authors_text: Tian Xie,Rajgopal Kannan,C. -C. Jay Kuo
title: Label Efficient Regularization and Propagation for Graph Node Classification
title_zh: 图节点分类的标签高效正则化和传播
abstract: An enhanced label propagation (LP) method called GraphHop was proposed recently. It outperforms graph convolutional networks (GCNs) in the semi-supervised node classification task on various networks. Although the performance of GraphHop was explained intuitively with joint node attribute and label signal smoothening, its rigorous mathematical treatment is lacking. In this paper, we propose a label efficient regularization and propagation (LERP) framework for graph node classification, and present an alternate optimization procedure for its solution. Furthermore, we show that GraphHop only offers an approximate solution to this framework and has two drawbacks. First, it includes all nodes in the classifier training without taking the reliability of pseudo-labeled nodes into account in the label update step. Second, it provides a rough approximation to the optimum of a subproblem in the label aggregation step. Based on the LERP framework, we propose a new method, named the LERP method, to solve these two shortcomings. LERP determines reliable pseudo-labels adaptively during the alternate optimization and provides a better approximation to the optimum with computational efficiency. Theoretical convergence of LERP is guaranteed. Extensive experiments are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of LERP. That is, LERP outperforms all benchmarking methods, including GraphHop, consistently on five test datasets and an object recognition task at extremely low label rates (i.e., 1, 2, 4, 8, 16, and 20 labeled samples per class).

Furthermore, we show that GraphHop only offers an approximate solution to this framework and has two drawbacks. First, it includes all nodes in the classifier training without taking the reliability of pseudo-labeled nodes into account in the label update step. Second, it provides a rough approximation to the optimum of a subproblem in the label aggregation step. Based on the LERP framework, we propose a new method, named the LERP method, to solve these two shortcomings. LERP determines reliable pseudo-labels adaptively during the alternate optimization and provides a better approximation to the optimum with computational efficiency. That is, LERP outperforms all benchmarking methods, including GraphHop, consistently on five test datasets and an object recognition task at extremely low label rates (i.e., 1, 2, 4, 8, 16, and 20 labeled samples per class).
abstract_zh: 最近提出了一种称为 GraphHop 的增强标签传播（LP）方法。它在各种网络上的半监督节点分类任务中优于图卷积网络（GCN）。虽然通过关节节点属性和标签信号平滑直观地解释了GraphHop的性能，但缺乏严格的数学处理。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于图节点分类的标签有效正则化和传播（LERP）框架，并为其解决方案提供了替代优化过程。此外，我们表明 GraphHop 只提供了该框架的近似解决方案，并且有两个缺点。首先，它包括分类器训练中的所有节点，而不在标签更新步骤中考虑伪标记节点的可靠性。其次，它提供了标签聚合步骤中子问题最优值的粗略近似。基于LERP框架，我们提出了一种新方法，称为LERP方法，来解决这两个缺点。 LERP 在交替优化过程中自适应地确定可靠的伪标签，并以计算效率提供更好的近似最优值。保证了LERP的理论收敛性。进行了大量的实验来证明 LERP 的有效性和效率。也就是说，LERP 在五个测试数据集和一个对象识别任务上以极低的标签率（即每类 1、2、4、8、16 和 20 个标记样本）始终优于所有基准测试方法，包括 GraphHop。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LERP的标签高效正则化与传播框架，用于改进图节点分类任务中的标签传播方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法GraphHop在数学严谨性和标签伪标记可靠性方面存在不足，导致分类效果受限。
AI.method: 构建LERP框架，通过交替优化实现伪标签自适应筛选与最优解逼近，解决GraphHop的两个缺陷。
AI.result: LERP在五个测试数据集和物体识别任务中，于极低标签率下（每类1-20个样本）持续优于包括GraphHop在内的所有基准方法。
AI.conclusion: LERP通过理论保证收敛性与计算效率，有效解决了标签传播中的可靠性与近似精度问题，显著提升分类性能。

search_text: Label Efficient Regularization and Propagation for Graph Node Classification 图节点分类的标签高效正则化和传播 An enhanced label propagation (LP) method called GraphHop was proposed recently. It outperforms graph convolutional networks (GCNs) in the semi-supervised node classification task on various networks. Although the performance of GraphHop was explained intuitively with joint node attribute and label signal smoothening, its rigorous mathematical treatment is lacking. In this paper, we propose a label efficient regularization and propagation (LERP) framework for graph node classification, and present an alternate optimization procedure for its solution. Furthermore, we show that GraphHop only offers an approximate solution to this framework and has two drawbacks. First, it includes all nodes in the classifier training without taking the reliability of pseudo-labeled nodes into account in the label update step. Second, it provides a rough approximation to the optimum of a subproblem in the label aggregation step. Based on the LERP framework, we propose a new method, named the LERP method, to solve these two shortcomings. LERP determines reliable pseudo-labels adaptively during the alternate optimization and provides a better approximation to the optimum with computational efficiency. Theoretical convergence of LERP is guaranteed. Extensive experiments are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of LERP. That is, LERP outperforms all benchmarking methods, including GraphHop, consistently on five test datasets and an object recognition task at extremely low label rates (i.e., 1, 2, 4, 8, 16, and 20 labeled samples per class). 最近提出了一种称为 GraphHop 的增强标签传播（LP）方法。它在各种网络上的半监督节点分类任务中优于图卷积网络（GCN）。虽然通过关节节点属性和标签信号平滑直观地解释了GraphHop的性能，但缺乏严格的数学处理。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于图节点分类的标签有效正则化和传播（LERP）框架，并为其解决方案提供了替代优化过程。此外，我们表明 GraphHop 只提供了该框架的近似解决方案，并且有两个缺点。首先，它包括分类器训练中的所有节点，而不在标签更新步骤中考虑伪标记节点的可靠性。其次，它提供了标签聚合步骤中子问题最优值的粗略近似。基于LERP框架，我们提出了一种新方法，称为LERP方法，来解决这两个缺点。 LERP 在交替优化过程中自适应地确定可靠的伪标签，并以计算效率提供更好的近似最优值。保证了LERP的理论收敛性。进行了大量的实验来证明 LERP 的有效性和效率。也就是说，LERP 在五个测试数据集和一个对象识别任务上以极低的标签率（即每类 1、2、4、8、16 和 20 个标记样本）始终优于所有基准测试方法，包括 GraphHop。 本文提出了一种名为LERP的标签高效正则化与传播框架，用于改进图节点分类任务中的标签传播方法。 Tian Xie,Rajgopal Kannan,C. -C. authors_text: C. Fanelli,A. Mahmood
title: Artificial Intelligence for Imaging Cherenkov Detectors at the EIC
title_zh: EIC 用于成像切伦科夫探测器的人工智能
abstract: Imaging Cherenkov detectors form the backbone of particle identification (PID) at the future Electron Ion Collider (EIC). Currently all the designs for the first EIC detector proposal use a dual Ring Imaging CHerenkov (dRICH) detector in the hadron endcap, a Detector for Internally Reflected Cherenkov (DIRC) light in the barrel, and a modular RICH (mRICH) in the electron endcap. These detectors involve optical processes with many photons that need to be tracked through complex surfaces at the simulation level, while for reconstruction they rely on pattern recognition of ring images. This proceeding summarizes ongoing efforts and possible applications of AI for imaging Cherenkov detectors at EIC. In particular we will provide the example of the dRICH for the AI-assisted design and of the DIRC for simulation and particle identification from complex patterns and discuss possible advantages of using AI.
summary: Imaging Cherenkov detectors form the backbone of particle identification (PID) at the future Electron Ion Collider (EIC). Currently all the designs for the first EIC detector proposal use a dual Ring Imaging CHerenkov (dRICH) detector in the hadron endcap, a Detector for Internally Reflected Cherenkov (DIRC) light in the barrel, and a modular RICH (mRICH) in the electron endcap. These detectors involve optical processes with many photons that need to be tracked through complex surfaces at the simulation level, while for reconstruction they rely on pattern recognition of ring images. This proceeding summarizes ongoing efforts and possible applications of AI for imaging Cherenkov detectors at EIC. In particular we will provide the example of the dRICH for the AI-assisted design and of the DIRC for simulation and particle identification from complex patterns and discuss possible advantages of using AI.
abstract_zh: 成像切伦科夫探测器构成了未来电子离子对撞机 (EIC) 粒子识别 (PID) 的支柱。目前，第一个 EIC 探测器提案的所有设计均在强子端盖中使用双环成像切伦科夫 (dRICH) 探测器，在镜筒中使用内反射切伦科夫 (DIRC) 光探测器，在电子端盖中使用模块化 RICH (mRICH)。这些探测器涉及许多光子的光学过程，需要在模拟水平上通过复杂的表面进行跟踪，而为了重建，它们依赖于环形图像的模式识别。本论文总结了 EIC 正在进行的人工智能在切伦科夫探测器成像方面的努力和可能的应用。特别是，我们将提供用于人工智能辅助设计的 dRICH 和用于从复杂图案中进行模拟和粒子识别的 DIRC 示例，并讨论使用人工智能的可能优势。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨人工智能在电子离子对撞机（EIC）成像切连科夫探测器中的应用，重点分析dRICH和DIRC探测器的AI辅助设计与数据处理方法。
AI.motivation: 现有EIC探测器设计依赖复杂光学过程模拟和环形图像模式识别，面临高精度粒子识别与数据处理的挑战，需借助AI提升效率与准确性。
AI.method: 通过AI技术优化dRICH探测器设计，并利用AI分析DIRC探测器的模拟数据与复杂光子模式，实现粒子识别。
AI.result: 展示了AI在探测器设计优化及粒子识别中的潜在优势，为后续研究提供方向。
AI.conclusion: AI技术可显著提升成像切连科夫探测器的性能与数据处理能力，未来需进一步验证其实际应用效果。

authors_text: Pranav Garg,Srinivasan Sengamedu SHS
title: Example-based Synthesis of Static Analysis Rules
title_zh: 基于实例的静态分析规则综合
abstract: Static Analysis tools have rules for several code quality issues and these rules are created by experts manually. In this paper, we address the problem of automatic synthesis of code quality rules from examples. We formulate the rule synthesis problem as synthesizing first order logic formulas over graph representations of code. We present a new synthesis algorithm RhoSynth that is based on Integer Linear Programming-based graph alignment for identifying code elements of interest to the rule. We bootstrap RhoSynth by leveraging code changes made by developers as the source of positive and negative examples. We also address rule refinement in which the rules are incrementally improved with additional user-provided examples. We validate RhoSynth by synthesizing more than 30 Java code quality rules. These rules have been deployed as part of a code review system in a company and their precision exceeds 75% based on developer feedback collected during live code-reviews. Through comparisons with recent baselines, we show that current state-of-the-art program synthesis approaches are unable to synthesize most of these rules.
summary: Static Analysis tools have rules for several code quality issues and these rules are created by experts manually. In this paper, we address the problem of automatic synthesis of code quality rules from examples. We formulate the rule synthesis problem as synthesizing first order logic formulas over graph representations of code. We present a new synthesis algorithm RhoSynth that is based on Integer Linear Programming-based graph alignment for identifying code elements of interest to the rule. We bootstrap RhoSynth by leveraging code changes made by developers as the source of positive and negative examples. We also address rule refinement in which the rules are incrementally improved with additional user-provided examples. We validate RhoSynth by synthesizing more than 30 Java code quality rules. These rules have been deployed as part of a code review system in a company and their precision exceeds 75% based on developer feedback collected during live code-reviews. Through comparisons with recent baselines, we show that current state-of-the-art program synthesis approaches are unable to synthesize most of these rules.
abstract_zh: 静态分析工具具有针对多个代码质量问题的规则，这些规则是由专家手动创建的。在本文中，我们解决了从示例中自动合成代码质量规则的问题。我们将规则综合问题表述为在代码的图形表示上综合一阶逻辑公式。我们提出了一种新的综合算法 RhoSynth，它基于基于整数线性规划的图形对齐，用于识别规则感兴趣的代码元素。我们通过利用开发人员所做的代码更改作为正面和负面示例的来源来引导 RhoSynth。我们还解决了规则细化问题，其中通过用户提供的其他示例逐步改进规则。我们通过综合 30 多个 Java 代码质量规则来验证 RhoSynth。这些规则已作为公司代码审查系统的一部分部署，根据实时代码审查期间收集的开发人员反馈，其精确度超过 75%。通过与最近的基线进行比较，我们表明当前最先进的程序综合方法无法综合大部分规则。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从代码示例中自动合成静态分析规则的方法，解决传统手动创建规则效率低的问题。
AI.motivation: 静态分析工具的规则依赖专家手动创建，耗时且难以覆盖所有代码质量场景，需自动化方法提升效率。
AI.method: 将规则合成转化为图表示上的一阶逻辑公式生成，提出基于整数线性规划的图对齐算法RhoSynth，并利用开发者代码修改作为正负样本进行规则迭代优化。
AI.result: 成功合成30+ Java规则，部署后精确度达75%以上，且优于当前最先进的程序合成方法。
AI.conclusion: RhoSynth能有效自动生成高精度静态分析规则，为代码质量检测提供自动化解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种从代码示例中自动合成静态分析规则的方法，解决传统手动创建规则效率低的问题。
ai_content.motivation: 静态分析工具的规则依赖专家手动创建，耗时且难以覆盖所有代码质量场景，需自动化方法提升效率。
ai_content.method: 将规则合成转化为图表示上的一阶逻辑公式生成，提出基于整数线性规划的图对齐算法RhoSynth，并利用开发者代码修改作为正负样本进行规则迭代优化。
ai_content.result: 成功合成30+ Java规则，部署后精确度达75%以上，且优于当前最先进的程序合成方法。
ai_content.conclusion: RhoSynth能有效自动生成高精度静态分析规则，为代码质量检测提供自动化解决方案。

search_text: Example-based Synthesis of Static Analysis Rules 基于实例的静态分析规则综合 Static Analysis tools have rules for several code quality issues and these rules are created by experts manually. In this paper, we address the problem of automatic synthesis of code quality rules from examples. We formulate the rule synthesis problem as synthesizing first order logic formulas over graph representations of code. We present a new synthesis algorithm RhoSynth that is based on Integer Linear Programming-based graph alignment for identifying code elements of interest to the rule. We bootstrap RhoSynth by leveraging code changes made by developers as the source of positive and negative examples. We also address rule refinement in which the rules are incrementally improved with additional user-provided examples. We validate RhoSynth by synthesizing more than 30 Java code quality rules. These rules have been deployed as part of a code review system in a company and their precision exceeds 75% based on developer feedback collected during live code-reviews. Through comparisons with recent baselines, we show that current state-of-the-art program synthesis approaches are unable to synthesize most of these rules. 静态分析工具具有针对多个代码质量问题的规则，这些规则是由专家手动创建的。在本文中，我们解决了从示例中自动合成代码质量规则的问题。我们将规则综合问题表述为在代码的图形表示上综合一阶逻辑公式。我们提出了一种新的综合算法 RhoSynth，它基于基于整数线性规划的图形对齐，用于识别规则感兴趣的代码元素。我们通过利用开发人员所做的代码更改作为正面和负面示例的来源来引导 RhoSynth。我们还解决了规则细化问题，其中通过用户提供的其他示例逐步改进规则。我们通过综合 30 多个 Java 代码质量规则来验证 RhoSynth。这些规则已作为公司代码审查系统的一部分部署，根据实时代码审查期间收集的开发人员反馈，其精确度超过 75%。通过与最近的基线进行比较，我们表明当前最先进的程序综合方法无法综合大部分规则。 本文提出一种从代码示例中自动合成静态分析规则的方法，解决传统手动创建规则效率低的问题。 Pranav Garg,Srinivasan Sengamedu SHS cs.SE,cs.AI,cs.LO,cs.PL

authors_text: Liqiao Yang,Yang Liu,Kit Ian Kou
title: Quaternion Optimized Model with Sparse Regularization for Color Image Recovery
title_zh: 用于彩色图像恢复的稀疏正则化四元数优化模型
abstract: This paper addresses the color image completion problem in accordance with low-rank quatenrion matrix optimization that is characterized by sparse regularization in a transformed domain. This research was inspired by an appreciation of the fact that different signal types, including audio formats and images, possess structures that are inherently sparse in respect of their respective bases. Since color images can be processed as a whole in the quaternion domain, we depicted the sparsity of the color image in the quaternion discrete cosine transform (QDCT) domain. In addition, the representation of a low-rank structure that is intrinsic to the color image is a vital issue in the quaternion matrix completion problem. To achieve a more superior low-rank approximation, the quatenrion-based truncated nuclear norm (QTNN) is employed in the proposed model. Moreover, this model is facilitated by a competent alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) based on the algorithm. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can yield vastly superior completion performance in comparison with the state-of-the-art low-rank matrix/quaternion matrix approximation methods tested on color image recovery.
summary: This paper addresses the color image completion problem in accordance with low-rank quatenrion matrix optimization that is characterized by sparse regularization in a transformed domain. This research was inspired by an appreciation of the fact that different signal types, including audio formats and images, possess structures that are inherently sparse in respect of their respective bases. Since color images can be processed as a whole in the quaternion domain, we depicted the sparsity of the color image in the quaternion discrete cosine transform (QDCT) domain. In addition, the representation of a low-rank structure that is intrinsic to the color image is a vital issue in the quaternion matrix completion problem. To achieve a more superior low-rank approximation, the quatenrion-based truncated nuclear norm (QTNN) is employed in the proposed model. Moreover, this model is facilitated by a competent alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) based on the algorithm. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can yield vastly superior completion performance in comparison with the state-of-the-art low-rank matrix/quaternion matrix approximation methods tested on color image recovery.
abstract_zh: 本文根据低秩四元数矩阵优化解决彩色图像补全问题，其特点是变换域中的稀疏正则化。这项研究的灵感来自于这样一个事实：不同的信号类型（包括音频格式和图像）拥有就其各自的基础而言本质上稀疏的结构。由于彩色图像可以在四元数域中作为一个整体进行处理，因此我们在四元数离散余弦变换（QDCT）域中描述了彩色图像的稀疏性。此外，彩色图像固有的低秩结构的表示是四元数矩阵补全问题中的一个重要问题。为了实现更优越的低秩近似，在所提出的模型中采用了基于四元数的截断核范数（QTNN）。此外，基于该算法的有效的乘法器交替方向法（ADMM）促进了该模型。大量的实验结果表明，与在彩色图像恢复上测试的最先进的低秩矩阵/四元数矩阵近似方法相比，所提出的方法可以产生极其优越的完成性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于四元数优化和稀疏正则化的彩色图像恢复模型，通过低秩四元数矩阵优化解决彩色图像补全问题。
AI.motivation: 受信号在特定基下具有稀疏特性的启发，利用四元数域处理彩色图像的整体性，结合稀疏正则化与低秩结构表示，提升图像恢复效果。
AI.method: 在四元数离散余弦变换（QDCT）域引入稀疏正则化，采用四元数截断核范数（QTNN）表征低秩结构，并通过改进的ADMM算法求解优化模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在彩色图像恢复任务中显著优于现有低秩矩阵/四元数矩阵逼近方法，具有更优的补全性能。
AI.conclusion: 结合QTNN与稀疏正则化的四元数优化模型能有效捕捉彩色图像的低秩与稀疏特性，为图像恢复提供新思路。

authors_text: Siddique Latif,Rajib Rana,Sara Khalifa,Raja Jurdak,Björn Schuller
title: Self Supervised Adversarial Domain Adaptation for Cross-Corpus and Cross-Language Speech Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 用于跨语料库和跨语言语音情感识别的自监督对抗域适应
comment: Accepted in IEEE Transactions on Affective Computing
comments: Accepted in IEEE Transactions on Affective Computing
abstract: Despite the recent advancement in speech emotion recognition (SER) within a single corpus setting, the performance of these SER systems degrades significantly for cross-corpus and cross-language scenarios. The key reason is the lack of generalisation in SER systems towards unseen conditions, which causes them to perform poorly in cross-corpus and cross-language settings. Recent studies focus on utilising adversarial methods to learn domain generalised representation for improving cross-corpus and cross-language SER to address this issue. However, many of these methods only focus on cross-corpus SER without addressing the cross-language SER performance degradation due to a larger domain gap between source and target language data. This contribution proposes an adversarial dual discriminator (ADDi) network that uses the three-players adversarial game to learn generalised representations without requiring any target data labels. We also introduce a self-supervised ADDi (sADDi) network that utilises self-supervised pre-training with unlabelled data. We propose synthetic data generation as a pretext task in sADDi, enabling the network to produce emotionally discriminative and domain invariant representations and providing complementary synthetic data to augment the system. The proposed model is rigorously evaluated using five publicly available datasets in three languages and compared with multiple studies on cross-corpus and cross-language SER. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model achieves improved performance compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Despite the recent advancement in speech emotion recognition (SER) within a single corpus setting, the performance of these SER systems degrades significantly for cross-corpus and cross-language scenarios. The key reason is the lack of generalisation in SER systems towards unseen conditions, which causes them to perform poorly in cross-corpus and cross-language settings. Recent studies focus on utilising adversarial methods to learn domain generalised representation for improving cross-corpus and cross-language SER to address this issue. However, many of these methods only focus on cross-corpus SER without addressing the cross-language SER performance degradation due to a larger domain gap between source and target language data. This contribution proposes an adversarial dual discriminator (ADDi) network that uses the three-players adversarial game to learn generalised representations without requiring any target data labels. We also introduce a self-supervised ADDi (sADDi) network that utilises self-supervised pre-training with unlabelled data. We propose synthetic data generation as a pretext task in sADDi, enabling the network to produce emotionally discriminative and domain invariant representations and providing complementary synthetic data to augment the system. The proposed model is rigorously evaluated using five publicly available datasets in three languages and compared with multiple studies on cross-corpus and cross-language SER. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model achieves improved performance compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近在单一语料库环境中的语音情感识别 (SER) 取得了进展，但这些 SER 系统的性能在跨语料库和跨语言场景中显着下降。关键原因是SER系统缺乏对未见条件的泛化，这导致它们在跨语料库和跨语言设置中表现不佳。最近的研究重点是利用对抗性方法来学习领域广义表示，以改进跨语料库和跨语言 SER 来解决这个问题。然而，这些方法中的许多方法仅关注跨语料库 SER，而没有解决由于源语言数据和目标语言数据之间较大的域差距而导致的跨语言 SER 性能下降的问题。该贡献提出了一种对抗性双重判别器（ADDi）网络，该网络使用三人对抗游戏来学习广义表示，而不需要任何目标数据标签。我们还引入了一种自监督 ADDi (sADDi) 网络，该网络利用未标记数据的自监督预训练。我们建议合成数据生成作为 sADDi 中的借口任务，使网络能够产生情感区分和领域不变的表示，并提供补充的合成数据来增强系统。使用三种语言的五个公开数据集对所提出的模型进行了严格评估，并与跨语料库和跨语言 SER 的多项研究进行了比较。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的模型取得了改进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督对抗领域自适应方法，用于解决跨语料库和跨语言语音情感识别（SER）中的性能退化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有SER系统在跨语料库和跨语言场景下表现不佳，主要由于领域差异导致的泛化能力不足，而现有方法多集中于跨语料库适应，未有效解决跨语言适应问题。
AI.method: 提出对抗双判别器（ADDi）网络，通过三玩家对抗博弈学习领域不变表示；进一步引入自监督预训练的sADDi网络，利用合成数据生成作为预训练任务增强模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 在三个语言的五个公开数据集上实验表明，该方法在跨语料库和跨语言SER任务中均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过自监督对抗领域自适应，有效缓解了跨语料库和跨语言场景下的SER性能退化问题，为领域泛化提供了新思路。

result: 在三个语言的五个公开数据集上实验表明，该方法在跨语料库和跨语言SER任务中均优于现有最先进方法。
conclusion: 通过自监督对抗领域自适应，有效缓解了跨语料库和跨语言场景下的SER性能退化问题，为领域泛化提供了新思路。
search_text: Self Supervised Adversarial Domain Adaptation for Cross-Corpus and Cross-Language Speech Emotion Recognition 用于跨语料库和跨语言语音情感识别的自监督对抗域适应 Despite the recent advancement in speech emotion recognition (SER) within a single corpus setting, the performance of these SER systems degrades significantly for cross-corpus and cross-language scenarios. The key reason is the lack of generalisation in SER systems towards unseen conditions, which causes them to perform poorly in cross-corpus and cross-language settings. Recent studies focus on utilising adversarial methods to learn domain generalised representation for improving cross-corpus and cross-language SER to address this issue. However, many of these methods only focus on cross-corpus SER without addressing the cross-language SER performance degradation due to a larger domain gap between source and target language data. This contribution proposes an adversarial dual discriminator (ADDi) network that uses the three-players adversarial game to learn generalised representations without requiring any target data labels. We also introduce a self-supervised ADDi (sADDi) network that utilises self-supervised pre-training with unlabelled data. We propose synthetic data generation as a pretext task in sADDi, enabling the network to produce emotionally discriminative and domain invariant representations and providing complementary synthetic data to augment the system. The proposed model is rigorously evaluated using five publicly available datasets in three languages and compared with multiple studies on cross-corpus and cross-language SER. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model achieves improved performance compared to the state-of-the-art methods. 尽管最近在单一语料库环境中的语音情感识别 (SER) 取得了进展，但这些 SER 系统的性能在跨语料库和跨语言场景中显着下降。关键原因是SER系统缺乏对未见条件的泛化，这导致它们在跨语料库和跨语言设置中表现不佳。最近的研究重点是利用对抗性方法来学习领域广义表示，以改进跨语料库和跨语言 SER 来解决这个问题。然而，这些方法中的许多方法仅关注跨语料库 SER，而没有解决由于源语言数据和目标语言数据之间较大的域差距而导致的跨语言 SER 性能下降的问题。该贡献提出了一种对抗性双重判别器（ADDi）网络，该网络使用三人对抗游戏来学习广义表示，而不需要任何目标数据标签。我们还引入了一种自监督 ADDi (sADDi) 网络，该网络利用未标记数据的自监督预训练。我们建议合成数据生成作为 sADDi 中的借口任务，使网络能够产生情感区分和领域不变的表示，并提供补充的合成数据来增强系统。使用三种语言的五个公开数据集对所提出的模型进行了严格评估，并与跨语料库和跨语言 SER 的多项研究进行了比较。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的模型取得了改进的性能。 本文提出了一种自监督对抗领域自适应方法，用于解决跨语料库和跨语言语音情感识别（SER）中的性能退化问题。 Siddique Latif,Rajib Rana,Sara Khalifa,Raja Jurdak,Björn Schuller cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: German Magai,Anton Ayzenberg
title: Topology and geometry of data manifold in deep learning
title_zh: 深度学习中数据流形的拓扑和几何
abstract: Despite significant advances in the field of deep learning in applications to various fields, explaining the inner processes of deep learning models remains an important and open question. The purpose of this article is to describe and substantiate the geometric and topological view of the learning process of neural networks. Our attention is focused on the internal representation of neural networks and on the dynamics of changes in the topology and geometry of the data manifold on different layers. We also propose a method for assessing the generalizing ability of neural networks based on topological descriptors. In this paper, we use the concepts of topological data analysis and intrinsic dimension, and we present a wide range of experiments on different datasets and different configurations of convolutional neural network architectures. In addition, we consider the issue of the geometry of adversarial attacks in the classification task and spoofing attacks on face recognition systems. Our work is a contribution to the development of an important area of explainable and interpretable AI through the example of computer vision.
summary: Despite significant advances in the field of deep learning in applications to various fields, explaining the inner processes of deep learning models remains an important and open question. The purpose of this article is to describe and substantiate the geometric and topological view of the learning process of neural networks. Our attention is focused on the internal representation of neural networks and on the dynamics of changes in the topology and geometry of the data manifold on different layers. We also propose a method for assessing the generalizing ability of neural networks based on topological descriptors. In this paper, we use the concepts of topological data analysis and intrinsic dimension, and we present a wide range of experiments on different datasets and different configurations of convolutional neural network architectures. In addition, we consider the issue of the geometry of adversarial attacks in the classification task and spoofing attacks on face recognition systems. Our work is a contribution to the development of an important area of explainable and interpretable AI through the example of computer vision.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度学习在各个领域的应用领域取得了重大进展，但解释深度学习模型的内部过程仍然是一个重要且悬而未决的问题。本文的目的是描述和证实神经网络学习过程的几何和拓扑视图。我们的注意力集中在神经网络的内部表示以及不同层上数据流形的拓扑和几何变化的动态上。我们还提出了一种基于拓扑描述符评估神经网络泛化能力的方法。在本文中，我们使用拓扑数据分析和内在维度的概念，并对不同数据集和卷积神经网络架构的不同配置进行了广泛的实验。此外，我们还考虑了分类任务中对抗性攻击的几何问题以及人脸识别系统上的欺骗攻击。我们的工作通过计算机视觉的例子为可解释和可解释的人工智能重要领域的发展做出了贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文从几何和拓扑角度分析深度学习中数据流形的特性，并提出基于拓扑描述符的神经网络泛化能力评估方法。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型的内部运作机制尚不明确，需通过几何与拓扑视角提升模型可解释性并解决对抗攻击等问题。
AI.method: 结合拓扑数据分析与内在维度理论，通过多数据集与CNN架构实验验证方法，并分析对抗攻击的几何特性。
AI.result: 提出有效评估神经网络泛化能力的拓扑方法，实验验证其可行性，并揭示对抗攻击与人脸识别欺骗攻击的几何规律。
AI.conclusion: 通过几何拓扑分析推动可解释AI发展，为计算机视觉领域提供新的理论工具与实践方向。

authors_text: Mirazul Haque,Christof J. Budnik,Wei Yang
title: CorrGAN: Input Transformation Technique Against Natural Corruptions
title_zh: CorrGAN：针对自然损坏的输入转换技术
abstract: Because of the increasing accuracy of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) on different tasks, a lot of real times systems are utilizing DNNs. These DNNs are vulnerable to adversarial perturbations and corruptions. Specifically, natural corruptions like fog, blur, contrast etc can affect the prediction of DNN in an autonomous vehicle. In real time, these corruptions are needed to be detected and also the corrupted inputs are needed to be de-noised to be predicted correctly. In this work, we propose CorrGAN approach, which can generate benign input when a corrupted input is provided. In this framework, we train Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) with novel intermediate output-based loss function. The GAN can denoise the corrupted input and generate benign input. Through experimentation, we show that up to 75.2% of the corrupted misclassified inputs can be classified correctly by DNN using CorrGAN.
summary: Because of the increasing accuracy of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) on different tasks, a lot of real times systems are utilizing DNNs. These DNNs are vulnerable to adversarial perturbations and corruptions. Specifically, natural corruptions like fog, blur, contrast etc can affect the prediction of DNN in an autonomous vehicle. In real time, these corruptions are needed to be detected and also the corrupted inputs are needed to be de-noised to be predicted correctly. In this work, we propose CorrGAN approach, which can generate benign input when a corrupted input is provided. In this framework, we train Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) with novel intermediate output-based loss function. The GAN can denoise the corrupted input and generate benign input. Through experimentation, we show that up to 75.2% of the corrupted misclassified inputs can be classified correctly by DNN using CorrGAN.
abstract_zh: 由于深度神经网络 (DNN) 在不同任务上的准确性不断提高，许多实时系统都在利用 DNN。这些 DNN 很容易受到对抗性扰动和腐败的影响。具体来说，雾、模糊、对比度等自然损坏可能会影响自动驾驶车辆中 DNN 的预测。需要实时检测这些损坏，并且需要对损坏的输入进行去噪才能正确预测。在这项工作中，我们提出了 CorrGAN 方法，该方法可以在提供损坏的输入时生成良性输入。在此框架中，我们使用新颖的基于中间输出的损失函数来训练生成对抗网络（GAN）。 GAN 可以对损坏的输入进行去噪并生成良性输入。通过实验，我们表明，使用 CorrGAN 的 DNN 可以正确分类高达 75.2% 的损坏错误分类输入。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CorrGAN的输入转换技术，用于应对自然损坏，通过生成良性输入以提高深度神经网络（DNN）在损坏数据下的预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在实际应用中易受自然损坏（如雾、模糊等）影响，导致预测错误，需有效方法检测并修复损坏输入。
AI.method: 设计基于中间输出的损失函数训练生成对抗网络（GAN），使其能够对损坏输入进行去噪并生成良性输入。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用CorrGAN后，75.2%的原本因损坏而被错误分类的输入得以正确分类。
AI.conclusion: CorrGAN有效提升了DNN在自然损坏输入下的鲁棒性，为实时系统中的损坏处理提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Jongmin Lee,Byungjin Kim,Minsu Cho
title: Self-Supervised Equivariant Learning for Oriented Keypoint Detection
title_zh: 用于定向关键点检测的自监督等变学习
comment: CVPR 2022 accepted paper, Project page: http://cvlab.postech.ac.kr/research/REKD/
comments: CVPR 2022 accepted paper, Project page: http://cvlab.postech.ac.kr/research/REKD/
abstract: Detecting robust keypoints from an image is an integral part of many computer vision problems, and the characteristic orientation and scale of keypoints play an important role for keypoint description and matching. Existing learning-based methods for keypoint detection rely on standard translation-equivariant CNNs but often fail to detect reliable keypoints against geometric variations. To learn to detect robust oriented keypoints, we introduce a self-supervised learning framework using rotation-equivariant CNNs. We propose a dense orientation alignment loss by an image pair generated by synthetic transformations for training a histogram-based orientation map. Our method outperforms the previous methods on an image matching benchmark and a camera pose estimation benchmark.
summary: Detecting robust keypoints from an image is an integral part of many computer vision problems, and the characteristic orientation and scale of keypoints play an important role for keypoint description and matching. Existing learning-based methods for keypoint detection rely on standard translation-equivariant CNNs but often fail to detect reliable keypoints against geometric variations. To learn to detect robust oriented keypoints, we introduce a self-supervised learning framework using rotation-equivariant CNNs. We propose a dense orientation alignment loss by an image pair generated by synthetic transformations for training a histogram-based orientation map. Our method outperforms the previous methods on an image matching benchmark and a camera pose estimation benchmark.
abstract_zh: 从图像中检测鲁棒关键点是许多计算机视觉问题不可或缺的一部分，关键点的特征方向和尺度对于关键点描述和匹配起着重要作用。现有的基于学习的关键点检测方法依赖于标准平移等变 CNN，但通常无法针对几何变化检测可靠的关键点。为了学习检测稳健的关键点，我们引入了使用旋转等变 CNN 的自监督学习框架。我们提出了通过合成变换生成的图像对来进行密集方向对齐损失，以训练基于直方图的方向图。我们的方法在图像匹配基准和相机姿态估计基准上优于以前的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种自监督等变学习框架，用于检测具有方向性的鲁棒关键点
AI.motivation: 现有关键点检测方法依赖平移等变CNN，在几何变换下难以检测可靠关键点，需提升方向与尺度鲁棒性
AI.method: 构建旋转等变CNN框架，设计密集方向对齐损失函数，利用合成变换图像对训练直方图方向图
AI.result: 在图像匹配和相机位姿估计基准测试中均优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: 自监督等变学习有效提升了方向关键点检测的几何鲁棒性

search_text: Self-Supervised Equivariant Learning for Oriented Keypoint Detection 用于定向关键点检测的自监督等变学习 Detecting robust keypoints from an image is an integral part of many computer vision problems, and the characteristic orientation and scale of keypoints play an important role for keypoint description and matching. Existing learning-based methods for keypoint detection rely on standard translation-equivariant CNNs but often fail to detect reliable keypoints against geometric variations. To learn to detect robust oriented keypoints, we introduce a self-supervised learning framework using rotation-equivariant CNNs. We propose a dense orientation alignment loss by an image pair generated by synthetic transformations for training a histogram-based orientation map. Our method outperforms the previous methods on an image matching benchmark and a camera pose estimation benchmark. 从图像中检测鲁棒关键点是许多计算机视觉问题不可或缺的一部分，关键点的特征方向和尺度对于关键点描述和匹配起着重要作用。现有的基于学习的关键点检测方法依赖于标准平移等变 CNN，但通常无法针对几何变化检测可靠的关键点。为了学习检测稳健的关键点，我们引入了使用旋转等变 CNN 的自监督学习框架。我们提出了通过合成变换生成的图像对来进行密集方向对齐损失，以训练基于直方图的方向图。我们的方法在图像匹配基准和相机姿态估计基准上优于以前的方法。 提出一种自监督等变学习框架，用于检测具有方向性的鲁棒关键点 Jongmin Lee,Byungjin Kim,Minsu Cho cs.CV

authors_text: Nyee Thoang Lim,Meng Yi Kuan,Muxin Pu,Mei Kuan Lim,Chun Yong Chong
title: Metamorphic Testing-based Adversarial Attack to Fool Deepfake Detectors
title_zh: 基于变形测试的对抗性攻击来欺骗 Deepfake 探测器
comment: paper accepted at 26TH International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR2022)
comments: paper accepted at 26TH International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR2022)
abstract: Deepfakes utilise Artificial Intelligence (AI) techniques to create synthetic media where the likeness of one person is replaced with another. There are growing concerns that deepfakes can be maliciously used to create misleading and harmful digital contents. As deepfakes become more common, there is a dire need for deepfake detection technology to help spot deepfake media. Present deepfake detection models are able to achieve outstanding accuracy (>90%). However, most of them are limited to within-dataset scenario, where the same dataset is used for training and testing. Most models do not generalise well enough in cross-dataset scenario, where models are tested on unseen datasets from another source. Furthermore, state-of-the-art deepfake detection models rely on neural network-based classification models that are known to be vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Motivated by the need for a robust deepfake detection model, this study adapts metamorphic testing (MT) principles to help identify potential factors that could influence the robustness of the examined model, while overcoming the test oracle problem in this domain. Metamorphic testing is specifically chosen as the testing technique as it fits our demand to address learning-based system testing with probabilistic outcomes from largely black-box components, based on potentially large input domains. We performed our evaluations on MesoInception-4 and TwoStreamNet models, which are the state-of-the-art deepfake detection models. This study identified makeup application as an adversarial attack that could fool deepfake detectors. Our experimental results demonstrate that both the MesoInception-4 and TwoStreamNet models degrade in their performance by up to 30\% when the input data is perturbed with makeup.

There are growing concerns that deepfakes can be maliciously used to create misleading and harmful digital contents. As deepfakes become more common, there is a dire need for deepfake detection technology to help spot deepfake media. Present deepfake detection models are able to achieve outstanding accuracy (>90%). However, most of them are limited to within-dataset scenario, where the same dataset is used for training and testing. Most models do not generalise well enough in cross-dataset scenario, where models are tested on unseen datasets from another source. Furthermore, state-of-the-art deepfake detection models rely on neural network-based classification models that are known to be vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Motivated by the need for a robust deepfake detection model, this study adapts metamorphic testing (MT) principles to help identify potential factors that could influence the robustness of the examined model, while overcoming the test oracle problem in this domain. Metamorphic testing is specifically chosen as the testing technique as it fits our demand to address learning-based system testing with probabilistic outcomes from largely black-box components, based on potentially large input domains. We performed our evaluations on MesoInception-4 and TwoStreamNet models, which are the state-of-the-art deepfake detection models. This study identified makeup application as an adversarial attack that could fool deepfake detectors. Our experimental results demonstrate that both the MesoInception-4 and TwoStreamNet models degrade in their performance by up to 30\% when the input data is perturbed with makeup.
abstract_zh: Deepfakes 利用人工智能 (AI) 技术创建合成媒体，其中一个人的肖像被另一个人取代。人们越来越担心深度伪造可能被恶意用来创建误导性和有害的数字内容。随着深度伪造变得越来越普遍，迫切需要深度伪造检测技术来帮助发现深度伪造媒体。目前的 Deepfake 检测模型能够实现出色的准确率（>90%）。然而，它们大多数仅限于数据集内场景，即使用相同的数据集进行训练和测试。大多数模型在跨数据集场景中泛化得不够好，在跨数据集场景中，模型是在来自其他来源的未见过的数据集上进行测试的。此外，最先进的深度伪造检测模型依赖于基于神经网络的分类模型，这些模型容易受到对抗性攻击。出于对稳健的深度伪造检测模型的需求，本研究采用变质测试（MT）原理来帮助识别可能影响所检查模型稳健性的潜在因素，同时克服该领域的测试预言机问题。变质测试被特别选择作为测试技术，因为它符合我们的需求，即基于潜在的大输入域，使用来自大部分黑盒组件的概率结果来解决基于学习的系统测试。我们对 MesoInception-4 和 TwoStreamNet 模型进行了评估，它们是最先进的 Deepfake 检测模型。这项研究将化妆应用确定为一种对抗性攻击，可以欺骗深度伪造探测器。我们的实验结果表明，当输入数据受到化妆干扰时，MesoInception-4 和 TwoStreamNet 模型的性能都会下降高达 30%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于形态测试的对抗攻击方法，旨在通过添加化妆等扰动使深度伪造检测模型失效。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测模型在跨数据集场景下泛化能力不足，且易受对抗攻击影响，需提升检测鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用形态测试技术，通过设计化妆等输入扰动作为对抗样本，测试并分析模型性能下降的潜在因素。
AI.result: 实验表明，MesoInception-4和TwoStreamNet模型在化妆扰动下性能最大下降30%。
AI.conclusion: 形态测试能有效暴露深度伪造检测模型的脆弱性，为提升模型鲁棒性提供新思路。

authors_text: Suorong Yang,Weikang Xiao,Mengchen Zhang,Suhan Guo,Jian Zhao,Furao Shen
title: Image Data Augmentation for Deep Learning: A Survey
title_zh: 用于深度学习的图像数据增强：一项调查
abstract: Deep learning has achieved remarkable results in many computer vision tasks. Deep neural networks typically rely on large amounts of training data to avoid overfitting. However, labeled data for real-world applications may be limited. By improving the quantity and diversity of training data, data augmentation has become an inevitable part of deep learning model training with image data. As an effective way to improve the sufficiency and diversity of training data, data augmentation has become a necessary part of successful application of deep learning models on image data. In this paper, we systematically review different image data augmentation methods. We propose a taxonomy of reviewed methods and present the strengths and limitations of these methods. We also conduct extensive experiments with various data augmentation methods on three typical computer vision tasks, including semantic segmentation, image classification and object detection. Finally, we discuss current challenges faced by data augmentation and future research directions to put forward some useful research guidance.
summary: Deep learning has achieved remarkable results in many computer vision tasks. Deep neural networks typically rely on large amounts of training data to avoid overfitting. However, labeled data for real-world applications may be limited. By improving the quantity and diversity of training data, data augmentation has become an inevitable part of deep learning model training with image data. As an effective way to improve the sufficiency and diversity of training data, data augmentation has become a necessary part of successful application of deep learning models on image data. In this paper, we systematically review different image data augmentation methods. We propose a taxonomy of reviewed methods and present the strengths and limitations of these methods. We also conduct extensive experiments with various data augmentation methods on three typical computer vision tasks, including semantic segmentation, image classification and object detection. Finally, we discuss current challenges faced by data augmentation and future research directions to put forward some useful research guidance.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在许多计算机视觉任务中取得了显着的成果。深度神经网络通常依赖大量的训练数据来避免过度拟合。然而，现实世界应用的标记数据可能是有限的。通过提高训练数据的数量和多样性，数据增强已成为图像数据深度学习模型训练的必然组成部分。数据增强作为提高训练数据充分性和多样性的有效方法，已成为深度学习模型在图像数据上成功应用的必要组成部分。在本文中，我们系统地回顾了不同的图像数据增强方法。我们提出了审查方法的分类法，并介绍了这些方法的优点和局限性。我们还在三种典型的计算机视觉任务上使用各种数据增强方法进行了广泛的实验，包括语义分割、图像分类和对象检测。最后，我们讨论了数据增强当前面临的挑战和未来的研究方向，以提出一些有用的研究指导。

AI.tldr: 系统综述图像数据增强方法，分析其优缺点并探讨未来方向
AI.motivation: 深度学习依赖大量数据，但实际应用中标签数据有限，数据增强能提高数据多样性和数量，成为必要步骤
AI.method: 提出数据增强方法的分类法，总结优缺点，并在语义分割、图像分类和目标检测任务中进行实验验证
AI.result: 实验验证了不同数据增强方法在典型任务中的效果，发现其对模型性能的提升作用
AI.conclusion: 指出数据增强面临的挑战，如自动化和适应性，并提出未来研究方向，如动态增强策略和跨领域应用

In this paper, we systematically review different image data augmentation methods. We propose a taxonomy of reviewed methods and present the strengths and limitations of these methods. We also conduct extensive experiments with various data augmentation methods on three typical computer vision tasks, including semantic segmentation, image classification and object detection. Finally, we discuss current challenges faced by data augmentation and future research directions to put forward some useful research guidance. 深度学习在许多计算机视觉任务中取得了显着的成果。深度神经网络通常依赖大量的训练数据来避免过度拟合。然而，现实世界应用的标记数据可能是有限的。通过提高训练数据的数量和多样性，数据增强已成为图像数据深度学习模型训练的必然组成部分。数据增强作为提高训练数据充分性和多样性的有效方法，已成为深度学习模型在图像数据上成功应用的必要组成部分。在本文中，我们系统地回顾了不同的图像数据增强方法。我们提出了审查方法的分类法，并介绍了这些方法的优点和局限性。我们还在三种典型的计算机视觉任务上使用各种数据增强方法进行了广泛的实验，包括语义分割、图像分类和对象检测。最后，我们讨论了数据增强当前面临的挑战和未来的研究方向，以提出一些有用的研究指导。 系统综述图像数据增强方法，分析其优缺点并探讨未来方向 Suorong Yang,Weikang Xiao,Mengchen Zhang,Suhan Guo,Jian Zhao,Furao Shen cs.CV

authors_text: Bilal Alsallakh,Pamela Bhattacharya,Vanessa Feng,Narine Kokhlikyan,Orion Reblitz-Richardson,Rahul Rajan,David Yan
title: A Tour of Visualization Techniques for Computer Vision Datasets
title_zh: 计算机视觉数据集可视化技术概览
abstract: We survey a number of data visualization techniques for analyzing Computer Vision (CV) datasets. These techniques help us understand properties and latent patterns in such data, by applying dataset-level analysis. We present various examples of how such analysis helps predict the potential impact of the dataset properties on CV models and informs appropriate mitigation of their shortcomings. Finally, we explore avenues for further visualization techniques of different modalities of CV datasets as well as ones that are tailored to support specific CV tasks and analysis needs.
summary: We survey a number of data visualization techniques for analyzing Computer Vision (CV) datasets. These techniques help us understand properties and latent patterns in such data, by applying dataset-level analysis. We present various examples of how such analysis helps predict the potential impact of the dataset properties on CV models and informs appropriate mitigation of their shortcomings. Finally, we explore avenues for further visualization techniques of different modalities of CV datasets as well as ones that are tailored to support specific CV tasks and analysis needs.
abstract_zh: 我们调查了许多用于分析计算机视觉 (CV) 数据集的数据可视化技术。这些技术通过应用数据集级分析帮助我们了解此类数据的属性和潜在模式。我们提供了各种示例，说明此类分析如何帮助预测数据集属性对 CV 模型的潜在影响，并告知如何适当缓解其缺点。最后，我们探索了不同模式的 CV 数据集的进一步可视化技术的途径，以及为支持特定 CV 任务和分析需求而定制的技术。

AI.tldr: 综述并探讨用于分析计算机视觉数据集的可视化技术，以揭示数据属性及潜在模式
AI.motivation: 现有CV数据集的分析方法难以全面揭示数据特性，需通过可视化技术辅助模型优化与问题诊断
AI.method: 通过案例分析和数据集级可视化技术，展示数据属性对CV模型的影响及改进策略
AI.result: 展示了多种可视化技术如何预测数据集特性对模型的影响，并提出了多模态及任务定制化可视化的研究方向
AI.conclusion: 可视化技术是分析CV数据集的关键工具，未来需开发更适配多模态数据和任务需求的可视化方法

authors_text: Shuangyao Huang,Haibo Zhang,Zhiyi Huang
title: CoDe: A Cooperative and Decentralized Collision Avoidance Algorithm for Small-Scale UAV Swarms Considering Energy Efficiency
title_zh: CoDe：一种考虑能源效率的小型无人机群协作、分散避碰算法
abstract: This paper introduces a cooperative and decentralized collision avoidance algorithm (CoDe) for small-scale UAV swarms consisting of up to three UAVs. CoDe improves energy efficiency of UAVs by achieving effective cooperation among UAVs. Moreover, CoDe is specifically tailored for UAV's operations by addressing the challenges faced by existing schemes, such as ineffectiveness in selecting actions from continuous action spaces and high computational complexity. CoDe is based on Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL), and finds cooperative policies by incorporating a novel credit assignment scheme. The novel credit assignment scheme estimates the contribution of an individual by subtracting a baseline from the joint action value for the swarm. The credit assignment scheme in CoDe outperforms other benchmarks as the baseline takes into account not only the importance of a UAV's action but also the interrelation between UAVs. Furthermore, extensive experiments are conducted against existing MARL-based and conventional heuristic-based algorithms to demonstrate the advantages of the proposed algorithm.
summary: This paper introduces a cooperative and decentralized collision avoidance algorithm (CoDe) for small-scale UAV swarms consisting of up to three UAVs. CoDe improves energy efficiency of UAVs by achieving effective cooperation among UAVs. Moreover, CoDe is specifically tailored for UAV's operations by addressing the challenges faced by existing schemes, such as ineffectiveness in selecting actions from continuous action spaces and high computational complexity. CoDe is based on Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL), and finds cooperative policies by incorporating a novel credit assignment scheme. The novel credit assignment scheme estimates the contribution of an individual by subtracting a baseline from the joint action value for the swarm. The credit assignment scheme in CoDe outperforms other benchmarks as the baseline takes into account not only the importance of a UAV's action but also the interrelation between UAVs. Furthermore, extensive experiments are conducted against existing MARL-based and conventional heuristic-based algorithms to demonstrate the advantages of the proposed algorithm.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种适用于最多由三架无人机组成的小型无人机群的协作式分散碰撞避免算法（CoDe）。 CoDe通过实现无人机之间的有效协作，提高无人机的能源效率。此外，CoDe专门针对无人机的操作而定制，解决了现有方案所面临的挑战，例如从连续动作空间中选择动作的效率低下以及计算复杂度高等。 CoDe 基于多智能体强化学习（MARL），并通过结合新颖的信用分配方案来寻找合作策略。新颖的信用分配方案通过从群体的联合行动值中减去基线来估计个体的贡献。 CoDe 中的信用分配方案优于其他基准，因为基线不仅考虑了无人机行动的重要性，还考虑了无人机之间的相互关系。此外，针对现有的基于 MARL 的算法和传统的基于启发式的算法进行了大量的实验，以证明该算法的优点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CoDe的协作与去中心化避撞算法，针对小型无人机群（最多三架无人机），旨在提升能源效率并解决现有方案在连续动作空间选择和计算复杂度方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机群避撞算法存在动作选择无效、计算复杂度高及难以适应无人机特有操作需求的问题，亟需一种兼顾协作性与能源效率的改进方案。
AI.method: 基于多智能体强化学习（MARL），设计新型信用分配机制，通过从群体联合动作值中减去基线值来评估个体贡献，基线综合考虑无人机动作重要性及相互关系。
AI.result: 实验表明，CoDe在避撞性能和能源效率上优于现有MARL及传统启发式算法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: CoDe通过协作策略与改进的信用分配机制，有效提升了小型无人机群的避撞能力与能源效率，为相关领域提供了新思路。

authors_text: Eng Lieh Ouh,Benjamin Kok Siew Gan,David Lo
title: ITSS: Interactive Web-Based Authoring and Playback Integrated Environment for Programming Tutorials
title_zh: ITSS：基于 Web 的交互式编程教程创作和回放集成环境
abstract: Video-based programming tutorials are a popular form of tutorial used by authors to guide learners to code. Still, the interactivity of these videos is limited primarily to control video flow. There are existing works with increased interactivity that are shown to improve the learning experience. Still, these solutions require setting up a custom recording environment and are not well-integrated with the playback environment. This paper describes our integrated ITSS environment and evaluates the ease of authoring and playback of our interactive programming tutorials. Our environment is designed to run within the browser sandbox and is less intrusive to record interactivity actions. We develop a recording approach that tracks the author's interactivity actions (e.g., typing code, highlighting words, scrolling panels) on the browser and stored in text and audio formats. We replay these actions using the recorded artefacts for learners to have a more interactive, integrated and realistic playback of the author's actions instead of watching video frames. Our design goals are 1) efficient recording and playback, 2) extensible interactivity features to help students learn better, and 3) a scalable web-based environment. Our first user study of 20 participants who carry out the author tasks agree that it is efficient and easy to author interactive videos in our environment with no additional software needed. Our second user study of 84 students using the environment agrees that the increased interactivity can help them learn better over a video-based tutorial. Our performance test shows that the environment can scale to support up to 500 concurrent users. We hope our open-source environment enable more educators to create interactive programming tutorials.
summary: Video-based programming tutorials are a popular form of tutorial used by authors to guide learners to code. Still, the interactivity of these videos is limited primarily to control video flow. There are existing works with increased interactivity that are shown to improve the learning experience. Still, these solutions require setting up a custom recording environment and are not well-integrated with the playback environment. This paper describes our integrated ITSS environment and evaluates the ease of authoring and playback of our interactive programming tutorials. Our environment is designed to run within the browser sandbox and is less intrusive to record interactivity actions. We develop a recording approach that tracks the author's interactivity actions (e.g., typing code, highlighting words, scrolling panels) on the browser and stored in text and audio formats. We replay these actions using the recorded artefacts for learners to have a more interactive, integrated and realistic playback of the author's actions instead of watching video frames. Our design goals are 1) efficient recording and playback, 2) extensible interactivity features to help students learn better, and 3) a scalable web-based environment. Our first user study of 20 participants who carry out the author tasks agree that it is efficient and easy to author interactive videos in our environment with no additional software needed. Our second user study of 84 students using the environment agrees that the increased interactivity can help them learn better over a video-based tutorial. Our performance test shows that the environment can scale to support up to 500 concurrent users. We hope our open-source environment enable more educators to create interactive programming tutorials.
abstract_zh: 基于视频的编程教程是作者用来指导学习者编码的一种流行的教程形式。尽管如此，这些视频的交互性主要限于控制视频流。现有的一些具有增强交互性的作品被证明可以改善学习体验。不过，这些解决方案需要设置自定义录制环境，并且与播放环境没有很好地集成。本文描述了我们的集成 ITSS 环境，并评估了我们的交互式编程教程的创作和回放的难易程度。我们的环境设计为在浏览器沙箱内运行，并且记录交互操作的侵入性较小。我们开发了一种记录方法，可以跟踪作者在浏览器上的交互操作（例如，键入代码、突出显示单词、滚动面板）并以文本和音频格式存储。我们使用录制的人工制品重播这些动作，以便学习者能够更加互动、集成和真实地回放作者的动作，而不是观看视频帧。我们的设计目标是 1) 高效的录制和回放，2) 可扩展的交互功能，帮助学生更好地学习，3) 可扩展的基于网络的环境。我们对 20 名执行创作任务的参与者进行的首次用户研究一致认为，在我们的环境中创作交互式视频非常高效且轻松，无需额外的软件。我们对使用该环境的 84 名学生进行的第二次用户研究一致认为，增加的交互性可以帮助他们通过基于视频的教程更好地学习。我们的性能测试表明，该环境可以扩展以支持最多 500 个并发用户。我们希望我们的开源环境能够让更多的教育工作者创建交互式编程教程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于浏览器的交互式编程教程创作与播放集成环境ITSS，旨在提升编程教学的互动性和易用性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频教程互动性不足，且高互动性方案需复杂环境且与播放端集成度低，限制了教学效果。
AI.method: 通过浏览器沙箱记录作者的代码输入、高亮、滚动等交互行为，并以文本和音频形式存储，实现更自然的交互式回放。
AI.result: 20名作者认为系统高效易用，84名学生认为互动性提升学习效果，性能测试支持500人并发访问。
AI.conclusion: ITSS通过开源形式为教育者提供了一种高效、可扩展的交互式编程教程制作工具，有助于提升编程教学效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于浏览器的交互式编程教程创作与播放集成环境ITSS，旨在提升编程教学的互动性和易用性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有视频教程互动性不足，且高互动性方案需复杂环境且与播放端集成度低，限制了教学效果。
ai_content.method: 通过浏览器沙箱记录作者的代码输入、高亮、滚动等交互行为，并以文本和音频形式存储，实现更自然的交互式回放。
ai_content.result: 20名作者认为系统高效易用，84名学生认为互动性提升学习效果，性能测试支持500人并发访问。
ai_content.conclusion: ITSS通过开源形式为教育者提供了一种高效、可扩展的交互式编程教程制作工具，有助于提升编程教学效果。

search_text: ITSS: Interactive Web-Based Authoring and Playback Integrated Environment for Programming Tutorials ITSS：基于 Web 的交互式编程教程创作和回放集成环境 Video-based programming tutorials are a popular form of tutorial used by authors to guide learners to code. Still, the interactivity of these videos is limited primarily to control video flow. There are existing works with increased interactivity that are shown to improve the learning experience. Still, these solutions require setting up a custom recording environment and are not well-integrated with the playback environment. This paper describes our integrated ITSS environment and evaluates the ease of authoring and playback of our interactive programming tutorials. Our environment is designed to run within the browser sandbox and is less intrusive to record interactivity actions. We develop a recording approach that tracks the author's interactivity actions (e.g., typing code, highlighting words, scrolling panels) on the browser and stored in text and audio formats. We replay these actions using the recorded artefacts for learners to have a more interactive, integrated and realistic playback of the author's actions instead of watching video frames. Our design goals are 1) efficient recording and playback, 2) extensible interactivity features to help students learn better, and 3) a scalable web-based environment. Our first user study of 20 participants who carry out the author tasks agree that it is efficient and easy to author interactive videos in our environment with no additional software needed. Our second user study of 84 students using the environment agrees that the increased interactivity can help them learn better over a video-based tutorial. Our performance test shows that the environment can scale to support up to 500 concurrent users. We hope our open-source environment enable more educators to create interactive programming tutorials. 基于视频的编程教程是作者用来指导学习者编码的一种流行的教程形式。尽管如此，这些视频的交互性主要限于控制视频流。现有的一些具有增强交互性的作品被证明可以改善学习体验。不过，这些解决方案需要设置自定义录制环境，并且与播放环境没有很好地集成。本文描述了我们的集成 ITSS 环境，并评估了我们的交互式编程教程的创作和回放的难易程度。我们的环境设计为在浏览器沙箱内运行，并且记录交互操作的侵入性较小。我们开发了一种记录方法，可以跟踪作者在浏览器上的交互操作（例如，键入代码、突出显示单词、滚动面板）并以文本和音频格式存储。我们使用录制的人工制品重播这些动作，以便学习者能够更加互动、集成和真实地回放作者的动作，而不是观看视频帧。我们的设计目标是 1) 高效的录制和回放，2) 可扩展的交互功能，帮助学生更好地学习，3) 可扩展的基于网络的环境。我们对 20 名执行创作任务的参与者进行的首次用户研究一致认为，在我们的环境中创作交互式视频非常高效且轻松，无需额外的软件。我们对使用该环境的 84 名学生进行的第二次用户研究一致认为，增加的交互性可以帮助他们通过基于视频的教程更好地学习。我们的性能测试表明，该环境可以扩展以支持最多 500 个并发用户。我们希望我们的开源环境能够让更多的教育工作者创建交互式编程教程。 本文提出了一种基于浏览器的交互式编程教程创作与播放集成环境ITSS，旨在提升编程教学的互动性和易用性。 Eng Lieh Ouh,Benjamin Kok Siew Gan,David Lo cs.SE,cs.HC

authors_text: Zhonghang Li,Chao Huang,Lianghao Xia,Yong Xu,Jian Pei
title: Spatial-Temporal Hypergraph Self-Supervised Learning for Crime Prediction
title_zh: 用于犯罪预测的时空超图自监督学习
comment: This paper has been published as a full paper at ICDE 2022
comments: This paper has been published as a full paper at ICDE 2022
abstract: Crime has become a major concern in many cities, which calls for the rising demand for timely predicting citywide crime occurrence. Accurate crime prediction results are vital for the beforehand decision-making of government to alleviate the increasing concern about the public safety. While many efforts have been devoted to proposing various spatial-temporal forecasting techniques to explore dependence across locations and time periods, most of them follow a supervised learning manner, which limits their spatial-temporal representation ability on sparse crime data. Inspired by the recent success in self-supervised learning, this work proposes a Spatial-Temporal Hypergraph Self-Supervised Learning framework (ST-HSL) to tackle the label scarcity issue in crime prediction. Specifically, we propose the cross-region hypergraph structure learning to encode region-wise crime dependency under the entire urban space. Furthermore, we design the dual-stage self-supervised learning paradigm, to not only jointly capture local- and global-level spatial-temporal crime patterns, but also supplement the sparse crime representation by augmenting region self-discrimination. We perform extensive experiments on two real-life crime datasets. Evaluation results show that our ST-HSL significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. Further analysis provides insights into the superiority of our ST-HSL method in the representation of spatial-temporal crime patterns. The implementation code is available at https://github.com/LZH-YS1998/STHSL.

We perform extensive experiments on two real-life crime datasets. Evaluation results show that our ST-HSL significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. Further analysis provides insights into the superiority of our ST-HSL method in the representation of spatial-temporal crime patterns. The implementation code is available at https://github.com/LZH-YS1998/STHSL.
abstract_zh: 犯罪已成为许多城市的主要问题，这要求及时预测全市犯罪发生的需求不断增长。准确的犯罪预测结果对于政府的事前决策、缓解人们对公共安全日益增长的担忧至关重要。虽然许多努力致力于提出各种时空预测技术来探索跨地点和时间段的依赖性，但大多数都遵循监督学习方式，这限制了它们对稀疏犯罪数据的时空表示能力。受最近自我监督学习成功的启发，这项工作提出了一个时空超图自我监督学习框架（ST-HSL）来解决犯罪预测中的标签稀缺问题。具体来说，我们提出跨区域超图结构学习来编码整个城市空间下的区域犯罪依赖性。此外，我们设计了双阶段自我监督学习范式，不仅可以共同捕获局部和全球层面的时空犯罪模式，而且可以通过增强区域自我歧视来补充稀疏犯罪表征。我们对两个现实生活中的犯罪数据集进行了广泛的实验。评估结果表明，我们的 ST-HSL 显着优于最先进的基线。进一步的分析让我们深入了解我们的 ST-HSL 方法在表示时空犯罪模式方面的优越性。实现代码可在 https://github.com/LZH-YS1998/STHSL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时空超图自监督学习的犯罪预测框架（ST-HSL），以解决犯罪数据标签稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 现有监督学习方法在犯罪预测中因数据稀疏性导致时空表示能力受限，需通过自监督学习提升模型对稀疏数据的表征能力。
AI.method: 设计跨区域超图结构学习编码区域间依赖关系，并采用双阶段自监督学习范式，联合捕捉局部与全局时空模式，增强区域自判别能力。
AI.result: 在两个真实犯罪数据集上实验表明，ST-HSL显著优于现有先进方法，且在时空犯罪模式表征上具有优势。
AI.conclusion: ST-HSL通过超图结构与自监督学习有效解决了犯罪预测中的标签稀缺问题，提升了模型泛化能力。

authors_text: Jessica Yin,Gregory M. Campbell,James Pikul,Mark Yim
title: Multimodal Proximity and Visuotactile Sensing With a Selectively Transmissive Soft Membrane
title_zh: 使用选择性透射软膜的多模式接近和视觉触觉传感
comment: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Soft Robotics (RoboSoft) 2022
comments: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Soft Robotics (RoboSoft) 2022
abstract: The most common sensing modalities found in a robot perception system are vision and touch, which together can provide global and highly localized data for manipulation. However, these sensing modalities often fail to adequately capture the behavior of target objects during the critical moments as they transition out of static, controlled contact with an end-effector to dynamic and uncontrolled motion. In this work, we present a novel multimodal visuotactile sensor that provides simultaneous visuotactile and proximity depth data. The sensor integrates an RGB camera and air pressure sensor to sense touch with an infrared time-of-flight (ToF) camera to sense proximity by leveraging a selectively transmissive soft membrane to enable the dual sensing modalities. We present the mechanical design, fabrication techniques, algorithm implementations, and evaluation of the sensor's tactile and proximity modalities. The sensor is demonstrated in three open-loop robotic tasks: approaching and contacting an object, catching, and throwing. The fusion of tactile and proximity data could be used to capture key information about a target object's transition behavior for sensor-based control in dynamic manipulation.
summary: The most common sensing modalities found in a robot perception system are vision and touch, which together can provide global and highly localized data for manipulation. However, these sensing modalities often fail to adequately capture the behavior of target objects during the critical moments as they transition out of static, controlled contact with an end-effector to dynamic and uncontrolled motion. In this work, we present a novel multimodal visuotactile sensor that provides simultaneous visuotactile and proximity depth data. The sensor integrates an RGB camera and air pressure sensor to sense touch with an infrared time-of-flight (ToF) camera to sense proximity by leveraging a selectively transmissive soft membrane to enable the dual sensing modalities. We present the mechanical design, fabrication techniques, algorithm implementations, and evaluation of the sensor's tactile and proximity modalities. The sensor is demonstrated in three open-loop robotic tasks: approaching and contacting an object, catching, and throwing. The fusion of tactile and proximity data could be used to capture key information about a target object's transition behavior for sensor-based control in dynamic manipulation.
abstract_zh: 机器人感知系统中最常见的传感方式是视觉和触觉，它们共同可以提供全局和高度本地化的操作数据。然而，这些传感方式通常无法充分捕获目标物体在关键时刻的行为，因为它们从与末端执行器的静态受控接触过渡到动态且不受控制的运动。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新型多模态视觉触觉传感器，可同时提供视觉触觉和接近深度数据。该传感器集成了 RGB 摄像头和气压传感器，可利用红外飞行时间 (ToF) 摄像头来感应触摸，从而利用选择性透射软膜实现双重感应模式来感应接近度。我们介绍了机械设计、制造技术、算法实现以及传感器触觉和接近模式的评估。该传感器在三个开环机器人任务中进行了演示：接近和接触物体、捕捉和投掷。触觉和接近数据的融合可用于捕获有关目标对象过渡行为的关键信息，以便在动态操纵中进行基于传感器的控制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型多模态视觉触觉传感器，通过选择性透光软膜同时获取触觉和接近度深度数据，以解决机器人动态操作中目标物体过渡行为感知不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉与触觉传感器难以捕捉物体从静态接触向动态运动过渡的关键行为，限制了机器人在动态环境中的操作能力。
AI.method: 集成RGB相机、气压传感器和红外飞行时间（ToF）相机，利用选择性透光软膜实现触觉与接近度双模态感知，结合机械设计、制造工艺及算法实现数据融合。
AI.result: 传感器在接近-接触、抓取和投掷三个开环任务中成功演示，触觉与接近度数据融合可有效捕捉目标物体过渡行为的关键信息。
AI.conclusion: 该传感器通过多模态数据融合提升了机器人对动态操作过程中物体过渡行为的感知能力，为基于传感器的动态控制提供了新方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种新型多模态视觉触觉传感器，通过选择性透光软膜同时获取触觉和接近度深度数据，以解决机器人动态操作中目标物体过渡行为感知不足的问题。

ai_content_json.method: 集成RGB相机、气压传感器和红外飞行时间（ToF）相机，利用选择性透光软膜实现触觉与接近度双模态感知，结合机械设计、制造工艺及算法实现数据融合。
ai_content_json.result: 传感器在接近-接触、抓取和投掷三个开环任务中成功演示，触觉与接近度数据融合可有效捕捉目标物体过渡行为的关键信息。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该传感器通过多模态数据融合提升了机器人对动态操作过程中物体过渡行为的感知能力，为基于传感器的动态控制提供了新方法。

search_text: Multimodal Proximity and Visuotactile Sensing With a Selectively Transmissive Soft Membrane 使用选择性透射软膜的多模式接近和视觉触觉传感 The most common sensing modalities found in a robot perception system are vision and touch, which together can provide global and highly localized data for manipulation. However, these sensing modalities often fail to adequately capture the behavior of target objects during the critical moments as they transition out of static, controlled contact with an end-effector to dynamic and uncontrolled motion. In this work, we present a novel multimodal visuotactile sensor that provides simultaneous visuotactile and proximity depth data. The sensor integrates an RGB camera and air pressure sensor to sense touch with an infrared time-of-flight (ToF) camera to sense proximity by leveraging a selectively transmissive soft membrane to enable the dual sensing modalities. We present the mechanical design, fabrication techniques, algorithm implementations, and evaluation of the sensor's tactile and proximity modalities. The sensor is demonstrated in three open-loop robotic tasks: approaching and contacting an object, catching, and throwing. The fusion of tactile and proximity data could be used to capture key information about a target object's transition behavior for sensor-based control in dynamic manipulation. 机器人感知系统中最常见的传感方式是视觉和触觉，它们共同可以提供全局和高度本地化的操作数据。然而，这些传感方式通常无法充分捕获目标物体在关键时刻的行为，因为它们从与末端执行器的静态受控接触过渡到动态且不受控制的运动。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新型多模态视觉触觉传感器，可同时提供视觉触觉和接近深度数据。该传感器集成了 RGB 摄像头和气压传感器，可利用红外飞行时间 (ToF) 摄像头来感应触摸，从而利用选择性透射软膜实现双重感应模式来感应接近度。我们介绍了机械设计、制造技术、算法实现以及传感器触觉和接近模式的评估。该传感器在三个开环机器人任务中进行了演示：接近和接触物体、捕捉和投掷。触觉和接近数据的融合可用于捕获有关目标对象过渡行为的关键信息，以便在动态操纵中进行基于传感器的控制。 本文提出一种新型多模态视觉触觉传感器，通过选择性透光软膜同时获取触觉和接近度深度数据，以解决机器人动态操作中目标物体过渡行为感知不足的问题。 Jessica Yin,Gregory M. Campbell,James Pikul,Mark Yim cs.RO

authors_text: Homanga Bharadhwaj,Mohammad Babaeizadeh,Dumitru Erhan,Sergey Levine
title: INFOrmation Prioritization through EmPOWERment in Visual Model-Based RL
title_zh: 通过基于视觉模型的强化学习中的赋能来确定信息优先级
comment: Published in International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2022)
comments: Published in International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2022)
abstract: Model-based reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms designed for handling complex visual observations typically learn some sort of latent state representation, either explicitly or implicitly. Standard methods of this sort do not distinguish between functionally relevant aspects of the state and irrelevant distractors, instead aiming to represent all available information equally. We propose a modified objective for model-based RL that, in combination with mutual information maximization, allows us to learn representations and dynamics for visual model-based RL without reconstruction in a way that explicitly prioritizes functionally relevant factors. The key principle behind our design is to integrate a term inspired by variational empowerment into a state-space model based on mutual information. This term prioritizes information that is correlated with action, thus ensuring that functionally relevant factors are captured first. Furthermore, the same empowerment term also promotes faster exploration during the RL process, especially for sparse-reward tasks where the reward signal is insufficient to drive exploration in the early stages of learning. We evaluate the approach on a suite of vision-based robot control tasks with natural video backgrounds, and show that the proposed prioritized information objective outperforms state-of-the-art model based RL approaches with higher sample efficiency and episodic returns. https://sites.google.com/view/information-empowerment
summary: Model-based reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms designed for handling complex visual observations typically learn some sort of latent state representation, either explicitly or implicitly. Standard methods of this sort do not distinguish between functionally relevant aspects of the state and irrelevant distractors, instead aiming to represent all available information equally. We propose a modified objective for model-based RL that, in combination with mutual information maximization, allows us to learn representations and dynamics for visual model-based RL without reconstruction in a way that explicitly prioritizes functionally relevant factors. The key principle behind our design is to integrate a term inspired by variational empowerment into a state-space model based on mutual information. This term prioritizes information that is correlated with action, thus ensuring that functionally relevant factors are captured first. Furthermore, the same empowerment term also promotes faster exploration during the RL process, especially for sparse-reward tasks where the reward signal is insufficient to drive exploration in the early stages of learning. We evaluate the approach on a suite of vision-based robot control tasks with natural video backgrounds, and show that the proposed prioritized information objective outperforms state-of-the-art model based RL approaches with higher sample efficiency and episodic returns. https://sites.google.com/view/information-empowerment
abstract_zh: 设计用于处理复杂视觉观察的基于模型的强化学习 (RL) 算法通常会显式或隐式地学习某种潜在状态表示。此类标准方法不区分状态的功能相关方面和不相关的干扰因素，而是旨在平等地表示所有可用信息。我们提出了基于模型的 RL 的修改目标，与互信息最大化相结合，使我们能够学习基于视觉模型的 RL 的表示和动态，而无需以明确优先考虑功能相关因素的方式进行重建。我们设计背后的关键原则是将受变分赋权启发的术语集成到基于互信息的状态空间模型中。该术语优先考虑与操作相关的信息，从而确保首先捕获功能相关的因素。此外，相同的赋权术语还可以促进强化学习过程中更快的探索，特别是对于奖励信号不足以推动学习早期阶段探索的稀疏奖励任务。我们在一系列具有自然视频背景的基于视觉的机器人控制任务上评估了该方法，并表明所提出的优先信息目标优于基于最先进模型的 RL 方法，具有更高的样本效率和情景回报。 https://sites.google.com/view/information-empowerment

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变分赋能和互信息的新型目标函数，用于视觉模型强化学习中优先学习功能相关状态信息。
AI.motivation: 传统模型强化学习方法对状态信息的表示缺乏区分度，无法有效过滤无关干扰因素，导致样本效率低下且探索能力不足。
AI.method: 将变分赋能概念融入互信息最大化框架，设计优先级信息目标函数，通过动态调整状态表示的熵值，优先编码与动作相关的信息维度。
AI.result: 在视觉机器人控制任务中，该方法在样本效率和回合奖励指标上优于现有模型强化学习方法，尤其在稀疏奖励场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过信息优先级机制可提升视觉强化学习的效率与鲁棒性，为复杂环境下的模型学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Maged Shoman,Armstrong Aboah,Alex Morehead,Ye Duan,Abdulateef Daud,Yaw Adu-Gyamfi
title: A Region-Based Deep Learning Approach to Automated Retail Checkout
title_zh: 基于区域的自动零售结账深度学习方法
abstract: Automating the product checkout process at conventional retail stores is a task poised to have large impacts on society generally speaking. Towards this end, reliable deep learning models that enable automated product counting for fast customer checkout can make this goal a reality. In this work, we propose a novel, region-based deep learning approach to automate product counting using a customized YOLOv5 object detection pipeline and the DeepSORT algorithm. Our results on challenging, real-world test videos demonstrate that our method can generalize its predictions to a sufficient level of accuracy and with a fast enough runtime to warrant deployment to real-world commercial settings. Our proposed method won 4th place in the 2022 AI City Challenge, Track 4, with an F1 score of 0.4400 on experimental validation data.
summary: Automating the product checkout process at conventional retail stores is a task poised to have large impacts on society generally speaking. Towards this end, reliable deep learning models that enable automated product counting for fast customer checkout can make this goal a reality. In this work, we propose a novel, region-based deep learning approach to automate product counting using a customized YOLOv5 object detection pipeline and the DeepSORT algorithm. Our results on challenging, real-world test videos demonstrate that our method can generalize its predictions to a sufficient level of accuracy and with a fast enough runtime to warrant deployment to real-world commercial settings. Our proposed method won 4th place in the 2022 AI City Challenge, Track 4, with an F1 score of 0.4400 on experimental validation data.
abstract_zh: 一般来说，传统零售店的产品结账流程自动化是一项将对社会产生重大影响的任务。为此，可靠的深度学习模型可以实现自动产品计数以实现快速客户结账，从而使这一目标成为现实。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的、基于区域的深度学习方法，使用定制的 YOLOv5 对象检测管道和 DeepSORT 算法来自动进行产品计数。我们在具有挑战性的现实世界测试视频上的结果表明，我们的方法可以将其预测推广到足够的准确度，并且具有足够快的运行时间以保证部署到现实世界的商业环境。我们提出的方法在 2022 年人工智能城市挑战赛第 4 场比赛中获得了第四名，实验验证数据的 F1 分数为 0.4400。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于区域的深度学习方法，通过定制YOLOv5和DeepSORT算法实现零售自动结账中的产品计数。
AI.motivation: 自动化零售结账能提升效率并改变社会零售模式，但现有方法在准确率和实时性上存在不足，需更可靠的技术方案。
AI.method: 采用定制化YOLOv5目标检测模型与DeepSORT算法结合，通过区域划分策略优化产品计数，提升复杂场景下的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在2022年AI City Challenge Track 4比赛中获得第四名，实验数据F1分数达到0.4400，验证了方法在真实场景中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在准确率与运行效率上满足实际部署需求，为零售自动化提供了可行的深度学习解决方案。

In this work, we propose a novel, region-based deep learning approach to automate product counting using a customized YOLOv5 object detection pipeline and the DeepSORT algorithm. Our results on challenging, real-world test videos demonstrate that our method can generalize its predictions to a sufficient level of accuracy and with a fast enough runtime to warrant deployment to real-world commercial settings. Our proposed method won 4th place in the 2022 AI City Challenge, Track 4, with an F1 score of 0.4400 on experimental validation data. 一般来说，传统零售店的产品结账流程自动化是一项将对社会产生重大影响的任务。为此，可靠的深度学习模型可以实现自动产品计数以实现快速客户结账，从而使这一目标成为现实。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的、基于区域的深度学习方法，使用定制的 YOLOv5 对象检测管道和 DeepSORT 算法来自动进行产品计数。我们在具有挑战性的现实世界测试视频上的结果表明，我们的方法可以将其预测推广到足够的准确度，并且具有足够快的运行时间以保证部署到现实世界的商业环境。我们提出的方法在 2022 年人工智能城市挑战赛第 4 场比赛中获得了第四名，实验验证数据的 F1 分数为 0.4400。 本文提出一种基于区域的深度学习方法，通过定制YOLOv5和DeepSORT算法实现零售自动结账中的产品计数。 Maged Shoman,Armstrong Aboah,Alex Morehead,Ye Duan,Abdulateef Daud,Yaw Adu-Gyamfi cs.CV

authors_text: Katherine Crowson,Stella Biderman,Daniel Kornis,Dashiell Stander,Eric Hallahan,Louis Castricato,Edward Raff
title: VQGAN-CLIP: Open Domain Image Generation and Editing with Natural Language Guidance
title_zh: VQGAN-CLIP：使用自然语言指导进行开放域图像生成和编辑
comment: Accepted for publication at ECCV 2022 Code available at https://github.com/EleutherAI/vqgan-clip/tree/main/notebooks
comments: Accepted for publication at ECCV 2022 Code available at https://github.com/EleutherAI/vqgan-clip/tree/main/notebooks
abstract: Generating and editing images from open domain text prompts is a challenging task that heretofore has required expensive and specially trained models. We demonstrate a novel methodology for both tasks which is capable of producing images of high visual quality from text prompts of significant semantic complexity without any training by using a multimodal encoder to guide image generations. We demonstrate on a variety of tasks how using CLIP [37] to guide VQGAN [11] produces higher visual quality outputs than prior, less flexible approaches like DALL-E [38], GLIDE [33] and Open-Edit [24], despite not being trained for the tasks presented. Our code is available in a public repository.
summary: Generating and editing images from open domain text prompts is a challenging task that heretofore has required expensive and specially trained models. We demonstrate a novel methodology for both tasks which is capable of producing images of high visual quality from text prompts of significant semantic complexity without any training by using a multimodal encoder to guide image generations. We demonstrate on a variety of tasks how using CLIP [37] to guide VQGAN [11] produces higher visual quality outputs than prior, less flexible approaches like DALL-E [38], GLIDE [33] and Open-Edit [24], despite not being trained for the tasks presented. Our code is available in a public repository.
abstract_zh: 从开放域文本提示生成和编辑图像是一项具有挑战性的任务，迄今为止需要昂贵且经过专门训练的模型。我们展示了一种针对这两项任务的新颖方法，该方法能够通过使用多模态编码器来指导图像生成，从具有显着语义复杂性的文本提示生成高视觉质量的图像，而无需任何训练。我们在各种任务中演示了如何使用 CLIP [37] 指导 VQGAN [11] 产生比以前的、不太灵活的方法（如 DALL-E [38]、GLIDE [33] 和 Open-Edit [24]）更高的视觉质量输出，尽管没有接受过针对所提出的任务的培训。我们的代码可在公共存储库中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VQGAN-CLIP方法，通过自然语言提示实现开放领域图像生成与编辑，无需专门训练模型。
AI.motivation: 传统图像生成方法需依赖昂贵且专门训练的模型，难以处理复杂语义提示，亟需高效灵活的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合CLIP多模态编码器与VQGAN生成模型，利用CLIP的文本-图像对齐能力指导图像生成过程，无需任务特定训练。
AI.result: 在多个任务中生成的图像质量优于DALL-E、GLIDE等现有方法，且未针对任务进行训练。
AI.conclusion: VQGAN-CLIP为开放领域图像生成提供了无需训练的高效方法，验证了跨模态预训练模型在生成任务中的有效性。

authors_text: Jack FitzGerald,Christopher Hench,Charith Peris,Scott Mackie,Kay Rottmann,Ana Sanchez,Aaron Nash,Liam Urbach,Vishesh Kakarala,Richa Singh,Swetha Ranganath,Laurie Crist,Misha Britan,Wouter Leeuwis,Gokhan Tur,Prem Natarajan
title: MASSIVE: A 1M-Example Multilingual Natural Language Understanding Dataset with 51 Typologically-Diverse Languages
title_zh: 海量：包含 51 种不同类型语言的 100 万示例多语言自然语言理解数据集
abstract: We present the MASSIVE dataset--Multilingual Amazon Slu resource package (SLURP) for Slot-filling, Intent classification, and Virtual assistant Evaluation. MASSIVE contains 1M realistic, parallel, labeled virtual assistant utterances spanning 51 languages, 18 domains, 60 intents, and 55 slots. MASSIVE was created by tasking professional translators to localize the English-only SLURP dataset into 50 typologically diverse languages from 29 genera. We also present modeling results on XLM-R and mT5, including exact match accuracy, intent classification accuracy, and slot-filling F1 score. We have released our dataset, modeling code, and models publicly.
summary: We present the MASSIVE dataset--Multilingual Amazon Slu resource package (SLURP) for Slot-filling, Intent classification, and Virtual assistant Evaluation. MASSIVE contains 1M realistic, parallel, labeled virtual assistant utterances spanning 51 languages, 18 domains, 60 intents, and 55 slots. MASSIVE was created by tasking professional translators to localize the English-only SLURP dataset into 50 typologically diverse languages from 29 genera. We also present modeling results on XLM-R and mT5, including exact match accuracy, intent classification accuracy, and slot-filling F1 score. We have released our dataset, modeling code, and models publicly.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了海量数据集——用于槽位填充、意图分类和虚拟助理评估的多语言 Amazon Slu 资源包 (SLURP)。 MASSIVE 包含 100 万条真实、并行、带标签的虚拟助理话语，涵盖 51 种语言、18 个领域、60 个意图和 55 个插槽。 MASSIVE 是由专业翻译人员将纯英语的 SLURP 数据集本地化为 29 个属的 50 种类型不同的语言而创建的。我们还展示了 XLM-R 和 mT5 上的建模结果，包括精确匹配精度、意图分类精度和槽填充 F1 分数。我们已经公开发布了我们的数据集、建模代码和模型。

AI.tldr: 构建包含100万条多语言虚拟助手语句的MASSIVE数据集，涵盖51种语言、18个领域、60个意图和55个槽位，用于自然语言理解任务。
AI.motivation: 现有多语言NLP数据集语言覆盖不足且类型学多样性有限，缺乏足够资源支持跨语言模型研究。
AI.method: 通过专业翻译将英文SLURP数据集本地化为50种类型学多样语言，构建平行标注语料，并在XLM-R和mT5模型上进行基准测试。
AI.result: 在XLM-R和mT5模型上实现了意图分类准确率与槽位填充F1分数，验证了数据集有效性，相关资源已开源。
AI.conclusion: MASSIVE为多语言自然语言理解研究提供了大规模、多语言、多领域基准数据集，推动跨语言模型发展。

authors_text: Ali Ghadirzadeh,Petra Poklukar,Karol Arndt,Chelsea Finn,Ville Kyrki,Danica Kragic,Mårten Björkman
title: Training and Evaluation of Deep Policies using Reinforcement Learning and Generative Models
title_zh: 使用强化学习和生成模型进行深度策略的训练和评估
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2007.13134
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2007.13134
abstract: We present a data-efficient framework for solving sequential decision-making problems which exploits the combination of reinforcement learning (RL) and latent variable generative models. The framework, called GenRL, trains deep policies by introducing an action latent variable such that the feed-forward policy search can be divided into two parts: (i) training a sub-policy that outputs a distribution over the action latent variable given a state of the system, and (ii) unsupervised training of a generative model that outputs a sequence of motor actions conditioned on the latent action variable. GenRL enables safe exploration and alleviates the data-inefficiency problem as it exploits prior knowledge about valid sequences of motor actions. Moreover, we provide a set of measures for evaluation of generative models such that we are able to predict the performance of the RL policy training prior to the actual training on a physical robot. We experimentally determine the characteristics of generative models that have most influence on the performance of the final policy training on two robotics tasks: shooting a hockey puck and throwing a basketball. Furthermore, we empirically demonstrate that GenRL is the only method which can safely and efficiently solve the robotics tasks compared to two state-of-the-art RL methods.
summary: We present a data-efficient framework for solving sequential decision-making problems which exploits the combination of reinforcement learning (RL) and latent variable generative models. The framework, called GenRL, trains deep policies by introducing an action latent variable such that the feed-forward policy search can be divided into two parts: (i) training a sub-policy that outputs a distribution over the action latent variable given a state of the system, and (ii) unsupervised training of a generative model that outputs a sequence of motor actions conditioned on the latent action variable. GenRL enables safe exploration and alleviates the data-inefficiency problem as it exploits prior knowledge about valid sequences of motor actions. Moreover, we provide a set of measures for evaluation of generative models such that we are able to predict the performance of the RL policy training prior to the actual training on a physical robot. We experimentally determine the characteristics of generative models that have most influence on the performance of the final policy training on two robotics tasks: shooting a hockey puck and throwing a basketball. Furthermore, we empirically demonstrate that GenRL is the only method which can safely and efficiently solve the robotics tasks compared to two state-of-the-art RL methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个用于解决序列决策问题的数据高效框架，该框架利用强化学习（RL）和潜变量生成模型的组合。该框架称为 GenRL，通过引入动作潜在变量来训练深度策略，使得前馈策略搜索可以分为两部分：（i）训练一个子策略，在给定系统状态的情况下输出动作潜在变量的分布；（ii）无监督训练生成模型，输出一系列以潜在动作变量为条件的运动动作。 GenRL 利用有关有效运动序列的先验知识，可以实现安全探索并缓解数据效率低下的问题。此外，我们提供了一套用于评估生成模型的措施，以便我们能够在对物理机器人进行实际训练之前预测 RL 策略训练的性能。我们通过实验确定了对两项机器人任务的最终策略训练性能影响最大的生成模型的特征：射曲棍球和投掷篮球。此外，我们凭经验证明，与两种最先进的 RL 方法相比，GenRL 是唯一能够安全有效地解决机器人任务的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合强化学习与生成模型的框架GenRL，通过引入动作潜在变量提升策略训练效率并解决机器人任务。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习存在数据效率低、探索不安全等问题，而生成模型可利用先验知识优化动作序列，需结合两者优势。
AI.method: GenRL框架分两步训练：1) 子策略根据状态输出动作潜在变量分布；2) 无监督生成模型根据潜在变量生成动作序列，并设计评估指标预测策略性能。
AI.result: 在冰球击打和篮球投掷任务中，GenRL相较两种最先进RL方法更安全高效，且发现生成模型的序列预测能力对最终策略性能影响最大。
AI.conclusion: GenRL通过结合生成模型先验知识有效提升数据效率与安全性，其评估指标可提前预测物理机器人训练效果，是当前唯一能稳定解决复杂任务的方法。

ai_content_json.method: GenRL框架分两步训练：1) 子策略根据状态输出动作潜在变量分布；2) 无监督生成模型根据潜在变量生成动作序列，并设计评估指标预测策略性能。
ai_content_json.result: 在冰球击打和篮球投掷任务中，GenRL相较两种最先进RL方法更安全高效，且发现生成模型的序列预测能力对最终策略性能影响最大。
ai_content_json.conclusion: GenRL通过结合生成模型先验知识有效提升数据效率与安全性，其评估指标可提前预测物理机器人训练效果，是当前唯一能稳定解决复杂任务的方法。

tldr: 本文提出一种结合强化学习与生成模型的框架GenRL，通过引入动作潜在变量提升策略训练效率并解决机器人任务。

result: 在冰球击打和篮球投掷任务中，GenRL相较两种最先进RL方法更安全高效，且发现生成模型的序列预测能力对最终策略性能影响最大。
