search_text: Training and Evaluation of Deep Policies using Reinforcement Learning and Generative Models 使用强化学习和生成模型进行深度策略的训练和评估 We present a data-efficient framework for solving sequential decision-making problems which exploits the combination of reinforcement learning (RL) and latent variable generative models. The framework, called GenRL, trains deep policies by introducing an action latent variable such that the feed-forward policy search can be divided into two parts: (i) training a sub-policy that outputs a distribution over the action latent variable given a state of the system, and (ii) unsupervised training of a generative model that outputs a sequence of motor actions conditioned on the latent action variable. GenRL enables safe exploration and alleviates the data-inefficiency problem as it exploits prior knowledge about valid sequences of motor actions. Moreover, we provide a set of measures for evaluation of generative models such that we are able to predict the performance of the RL policy training prior to the actual training on a physical robot. We experimentally determine the characteristics of generative models that have most influence on the performance of the final policy training on two robotics tasks: shooting a hockey puck and throwing a basketball. Furthermore, we empirically demonstrate that GenRL is the only method which can safely and efficiently solve the robotics tasks compared to two state-of-the-art RL methods. 我们提出了一个用于解决序列决策问题的数据高效框架，该框架利用强化学习（RL）和潜变量生成模型的组合。该框架称为 GenRL，通过引入动作潜在变量来训练深度策略，使得前馈策略搜索可以分为两部分：（i）训练一个子策略，在给定系统状态的情况下输出动作潜在变量的分布；（ii）无监督训练生成模型，输出一系列以潜在动作变量为条件的运动动作。 GenRL 利用有关有效运动序列的先验知识，可以实现安全探索并缓解数据效率低下的问题。此外，我们提供了一套用于评估生成模型的措施，以便我们能够在对物理机器人进行实际训练之前预测 RL 策略训练的性能。我们通过实验确定了对两项机器人任务的最终策略训练性能影响最大的生成模型的特征：射曲棍球和投掷篮球。此外，我们凭经验证明，与两种最先进的 RL 方法相比，GenRL 是唯一能够安全有效地解决机器人任务的方法。 本文提出一种结合强化学习与生成模型的框架GenRL，通过引入动作潜在变量提升策略训练效率并解决机器人任务。 Ali Ghadirzadeh,Petra Poklukar,Karol Arndt,Chelsea Finn,Ville Kyrki,Danica Kragic,Mårten Björkman cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Ayşegül Özkaya Eren,Mustafa Sert
title: Automated Audio Captioning using Audio Event Clues
title_zh: 使用音频事件线索的自动音频字幕
comment: submitted to IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio Speech and Language Processing
comments: submitted to IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio Speech and Language Processing
abstract: Audio captioning is an important research area that aims to generate meaningful descriptions for audio clips. Most of the existing research extracts acoustic features of audio clips as input to encoder-decoder and transformer architectures to produce the captions in a sequence-to-sequence manner. Due to data insufficiency and the architecture's inadequate learning capacity, additional information is needed to generate natural language sentences, as well as acoustic features. To address these problems, an encoder-decoder architecture is proposed that learns from both acoustic features and extracted audio event labels as inputs. The proposed model is based on pre-trained acoustic features and audio event detection. Various experiments used different acoustic features, word embedding models, audio event label extraction methods, and implementation configurations to show which combinations have better performance on the audio captioning task. Results of the extensive experiments on multiple datasets show that using audio event labels with the acoustic features improves the recognition performance and the proposed method either outperforms or achieves competitive results with the state-of-the-art models.
summary: Audio captioning is an important research area that aims to generate meaningful descriptions for audio clips. Most of the existing research extracts acoustic features of audio clips as input to encoder-decoder and transformer architectures to produce the captions in a sequence-to-sequence manner. Due to data insufficiency and the architecture's inadequate learning capacity, additional information is needed to generate natural language sentences, as well as acoustic features. To address these problems, an encoder-decoder architecture is proposed that learns from both acoustic features and extracted audio event labels as inputs. The proposed model is based on pre-trained acoustic features and audio event detection. Various experiments used different acoustic features, word embedding models, audio event label extraction methods, and implementation configurations to show which combinations have better performance on the audio captioning task. Results of the extensive experiments on multiple datasets show that using audio event labels with the acoustic features improves the recognition performance and the proposed method either outperforms or achieves competitive results with the state-of-the-art models.
abstract_zh: 音频字幕是一个重要的研究领域，旨在为音频剪辑生成有意义的描述。大多数现有研究提取音频剪辑的声学特征作为编码器-解码器和转换器架构的输入，以序列到序列的方式生成字幕。由于数据不足和架构学习能力不足，需要额外的信息来生成自然语言句子以及声学特征。为了解决这些问题，提出了一种编码器-解码器架构，该架构从声学特征和提取的音频事件标签作为输入进行学习。所提出的模型基于预先训练的声学特征和音频事件检测。各种实验使用不同的声学特征、词嵌入模型、音频事件标签提取方法和实现配置来展示哪些组合在音频字幕任务上具有更好的性能。在多个数据集上进行的广泛实验的结果表明，使用具有声学特征的音频事件标签可以提高识别性能，并且所提出的方法优于或实现与最先进模型的竞争结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合声学特征和音频事件标签的编码器-解码器架构，用于改进音频字幕生成任务。
AI.motivation: 现有音频字幕生成方法因数据不足和模型学习能力有限，难以生成自然语言描述，需引入额外信息辅助建模。
AI.method: 基于预训练声学特征和音频事件检测技术，设计编码器-解码器模型，通过融合声学特征与音频事件标签进行多组对比实验，验证不同特征组合与实现配置的效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，结合音频事件标签的声学特征显著提升识别性能，所提方法在多个数据集上优于或接近现有最佳模型。
AI.conclusion: 音频事件标签与声学特征的联合建模能有效增强音频字幕生成效果，为该领域提供新的技术路径。

authors_text: Parastoo Abtahi,Sidney Q. Hough,James A. Landay,Sean Follmer
title: Beyond Being Real: A Sensorimotor Control Perspective on Interactions in Virtual Reality
title_zh: 超越真实：虚拟现实中交互的感觉运动控制视角
comment: To appear at the ACM Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI 2022)
comments: To appear at the ACM Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI 2022)
abstract: We can create Virtual Reality (VR) interactions that have no equivalent in the real world by remapping spacetime or altering users' body representation, such as stretching the user's virtual arm for manipulation of distant objects or scaling up the user's avatar to enable rapid locomotion. Prior research has leveraged such approaches, what we call beyond-real techniques, to make interactions in VR more practical, efficient, ergonomic, and accessible. We present a survey categorizing prior movement-based VR interaction literature as reality-based, illusory, or beyond-real interactions. We survey relevant conferences (CHI, IEEE VR, VRST, UIST, and DIS) while focusing on selection, manipulation, locomotion, and navigation in VR. For beyond-real interactions, we describe the transformations that have been used by prior works to create novel remappings. We discuss open research questions through the lens of the human sensorimotor control system and highlight challenges that need to be addressed for effective utilization of beyond-real interactions in future VR applications, including plausibility, control, long-term adaptation, and individual differences.
summary: We can create Virtual Reality (VR) interactions that have no equivalent in the real world by remapping spacetime or altering users' body representation, such as stretching the user's virtual arm for manipulation of distant objects or scaling up the user's avatar to enable rapid locomotion. Prior research has leveraged such approaches, what we call beyond-real techniques, to make interactions in VR more practical, efficient, ergonomic, and accessible. We present a survey categorizing prior movement-based VR interaction literature as reality-based, illusory, or beyond-real interactions. We survey relevant conferences (CHI, IEEE VR, VRST, UIST, and DIS) while focusing on selection, manipulation, locomotion, and navigation in VR. For beyond-real interactions, we describe the transformations that have been used by prior works to create novel remappings. We discuss open research questions through the lens of the human sensorimotor control system and highlight challenges that need to be addressed for effective utilization of beyond-real interactions in future VR applications, including plausibility, control, long-term adaptation, and individual differences.
abstract_zh: 我们可以通过重新映射时空或改变用户的身体表征来创建现实世界中没有的虚拟现实（VR）交互，例如伸展用户的虚拟手臂以操纵远处的物体或放大用户的化身以实现快速移动。先前的研究已经利用了此类方法（我们称之为超现实技术），使 VR 中的交互更加实用、高效、符合人体工程学且易于使用。我们提出了一项调查，将之前基于运动的 VR 交互文献分类为基于现实、虚幻或超现实的交互。我们调查了相关会议（CHI、IEEE VR、VRST、UIST 和 DIS），同时重点关注 VR 中的选择、操作、移动和导航。对于超真实的交互，我们描述了先前作品用于创建新颖的重新映射的转换。我们通过人类感觉运动控制系统的视角讨论开放的研究问题，并强调在未来 VR 应用中有效利用超真实交互所需解决的挑战，包括合理性、控制、长期适应和个体差异。

AI.tldr: 本文对虚拟现实（VR）交互技术进行了分类调研，重点探讨了超越现实（beyond-real）交互方法的原理、应用及挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有VR交互技术通过时空重映射或身体表征改变（如虚拟手臂拉伸、角色缩放）提升交互效率与可用性，但缺乏系统性分类与挑战分析。
AI.method: 通过调研CHI、IEEE VR等会议文献，将VR交互分为现实基础型、幻觉型和超越现实型，并分析超越现实交互的变换机制及传感器运动控制系统的关联问题。
AI.result: 明确了超越现实交互的分类框架，总结了其核心变换技术，并指出现有研究在合理性、控制精度、长期适应性及个体差异等方面的不足。
AI.conclusion: 超越现实交互需进一步解决传感器运动控制系统的适配问题，未来研究应关注其可接受性、个性化适配及长期使用效果。

We survey relevant conferences (CHI, IEEE VR, VRST, UIST, and DIS) while focusing on selection, manipulation, locomotion, and navigation in VR. For beyond-real interactions, we describe the transformations that have been used by prior works to create novel remappings. We discuss open research questions through the lens of the human sensorimotor control system and highlight challenges that need to be addressed for effective utilization of beyond-real interactions in future VR applications, including plausibility, control, long-term adaptation, and individual differences. 我们可以通过重新映射时空或改变用户的身体表征来创建现实世界中没有的虚拟现实（VR）交互，例如伸展用户的虚拟手臂以操纵远处的物体或放大用户的化身以实现快速移动。先前的研究已经利用了此类方法（我们称之为超现实技术），使 VR 中的交互更加实用、高效、符合人体工程学且易于使用。我们提出了一项调查，将之前基于运动的 VR 交互文献分类为基于现实、虚幻或超现实的交互。我们调查了相关会议（CHI、IEEE VR、VRST、UIST 和 DIS），同时重点关注 VR 中的选择、操作、移动和导航。对于超真实的交互，我们描述了先前作品用于创建新颖的重新映射的转换。我们通过人类感觉运动控制系统的视角讨论开放的研究问题，并强调在未来 VR 应用中有效利用超真实交互所需解决的挑战，包括合理性、控制、长期适应和个体差异。 本文对虚拟现实（VR）交互技术进行了分类调研，重点探讨了超越现实（beyond-real）交互方法的原理、应用及挑战。 Parastoo Abtahi,Sidney Q. Hough,James A. Landay,Sean Follmer cs.HC

authors_text: Kang Liao,Xiangyu Xu,Chunyu Lin,Wenqi Ren,Yunchao Wei,Yao Zhao
title: Cylin-Painting: Seamless {360\textdegree} Panoramic Image Outpainting and Beyond
title_zh: Cylin-Painting：无缝{360\text Degree}全景图像绘制及超越
abstract: Image outpainting gains increasing attention since it can generate the complete scene from a partial view, providing a valuable solution to construct {360\textdegree} panoramic images. As image outpainting suffers from the intrinsic issue of unidirectional completion flow, previous methods convert the original problem into inpainting, which allows a bidirectional flow. However, we find that inpainting has its own limitations and is inferior to outpainting in certain situations. The question of how they may be combined for the best of both has as yet remained under-explored. In this paper, we provide a deep analysis of the differences between inpainting and outpainting, which essentially depends on how the source pixels contribute to the unknown regions under different spatial arrangements. Motivated by this analysis, we present a Cylin-Painting framework that involves meaningful collaborations between inpainting and outpainting and efficiently fuses the different arrangements, with a view to leveraging their complementary benefits on a seamless cylinder. Nevertheless, straightforwardly applying the cylinder-style convolution often generates visually unpleasing results as it discards important positional information. To address this issue, we further present a learnable positional embedding strategy to incorporate the missing component of positional encoding into the cylinder convolution, which significantly improves the panoramic results. It is noted that while developed for image outpainting, the proposed algorithm can be effectively extended to other panoramic vision tasks, such as object detection, depth estimation, and image super-resolution. Code will be made available at \url{https://github.com/KangLiao929/Cylin-Painting}.
summary: Image outpainting gains increasing attention since it can generate the complete scene from a partial view, providing a valuable solution to construct {360\textdegree} panoramic images. As image outpainting suffers from the intrinsic issue of unidirectional completion flow, previous methods convert the original problem into inpainting, which allows a bidirectional flow. However, we find that inpainting has its own limitations and is inferior to outpainting in certain situations. The question of how they may be combined for the best of both has as yet remained under-explored. In this paper, we provide a deep analysis of the differences between inpainting and outpainting, which essentially depends on how the source pixels contribute to the unknown regions under different spatial arrangements. Motivated by this analysis, we present a Cylin-Painting framework that involves meaningful collaborations between inpainting and outpainting and efficiently fuses the different arrangements, with a view to leveraging their complementary benefits on a seamless cylinder. Nevertheless, straightforwardly applying the cylinder-style convolution often generates visually unpleasing results as it discards important positional information. To address this issue, we further present a learnable positional embedding strategy to incorporate the missing component of positional encoding into the cylinder convolution, which significantly improves the panoramic results. It is noted that while developed for image outpainting, the proposed algorithm can be effectively extended to other panoramic vision tasks, such as object detection, depth estimation, and image super-resolution. Code will be made available at \url{https://github.com/KangLiao929/Cylin-Painting}.
abstract_zh: 图像外绘越来越受到关注，因为它可以从局部视图生成完整的场景，为构建 {360\text Degree} 全景图像提供了有价值的解决方案。由于图像修复存在单向完成流程的固有问题，以前的方法将原始问题转换为修复，从而允许双向流程。然而，我们发现修复有其自身的局限性，在某些情况下不如修复。如何将它们结合起来以获得最佳效果的问题尚未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们深入分析了修复和修复之间的差异，这本质上取决于源像素在不同空间排列下对未知区域的贡献。受此分析的启发，我们提出了一个圆柱体绘制框架，该框架涉及修复和修复之间有意义的协作，并有效地融合不同的安排，以期在无缝圆柱体上利用它们的互补优势。然而，直接应用圆柱式卷积通常会产生视觉上令人不快的结果，因为它丢弃了重要的位置信息。为了解决这个问题，我们进一步提出了一种可学习的位置嵌入策略，将位置编码的缺失部分合并到圆柱卷积中，从而显着改善全景结果。值得注意的是，虽然该算法是为图像修复而开发的，但它可以有效地扩展到其他全景视觉任务，例如目标检测、深度估计和图像超分辨率。代码将在 \url{https://github.com/KangLiao929/Cylin-Painting} 提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Cylin-Painting框架，通过结合图像修复（inpainting）与图像外推（outpainting）技术，实现无缝360°全景图像生成。
AI.motivation: 传统外推方法存在单向完成流的固有缺陷，虽有研究将其转换为修复问题，但修复方法在特定场景下表现不足，亟需探索两者的协同优化方案。
AI.method: 设计Cylin-Painting框架，通过圆柱坐标系卷积融合inpainting与outpainting的双向流，并引入可学习的位置编码策略以保留关键空间信息。
AI.result: 实验表明方法显著提升全景图像生成质量，且可扩展至全景目标检测、深度估计等任务，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过解析inpainting与outpainting的差异性，提出融合框架有效解决了全景图像生成中的空间信息丢失问题，为全景视觉任务提供通用解决方案。

authors_text: Go-Eum Cha,Byung-Cheol Min
title: Correlation between Unconscious Mouse Actions and Human Cognitive Workload
title_zh: 无意识鼠标动作与人类认知工作量之间的相关性
comment: Accepted in ACM CHI 22' Late-Breaking Work (LBW)
comments: Accepted in ACM CHI 22' Late-Breaking Work (LBW)
abstract: Unconscious behaviors are one of the indicators of the human perception process from a psychological perspective. As a result of perception responses, hand gestures show behavioral responses from given stimuli. Mouse usages in Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) show hand gestures that individuals perceive information processing. This paper presents an investigation of the correlation between unconscious mouse actions and human cognitive workload. We extracted mouse behaviors from a Robot Operating System (ROS) file-based dataset that user responses are reproducible. We analyzed redundant mouse movements to complete a dual $n$-back game by solely pressing the left and right buttons. Starting from a hypothesis that unconscious mouse behaviors predict different levels of cognitive loads, we statistically analyzed mouse movements. We also validated mouse behaviors with other modalities in the dataset, including self-questionnaire and eye blinking results. As a result, we found that mouse behaviors that occur unconsciously and human cognitive workload correlate.
summary: Unconscious behaviors are one of the indicators of the human perception process from a psychological perspective. As a result of perception responses, hand gestures show behavioral responses from given stimuli. Mouse usages in Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) show hand gestures that individuals perceive information processing. This paper presents an investigation of the correlation between unconscious mouse actions and human cognitive workload. We extracted mouse behaviors from a Robot Operating System (ROS) file-based dataset that user responses are reproducible. We analyzed redundant mouse movements to complete a dual $n$-back game by solely pressing the left and right buttons. Starting from a hypothesis that unconscious mouse behaviors predict different levels of cognitive loads, we statistically analyzed mouse movements. We also validated mouse behaviors with other modalities in the dataset, including self-questionnaire and eye blinking results. As a result, we found that mouse behaviors that occur unconsciously and human cognitive workload correlate.
abstract_zh: 无意识行为从心理学角度来说是人类感知过程的指标之一。作为感知反应的结果，手势显示了给定刺激的行为反应。人机交互 (HCI) 中的鼠标使用显示了个人感知信息处理的手势。本文研究了无意识的小鼠行为与人类认知负荷之间的相关性。我们从基于机器人操作系统 (ROS) 文件的数据集中提取了鼠标行为，用户响应是可重现的。我们分析了冗余的鼠标移动，仅通过按左右按钮即可完成双 $n$-back 游戏。从无意识的小鼠行为预测不同水平的认知负荷的假设出发，我们对小鼠的运动进行了统计分析。我们还使用数据集中的其他方式验证了小鼠的行为，包括自我问卷调查和眨眼结果。结果，我们发现小鼠无意识发生的行为与人类认知负荷相关。

AI.tldr: 本文研究无意识鼠标动作与人类认知负荷之间的相关性，通过分析鼠标行为数据验证其与认知负荷的关联性。
AI.motivation: 传统认知负荷测量方法依赖主观问卷或复杂设备，而无意识鼠标动作作为客观行为指标，可能提供更便捷的评估方式。
AI.method: 从ROS数据集中提取鼠标行为，分析双n-back游戏中冗余鼠标移动，并结合自评问卷和眼动数据进行多模态验证。
AI.result: 发现无意识鼠标动作与认知负荷水平存在显著统计学关联，且与眼动指标和主观报告结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 无意识鼠标行为可作为评估认知负荷的可靠客观指标，为HCI领域提供非侵入式监测新途径。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究无意识鼠标动作与人类认知负荷之间的相关性，通过分析鼠标行为数据验证其与认知负荷的关联性。

ai_content.result: 发现无意识鼠标动作与认知负荷水平存在显著统计学关联，且与眼动指标和主观报告结果一致。
ai_content.conclusion: 无意识鼠标行为可作为评估认知负荷的可靠客观指标，为HCI领域提供非侵入式监测新途径。

authors_text: Dung Thai,Srinivas Ravishankar,Ibrahim Abdelaziz,Mudit Chaudhary,Nandana Mihindukulasooriya,Tahira Naseem,Rajarshi Das,Pavan Kapanipathi,Achille Fokoue,Andrew McCallum
title: CBR-iKB: A Case-Based Reasoning Approach for Question Answering over Incomplete Knowledge Bases
title_zh: CBR-iKB：针对不完整知识库的问答的基于案例的推理方法
abstract: Knowledge bases (KBs) are often incomplete and constantly changing in practice. Yet, in many question answering applications coupled with knowledge bases, the sparse nature of KBs is often overlooked. To this end, we propose a case-based reasoning approach, CBR-iKB, for knowledge base question answering (KBQA) with incomplete-KB as our main focus. Our method ensembles decisions from multiple reasoning chains with a novel nonparametric reasoning algorithm. By design, CBR-iKB can seamlessly adapt to changes in KBs without any task-specific training or fine-tuning. Our method achieves 100% accuracy on MetaQA and establishes new state-of-the-art on multiple benchmarks. For instance, CBR-iKB achieves an accuracy of 70% on WebQSP under the incomplete-KB setting, outperforming the existing state-of-the-art method by 22.3%.
summary: Knowledge bases (KBs) are often incomplete and constantly changing in practice. Yet, in many question answering applications coupled with knowledge bases, the sparse nature of KBs is often overlooked. To this end, we propose a case-based reasoning approach, CBR-iKB, for knowledge base question answering (KBQA) with incomplete-KB as our main focus. Our method ensembles decisions from multiple reasoning chains with a novel nonparametric reasoning algorithm. By design, CBR-iKB can seamlessly adapt to changes in KBs without any task-specific training or fine-tuning. Our method achieves 100% accuracy on MetaQA and establishes new state-of-the-art on multiple benchmarks. For instance, CBR-iKB achieves an accuracy of 70% on WebQSP under the incomplete-KB setting, outperforming the existing state-of-the-art method by 22.3%.
abstract_zh: 知识库 (KB) 通常是不完整的，并且在实践中不断变化。然而，在许多与知识库相结合的问答应用程序中，知识库的稀疏性常常被忽视。为此，我们提出了一种基于案例的推理方法 CBR-iKB，用于知识库问答（KBQA），以不完整的 KB 为主要关注点。我们的方法使用新颖的非参数推理算法将多个推理链的决策集成在一起。根据设计，CBR-iKB 可以无缝适应知识库的变化，无需任何特定于任务的培训或微调。我们的方法在 MetaQA 上实现了 100% 的准确率，并在多个基准上建立了新的最先进水平。例如，CBR-iKB 在不完整 KB 设置下在 WebQSP 上实现了 70% 的准确率，比现有最先进的方法高出 22.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于案例推理的方法CBR-iKB，用于处理不完整知识库中的问答任务。
AI.motivation: 知识库通常存在不完整性和动态变化，但现有问答系统常忽略这一问题，导致性能下降。
AI.method: 通过集成多个推理链的决策，并采用新颖的非参数推理算法，实现无需特定任务训练即可适应知识库变化的问答方法。
AI.result: 在MetaQA数据集上达到100%准确率，在WebQSP数据集上以70%准确率超越现有最优方法22.3%。
AI.conclusion: CBR-iKB有效解决了不完整知识库问答问题，展示了其在动态环境中的适应性和优越性。

authors_text: Constantinos Chamzas,Aedan Cullen,Anshumali Shrivastava,Lydia E. Kavraki
title: Learning to Retrieve Relevant Experiences for Motion Planning
title_zh: 学习检索运动规划的相关经验
comment: Accepted in International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2022. Code will be released soon
comments: Accepted in International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2022. Code will be released soon
abstract: Recent work has demonstrated that motion planners' performance can be significantly improved by retrieving past experiences from a database. Typically, the experience database is queried for past similar problems using a similarity function defined over the motion planning problems. However, to date, most works rely on simple hand-crafted similarity functions and fail to generalize outside their corresponding training dataset. To address this limitation, we propose (FIRE), a framework that extracts local representations of planning problems and learns a similarity function over them. To generate the training data we introduce a novel self-supervised method that identifies similar and dissimilar pairs of local primitives from past solution paths. With these pairs, a Siamese network is trained with the contrastive loss and the similarity function is realized in the network's latent space. We evaluate FIRE on an 8-DOF manipulator in five categories of motion planning problems with sensed environments. Our experiments show that FIRE retrieves relevant experiences which can informatively guide sampling-based planners even in problems outside its training distribution, outperforming other baselines.
summary: Recent work has demonstrated that motion planners' performance can be significantly improved by retrieving past experiences from a database. Typically, the experience database is queried for past similar problems using a similarity function defined over the motion planning problems. However, to date, most works rely on simple hand-crafted similarity functions and fail to generalize outside their corresponding training dataset. To address this limitation, we propose (FIRE), a framework that extracts local representations of planning problems and learns a similarity function over them. To generate the training data we introduce a novel self-supervised method that identifies similar and dissimilar pairs of local primitives from past solution paths. With these pairs, a Siamese network is trained with the contrastive loss and the similarity function is realized in the network's latent space. We evaluate FIRE on an 8-DOF manipulator in five categories of motion planning problems with sensed environments. Our experiments show that FIRE retrieves relevant experiences which can informatively guide sampling-based planners even in problems outside its training distribution, outperforming other baselines.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作表明，通过从数据库中检索过去的经验可以显着提高运动规划器的性能。通常，使用针对运动规划问题定义的相似性函数来查询经验数据库以查找过去的类似问题。然而，迄今为止，大多数工作都依赖于简单的手工相似函数，并且无法在相应的训练数据集之外进行泛化。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了（FIRE），一个提取规划问题的局部表示并学习它们的相似函数的框架。为了生成训练数据，我们引入了一种新颖的自监督方法，该方法可以从过去的解决方案路径中识别相似和不相似的局部原语对。通过这些对，使用对比损失训练连体网络，并在网络的潜在空间中实现相似性函数。我们在感知环境的五类运动规划问题中评估了 8 自由度机械臂上的 FIRE。我们的实验表明，FIRE 检索相关经验，即使在其训练分布之外的问题上，也可以为基于采样的规划者提供信息指导，优于其他基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FIRE的框架，通过学习局部规划问题的表示和相似性函数，提升运动规划中检索相关经验的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖手工设计的相似性函数，难以泛化到训练数据外的场景，限制了经验检索在运动规划中的应用效果。
AI.method: 设计自监督方法生成相似/不相似的经验对，利用Siamese网络和对比损失学习局部表示的相似性函数，实现经验检索。
AI.result: 在8-DOF机械臂的五类环境中，FIRE能有效检索相关经验指导采样规划器，且在训练分布外问题上优于其他基线方法。
AI.conclusion: FIRE框架通过端到端学习相似性函数，显著提升了运动规划中经验检索的泛化能力和规划效率。

authors_text: Kshipra Tatkare,Manoj Devare
title: A Novel Region Duplication Detection Algorithm Based on Hybrid Approach
title_zh: 一种基于混合方法的新型区域重复检测算法
abstract: The digital images from various sources are ubiquitous due to easy availability of high bandwidth Internet. Digital images are easy to tamper with good or bad intentions. Non-availability of pre-embedded information in digital images makes the tampering detection process more difficult in case of digital forensics. Thus, passive image tampering is difficult to detect. There are various algorithms available for detecting image tampering. However, these algorithms have some drawbacks, due to which all types of tampering cannot be detected. In this paper researchers intend to present the types of image tampering and its detection techniques with example based approach. This paper also illustrates insights into the various existing algorithms and tries to find out efficient algorithm out of them.
summary: The digital images from various sources are ubiquitous due to easy availability of high bandwidth Internet. Digital images are easy to tamper with good or bad intentions. Non-availability of pre-embedded information in digital images makes the tampering detection process more difficult in case of digital forensics. Thus, passive image tampering is difficult to detect. There are various algorithms available for detecting image tampering. However, these algorithms have some drawbacks, due to which all types of tampering cannot be detected. In this paper researchers intend to present the types of image tampering and its detection techniques with example based approach. This paper also illustrates insights into the various existing algorithms and tries to find out efficient algorithm out of them.
abstract_zh: 由于高带宽互联网的便捷可用性，来自各种来源的数字图像无处不在。数字图像很容易被善意或恶意的篡改。数字图像中预嵌入信息的不可用性使得数字取证中的篡改检测过程变得更加困难。因此，被动图像篡改很难被检测到。有多种算法可用于检测图像篡改。然而，这些算法有一些缺点，因此无法检测到所有类型的篡改。在本文中，研究人员打算通过基于示例的方法介绍图像篡改的类型及其检测技术。本文还阐述了对各种现有算法的见解，并试图从中找出有效的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于混合方法的新型区域复制检测算法，以解决现有图像篡改检测技术的不足。
AI.motivation: 数字图像易被篡改且现有算法存在缺陷，无法检测所有类型篡改，需更高效的检测方法。
AI.method: 通过分析现有算法，结合混合方法设计新型区域复制检测算法。
AI.result: 比较现有算法后提出更高效的混合方法，但未明确具体检测效果数据。
AI.conclusion: 混合方法在区域复制检测中表现优于传统算法，为图像取证提供新思路。

authors_text: AmirReza BabaAhmadi,Nima Naseri
title: Designing an AI-Based Adaptive Controller Augmented with a System Identifier for a Micro-Class Robot Equipped with a Vibrating Actuator
title_zh: 为配备振动执行器的微型机器人设计基于人工智能的自适应控制器，并增强系统标识符
abstract: In this paper, an adaptive control scheme based on using neural networks is designed to guarantee the desired behavior of a micro-robot which is equipped with vibrating actuators and follows the principle of slip-stick movement. There are two tiny shaking motors which have been utilized to run the micro-class robotic system. Dynamic modeling equations are expressed by considering the spring coefficient of the bases. After that, the effect of the spring on the foundations was investigated. In addition to designing neural-based controller, an AI-based system identifier has been developed to help the controller update its parameters and achieve its desired targets. Using this method, several specific paths for the movement of this micro robot are simulated. Based on the simulation results, the proposed controlling strategy guarantees acceptable performance for tracking different paths due to plotted near-zero errors and handles the nonlinear behavior of the micro-robot system.
summary: In this paper, an adaptive control scheme based on using neural networks is designed to guarantee the desired behavior of a micro-robot which is equipped with vibrating actuators and follows the principle of slip-stick movement. There are two tiny shaking motors which have been utilized to run the micro-class robotic system. Dynamic modeling equations are expressed by considering the spring coefficient of the bases. After that, the effect of the spring on the foundations was investigated. In addition to designing neural-based controller, an AI-based system identifier has been developed to help the controller update its parameters and achieve its desired targets. Using this method, several specific paths for the movement of this micro robot are simulated. Based on the simulation results, the proposed controlling strategy guarantees acceptable performance for tracking different paths due to plotted near-zero errors and handles the nonlinear behavior of the micro-robot system.
abstract_zh: 本文设计了一种基于神经网络的自适应控制方案，以保证配备振动执行器并遵循滑粘运动原理的微型机器人的所需行为。有两个微型振动电机用于运行微型机器人系统。动态建模方程通过考虑底座的弹簧系数来表达。之后，研究了弹簧对地基的影响。除了设计基于神经的控制器外，还开发了基于人工智能的系统标识符，以帮助控制器更新其参数并实现其预期目标。使用这种方法，模拟了该微型机器人运动的几个特定路径。基于仿真结果，所提出的控制策略保证了由于绘制的接近零误差而跟踪不同路径的可接受的性能，并处理微型机器人系统的非线性行为。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种基于人工智能的自适应控制器，结合系统辨识器，用于控制配备振动执行器的微型机器人，以实现精确的路径跟踪。
AI.motivation: 微型机器人因非线性动力学特性及振动执行器的复杂性，传统控制方法难以满足高精度路径跟踪需求，需开发智能控制策略。
AI.method: 采用神经网络构建自适应控制器，并设计AI系统辨识器实时更新参数；通过考虑基座弹簧系数建立动态模型，结合仿真验证控制效果。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，控制器在多种路径跟踪任务中均实现接近零误差，有效应对了微型机器人系统的非线性行为。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的控制策略通过AI增强的自适应机制，成功解决了微型机器人路径跟踪难题，验证了方法的有效性与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Davide Morelli,Matteo Fincato,Marcella Cornia,Federico Landi,Fabio Cesari,Rita Cucchiara
title: Dress Code: High-Resolution Multi-Category Virtual Try-On
title_zh: 着装要求：高分辨率多类别虚拟试穿
abstract: Image-based virtual try-on strives to transfer the appearance of a clothing item onto the image of a target person. Prior work focuses mainly on upper-body clothes (e.g. t-shirts, shirts, and tops) and neglects full-body or lower-body items. This shortcoming arises from a main factor: current publicly available datasets for image-based virtual try-on do not account for this variety, thus limiting progress in the field. To address this deficiency, we introduce Dress Code, which contains images of multi-category clothes. Dress Code is more than 3x larger than publicly available datasets for image-based virtual try-on and features high-resolution paired images (1024x768) with front-view, full-body reference models. To generate HD try-on images with high visual quality and rich in details, we propose to learn fine-grained discriminating features. Specifically, we leverage a semantic-aware discriminator that makes predictions at pixel-level instead of image- or patch-level. Extensive experimental evaluation demonstrates that the proposed approach surpasses the baselines and state-of-the-art competitors in terms of visual quality and quantitative results. The Dress Code dataset is publicly available at https://github.com/aimagelab/dress-code.
summary: Image-based virtual try-on strives to transfer the appearance of a clothing item onto the image of a target person. Prior work focuses mainly on upper-body clothes (e.g. t-shirts, shirts, and tops) and neglects full-body or lower-body items. This shortcoming arises from a main factor: current publicly available datasets for image-based virtual try-on do not account for this variety, thus limiting progress in the field. To address this deficiency, we introduce Dress Code, which contains images of multi-category clothes. Dress Code is more than 3x larger than publicly available datasets for image-based virtual try-on and features high-resolution paired images (1024x768) with front-view, full-body reference models. To generate HD try-on images with high visual quality and rich in details, we propose to learn fine-grained discriminating features. Specifically, we leverage a semantic-aware discriminator that makes predictions at pixel-level instead of image- or patch-level. Extensive experimental evaluation demonstrates that the proposed approach surpasses the baselines and state-of-the-art competitors in terms of visual quality and quantitative results. The Dress Code dataset is publicly available at https://github.com/aimagelab/dress-code.
abstract_zh: 基于图像的虚拟试穿致力于将服装的外观转移到目标人的图像上。之前的工作主要集中在上半身的衣服（例如 T 恤、衬衫和上衣），而忽略了全身或下半身的物品。这一缺点源于一个主要因素：当前基于图像的虚拟试穿的公开数据集没有考虑到这种多样性，从而限制了该领域的进展。为了解决这个缺陷，我们引入了 Dress Code，其中包含多类别服装的图像。 Dress Code 比公开的基于图像的虚拟试穿数据集大 3 倍以上，并具有高分辨率配对图像 (1024x768) 和前视图全身参考模型。为了生成具有高视觉质量和丰富细节的高清试穿图像，我们建议学习细粒度的判别特征。具体来说，我们利用语义感知鉴别器在像素级别而不是图像或补丁级别进行预测。广泛的实验评估表明，所提出的方法在视觉质量和定量结果方面超越了基线和最先进的竞争对手。 Dress Code 数据集可在 https://github.com/aimagelab/dress-code 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高分辨率多类别虚拟试衣方法Dress Code，解决现有数据集对全身或下装支持不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图像的虚拟试衣研究主要集中在上装，缺乏全身或下装的数据集，限制了技术发展。
AI.method: 构建包含多类别服装的高分辨率数据集Dress Code（1024x768），并设计像素级语义感知判别器学习细粒度特征。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在视觉质量和定量指标上优于基线和现有最优方法，数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: Dress Code数据集和方法为多类别全身虚拟试衣提供了新基准，推动了该领域的发展。

authors_text: Sugandha Doda,Yuanyuan Wang,Matthias Kahl,Eike Jens Hoffmann,Kim Ouan,Hannes Taubenböck,Xiao Xiang Zhu
title: So2Sat POP -- A Curated Benchmark Data Set for Population Estimation from Space on a Continental Scale
title_zh: So2Sat POP——用于从大陆尺度空间进行人口估算的精心策划的基准数据集
abstract: Obtaining a dynamic population distribution is key to many decision-making processes such as urban planning, disaster management and most importantly helping the government to better allocate socio-technical supply. For the aspiration of these objectives, good population data is essential. The traditional method of collecting population data through the census is expensive and tedious. In recent years, statistical and machine learning methods have been developed to estimate population distribution. Most of the methods use data sets that are either developed on a small scale or not publicly available yet. Thus, the development and evaluation of new methods become challenging. We fill this gap by providing a comprehensive data set for population estimation in 98 European cities. The data set comprises a digital elevation model, local climate zone, land use proportions, nighttime lights in combination with multi-spectral Sentinel-2 imagery, and data from the Open Street Map initiative. We anticipate that it would be a valuable addition to the research community for the development of sophisticated approaches in the field of population estimation.
summary: Obtaining a dynamic population distribution is key to many decision-making processes such as urban planning, disaster management and most importantly helping the government to better allocate socio-technical supply. For the aspiration of these objectives, good population data is essential. The traditional method of collecting population data through the census is expensive and tedious. In recent years, statistical and machine learning methods have been developed to estimate population distribution. Most of the methods use data sets that are either developed on a small scale or not publicly available yet. Thus, the development and evaluation of new methods become challenging. We fill this gap by providing a comprehensive data set for population estimation in 98 European cities. The data set comprises a digital elevation model, local climate zone, land use proportions, nighttime lights in combination with multi-spectral Sentinel-2 imagery, and data from the Open Street Map initiative. We anticipate that it would be a valuable addition to the research community for the development of sophisticated approaches in the field of population estimation.
abstract_zh: 获得动态的人口分布是许多决策过程的关键，例如城市规划、灾害管理，最重要的是帮助政府更好地分配社会技术供应。为了实现这些目标，良好的人口数据至关重要。通过人口普查收集人口数据的传统方法既昂贵又乏味。近年来，统计和机器学习方法已被开发来估计人口分布。大多数方法使用的数据集要么是小规模开发的，要么尚未公开。因此，新方法的开发和评估变得具有挑战性。我们通过提供用于 98 个欧洲城市人口估算的综合数据集来填补这一空白。该数据集包括数字高程模型、当地气候区、土地利用比例、夜间灯光与多光谱 Sentinel-2 图像以及来自开放街道地图计划的数据。我们预计这对于研究界在人口估计领域开发复杂方法来说将是一个有价值的补充。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为So2Sat POP的基准数据集，用于从太空进行大陆尺度的人口估算。
AI.motivation: 传统人口普查成本高且耗时，现有统计和机器学习方法因缺乏公开的大规模数据集而难以有效开发和评估。
AI.method: 整合数字高程模型、局部气候区、土地利用比例、夜间灯光数据、Sentinel-2多光谱影像及OpenStreetMap数据，构建覆盖98个欧洲城市的综合数据集。
AI.result: 提供了一个包含多源异构数据的基准数据集，填补了欧洲大陆尺度人口估算公开数据的空白。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为研究社区提供了宝贵的资源，有助于推动更复杂的人口估算方法的发展。

search_text: So2Sat POP -- A Curated Benchmark Data Set for Population Estimation from Space on a Continental Scale So2Sat POP——用于从大陆尺度空间进行人口估算的精心策划的基准数据集 Obtaining a dynamic population distribution is key to many decision-making processes such as urban planning, disaster management and most importantly helping the government to better allocate socio-technical supply. For the aspiration of these objectives, good population data is essential. The traditional method of collecting population data through the census is expensive and tedious. In recent years, statistical and machine learning methods have been developed to estimate population distribution. Most of the methods use data sets that are either developed on a small scale or not publicly available yet. Thus, the development and evaluation of new methods become challenging. We fill this gap by providing a comprehensive data set for population estimation in 98 European cities. The data set comprises a digital elevation model, local climate zone, land use proportions, nighttime lights in combination with multi-spectral Sentinel-2 imagery, and data from the Open Street Map initiative. We anticipate that it would be a valuable addition to the research community for the development of sophisticated approaches in the field of population estimation. 获得动态的人口分布是许多决策过程的关键，例如城市规划、灾害管理，最重要的是帮助政府更好地分配社会技术供应。为了实现这些目标，良好的人口数据至关重要。通过人口普查收集人口数据的传统方法既昂贵又乏味。近年来，统计和机器学习方法已被开发来估计人口分布。大多数方法使用的数据集要么是小规模开发的，要么尚未公开。因此，新方法的开发和评估变得具有挑战性。我们通过提供用于 98 个欧洲城市人口估算的综合数据集来填补这一空白。该数据集包括数字高程模型、当地气候区、土地利用比例、夜间灯光与多光谱 Sentinel-2 图像以及来自开放街道地图计划的数据。我们预计这对于研究界在人口估计领域开发复杂方法来说将是一个有价值的补充。 本文提出一个名为So2Sat POP的基准数据集，用于从太空进行大陆尺度的人口估算。 Sugandha Doda,Yuanyuan Wang,Matthias Kahl,Eike Jens Hoffmann,Kim Ouan,Hannes Taubenböck,Xiao Xiang Zhu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY,stat.ML

authors_text: Namyong Park,Ryan Rossi,Eunyee Koh,Iftikhar Ahamath Burhanuddin,Sungchul Kim,Fan Du,Nesreen Ahmed,Christos Faloutsos
title: CGC: Contrastive Graph Clustering for Community Detection and Tracking
title_zh: CGC：用于社区检测和跟踪的对比图聚类
abstract: Given entities and their interactions in the web data, which may have occurred at different time, how can we find communities of entities and track their evolution? In this paper, we approach this important task from graph clustering perspective. Recently, state-of-the-art clustering performance in various domains has been achieved by deep clustering methods. Especially, deep graph clustering (DGC) methods have successfully extended deep clustering to graph-structured data by learning node representations and cluster assignments in a joint optimization framework. Despite some differences in modeling choices (e.g., encoder architectures), existing DGC methods are mainly based on autoencoders and use the same clustering objective with relatively minor adaptations. Also, while many real-world graphs are dynamic, previous DGC methods considered only static graphs. In this work, we develop CGC, a novel end-to-end framework for graph clustering, which fundamentally differs from existing methods. CGC learns node embeddings and cluster assignments in a contrastive graph learning framework, where positive and negative samples are carefully selected in a multi-level scheme such that they reflect hierarchical community structures and network homophily. Also, we extend CGC for time-evolving data, where temporal graph clustering is performed in an incremental learning fashion, with the ability to detect change points. Extensive evaluation on real-world graphs demonstrates that the proposed CGC consistently outperforms existing methods.
summary: Given entities and their interactions in the web data, which may have occurred at different time, how can we find communities of entities and track their evolution? In this paper, we approach this important task from graph clustering perspective. Recently, state-of-the-art clustering performance in various domains has been achieved by deep clustering methods. Especially, deep graph clustering (DGC) methods have successfully extended deep clustering to graph-structured data by learning node representations and cluster assignments in a joint optimization framework. Despite some differences in modeling choices (e.g., encoder architectures), existing DGC methods are mainly based on autoencoders and use the same clustering objective with relatively minor adaptations. Also, while many real-world graphs are dynamic, previous DGC methods considered only static graphs. In this work, we develop CGC, a novel end-to-end framework for graph clustering, which fundamentally differs from existing methods. CGC learns node embeddings and cluster assignments in a contrastive graph learning framework, where positive and negative samples are carefully selected in a multi-level scheme such that they reflect hierarchical community structures and network homophily. Also, we extend CGC for time-evolving data, where temporal graph clustering is performed in an incremental learning fashion, with the ability to detect change points. Extensive evaluation on real-world graphs demonstrates that the proposed CGC consistently outperforms existing methods.
abstract_zh: 给定网络数据中可能发生在不同时间的实体及其交互，我们如何找到实体社区并跟踪它们的演变？在本文中，我们从图聚类的角度来处理这一重要任务。最近，通过深度聚类方法已经在各个领域实现了最先进的聚类性能。特别是，深度图聚类（DGC）方法通过在联合优化框架中学习节点表示和聚类分配，成功地将深度聚类扩展到图结构数据。尽管建模选择（例如编码器架构）存在一些差异，但现有的 DGC 方法主要基于自动编码器，并使用相同的聚类目标，但适应性相对较小。此外，虽然许多现实世界的图是动态的，但以前的 DGC 方法只考虑静态图。在这项工作中，我们开发了 CGC，这是一种新颖的图聚类端到端框架，它与现有方法有根本的不同。 CGC 在对比图学习框架中学习节点嵌入和聚类分配，其中在多级方案中仔细选择正样本和负样本，以便它们反映分层社区结构和网络同质性。此外，我们还针对时间演化数据扩展了 CGC，其中时间图聚类以增量学习方式执行，并且能够检测变化点。对现实世界图的广泛评估表明，所提出的 CGC 始终优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CGC框架，通过对比图聚类方法实现对动态网络中实体社区的检测与追踪。
AI.motivation: 现有深度图聚类方法多针对静态图且聚类目标相似，难以处理动态网络中的社区演化及分层结构问题。
AI.method: 基于对比学习框架，通过多层级正负样本选择反映社区层次结构与同质性，并采用增量学习处理时间演化数据以检测变化点。
AI.result: 在多个真实网络数据集上验证，CGC在社区检测与追踪任务中持续优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CGC通过对比学习与增量学习有效解决了动态网络社区发现的挑战，为图聚类领域提供新思路。

authors_text: Federico Landi,Roberto Bigazzi,Marcella Cornia,Silvia Cascianelli,Lorenzo Baraldi,Rita Cucchiara
title: Spot the Difference: A Novel Task for Embodied Agents in Changing Environments
title_zh: 发现差异：变化环境中实体主体的一项新任务
comment: Accepted by 26TH International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR 2022)
comments: Accepted by 26TH International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR 2022)
abstract: Embodied AI is a recent research area that aims at creating intelligent agents that can move and operate inside an environment. Existing approaches in this field demand the agents to act in completely new and unexplored scenes. However, this setting is far from realistic use cases that instead require executing multiple tasks in the same environment. Even if the environment changes over time, the agent could still count on its global knowledge about the scene while trying to adapt its internal representation to the current state of the environment. To make a step towards this setting, we propose Spot the Difference: a novel task for Embodied AI where the agent has access to an outdated map of the environment and needs to recover the correct layout in a fixed time budget. To this end, we collect a new dataset of occupancy maps starting from existing datasets of 3D spaces and generating a number of possible layouts for a single environment. This dataset can be employed in the popular Habitat simulator and is fully compliant with existing methods that employ reconstructed occupancy maps during navigation. Furthermore, we propose an exploration policy that can take advantage of previous knowledge of the environment and identify changes in the scene faster and more effectively than existing agents. Experimental results show that the proposed architecture outperforms existing state-of-the-art models for exploration on this new setting.
summary: Embodied AI is a recent research area that aims at creating intelligent agents that can move and operate inside an environment. Existing approaches in this field demand the agents to act in completely new and unexplored scenes. However, this setting is far from realistic use cases that instead require executing multiple tasks in the same environment. Even if the environment changes over time, the agent could still count on its global knowledge about the scene while trying to adapt its internal representation to the current state of the environment. To make a step towards this setting, we propose Spot the Difference: a novel task for Embodied AI where the agent has access to an outdated map of the environment and needs to recover the correct layout in a fixed time budget. To this end, we collect a new dataset of occupancy maps starting from existing datasets of 3D spaces and generating a number of possible layouts for a single environment. This dataset can be employed in the popular Habitat simulator and is fully compliant with existing methods that employ reconstructed occupancy maps during navigation. Furthermore, we propose an exploration policy that can take advantage of previous knowledge of the environment and identify changes in the scene faster and more effectively than existing agents. Experimental results show that the proposed architecture outperforms existing state-of-the-art models for exploration on this new setting.
abstract_zh: 嵌入式人工智能是最近的一个研究领域，旨在创建可以在环境中移动和操作的智能代理。该领域的现有方法要求智能体在全新且未经探索的场景中行动。但是，此设置与需要在同一环境中执行多个任务的实际用例相去甚远。即使环境随着时间的推移而变化，代理仍然可以依靠其关于场景的全局知识，同时尝试使其内部表示适应环境的当前状态。为了实现这一设置，我们提出了“发现差异”：一项针对 Embodied AI 的新颖任务，其中代理可以访问过时的环境地图，并且需要在固定的时间预算内恢复正确的布局。为此，我们从现有的 3D 空间数据集开始收集新的占用图数据集，并为单个环境生成许多可能的布局。该数据集可在流行的栖息地模拟器中使用，并且完全符合在导航过程中使用重建占用地图的现有方法。此外，我们提出了一种探索策略，可以利用先前的环境知识，比现有代理更快、更有效地识别场景的变化。实验结果表明，所提出的架构优于现有最先进的模型，用于探索这种新设置。

AI.tldr: 提出一种新任务，要求具身智能体在动态环境中利用过时地图快速识别环境变化并恢复正确布局
AI.motivation: 现有具身AI方法要求智能体在全新环境中行动，但实际应用中环境会变化，智能体需利用已有知识适应变化
AI.method: 构建基于现有3D空间数据集生成的占用地图数据集，设计探索策略利用环境先验知识快速识别变化
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在探索任务中优于现有最先进模型
AI.conclusion: 该任务和方法为具身智能体在动态环境中的适应性提供了新方向

authors_text: Chengcheng Guo,Bo Zhao,Yanbing Bai
title: DeepCore: A Comprehensive Library for Coreset Selection in Deep Learning
title_zh: DeepCore：深度学习中核心集选择的综合库
abstract: Coreset selection, which aims to select a subset of the most informative training samples, is a long-standing learning problem that can benefit many downstream tasks such as data-efficient learning, continual learning, neural architecture search, active learning, etc. However, many existing coreset selection methods are not designed for deep learning, which may have high complexity and poor generalization performance. In addition, the recently proposed methods are evaluated on models, datasets, and settings of different complexities. To advance the research of coreset selection in deep learning, we contribute a comprehensive code library, namely DeepCore, and provide an empirical study on popular coreset selection methods on CIFAR10 and ImageNet datasets. Extensive experiments on CIFAR10 and ImageNet datasets verify that, although various methods have advantages in certain experiment settings, random selection is still a strong baseline.
summary: Coreset selection, which aims to select a subset of the most informative training samples, is a long-standing learning problem that can benefit many downstream tasks such as data-efficient learning, continual learning, neural architecture search, active learning, etc. However, many existing coreset selection methods are not designed for deep learning, which may have high complexity and poor generalization performance. In addition, the recently proposed methods are evaluated on models, datasets, and settings of different complexities. To advance the research of coreset selection in deep learning, we contribute a comprehensive code library, namely DeepCore, and provide an empirical study on popular coreset selection methods on CIFAR10 and ImageNet datasets. Extensive experiments on CIFAR10 and ImageNet datasets verify that, although various methods have advantages in certain experiment settings, random selection is still a strong baseline.
abstract_zh: 核心集选择旨在选择信息最丰富的训练样本的子集，是一个长期存在的学习问题，可以使许多下游任务受益，例如数据高效学习、持续学习、神经架构搜索、主动学习等。然而，许多现有的核心集选择方法并不是为深度学习设计的，其复杂度高且泛化性能差。此外，最近提出的方法还针对不同复杂性的模型、数据集和设置进行了评估。为了推进深度学习中核心集选择的研究，我们贡献了一个综合的代码库，即 DeepCore，并对 CIFAR10 和 ImageNet 数据集上流行的核心集选择方法进行了实证研究。对 CIFAR10 和 ImageNet 数据集的大量实验证明，尽管各种方法在某些实验设置中具有优势，但随机选择仍然是一个强大的基线。

AI.tldr: 开发名为DeepCore的综合库，用于评估深度学习中Coreset选择方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Coreset选择方法复杂度高、泛化性差，且缺乏在深度学习场景下的统一评估基准。
AI.method: 构建DeepCore库，系统评估主流Coreset方法在CIFAR10和ImageNet数据集上的表现。
AI.result: 实验显示不同方法在特定场景下有优势，但随机选择仍保持强基线性能。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步探索更有效的深度学习Coreset选择方法，DeepCore库为后续研究提供重要工具支持。

authors_text: Miguel Á. González-Santamarta,Francisco J. Rodríguez-Lera,Francisco Martín,Camino Fernández,Vicente Matellán
title: KANT: A tool for Grounding and Knowledge Management
title_zh: 康德：基础和知识管理的工具
abstract: The intelligent robotics community usually organizes knowledge into symbolic and sub-symbolic levels. These two levels establish the set of symbols and rules for manipulating knowledge based on their (symbol system - dictionary). Thus, the correspondences -- Grounding or knowledge representation -- require specific software techniques for anchoring continuous and discrete state variables between these two levels. This paper presents the design and evaluation of an Open Source tool called KANT(Knowledge mAnagemeNT) to let different components of the system architecture controlling the robot query, save, edit, and delete the data from the Knowledge Base without having to worry about the type and the implementation of the source data. Using KANT, components managing subsymbolic information can smoothly interact with symbolic components. Besides, implementation mechanisms used in KANT, such as the use of in-memory and non-SQL databases, improve the performance of the knowledge management systems in ROS middleware, as shown by the evaluations presented in this work.
summary: The intelligent robotics community usually organizes knowledge into symbolic and sub-symbolic levels. These two levels establish the set of symbols and rules for manipulating knowledge based on their (symbol system - dictionary). Thus, the correspondences -- Grounding or knowledge representation -- require specific software techniques for anchoring continuous and discrete state variables between these two levels. This paper presents the design and evaluation of an Open Source tool called KANT(Knowledge mAnagemeNT) to let different components of the system architecture controlling the robot query, save, edit, and delete the data from the Knowledge Base without having to worry about the type and the implementation of the source data. Using KANT, components managing subsymbolic information can smoothly interact with symbolic components. Besides, implementation mechanisms used in KANT, such as the use of in-memory and non-SQL databases, improve the performance of the knowledge management systems in ROS middleware, as shown by the evaluations presented in this work.
abstract_zh: 智能机器人社区通常将知识组织成符号和子符号级别。这两个层次建立了基于它们（符号系统-字典）操作知识的符号集和规则。因此，对应关系（基础或知识表示）需要特定的软件技术来锚定这两个级别之间的连续和离散状态变量。本文提出了一种名为 KANT（知识管理 NT）的开源工具的设计和评估，让系统架构的不同组件控制机器人查询、保存、编辑和删除知识库中的数据，而不必担心源数据的类型和实现。使用 KANT，管理子符号信息的组件可以与符号组件顺利交互。此外，KANT 中使用的实现机制，例如使用内存和非 SQL 数据库，提高了 ROS 中间件中知识管理系统的性能，如本工作中提出的评估所示。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并评估了一个名为KANT的开源工具，用于机器人系统中符号与次符号层次的知识管理与接地。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人系统在符号与次符号层次间缺乏高效的知识表示与交互机制，导致数据类型和实现细节处理复杂。
AI.method: 通过开发支持内存与非SQL数据库的KANT工具，实现跨层次数据的无缝交互与高效管理。
AI.result: 实验表明，KANT提升了ROS中间件中知识管理系统的性能，简化了组件间的数据操作。
AI.conclusion: KANT为机器人系统提供了灵活、高效的知识管理方案，增强了符号与次符号组件的协同能力。

authors_text: Alex Tamkin,Dat Nguyen,Salil Deshpande,Jesse Mu,Noah Goodman
title: Active Learning Helps Pretrained Models Learn the Intended Task
title_zh: 主动学习帮助预训练模型学习预期任务
abstract: Models can fail in unpredictable ways during deployment due to task ambiguity, when multiple behaviors are consistent with the provided training data. An example is an object classifier trained on red squares and blue circles: when encountering blue squares, the intended behavior is undefined. We investigate whether pretrained models are better active learners, capable of disambiguating between the possible tasks a user may be trying to specify. Intriguingly, we find that better active learning is an emergent property of the pretraining process: pretrained models require up to 5 times fewer labels when using uncertainty-based active learning, while non-pretrained models see no or even negative benefit. We find these gains come from an ability to select examples with attributes that disambiguate the intended behavior, such as rare product categories or atypical backgrounds. These attributes are far more linearly separable in pretrained model's representation spaces vs non-pretrained models, suggesting a possible mechanism for this behavior.
summary: Models can fail in unpredictable ways during deployment due to task ambiguity, when multiple behaviors are consistent with the provided training data. An example is an object classifier trained on red squares and blue circles: when encountering blue squares, the intended behavior is undefined. We investigate whether pretrained models are better active learners, capable of disambiguating between the possible tasks a user may be trying to specify. Intriguingly, we find that better active learning is an emergent property of the pretraining process: pretrained models require up to 5 times fewer labels when using uncertainty-based active learning, while non-pretrained models see no or even negative benefit. We find these gains come from an ability to select examples with attributes that disambiguate the intended behavior, such as rare product categories or atypical backgrounds. These attributes are far more linearly separable in pretrained model's representation spaces vs non-pretrained models, suggesting a possible mechanism for this behavior.
abstract_zh: 当多种行为与提供的训练数据一致时，由于任务模糊性，模型在部署过程中可能会以不可预测的方式失败。一个例子是在红色方块和蓝色圆圈上训练的对象分类器：当遇到蓝色方块时，预期的行为是未定义的。我们研究预训练模型是否是更好的主动学习者，能够消除用户可能尝试指定的可能任务之间的歧义。有趣的是，我们发现更好的主动学习是预训练过程的一个新兴特性：使用基于不确定性的主动学习时，预训练模型所需的标签最多减少 5 倍，而非预训练模型则看不到任何好处，甚至没有好处，甚至带来负面好处。我们发现这些收益来自于选择具有消除预期行为歧义的属性的示例的能力，例如稀有产品类别或非典型背景。与非预训练模型相比，这些属性在预训练模型的表示空间中的线性可分性要好得多，这表明了这种行为的可能机制。

AI.tldr: 研究预训练模型在主动学习中的优势，发现其能更高效地通过主动学习解决任务歧义问题。
AI.motivation: 模型在部署时可能因任务模糊性导致失败，而预训练模型可能具备更好的主动学习能力以消除歧义。
AI.method: 通过比较预训练与非预训练模型在主动学习中的表现，分析其选择样本的属性及表示空间差异。
AI.result: 预训练模型使用不确定性主动学习时标签需求减少5倍，且能选择更有效的歧义消除样本。
AI.conclusion: 预训练模型的表示空间特性使其在主动学习中表现更优，可能源于属性线性可分性的提升。

authors_text: Samuele Papa,Ole Winther,Andrea Dittadi
title: Inductive Biases for Object-Centric Representations in the Presence of Complex Textures
title_zh: 存在复杂纹理时以对象为中心的表示的归纳偏差
comment: UAI 2022 workshop on Causal Representation Learning
comments: UAI 2022 workshop on Causal Representation Learning
abstract: Understanding which inductive biases could be helpful for the unsupervised learning of object-centric representations of natural scenes is challenging. In this paper, we systematically investigate the performance of two models on datasets where neural style transfer was used to obtain objects with complex textures while still retaining ground-truth annotations. We find that by using a single module to reconstruct both the shape and visual appearance of each object, the model learns more useful representations and achieves better object separation. In addition, we observe that adjusting the latent space size is insufficient to improve segmentation performance. Finally, the downstream usefulness of the representations is significantly more strongly correlated with segmentation quality than with reconstruction accuracy.
summary: Understanding which inductive biases could be helpful for the unsupervised learning of object-centric representations of natural scenes is challenging. In this paper, we systematically investigate the performance of two models on datasets where neural style transfer was used to obtain objects with complex textures while still retaining ground-truth annotations. We find that by using a single module to reconstruct both the shape and visual appearance of each object, the model learns more useful representations and achieves better object separation. In addition, we observe that adjusting the latent space size is insufficient to improve segmentation performance. Finally, the downstream usefulness of the representations is significantly more strongly correlated with segmentation quality than with reconstruction accuracy.
abstract_zh: 理解哪些归纳偏差可能有助于自然场景的以对象为中心的表示的无监督学习是具有挑战性的。在本文中，我们系统地研究了两个模型在数据集上的性能，其中使用神经风格迁移来获取具有复杂纹理的对象，同时仍然保留真实注释。我们发现，通过使用单个模块来重建每个对象的形状和视觉外观，模型可以学习更有用的表示并实现更好的对象分离。此外，我们观察到调整潜在空间大小不足以提高分割性能。最后，表示的下游有用性与分割质量的相关性明显高于与重建精度的相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在复杂纹理存在的情况下，哪些归纳偏置有助于无监督学习物体中心表示。
AI.motivation: 物体中心表示的无监督学习在复杂纹理场景下面临挑战，需要探索有效的归纳偏置以提高表示质量。
AI.method: 在神经风格迁移生成的复杂纹理数据集上，系统评估两种模型性能，通过单一模块联合重建物体形状与外观，并调整潜在空间维度。
AI.result: 单一模块重建方法获得更优表示，潜在空间调整无效，分割质量与下游任务表现的相关性高于重建准确率。
AI.conclusion: 物体分离质量是衡量表示有效性的关键指标，联合重建模块和分割质量相关性对优化模型设计具有指导意义。

search_text: Inductive Biases for Object-Centric Representations in the Presence of Complex Textures 存在复杂纹理时以对象为中心的表示的归纳偏差 Understanding which inductive biases could be helpful for the unsupervised learning of object-centric representations of natural scenes is challenging. In this paper, we systematically investigate the performance of two models on datasets where neural style transfer was used to obtain objects with complex textures while still retaining ground-truth annotations. We find that by using a single module to reconstruct both the shape and visual appearance of each object, the model learns more useful representations and achieves better object separation. In addition, we observe that adjusting the latent space size is insufficient to improve segmentation performance. Finally, the downstream usefulness of the representations is significantly more strongly correlated with segmentation quality than with reconstruction accuracy. 理解哪些归纳偏差可能有助于自然场景的以对象为中心的表示的无监督学习是具有挑战性的。在本文中，我们系统地研究了两个模型在数据集上的性能，其中使用神经风格迁移来获取具有复杂纹理的对象，同时仍然保留真实注释。我们发现，通过使用单个模块来重建每个对象的形状和视觉外观，模型可以学习更有用的表示并实现更好的对象分离。此外，我们观察到调整潜在空间大小不足以提高分割性能。最后，表示的下游有用性与分割质量的相关性明显高于与重建精度的相关性。 本文研究了在复杂纹理存在的情况下，哪些归纳偏置有助于无监督学习物体中心表示。 Samuele Papa,Ole Winther,Andrea Dittadi cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yangrun Hu,Yuanfan Guo,Fan Zhang,Mingda Wang,Tiancheng Lin,Rong Wu,Yi Xu
title: Enhancing Non-mass Breast Ultrasound Cancer Classification With Knowledge Transfer
title_zh: 通过知识转移加强非肿块乳腺癌超声分类
abstract: Much progress has been made in the deep neural network (DNN) based diagnosis of mass lesions breast ultrasound (BUS) images. However, the non-mass lesion is less investigated because of the limited data. Based on the insight that mass data is sufficient and shares the same knowledge structure with non-mass data of identifying the malignancy of a lesion based on the ultrasound image, we propose a novel transfer learning framework to enhance the generalizability of the DNN model for non-mass BUS with the help of mass BUS. Specifically, we train a shared DNN with combined non-mass and mass data. With the prior of different marginal distributions in input and output space, we employ two domain alignment strategies in the proposed transfer learning framework with the insight of capturing domain-specific distribution to address the issue of domain shift. Moreover, we propose a cross-domain semantic-preserve data generation module called CrossMix to recover the missing distribution between non-mass and mass data that is not presented in training data. Experimental results on an in-house dataset demonstrate that the DNN model trained with combined data by our framework achieves a 10% improvement in AUC on the malignancy prediction task of non-mass BUS compared to training directly on non-mass data.
summary: Much progress has been made in the deep neural network (DNN) based diagnosis of mass lesions breast ultrasound (BUS) images. However, the non-mass lesion is less investigated because of the limited data. Based on the insight that mass data is sufficient and shares the same knowledge structure with non-mass data of identifying the malignancy of a lesion based on the ultrasound image, we propose a novel transfer learning framework to enhance the generalizability of the DNN model for non-mass BUS with the help of mass BUS. Specifically, we train a shared DNN with combined non-mass and mass data. With the prior of different marginal distributions in input and output space, we employ two domain alignment strategies in the proposed transfer learning framework with the insight of capturing domain-specific distribution to address the issue of domain shift. Moreover, we propose a cross-domain semantic-preserve data generation module called CrossMix to recover the missing distribution between non-mass and mass data that is not presented in training data. Experimental results on an in-house dataset demonstrate that the DNN model trained with combined data by our framework achieves a 10% improvement in AUC on the malignancy prediction task of non-mass BUS compared to training directly on non-mass data.
abstract_zh: 基于深度神经网络（DNN）的乳腺超声（BUS）图像肿块诊断取得了很大进展。然而，由于数据有限，对非肿块性病变的研究较少。基于海量数据充足且与基于超声图像识别病变恶性程度的非海量数据共享相同知识结构的见解，我们提出了一种新颖的迁移学习框架，以借助海量总线增强非海量总线的 DNN 模型的泛化性。具体来说，我们结合非海量数据和海量数据训练共享 DNN。利用输入和输出空间中不同边缘分布的先验，我们在所提出的迁移学习框架中采用两种域对齐策略，并通过捕获特定于域的分布来解决域转移问题。此外，我们提出了一种称为 CrossMix 的跨域语义保留数据生成模块，用于恢复训练数据中未呈现的非海量数据和海量数据之间缺失的分布。内部数据集上的实验结果表明，与直接在非海量数据上训练相比，通过我们的框架使用组合数据训练的 DNN 模型在非海量 BUS 恶性肿瘤预测任务上的 AUC 提高了 10%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于知识迁移的深度学习框架，通过结合肿块病变数据增强非肿块病变乳腺超声图像的癌症分类性能。
AI.motivation: 非肿块病变乳腺超声图像因数据量有限难以有效分类，而肿块病变数据充足且与非肿块病变共享相似的知识结构。
AI.method: 训练共享DNN模型结合肿块与非肿块数据，采用域对齐策略和跨域语义保留数据生成模块CrossMix以解决域偏移问题。
AI.result: 在内部数据集上，框架使非肿块病变恶性预测任务的AUC值较直接使用非肿块数据训练提升10%。
AI.conclusion: 通过迁移学习与数据生成技术有效利用肿块数据，显著提升了非肿块病变分类性能，验证了方法的有效性。

search_text: Enhancing Non-mass Breast Ultrasound Cancer Classification With Knowledge Transfer 通过知识转移加强非肿块乳腺癌超声分类 Much progress has been made in the deep neural network (DNN) based diagnosis of mass lesions breast ultrasound (BUS) images. However, the non-mass lesion is less investigated because of the limited data. Based on the insight that mass data is sufficient and shares the same knowledge structure with non-mass data of identifying the malignancy of a lesion based on the ultrasound image, we propose a novel transfer learning framework to enhance the generalizability of the DNN model for non-mass BUS with the help of mass BUS. Specifically, we train a shared DNN with combined non-mass and mass data. With the prior of different marginal distributions in input and output space, we employ two domain alignment strategies in the proposed transfer learning framework with the insight of capturing domain-specific distribution to address the issue of domain shift. Moreover, we propose a cross-domain semantic-preserve data generation module called CrossMix to recover the missing distribution between non-mass and mass data that is not presented in training data. Experimental results on an in-house dataset demonstrate that the DNN model trained with combined data by our framework achieves a 10% improvement in AUC on the malignancy prediction task of non-mass BUS compared to training directly on non-mass data. 基于深度神经网络（DNN）的乳腺超声（BUS）图像肿块诊断取得了很大进展。然而，由于数据有限，对非肿块性病变的研究较少。基于海量数据充足且与基于超声图像识别病变恶性程度的非海量数据共享相同知识结构的见解，我们提出了一种新颖的迁移学习框架，以借助海量总线增强非海量总线的 DNN 模型的泛化性。具体来说，我们结合非海量数据和海量数据训练共享 DNN。利用输入和输出空间中不同边缘分布的先验，我们在所提出的迁移学习框架中采用两种域对齐策略，并通过捕获特定于域的分布来解决域转移问题。此外，我们提出了一种称为 CrossMix 的跨域语义保留数据生成模块，用于恢复训练数据中未呈现的非海量数据和海量数据之间缺失的分布。内部数据集上的实验结果表明，与直接在非海量数据上训练相比，通过我们的框架使用组合数据训练的 DNN 模型在非海量 BUS 恶性肿瘤预测任务上的 AUC 提高了 10%。 本文提出一种基于知识迁移的深度学习框架，通过结合肿块病变数据增强非肿块病变乳腺超声图像的癌症分类性能。 Yangrun Hu,Yuanfan Guo,Fan Zhang,Mingda Wang,Tiancheng Lin,Rong Wu,Yi Xu eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Yuanfan Guo,Canqian Yang,Tiancheng Lin,Chunxiao Li,Rui Zhang,Yi Xu
title: Self Supervised Lesion Recognition For Breast Ultrasound Diagnosis
title_zh: 用于乳腺超声诊断的自我监督病变识别
abstract: Previous deep learning based Computer Aided Diagnosis (CAD) system treats multiple views of the same lesion as independent images. Since an ultrasound image only describes a partial 2D projection of a 3D lesion, such paradigm ignores the semantic relationship between different views of a lesion, which is inconsistent with the traditional diagnosis where sonographers analyze a lesion from at least two views. In this paper, we propose a multi-task framework that complements Benign/Malignant classification task with lesion recognition (LR) which helps leveraging relationship among multiple views of a single lesion to learn a complete representation of the lesion. To be specific, LR task employs contrastive learning to encourage representation that pulls multiple views of the same lesion and repels those of different lesions. The task therefore facilitates a representation that is not only invariant to the view change of the lesion, but also capturing fine-grained features to distinguish between different lesions. Experiments show that the proposed multi-task framework boosts the performance of Benign/Malignant classification as two sub-tasks complement each other and enhance the learned representation of ultrasound images.
summary: Previous deep learning based Computer Aided Diagnosis (CAD) system treats multiple views of the same lesion as independent images. Since an ultrasound image only describes a partial 2D projection of a 3D lesion, such paradigm ignores the semantic relationship between different views of a lesion, which is inconsistent with the traditional diagnosis where sonographers analyze a lesion from at least two views. In this paper, we propose a multi-task framework that complements Benign/Malignant classification task with lesion recognition (LR) which helps leveraging relationship among multiple views of a single lesion to learn a complete representation of the lesion. To be specific, LR task employs contrastive learning to encourage representation that pulls multiple views of the same lesion and repels those of different lesions. The task therefore facilitates a representation that is not only invariant to the view change of the lesion, but also capturing fine-grained features to distinguish between different lesions. Experiments show that the proposed multi-task framework boosts the performance of Benign/Malignant classification as two sub-tasks complement each other and enhance the learned representation of ultrasound images.
abstract_zh: 先前基于深度学习的计算机辅助诊断（CAD）系统将同一病变的多个视图视为独立图像。由于超声图像仅描述 3D 病灶的部分 2D 投影，因此这种范式忽略了病灶不同视图之间的语义关系，这与超声波技师从至少两个视图分析病灶的传统诊断不一致。在本文中，我们提出了一个多任务框架，通过病变识别（LR）补充良性/恶性分类任务，有助于利用单个病变的多个视图之间的关系来学习病变的完整表示。具体来说，LR 任务采用对比学习来鼓励表示，即提取同一病变的多个视图并排斥不同病变的视图。因此，该任务促进了一种表示，该表示不仅对病变的视图变化保持不变，而且还捕获细粒度的特征以区分不同的病变。实验表明，所提出的多任务框架提高了良性/恶性分类的性能，因为两个子任务相互补充并增强了超声图像的学习表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务框架，通过自监督病灶识别任务增强乳腺超声图像的良性/恶性分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统CAD系统将同一病灶的不同超声视图视为独立图像，忽略了多视图间的语义关联，而实际诊断需结合多视图分析。
AI.method: 设计多任务学习框架，结合良性/恶性分类与自监督病灶识别任务，利用对比学习拉近同一病灶多视图表示并推开不同病灶表示。
AI.result: 实验表明多任务框架通过子任务互补增强了特征表示，显著提升了分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 融合多视图语义关系的自监督学习能有效提升乳腺超声诊断的表示学习效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务框架，通过自监督病灶识别任务增强乳腺超声图像的良性/恶性分类性能。

ai_content.conclusion: 融合多视图语义关系的自监督学习能有效提升乳腺超声诊断的表示学习效果。

motivation: 传统CAD系统将同一病灶的不同超声视图视为独立图像，忽略了多视图间的语义关联，而实际诊断需结合多视图分析。
method: 设计多任务学习框架，结合良性/恶性分类与自监督病灶识别任务，利用对比学习拉近同一病灶多视图表示并推开不同病灶表示。
result: 实验表明多任务框架通过子任务互补增强了特征表示，显著提升了分类准确率。
conclusion: 融合多视图语义关系的自监督学习能有效提升乳腺超声诊断的表示学习效果。
search_text: Self Supervised Lesion Recognition For Breast Ultrasound Diagnosis 用于乳腺超声诊断的自我监督病变识别 Previous deep learning based Computer Aided Diagnosis (CAD) system treats multiple views of the same lesion as independent images. Since an ultrasound image only describes a partial 2D projection of a 3D lesion, such paradigm ignores the semantic relationship between different views of a lesion, which is inconsistent with the traditional diagnosis where sonographers analyze a lesion from at least two views. In this paper, we propose a multi-task framework that complements Benign/Malignant classification task with lesion recognition (LR) which helps leveraging relationship among multiple views of a single lesion to learn a complete representation of the lesion. To be specific, LR task employs contrastive learning to encourage representation that pulls multiple views of the same lesion and repels those of different lesions. The task therefore facilitates a representation that is not only invariant to the view change of the lesion, but also capturing fine-grained features to distinguish between different lesions. Experiments show that the proposed multi-task framework boosts the performance of Benign/Malignant classification as two sub-tasks complement each other and enhance the learned representation of ultrasound images. 先前基于深度学习的计算机辅助诊断（CAD）系统将同一病变的多个视图视为独立图像。由于超声图像仅描述 3D 病灶的部分 2D 投影，因此这种范式忽略了病灶不同视图之间的语义关系，这与超声波技师从至少两个视图分析病灶的传统诊断不一致。在本文中，我们提出了一个多任务框架，通过病变识别（LR）补充良性/恶性分类任务，有助于利用单个病变的多个视图之间的关系来学习病变的完整表示。具体来说，LR 任务采用对比学习来鼓励表示，即提取同一病变的多个视图并排斥不同病变的视图。因此，该任务促进了一种表示，该表示不仅对病变的视图变化保持不变，而且还捕获细粒度的特征以区分不同的病变。实验表明，所提出的多任务框架提高了良性/恶性分类的性能，因为两个子任务相互补充并增强了超声图像的学习表示。 本文提出一种多任务框架，通过自监督病灶识别任务增强乳腺超声图像的良性/恶性分类性能。 Yuanfan Guo,Canqian Yang,Tiancheng Lin,Chunxiao Li,Rui Zhang,Yi Xu eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Raphael Petegrosso,Vasistakrishna Baderdinni,Thibaud Senechal,Benjamin L. Bullough
title: AB/BA analysis: A framework for estimating keyword spotting recall improvement while maintaining audio privacy
title_zh: AB/BA 分析：在保持音频隐私的同时估计关键字识别召回改进的框架
abstract: Evaluation of keyword spotting (KWS) systems that detect keywords in speech is a challenging task under realistic privacy constraints. The KWS is designed to only collect data when the keyword is present, limiting the availability of hard samples that may contain false negatives, and preventing direct estimation of model recall from production data. Alternatively, complementary data collected from other sources may not be fully representative of the real application. In this work, we propose an evaluation technique which we call AB/BA analysis. Our framework evaluates a candidate KWS model B against a baseline model A, using cross-dataset offline decoding for relative recall estimation, without requiring negative examples. Moreover, we propose a formulation with assumptions that allow estimation of relative false positive rate between models with low variance even when the number of false positives is small. Finally, we propose to leverage machine-generated soft labels, in a technique we call Semi-Supervised AB/BA analysis, that improves the analysis time, privacy, and cost. Experiments with both simulation and real data show that AB/BA analysis is successful at measuring recall improvement in conjunction with the trade-off in relative false positive rate.
summary: Evaluation of keyword spotting (KWS) systems that detect keywords in speech is a challenging task under realistic privacy constraints. The KWS is designed to only collect data when the keyword is present, limiting the availability of hard samples that may contain false negatives, and preventing direct estimation of model recall from production data. Alternatively, complementary data collected from other sources may not be fully representative of the real application. In this work, we propose an evaluation technique which we call AB/BA analysis. Our framework evaluates a candidate KWS model B against a baseline model A, using cross-dataset offline decoding for relative recall estimation, without requiring negative examples. Moreover, we propose a formulation with assumptions that allow estimation of relative false positive rate between models with low variance even when the number of false positives is small. Finally, we propose to leverage machine-generated soft labels, in a technique we call Semi-Supervised AB/BA analysis, that improves the analysis time, privacy, and cost. Experiments with both simulation and real data show that AB/BA analysis is successful at measuring recall improvement in conjunction with the trade-off in relative false positive rate.
abstract_zh: 在现实的隐私限制下，对检测语音中的关键字的关键字识别（KWS）系统进行评估是一项具有挑战性的任务。 KWS 设计为仅在存在关键字时收集数据，限制了可能包含假阴性的硬样本的可用性，并防止从生产数据直接估计模型召回率。或者，从其他来源收集的补充数据可能无法完全代表实际应用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为 AB/BA 分析的评估技术。我们的框架根据基线模型 A 评估候选 KWS 模型 B，使用跨数据集离线解码进行相对召回率估计，而不需要负面示例。此外，我们提出了一种假设公式，即使误报数量很少，也可以估计方差较低的模型之间的相对误报率。最后，我们建议利用机器生成的软标签，即我们称为半监督 AB/BA 分析的技术，该技术可以缩短分析时间、隐私并降低成本。模拟和真实数据的实验表明，AB/BA 分析可以成功地衡量召回率的提高以及相对误报率的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AB/BA分析框架，在保护音频隐私的前提下，通过跨数据集解码评估关键词检测模型的召回率提升。
AI.motivation: 关键词检测系统在真实隐私约束下难以获取负样本进行评估，传统方法依赖生产数据或外部数据存在代表性不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用跨数据集离线解码对比候选模型与基线模型，无需负样本即可估计相对召回率；通过假设降低误报率方差，并引入半监督软标签技术提升效率与隐私保护。
AI.result: 仿真与真实数据实验表明，AB/BA分析能有效衡量召回率提升，同时平衡相对误报率的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: AB/BA框架为隐私敏感场景下的关键词检测模型评估提供了可行方案，兼顾效果与隐私保护需求。

authors_text: Yingtao Tian,Marco Cuturi,David Ha
title: Simultaneous Multiple-Prompt Guided Generation Using Differentiable Optimal Transport
title_zh: 使用可微最优传输的同时多提示引导生成
abstract: Recent advances in deep learning, such as powerful generative models and joint text-image embeddings, have provided the computational creativity community with new tools, opening new perspectives for artistic pursuits. Text-to-image synthesis approaches that operate by generating images from text cues provide a case in point. These images are generated with a latent vector that is progressively refined to agree with text cues. To do so, patches are sampled within the generated image, and compared with the text prompts in the common text-image embedding space; The latent vector is then updated, using gradient descent, to reduce the mean (average) distance between these patches and text cues. While this approach provides artists with ample freedom to customize the overall appearance of images, through their choice in generative models, the reliance on a simple criterion (mean of distances) often causes mode collapse: The entire image is drawn to the average of all text cues, thereby losing their diversity. To address this issue, we propose using matching techniques found in the optimal transport (OT) literature, resulting in images that are able to reflect faithfully a wide diversity of prompts. We provide numerous illustrations showing that OT avoids some of the pitfalls arising from estimating vectors with mean distances, and demonstrate the capacity of our proposed method to perform better in experiments, qualitatively and quantitatively.
summary: Recent advances in deep learning, such as powerful generative models and joint text-image embeddings, have provided the computational creativity community with new tools, opening new perspectives for artistic pursuits. Text-to-image synthesis approaches that operate by generating images from text cues provide a case in point. These images are generated with a latent vector that is progressively refined to agree with text cues. To do so, patches are sampled within the generated image, and compared with the text prompts in the common text-image embedding space; The latent vector is then updated, using gradient descent, to reduce the mean (average) distance between these patches and text cues. While this approach provides artists with ample freedom to customize the overall appearance of images, through their choice in generative models, the reliance on a simple criterion (mean of distances) often causes mode collapse: The entire image is drawn to the average of all text cues, thereby losing their diversity. To address this issue, we propose using matching techniques found in the optimal transport (OT) literature, resulting in images that are able to reflect faithfully a wide diversity of prompts. We provide numerous illustrations showing that OT avoids some of the pitfalls arising from estimating vectors with mean distances, and demonstrate the capacity of our proposed method to perform better in experiments, qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 深度学习的最新进展，例如强大的生成模型和联合文本图像嵌入，为计算创造力社区提供了新工具，为艺术追求开辟了新视角。通过从文本提示生成图像来操作的文本到图像合成方法提供了一个很好的例子。这些图像是使用潜在矢量生成的，该矢量逐渐细化以与文本提示一致。为此，在生成的图像中对补丁进行采样，并与公共文本图像嵌入空间中的文本提示进行比较；然后使用梯度下降更新潜在向量，以减少这些补丁和文本提示之间的平均距离。虽然这种方法为艺术家提供了足够的自由来定制图像的整体外观，但通过他们对生成模型的选择，对简单标准（距离平均值）的依赖通常会导致模式崩溃：整个图像被绘制为所有文本提示的平均值，从而失去了多样性。为了解决这个问题，我们建议使用最佳传输（OT）文献中的匹配技术，从而生成能够忠实反映各种提示的图像。我们提供了大量的插图，表明 OT 避免了用平均距离估计向量所产生的一些陷阱，并证明了我们提出的方法在定性和定量实验中表现更好的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可微分最优运输的多提示同步生成方法，以解决文本到图像合成中的模式崩溃问题，提升生成图像的多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖平均距离准则，导致生成图像趋向于所有提示的平均，丢失多样性，需改进以保留多提示的多样性。
AI.method: 采用最优运输（OT）匹配技术替代平均距离准则，通过可微分OT优化潜在向量，使图像能反映多提示的多样性。
AI.result: 实验表明，OT方法有效避免了平均距离的缺陷，生成图像在多样性和质量上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过OT理论有效解决了多提示生成中的模式崩溃问题，提升了生成图像的多样性和质量，为艺术创作提供更灵活的工具。
