While this approach provides artists with ample freedom to customize the overall appearance of images, through their choice in generative models, the reliance on a simple criterion (mean of distances) often causes mode collapse: The entire image is drawn to the average of all text cues, thereby losing their diversity. To address this issue, we propose using matching techniques found in the optimal transport (OT) literature, resulting in images that are able to reflect faithfully a wide diversity of prompts. We provide numerous illustrations showing that OT avoids some of the pitfalls arising from estimating vectors with mean distances, and demonstrate the capacity of our proposed method to perform better in experiments, qualitatively and quantitatively. 深度学习的最新进展，例如强大的生成模型和联合文本图像嵌入，为计算创造力社区提供了新工具，为艺术追求开辟了新视角。通过从文本提示生成图像来操作的文本到图像合成方法提供了一个很好的例子。这些图像是使用潜在矢量生成的，该矢量逐渐细化以与文本提示一致。为此，在生成的图像中对补丁进行采样，并与公共文本图像嵌入空间中的文本提示进行比较；然后使用梯度下降更新潜在向量，以减少这些补丁和文本提示之间的平均距离。虽然这种方法为艺术家提供了足够的自由来定制图像的整体外观，但通过他们对生成模型的选择，对简单标准（距离平均值）的依赖通常会导致模式崩溃：整个图像被绘制为所有文本提示的平均值，从而失去了多样性。为了解决这个问题，我们建议使用最佳传输（OT）文献中的匹配技术，从而生成能够忠实反映各种提示的图像。我们提供了大量的插图，表明 OT 避免了用平均距离估计向量所产生的一些陷阱，并证明了我们提出的方法在定性和定量实验中表现更好的能力。 本文提出了一种基于可微分最优运输的多提示同步生成方法，以解决文本到图像合成中的模式崩溃问题，提升生成图像的多样性。 Yingtao Tian,Marco Cuturi,David Ha cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.LG

authors_text: Riku Arakawa,Hiromu Yakura
title: AI for human assessment: What do professional assessors need?
title_zh: 人工智能用于人类评估：专业评估员需要什么？
comment: To appear in Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (Case Study)
comments: To appear in Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (Case Study)
abstract: Recent organizations have started to adopt AI-based decision support tools to optimize human resource development practices, while facing various challenges of using AIs in highly contextual and sensitive domains. We present our case study that aims to help professional assessors make decisions in human assessment, in which they conduct interviews with assessees and evaluate their suitability for certain job roles. Our workshop with two industrial assessors elucidated troubles they face (i.e., maintaining stable and non-subjective observation of assessees' behaviors) and derived requirements of AI systems (i.e., extracting their nonverbal cues from interview videos in an interpretable manner). In response, we employed an unsupervised anomaly detection algorithm using multimodal behavioral features such as facial keypoints, body and head pose, and gaze. The algorithm extracts outlier scenes from the video based on behavioral features as well as informing which feature contributes to the outlierness. We first evaluated how the assessors would perceive the extracted cues and discovered that the algorithm is useful in suggesting scenes to which assessors would pay attention, thanks to its interpretability. Then, we developed an interface prototype incorporating the algorithm and had six assessors use it for their actual assessment. Their comments revealed the effectiveness of introducing unsupervised anomaly detection to enhance their feeling of confidence and objectivity of the assessment along with potential use scenarios of such AI-based systems in human assessment. Our approach, which builds on top of the idea of separating observation and interpretation in human-AI collaboration, will facilitate human decision making in highly contextual domains, such as human assessment, while keeping their trust in the system.

We present our case study that aims to help professional assessors make decisions in human assessment, in which they conduct interviews with assessees and evaluate their suitability for certain job roles. Our workshop with two industrial assessors elucidated troubles they face (i.e., maintaining stable and non-subjective observation of assessees' behaviors) and derived requirements of AI systems (i.e., extracting their nonverbal cues from interview videos in an interpretable manner). In response, we employed an unsupervised anomaly detection algorithm using multimodal behavioral features such as facial keypoints, body and head pose, and gaze. The algorithm extracts outlier scenes from the video based on behavioral features as well as informing which feature contributes to the outlierness. We first evaluated how the assessors would perceive the extracted cues and discovered that the algorithm is useful in suggesting scenes to which assessors would pay attention, thanks to its interpretability. Then, we developed an interface prototype incorporating the algorithm and had six assessors use it for their actual assessment. Their comments revealed the effectiveness of introducing unsupervised anomaly detection to enhance their feeling of confidence and objectivity of the assessment along with potential use scenarios of such AI-based systems in human assessment. Our approach, which builds on top of the idea of separating observation and interpretation in human-AI collaboration, will facilitate human decision making in highly contextual domains, such as human assessment, while keeping their trust in the system.
abstract_zh: 最近的组织已开始采用基于人工智能的决策支持工具来优化人力资源开发实践，同时面临在高度上下文和敏感领域使用人工智能的各种挑战。我们介绍的案例研究旨在帮助专业评估人员在人类评估中做出决策，其中他们对被评估者进行访谈并评估他们对某些工作角色的适合性。我们与两名工业评估员举行的研讨会阐明了他们面临的问题（即，保持对评估者行为的稳定和非主观观察），并得出了人工智能系统的要求（即，以可解释的方式从采访视频中提取他们的非语言线索）。作为回应，我们采用了一种无监督的异常检测算法，该算法使用多模态行为特征，例如面部关键点、身体和头部姿势以及凝视。该算法根据行为特征从视频中提取异常场景，并告知哪个特征导致了异常。我们首先评估了评估者如何感知提取的线索，并发现该算法由于其可解释性，在建议评估者会关注的场景方面很有用。然后，我们开发了一个包含该算法的界面原型，并让六名评估员使用它进行实际评估。他们的评论揭示了引入无监督异常检测以增强评估的信心和客观性的有效性，以及此类基于人工智能的系统在人类评估中的潜在使用场景。我们的方法建立在人类与人工智能协作中将观察和解释分开的理念之上，将促进人类在高度关联的领域（例如人类评估）中做出决策，同时保持对系统的信任。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过AI辅助专业评估者在人力资源评估中提升决策质量，重点分析非语言行为线索的可解释性检测方法。
AI.motivation: 在高度依赖主观判断的人类评估场景中，专业评估者面临保持观察客观性和处理复杂行为线索的挑战，亟需可解释的AI工具支持。
AI.method: 采用无监督异常检测算法，结合面部关键点、身体姿态和注视等多模态行为特征，从面试视频中提取异常行为片段并标注关键特征贡献度。
AI.result: 评估者通过原型系统使用发现，AI提取的异常场景与人工关注点高度重合，显著提升了评估的客观性感知和决策信心。
AI.conclusion: 将观察与解释分离的人机协作模式，能有效增强复杂领域决策的可信度，为AI辅助人类评估系统设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Vinay Ummadi
title: U-Net and its variants for Medical Image Segmentation : A short review
title_zh: U-Net 及其医学图像分割变体：简短回顾
abstract: The paper is a short review of medical image segmentation using U-Net and its variants. As we understand going through a medical images is not an easy job for any clinician either radiologist or pathologist. Analysing medical images is the only way to perform non-invasive diagnosis. Segmenting out the regions of interest has significant importance in medical images and is key for diagnosis. This paper also gives a bird eye view of how medical image segmentation has evolved. Also discusses challenge's and success of the deep neural architectures. Following how different hybrid architectures have built upon strong techniques from visual recognition tasks. In the end we will see current challenges and future directions for medical image segmentation(MIS).
summary: The paper is a short review of medical image segmentation using U-Net and its variants. As we understand going through a medical images is not an easy job for any clinician either radiologist or pathologist. Analysing medical images is the only way to perform non-invasive diagnosis. Segmenting out the regions of interest has significant importance in medical images and is key for diagnosis. This paper also gives a bird eye view of how medical image segmentation has evolved. Also discusses challenge's and success of the deep neural architectures. Following how different hybrid architectures have built upon strong techniques from visual recognition tasks. In the end we will see current challenges and future directions for medical image segmentation(MIS).
abstract_zh: 本文是对使用 U-Net 及其变体的医学图像分割的简短回顾。据我们了解，对于任何临床医生（无论是放射科医生还是病理学家）来说，浏览医学图像都不是一件容易的工作。分析医学图像是进行无创诊断的唯一方法。分割出感兴趣的区域在医学图像中具有重要意义，并且是诊断的关键。本文还概述了医学图像分割的演变过程。还讨论了深度神经架构的挑战和成功。了解不同的混合架构如何基于视觉识别任务的强大技术构建。最后我们将看到医学图像分割（MIS）当前的挑战和未来的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了U-Net及其变体在医学图像分割领域的应用与发展。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分析对临床诊断至关重要，而分割感兴趣区域是关键步骤，需探讨深度学习方法在该领域的进展与挑战。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，总结U-Net及变体架构的演变，分析混合模型在医学图像分割中的技术特点与应用效果。
AI.result: 梳理了医学图像分割技术的发展历程，总结了主流架构的优势与不足，并指出数据获取、模型泛化等现存挑战及未来方向。
AI.conclusion: U-Net系列模型显著推动了医学图像分割的发展，但需进一步解决数据局限性与模型适应性问题以提升临床实用性。

authors_text: Marcos Faundez-Zanuy,Miguel A. Ferrer-Ballester,Carlos M. Travieso-González,Virginia Espinosa-Duro
title: Hand Geometry Based Recognition with a MLP Classifier
title_zh: 使用 MLP 分类器进行基于手部几何形状的识别
comment: 8 pages published in International Conference on Biometrics ICB 2006, Advances in Biometrics pages 721 727 Hong Kong, China. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.07764
comments: 8 pages published in International Conference on Biometrics ICB 2006, Advances in Biometrics pages 721 727 Hong Kong, China. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.07764
abstract: This paper presents a biometric recognition system based on hand geometry. We describe a database specially collected for research purposes, which consists of 50 people and 10 different acquisitions of the right hand. This database can be freely downloaded. In addition, we describe a feature extraction procedure and we obtain experimental results using different classification strategies based on Multi Layer Perceptrons (MLP). We have evaluated identification rates and Detection Cost Function (DCF) values for verification applications. Experimental results reveal up to 100% identification and 0% DCF
summary: This paper presents a biometric recognition system based on hand geometry. We describe a database specially collected for research purposes, which consists of 50 people and 10 different acquisitions of the right hand. This database can be freely downloaded. In addition, we describe a feature extraction procedure and we obtain experimental results using different classification strategies based on Multi Layer Perceptrons (MLP). We have evaluated identification rates and Detection Cost Function (DCF) values for verification applications. Experimental results reveal up to 100% identification and 0% DCF
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于手部几何形状的生物特征识别系统。我们描述了一个专门为研究目的收集的数据库，其中包含 50 个人和 10 次不同的右手采集。该数据库可以免费下载。此外，我们描述了特征提取过程，并使用基于多层感知器（MLP）的不同分类策略获得了实验结果。我们评估了验证应用程序的识别率和检测成本函数 (DCF) 值。实验结果表明识别率高达 100%，DCF 为 0%

authors_text: Josep roure-Alcobé,Marcos Faundez-Zanuy
title: Face recognition with small and large size databases
title_zh: 小型和大型数据库的人脸识别
comment: 5 pages, published in Proceedings 39th Annual 2005 International Carnahan Conference on Security Technology, Las Palmas (Spain). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2204.07764, arXiv:2204.03935
comments: 5 pages, published in Proceedings 39th Annual 2005 International Carnahan Conference on Security Technology, Las Palmas (Spain). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2204.07764, arXiv:2204.03935
abstract: This paper presents experimental results using the ORL (40 people) and FERET (994 people) databases. The ORL database can be useful for securing applications where few users attempting to access are expected. This is the case, for instance, of a PDA or PC where the password is the face of the user. On the other hand, the FERET database is useful for studying those situations where the number of authorized users is around a thousand people.
summary: This paper presents experimental results using the ORL (40 people) and FERET (994 people) databases. The ORL database can be useful for securing applications where few users attempting to access are expected. This is the case, for instance, of a PDA or PC where the password is the face of the user. On the other hand, the FERET database is useful for studying those situations where the number of authorized users is around a thousand people.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了使用 ORL（40 人）和 FERET（994 人）数据库的实验结果。 ORL 数据库对于保护预计很少有用户尝试访问的应用程序非常有用。例如，PDA 或 PC 就是这种情况，其中密码是用户的脸部。另一方面，FERET 数据库对于研究授权用户数量约为 1000 人的情况很有用。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过实验对比分析了小规模和大规模人脸数据库在人脸识别中的应用效果。
AI.motivation: 研究不同规模数据库（如ORL和FERET）在实际应用场景中的适用性，例如少数用户设备（如PDA）与千人级授权场景。
AI.method: 使用ORL（40人）和FERET（994人）数据库进行实验，对比分析两种规模数据集的人脸识别性能。
AI.result: 实验结果验证了小规模数据库适用于用户数量有限的场景，而大规模数据库更适合处理千人级授权需求。
AI.conclusion: 不同规模的人脸数据库应根据实际应用场景的用户数量需求进行选择和优化。

authors_text: Meirui Jiang,Hongzheng Yang,Chen Cheng,Qi Dou
title: IOP-FL: Inside-Outside Personalization for Federated Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: IOP-FL：联合医学图像分割的内外个性化
comment: Accepted by IEEE TMI special issue on federated learning for medical imaging
comments: Accepted by IEEE TMI special issue on federated learning for medical imaging
abstract: Federated learning (FL) allows multiple medical institutions to collaboratively learn a global model without centralizing client data. It is difficult, if possible at all, for such a global model to commonly achieve optimal performance for each individual client, due to the heterogeneity of medical images from various scanners and patient demographics. This problem becomes even more significant when deploying the global model to unseen clients outside the FL with unseen distributions not presented during federated training. To optimize the prediction accuracy of each individual client for medical imaging tasks, we propose a novel unified framework for both \textit{Inside and Outside model Personalization in FL} (IOP-FL). Our inside personalization uses a lightweight gradient-based approach that exploits the local adapted model for each client, by accumulating both the global gradients for common knowledge and the local gradients for client-specific optimization. Moreover, and importantly, the obtained local personalized models and the global model can form a diverse and informative routing space to personalize an adapted model for outside FL clients. Hence, we design a new test-time routing scheme using the consistency loss with a shape constraint to dynamically incorporate the models, given the distribution information conveyed by the test data. Our extensive experimental results on two medical image segmentation tasks present significant improvements over SOTA methods on both inside and outside personalization, demonstrating the potential of our IOP-FL scheme for clinical practice.
summary: Federated learning (FL) allows multiple medical institutions to collaboratively learn a global model without centralizing client data. It is difficult, if possible at all, for such a global model to commonly achieve optimal performance for each individual client, due to the heterogeneity of medical images from various scanners and patient demographics. This problem becomes even more significant when deploying the global model to unseen clients outside the FL with unseen distributions not presented during federated training. To optimize the prediction accuracy of each individual client for medical imaging tasks, we propose a novel unified framework for both \textit{Inside and Outside model Personalization in FL} (IOP-FL). Our inside personalization uses a lightweight gradient-based approach that exploits the local adapted model for each client, by accumulating both the global gradients for common knowledge and the local gradients for client-specific optimization. Moreover, and importantly, the obtained local personalized models and the global model can form a diverse and informative routing space to personalize an adapted model for outside FL clients. Hence, we design a new test-time routing scheme using the consistency loss with a shape constraint to dynamically incorporate the models, given the distribution information conveyed by the test data. Our extensive experimental results on two medical image segmentation tasks present significant improvements over SOTA methods on both inside and outside personalization, demonstrating the potential of our IOP-FL scheme for clinical practice.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）允许多个医疗机构协作学习全局模型，而无需集中客户数据。由于来自不同扫描仪和患者人口统计数据的医学图像的异质性，这种全局模型通常很难为每个单独的客户实现最佳性能（如果可能的话）。当将全局模型部署到 FL 之外的未见过的客户端且在联合训练期间未呈现未见过的分布时，这个问题变得更加严重。为了优化每个客户对医学成像任务的预测准确性，我们为 \textit{FL 中的内部和外部模型个性化} (IOP-FL) 提出了一种新颖的统一框架。我们的内部个性化使用基于梯度的轻量级方法，通过累积常识的全局梯度和针对特定客户的优化的局部梯度，利用每个客户的本地适应模型。此外，重要的是，获得的本地个性化模型和全局模型可以形成多样化且信息丰富的路由空间，为外部 FL 客户个性化适应模型。因此，我们设计了一种新的测试时路由方案，在给定测试数据传达的分布信息的情况下，使用具有形状约束的一致性损失来动态合并模型。我们在两个医学图像分割任务上的广泛实验结果在内部和外部个性化方面都比 SOTA 方法有了显着改进，证明了我们的 IOP-FL 方案在临床实践中的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IOP-FL框架，在联邦学习中实现医疗图像分割任务的内部与外部个性化模型优化。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习的全局模型难以适应不同医疗机构的异质性数据，尤其在面对训练时未见过的外部客户端时性能显著下降，需通过个性化方法提升模型适应性。
AI.method: 采用轻量级梯度累积策略，结合全局梯度与本地梯度优化本地模型；设计测试时路由方案，利用一致性损失与形状约束动态整合模型以适应外部客户端。
AI.result: 在两个医疗图像分割任务中，IOP-FL在内部与外部个性化指标上均显著优于现有SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: IOP-FL通过双路径个性化机制有效解决了联邦学习中的数据异质性问题，为临床医疗影像分析提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Binjie Qin,Haohao Mao,Yiming Liu,Jun Zhao,Yisong Lv,Yueqi Zhu,Song Ding,Xu Chen
title: Robust PCA Unrolling Network for Super-resolution Vessel Extraction in X-ray Coronary Angiography
title_zh: 用于 X 射线冠状动脉造影中超分辨率血管提取的稳健 PCA 展开网络
abstract: Although robust PCA has been increasingly adopted to extract vessels from X-ray coronary angiography (XCA) images, challenging problems such as inefficient vessel-sparsity modelling, noisy and dynamic background artefacts, and high computational cost still remain unsolved. Therefore, we propose a novel robust PCA unrolling network with sparse feature selection for super-resolution XCA vessel imaging. Being embedded within a patch-wise spatiotemporal super-resolution framework that is built upon a pooling layer and a convolutional long short-term memory network, the proposed network can not only gradually prune complex vessel-like artefacts and noisy backgrounds in XCA during network training but also iteratively learn and select the high-level spatiotemporal semantic information of moving contrast agents flowing in the XCA-imaged vessels. The experimental results show that the proposed method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, especially in the imaging of the vessel network and its distal vessels, by restoring the intensity and geometry profiles of heterogeneous vessels against complex and dynamic backgrounds.
summary: Although robust PCA has been increasingly adopted to extract vessels from X-ray coronary angiography (XCA) images, challenging problems such as inefficient vessel-sparsity modelling, noisy and dynamic background artefacts, and high computational cost still remain unsolved. Therefore, we propose a novel robust PCA unrolling network with sparse feature selection for super-resolution XCA vessel imaging. Being embedded within a patch-wise spatiotemporal super-resolution framework that is built upon a pooling layer and a convolutional long short-term memory network, the proposed network can not only gradually prune complex vessel-like artefacts and noisy backgrounds in XCA during network training but also iteratively learn and select the high-level spatiotemporal semantic information of moving contrast agents flowing in the XCA-imaged vessels. The experimental results show that the proposed method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, especially in the imaging of the vessel network and its distal vessels, by restoring the intensity and geometry profiles of heterogeneous vessels against complex and dynamic backgrounds.
abstract_zh: 尽管稳健的 PCA 已被越来越多地采用从 X 射线冠状动脉造影 (XCA) 图像中提取血管，但诸如低效血管稀疏建模、噪声和动态背景伪影以及高计算成本等挑战性问题仍未解决。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的鲁棒 PCA 展开网络，具有稀疏特征选择，用于超分辨率 XCA 血管成像。嵌入在基于池化层和卷积长短期记忆网络的补丁式时空超分辨率框架中，所提出的网络不仅可以在网络训练期间逐渐修剪XCA中的复杂血管状伪影和噪声背景，而且还可以迭代学习和选择在XCA成像血管中流动的移动造影剂的高级时空语义信息。实验结果表明，该方法通过在复杂和动态背景下恢复异质血管的强度和几何轮廓，显着优于最先进的方法，特别是在血管网络及其远端血管的成像方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于鲁棒PCA展开网络的高分辨率血管提取方法，用于X射线冠状动脉造影图像。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在XCA血管提取中存在血管稀疏性建模效率低、动态背景噪声处理困难及计算成本高等问题。
AI.method: 设计嵌入分块时空超分辨率框架的鲁棒PCA展开网络，结合稀疏特征选择、池化层与卷积LSTM，实现动态背景抑制与血管语义特征学习。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在血管网络及远端血管成像中显著优于现有技术，能有效恢复异质血管的强度与几何特征。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了XCA血管提取中的关键难题，为高精度血管成像提供了新思路。

authors_text: Roshanak Ashrafi,Mona Azarbayjani,Hamed Tabkhi
title: Machine Learning-Based Automated Thermal Comfort Prediction: Integration of Low-Cost Thermal and Visual Cameras for Higher Accuracy
title_zh: 基于机器学习的自动热舒适度预测：集成低成本热感相机和视觉相机以实现更高的准确度
abstract: Recent research is trying to leverage occupants' demand in the building's control loop to consider individuals' well-being and the buildings' energy savings. To that end, a real-time feedback system is needed to provide data about occupants' comfort conditions that can be used to control the building's heating, cooling, and air conditioning (HVAC) system. The emergence of thermal imaging techniques provides an excellent opportunity for contactless data gathering with no interruption in occupant conditions and activities. There is increasing attention to infrared thermal camera usage in public buildings because of their non-invasive quality in reading the human skin temperature. However, the state-of-the-art methods need additional modifications to become more reliable. To capitalize potentials and address some existing limitations, new solutions are required to bring a more holistic view toward non-intrusive thermal scanning by leveraging the benefit of machine learning and image processing. This research implements an automated approach to collect and register simultaneous thermal and visual images and read the facial temperature in different regions. This paper also presents two additional investigations. First, through utilizing IButton wearable thermal sensors on the forehead area, we investigate the reliability of an in-expensive thermal camera (FLIR Lepton) in reading the skin temperature. Second, by studying the false-color version of thermal images, we look into the possibility of non-radiometric thermal images for predicting personalized thermal comfort. The results shows the strong performance of Random Forest and K-Nearest Neighbor prediction algorithms in predicting personalized thermal comfort. In addition, we have found that non-radiometric images can also indicate thermal comfort when the algorithm is trained with larger amounts of data.
summary: Recent research is trying to leverage occupants' demand in the building's control loop to consider individuals' well-being and the buildings' energy savings. To that end, a real-time feedback system is needed to provide data about occupants' comfort conditions that can be used to control the building's heating, cooling, and air conditioning (HVAC) system. The emergence of thermal imaging techniques provides an excellent opportunity for contactless data gathering with no interruption in occupant conditions and activities. There is increasing attention to infrared thermal camera usage in public buildings because of their non-invasive quality in reading the human skin temperature. However, the state-of-the-art methods need additional modifications to become more reliable. To capitalize potentials and address some existing limitations, new solutions are required to bring a more holistic view toward non-intrusive thermal scanning by leveraging the benefit of machine learning and image processing. This research implements an automated approach to collect and register simultaneous thermal and visual images and read the facial temperature in different regions. This paper also presents two additional investigations. First, through utilizing IButton wearable thermal sensors on the forehead area, we investigate the reliability of an in-expensive thermal camera (FLIR Lepton) in reading the skin temperature. Second, by studying the false-color version of thermal images, we look into the possibility of non-radiometric thermal images for predicting personalized thermal comfort. The results shows the strong performance of Random Forest and K-Nearest Neighbor prediction algorithms in predicting personalized thermal comfort. In addition, we have found that non-radiometric images can also indicate thermal comfort when the algorithm is trained with larger amounts of data.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究试图利用建筑物控制回路中居住者的需求来考虑个人的福祉和建筑物的节能。为此，需要一个实时反馈系统来提供有关居住者舒适状况的数据，这些数据可用于控制建筑物的供暖、制冷和空调 (HVAC) 系统。热成像技术的出现为非接触式数据收集提供了绝佳的机会，并且不会中断居住者的条件和活动。由于红外热像仪在读取人体皮肤温度方面具有非侵入性，因此在公共建筑中的使用越来越受到关注。然而，最先进的方法需要进行额外的修改才能变得更加可靠。为了充分利用潜力并解决一些现有的限制，需要新的解决方案通过利用机器学习和图像处理的优势，为非侵入式热扫描提供更全面的视角。这项研究采用了一种自动化方法来收集和记录同时的热图像和视觉图像，并读取不同区域的面部温度。本文还提出了两项​​额外的调查。首先，通过在额头区域使用 IButton 可穿戴热传感器，我们研究了廉价热像仪 (FLIR Lepton) 在读取皮肤温度方面的可靠性。其次，通过研究热图像的假色版本，我们研究了非辐射热图像用于预测个性化热舒适度的可能性。结果表明，随机森林和 K 最近邻预测算法在预测个性化热舒适度方面具有强大的性能。此外，我们发现，当使用大量数据训练算法时，非辐射图像也可以指示热舒适度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于机器学习的自动化热舒适预测方法，结合低成本热成像和视觉摄像头提升预测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有建筑HVAC系统缺乏实时反馈机制，难以平衡 occupants 热舒适需求与能源效率，需非接触式数据采集技术。
AI.method: 同步采集热成像与视觉图像，利用FLIR Lepton热相机和IButton传感器验证皮肤温度可靠性，并通过随机森林与KNN算法分析非辐射热图的预测能力。
AI.result: 随机森林和KNN算法在个性化热舒适预测中表现优异，非辐射热图在大数据训练下可有效替代辐射热图。
AI.conclusion: 整合低成本热成像与机器学习可实现非侵入式热舒适监测，为智能建筑节能提供可靠方案。

authors_text: Maged Abdalla Helmy Abdou,Paulo Ferreira,Eric Jul,Tuyen Trung Truong
title: CapillaryX: A Software Design Pattern for Analyzing Medical Images in Real-time using Deep Learning
title_zh: CapillaryX：使用深度学习实时分析医学图像的软件设计模式
abstract: Recent advances in digital imaging, e.g., increased number of pixels captured, have meant that the volume of data to be processed and analyzed from these images has also increased. Deep learning algorithms are state-of-the-art for analyzing such images, given their high accuracy when trained with a large data volume of data. Nevertheless, such analysis requires considerable computational power, making such algorithms time- and resource-demanding. Such high demands can be met by using third-party cloud service providers. However, analyzing medical images using such services raises several legal and privacy challenges and does not necessarily provide real-time results. This paper provides a computing architecture that locally and in parallel can analyze medical images in real-time using deep learning thus avoiding the legal and privacy challenges stemming from uploading data to a third-party cloud provider. To make local image processing efficient on modern multi-core processors, we utilize parallel execution to offset the resource-intensive demands of deep neural networks. We focus on a specific medical-industrial case study, namely the quantifying of blood vessels in microcirculation images for which we have developed a working system. It is currently used in an industrial, clinical research setting as part of an e-health application. Our results show that our system is approximately 78% faster than its serial system counterpart and 12% faster than a master-slave parallel system architecture.
summary: Recent advances in digital imaging, e.g., increased number of pixels captured, have meant that the volume of data to be processed and analyzed from these images has also increased. Deep learning algorithms are state-of-the-art for analyzing such images, given their high accuracy when trained with a large data volume of data. Nevertheless, such analysis requires considerable computational power, making such algorithms time- and resource-demanding. Such high demands can be met by using third-party cloud service providers. However, analyzing medical images using such services raises several legal and privacy challenges and does not necessarily provide real-time results. This paper provides a computing architecture that locally and in parallel can analyze medical images in real-time using deep learning thus avoiding the legal and privacy challenges stemming from uploading data to a third-party cloud provider. To make local image processing efficient on modern multi-core processors, we utilize parallel execution to offset the resource-intensive demands of deep neural networks. We focus on a specific medical-industrial case study, namely the quantifying of blood vessels in microcirculation images for which we have developed a working system. It is currently used in an industrial, clinical research setting as part of an e-health application. Our results show that our system is approximately 78% faster than its serial system counterpart and 12% faster than a master-slave parallel system architecture.
abstract_zh: 数字成像的最新进展，例如捕获的像素数量的增加，意味着从这些图像中处理和分析的数据量也增加了。深度学习算法是分析此类图像的最先进算法，因为它们在使用大量数据进行训练时具有很高的准确性。然而，这种分析需要相当大的计算能力，使得这种算法需要时间和资源。通过使用第三方云服务提供商可以满足如此高的要求。然而，使用此类服务​​分析医学图像会带来一些法律和隐私挑战，并且不一定提供实时结果。本文提供了一种计算架构，可以使用深度学习在本地并行地实时分析医学图像，从而避免将数据上传到第三方云提供商所带来的法律和隐私挑战。为了使本地图像处理在现代多核处理器上高效，我们利用并行执行来抵消深度神经网络的资源密集型需求。我们专注于一个特定的医疗工业案例研究，即微循环图像中血管的量化，我们为此开发了一个工作系统。目前，它作为电子医疗应用的一部分用于工业、临床研究环境。我们的结果表明，我们的系统比串行系统快大约 78%，比主从并行系统架构快 12%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CapillaryX的软件设计模式，用于在本地实时分析医学图像，避免了上传到第三方云服务带来的法律和隐私问题。
AI.motivation: 医学图像数据量的增加使得深度学习分析变得计算密集，而使用第三方云服务会带来隐私和法律挑战，且无法保证实时性。
AI.method: 通过在本地多核处理器上使用并行执行技术，开发了一种能够实时分析医学图像的软件架构，并在微循环图像中量化血管的案例研究中进行了验证。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该系统比串行系统快约78%，比主从式并行系统架构快12%。
AI.conclusion: CapillaryX设计模式能够有效提升医学图像分析的效率，同时保证数据隐私和实时性，适合用于临床研究和e-健康应用。

search_text: CapillaryX: A Software Design Pattern for Analyzing Medical Images in Real-time using Deep Learning CapillaryX：使用深度学习实时分析医学图像的软件设计模式 Recent advances in digital imaging, e.g., increased number of pixels captured, have meant that the volume of data to be processed and analyzed from these images has also increased. Deep learning algorithms are state-of-the-art for analyzing such images, given their high accuracy when trained with a large data volume of data. Nevertheless, such analysis requires considerable computational power, making such algorithms time- and resource-demanding. Such high demands can be met by using third-party cloud service providers. However, analyzing medical images using such services raises several legal and privacy challenges and does not necessarily provide real-time results. This paper provides a computing architecture that locally and in parallel can analyze medical images in real-time using deep learning thus avoiding the legal and privacy challenges stemming from uploading data to a third-party cloud provider. To make local image processing efficient on modern multi-core processors, we utilize parallel execution to offset the resource-intensive demands of deep neural networks. We focus on a specific medical-industrial case study, namely the quantifying of blood vessels in microcirculation images for which we have developed a working system. It is currently used in an industrial, clinical research setting as part of an e-health application. Our results show that our system is approximately 78% faster than its serial system counterpart and 12% faster than a master-slave parallel system architecture. 数字成像的最新进展，例如捕获的像素数量的增加，意味着从这些图像中处理和分析的数据量也增加了。深度学习算法是分析此类图像的最先进算法，因为它们在使用大量数据进行训练时具有很高的准确性。然而，这种分析需要相当大的计算能力，使得这种算法需要时间和资源。通过使用第三方云服务提供商可以满足如此高的要求。然而，使用此类服务​​分析医学图像会带来一些法律和隐私挑战，并且不一定提供实时结果。本文提供了一种计算架构，可以使用深度学习在本地并行地实时分析医学图像，从而避免将数据上传到第三方云提供商所带来的法律和隐私挑战。为了使本地图像处理在现代多核处理器上高效，我们利用并行执行来抵消深度神经网络的资源密集型需求。我们专注于一个特定的医疗工业案例研究，即微循环图像中血管的量化，我们为此开发了一个工作系统。目前，它作为电子医疗应用的一部分用于工业、临床研究环境。我们的结果表明，我们的系统比串行系统快大约 78%，比主从并行系统架构快 12%。 本文提出了一种名为CapillaryX的软件设计模式，用于在本地实时分析医学图像，避免了上传到第三方云服务带来的法律和隐私问题。 Maged Abdalla Helmy Abdou,Paulo Ferreira,Eric Jul,Tuyen Trung Truong eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: James Brock,Zahraa S. Abdallah
title: Investigating Temporal Convolutional Neural Networks for Satellite Image Time Series Classification: A survey
title_zh: 研究用于卫星图像时间序列分类的时间卷积神经网络：一项调查
comment: 24 pages (not inc. 6 pages for appendices and references), 8 figures, 15 tables. Submitted for publishing
comments: 24 pages (not inc. 6 pages for appendices and references), 8 figures, 15 tables. Submitted for publishing
abstract: Satellite Image Time Series (SITS) of the Earth's surface provide detailed land cover maps, with their quality in the spatial and temporal dimensions consistently improving. These image time series are integral for developing systems that aim to produce accurate, up-to-date land cover maps of the Earth's surface. Applications are wide-ranging, with notable examples including ecosystem mapping, vegetation process monitoring and anthropogenic land-use change tracking. Recently proposed methods for SITS classification have demonstrated respectable merit, but these methods tend to lack native mechanisms that exploit the temporal dimension of the data; commonly resulting in extensive data pre-processing contributing to prohibitively long training times. To overcome these shortcomings, Temporal CNNs have recently been employed for SITS classification tasks with encouraging results. This paper seeks to survey this method against a plethora of other contemporary methods for SITS classification to validate the existing findings in recent literature. Comprehensive experiments are carried out on two benchmark SITS datasets with the results demonstrating that Temporal CNNs display a superior performance to the comparative benchmark algorithms across both studied datasets, achieving accuracies of 95.0\% and 87.3\% respectively. Investigations into the Temporal CNN architecture also highlighted the non-trivial task of optimising the model for a new dataset.
summary: Satellite Image Time Series (SITS) of the Earth's surface provide detailed land cover maps, with their quality in the spatial and temporal dimensions consistently improving. These image time series are integral for developing systems that aim to produce accurate, up-to-date land cover maps of the Earth's surface. Applications are wide-ranging, with notable examples including ecosystem mapping, vegetation process monitoring and anthropogenic land-use change tracking. Recently proposed methods for SITS classification have demonstrated respectable merit, but these methods tend to lack native mechanisms that exploit the temporal dimension of the data; commonly resulting in extensive data pre-processing contributing to prohibitively long training times. To overcome these shortcomings, Temporal CNNs have recently been employed for SITS classification tasks with encouraging results. This paper seeks to survey this method against a plethora of other contemporary methods for SITS classification to validate the existing findings in recent literature. Comprehensive experiments are carried out on two benchmark SITS datasets with the results demonstrating that Temporal CNNs display a superior performance to the comparative benchmark algorithms across both studied datasets, achieving accuracies of 95.0\% and 87.3\% respectively. Investigations into the Temporal CNN architecture also highlighted the non-trivial task of optimising the model for a new dataset.
abstract_zh: 地球表面的卫星图像时间序列（SITS）提供了详细的土地覆盖图，其空间和时间维度的质量不断提高。这些图像时间序列对于开发旨在生成准确、最新的地球表面土地覆盖图的系统至关重要。应用范围广泛，著名的例子包括生态系统绘图、植被过程监测和人为土地利用变化跟踪。最近提出的 SITS 分类方法已显示出可观的优点，但这些方法往往缺乏利用数据时间维度的本机机制；通常会导致大量的数据预处理，从而导致训练时间过长。为了克服这些缺点，时态 CNN 最近被用于 SITS 分类任务，并取得了令人鼓舞的结果。本文旨在对照大量其他当代 SITS 分类方法对该方法进行调查，以验证近期文献中的现有发现。在两个基准 SITS 数据集上进行了综合实验，结果表明，时态 CNN 在两个研究数据集上均表现出优于对比基准算法的性能，分别实现了 95.0% 和 87.3% 的准确率。对时态 CNN 架构的研究还强调了针对新数据集优化模型的艰巨任务。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了时间卷积神经网络（Temporal CNN）在卫星图像时间序列分类中的应用，并通过实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有卫星图像时间序列分类方法未能有效利用时间维度，导致预处理复杂且训练耗时，需探索更优的时序建模方法。
AI.method: 在两个基准数据集上对比实验，将Temporal CNN与多种当代方法进行性能评估，并分析其架构优化难点。
AI.result: Temporal CNN在两个数据集上分别达到95.0%和87.3%的准确率，优于对比算法，但模型优化对新数据集具有挑战性。
AI.conclusion: Temporal CNN在SITS分类中表现优异，但需进一步研究其在不同数据集上的适应性优化策略。

ai_content.tldr: 本文综述了时间卷积神经网络（Temporal CNN）在卫星图像时间序列分类中的应用，并通过实验验证其有效性。

authors_text: Pierre-Etienne Martin,J Benois-Pineau,R Péteri,A Zemmari,J Morlier
title: 3D Convolutional Networks for Action Recognition: Application to Sport Gesture Recognition
title_zh: 用于动作识别的 3D 卷积网络：在运动手势识别中的应用
abstract: 3D convolutional networks is a good means to perform tasks such as video segmentation into coherent spatio-temporal chunks and classification of them with regard to a target taxonomy. In the chapter we are interested in the classification of continuous video takes with repeatable actions, such as strokes of table tennis. Filmed in a free marker less ecological environment, these videos represent a challenge from both segmentation and classification point of view. The 3D convnets are an efficient tool for solving these problems with window-based approaches.
summary: 3D convolutional networks is a good means to perform tasks such as video segmentation into coherent spatio-temporal chunks and classification of them with regard to a target taxonomy. In the chapter we are interested in the classification of continuous video takes with repeatable actions, such as strokes of table tennis. Filmed in a free marker less ecological environment, these videos represent a challenge from both segmentation and classification point of view. The 3D convnets are an efficient tool for solving these problems with window-based approaches.
abstract_zh: 3D 卷积网络是执行诸如视频分割成连贯时空块以及根据目标分类法对它们进行分类等任务的好方法。在本章中，我们感兴趣的是具有可重复动作的连续视频的分类，例如乒乓球的击球。这些视频是在无自由标记的生态环境中拍摄的，从分割和分类的角度来看都是一个挑战。 3D 卷积网络是使用基于窗口的方法解决这些问题的有效工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用3D卷积网络对连续视频中的重复运动动作（如乒乓球击球）进行分割与分类，解决自然环境下的动作识别难题。
AI.motivation: 在无标记的自然环境中拍摄的连续视频存在动作分割与分类的双重挑战，传统方法难以有效处理此类复杂场景。
AI.method: 采用3D卷积神经网络结合基于窗口的分析方法，对视频进行时空特征提取与动作分类。
AI.result: 验证了3D卷积网络在复杂生态环境中对重复性运动动作的分割与分类有效性。
AI.conclusion: 3D卷积网络结合窗口方法能有效解决运动手势识别中的时空特征建模难题，为类似任务提供可行方案。

method: 采用3D卷积神经网络结合基于窗口的分析方法，对视频进行时空特征提取与动作分类。
result: 验证了3D卷积网络在复杂生态环境中对重复性运动动作的分割与分类有效性。
conclusion: 3D卷积网络结合窗口方法能有效解决运动手势识别中的时空特征建模难题，为类似任务提供可行方案。
search_text: 3D Convolutional Networks for Action Recognition: Application to Sport Gesture Recognition 用于动作识别的 3D 卷积网络：在运动手势识别中的应用 3D convolutional networks is a good means to perform tasks such as video segmentation into coherent spatio-temporal chunks and classification of them with regard to a target taxonomy. In the chapter we are interested in the classification of continuous video takes with repeatable actions, such as strokes of table tennis. Filmed in a free marker less ecological environment, these videos represent a challenge from both segmentation and classification point of view. The 3D convnets are an efficient tool for solving these problems with window-based approaches. 3D 卷积网络是执行诸如视频分割成连贯时空块以及根据目标分类法对它们进行分类等任务的好方法。在本章中，我们感兴趣的是具有可重复动作的连续视频的分类，例如乒乓球的击球。这些视频是在无自由标记的生态环境中拍摄的，从分割和分类的角度来看都是一个挑战。 3D 卷积网络是使用基于窗口的方法解决这些问题的有效工具。 本文提出使用3D卷积网络对连续视频中的重复运动动作（如乒乓球击球）进行分割与分类，解决自然环境下的动作识别难题。 Pierre-Etienne Martin,J Benois-Pineau,R Péteri,A Zemmari,J Morlier cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Karim Hammoudi,Adnane Cabani,Bouthaina Slika,Halim Benhabiles,Fadi Dornaika,Mahmoud Melkemi
title: SuperpixelGridCut, SuperpixelGridMean and SuperpixelGridMix Data Augmentation
title_zh: SuperpixelGridCut、SuperpixelGridMean 和 SuperpixelGridMix 数据增强
abstract: A novel approach of data augmentation based on irregular superpixel decomposition is proposed. This approach called SuperpixelGridMasks permits to extend original image datasets that are required by training stages of machine learning-related analysis architectures towards increasing their performances. Three variants named SuperpixelGridCut, SuperpixelGridMean and SuperpixelGridMix are presented. These grid-based methods produce a new style of image transformations using the dropping and fusing of information. Extensive experiments using various image classification models and datasets show that baseline performances can be significantly outperformed using our methods. The comparative study also shows that our methods can overpass the performances of other data augmentations. Experimental results obtained over image recognition datasets of varied natures show the efficiency of these new methods. SuperpixelGridCut, SuperpixelGridMean and SuperpixelGridMix codes are publicly available at https://github.com/hammoudiproject/SuperpixelGridMasks
summary: A novel approach of data augmentation based on irregular superpixel decomposition is proposed. This approach called SuperpixelGridMasks permits to extend original image datasets that are required by training stages of machine learning-related analysis architectures towards increasing their performances. Three variants named SuperpixelGridCut, SuperpixelGridMean and SuperpixelGridMix are presented. These grid-based methods produce a new style of image transformations using the dropping and fusing of information. Extensive experiments using various image classification models and datasets show that baseline performances can be significantly outperformed using our methods. The comparative study also shows that our methods can overpass the performances of other data augmentations. Experimental results obtained over image recognition datasets of varied natures show the efficiency of these new methods. SuperpixelGridCut, SuperpixelGridMean and SuperpixelGridMix codes are publicly available at https://github.com/hammoudiproject/SuperpixelGridMasks
abstract_zh: 提出了一种基于不规则超像素分解的数据增强新方法。这种称为 SuperpixelGridMasks 的方法允许扩展机器学习相关分析架构的训练阶段所需的原始图像数据集，以提高其性能。提出了名为 SuperpixelGridCut、SuperpixelGridMean 和 SuperpixelGridMix 的三个变体。这些基于网格的方法使用信息的删除和融合产生了一种新的图像转换风格。使用各种图像分类模型和数据集进行的大量实验表明，使用我们的方法可以显着优于基线性能。比较研究还表明，我们的方法可以超越其他数据增强的性能。在不同性质的图像识别数据集上获得的实验结果表明了这些新方法的效率。 SuperpixelGridCut、SuperpixelGridMean 和 SuperpixelGridMix 代码可在 https://github.com/hammoudiproject/SuperpixelGridMasks 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 提出三种基于超像素分解的数据增强方法，以提升机器学习模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统数据增强方法在提升模型性能上存在局限，需要更有效的图像变换策略。
AI.method: 采用不规则超像素分解技术，设计三种网格化方法（Cut、Mean、Mix），通过信息丢弃与融合生成新的图像变换。
AI.result: 在多种图像分类任务中显著提升基线性能，优于现有数据增强方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的三种方法在不同数据集上均表现出高效性，代码已开源供使用。

authors_text: Wele Gedara Chaminda Bandara,Vishal M. Patel
title: Revisiting Consistency Regularization for Semi-supervised Change Detection in Remote Sensing Images
title_zh: 重新审视遥感图像半监督变化检测的一致性正则化
abstract: Remote-sensing (RS) Change Detection (CD) aims to detect "changes of interest" from co-registered bi-temporal images. The performance of existing deep supervised CD methods is attributed to the large amounts of annotated data used to train the networks. However, annotating large amounts of remote sensing images is labor-intensive and expensive, particularly with bi-temporal images, as it requires pixel-wise comparisons by a human expert. On the other hand, we often have access to unlimited unlabeled multi-temporal RS imagery thanks to ever-increasing earth observation programs. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective way to leverage the information from unlabeled bi-temporal images to improve the performance of CD approaches. More specifically, we propose a semi-supervised CD model in which we formulate an unsupervised CD loss in addition to the supervised Cross-Entropy (CE) loss by constraining the output change probability map of a given unlabeled bi-temporal image pair to be consistent under the small random perturbations applied on the deep feature difference map that is obtained by subtracting their latent feature representations. Experiments conducted on two publicly available CD datasets show that the proposed semi-supervised CD method can reach closer to the performance of supervised CD even with access to as little as 10% of the annotated training data. Code available at https://github.com/wgcban/SemiCD
summary: Remote-sensing (RS) Change Detection (CD) aims to detect "changes of interest" from co-registered bi-temporal images. The performance of existing deep supervised CD methods is attributed to the large amounts of annotated data used to train the networks. However, annotating large amounts of remote sensing images is labor-intensive and expensive, particularly with bi-temporal images, as it requires pixel-wise comparisons by a human expert. On the other hand, we often have access to unlimited unlabeled multi-temporal RS imagery thanks to ever-increasing earth observation programs. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective way to leverage the information from unlabeled bi-temporal images to improve the performance of CD approaches. More specifically, we propose a semi-supervised CD model in which we formulate an unsupervised CD loss in addition to the supervised Cross-Entropy (CE) loss by constraining the output change probability map of a given unlabeled bi-temporal image pair to be consistent under the small random perturbations applied on the deep feature difference map that is obtained by subtracting their latent feature representations. Experiments conducted on two publicly available CD datasets show that the proposed semi-supervised CD method can reach closer to the performance of supervised CD even with access to as little as 10% of the annotated training data. Code available at https://github.com/wgcban/SemiCD
abstract_zh: 遥感 (RS) 变化检测 (CD) 旨在从共同配准的双时态图像中检测“感兴趣的变化”。现有深度监督 CD 方法的性能归因于用于训练网络的大量注释数据。然而，注释大量遥感图像是劳动密集型且昂贵的，特别是对于双时态图像，因为它需要人类专家进行逐像素比较。另一方面，由于不断增加的地球观测计划，我们经常可以获得无限的未标记的多时相遥感图像。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法来利用未标记的双时图像的信息来提高 CD 方法的性能。更具体地说，我们提出了一种半监督 CD 模型，在该模型中，除了有监督的交叉熵（CE）损失之外，我们还通过将给定的未标记双时图像对的输出变化概率图限制为在应用于深度特征差异图（通过减去其潜在特征表示而获得）的小随机扰动下保持一致，从而制定无监督 CD 损失。在两个公开可用的 CD 数据集上进行的实验表明，即使访问的带注释训练数据少至 10%，所提出的半监督 CD 方法也可以达到更接近监督 CD 的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/wgcban/SemiCD 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督遥感图像变化检测方法，通过一致性正则化利用未标注数据提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习变化检测方法依赖大量标注数据，而人工标注遥感图像成本高且耗时，未标注的多时相遥感影像却大量存在。
AI.method: 设计半监督框架，在交叉熵损失基础上增加无监督损失，通过约束未标注图像对的特征差图在随机扰动下保持一致，实现对变化概率图的正则化。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上实验表明，仅使用10%标注数据时，该方法性能接近全监督模型。
AI.conclusion: 一致性正则化有效利用未标注数据，为标注数据稀缺场景下的遥感变化检测提供可行解决方案。

The performance of existing deep supervised CD methods is attributed to the large amounts of annotated data used to train the networks. However, annotating large amounts of remote sensing images is labor-intensive and expensive, particularly with bi-temporal images, as it requires pixel-wise comparisons by a human expert. On the other hand, we often have access to unlimited unlabeled multi-temporal RS imagery thanks to ever-increasing earth observation programs. Experiments conducted on two publicly available CD datasets show that the proposed semi-supervised CD method can reach closer to the performance of supervised CD even with access to as little as 10% of the annotated training data. authors_text: Hanyu Wang,Kamal Gupta,Larry Davis,Abhinav Shrivastava
title: Neural Space-filling Curves
title_zh: 神经空间填充曲线
abstract: We present Neural Space-filling Curves (SFCs), a data-driven approach to infer a context-based scan order for a set of images. Linear ordering of pixels forms the basis for many applications such as video scrambling, compression, and auto-regressive models that are used in generative modeling for images. Existing algorithms resort to a fixed scanning algorithm such as Raster scan or Hilbert scan. Instead, our work learns a spatially coherent linear ordering of pixels from the dataset of images using a graph-based neural network. The resulting Neural SFC is optimized for an objective suitable for the downstream task when the image is traversed along with the scan line order. We show the advantage of using Neural SFCs in downstream applications such as image compression. Code and additional results will be made available at https://hywang66.github.io/publication/neuralsfc.
summary: We present Neural Space-filling Curves (SFCs), a data-driven approach to infer a context-based scan order for a set of images. Linear ordering of pixels forms the basis for many applications such as video scrambling, compression, and auto-regressive models that are used in generative modeling for images. Existing algorithms resort to a fixed scanning algorithm such as Raster scan or Hilbert scan. Instead, our work learns a spatially coherent linear ordering of pixels from the dataset of images using a graph-based neural network. The resulting Neural SFC is optimized for an objective suitable for the downstream task when the image is traversed along with the scan line order. We show the advantage of using Neural SFCs in downstream applications such as image compression. Code and additional results will be made available at https://hywang66.github.io/publication/neuralsfc.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了神经空间填充曲线（SFC），这是一种数据驱动的方法，用于推断一组图像的基于上下文的扫描顺序。像素的线性排序构成了许多应用的基础，例如图像生成建模中使用的视频加扰、压缩和自回归模型。现有算法采用固定扫描算法，例如光栅扫描或希尔伯特扫描。相反，我们的工作使用基于图的神经网络从图像数据集中学习像素的空间相干线性排序。当图像沿着扫描线顺序遍历时，生成的神经 SFC 针对适合下游任务的目标进行了优化。我们展示了在图像压缩等下游应用中使用神经 SFC 的优势。代码和其他结果将在 https://hywang66.github.io/publication/neuralsfc 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经网络的数据驱动方法，用于从图像数据集中学习上下文相关的像素扫描顺序，以替代传统的固定扫描算法。
AI.motivation: 传统空间填充曲线（如栅格扫描或希尔伯特扫描）采用固定算法，无法适应不同图像数据集的特性，限制了其在图像压缩等下游任务中的性能。
AI.method: 利用基于图的神经网络，从图像数据集中学习像素的线性排列顺序，并通过优化与下游任务相关的目标函数来调整扫描路径。
AI.result: 在图像压缩等应用中，神经空间填充曲线（Neural SFC）相比传统方法表现出更高的效率和适应性。
AI.conclusion: 神经空间填充曲线提供了一种灵活的数据驱动方案，能够根据具体任务优化像素扫描顺序，从而提升图像处理相关应用的效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经网络的数据驱动方法，用于从图像数据集中学习上下文相关的像素扫描顺序，以替代传统的固定扫描算法。
ai_content.motivation: 传统空间填充曲线（如栅格扫描或希尔伯特扫描）采用固定算法，无法适应不同图像数据集的特性，限制了其在图像压缩等下游任务中的性能。
ai_content.method: 利用基于图的神经网络，从图像数据集中学习像素的线性排列顺序，并通过优化与下游任务相关的目标函数来调整扫描路径。
ai_content.result: 在图像压缩等应用中，神经空间填充曲线（Neural SFC）相比传统方法表现出更高的效率和适应性。
ai_content.conclusion: 神经空间填充曲线提供了一种灵活的数据驱动方案，能够根据具体任务优化像素扫描顺序，从而提升图像处理相关应用的效果。

search_text: Neural Space-filling Curves 神经空间填充曲线 We present Neural Space-filling Curves (SFCs), a data-driven approach to infer a context-based scan order for a set of images. Linear ordering of pixels forms the basis for many applications such as video scrambling, compression, and auto-regressive models that are used in generative modeling for images. Existing algorithms resort to a fixed scanning algorithm such as Raster scan or Hilbert scan. Instead, our work learns a spatially coherent linear ordering of pixels from the dataset of images using a graph-based neural network. The resulting Neural SFC is optimized for an objective suitable for the downstream task when the image is traversed along with the scan line order. We show the advantage of using Neural SFCs in downstream applications such as image compression. Code and additional results will be made available at https://hywang66.github.io/publication/neuralsfc. 我们提出了神经空间填充曲线（SFC），这是一种数据驱动的方法，用于推断一组图像的基于上下文的扫描顺序。像素的线性排序构成了许多应用的基础，例如图像生成建模中使用的视频加扰、压缩和自回归模型。现有算法采用固定扫描算法，例如光栅扫描或希尔伯特扫描。相反，我们的工作使用基于图的神经网络从图像数据集中学习像素的空间相干线性排序。当图像沿着扫描线顺序遍历时，生成的神经 SFC 针对适合下游任务的目标进行了优化。我们展示了在图像压缩等下游应用中使用神经 SFC 的优势。代码和其他结果将在 https://hywang66.github.io/publication/neuralsfc 上提供。 本文提出了一种基于神经网络的数据驱动方法，用于从图像数据集中学习上下文相关的像素扫描顺序，以替代传统的固定扫描算法。 Hanyu Wang,Kamal Gupta,Larry Davis,Abhinav Shrivastava cs.CV

authors_text: Evonne Ng,Hanbyul Joo,Liwen Hu,Hao Li,Trevor Darrell,Angjoo Kanazawa,Shiry Ginosar
title: Learning to Listen: Modeling Non-Deterministic Dyadic Facial Motion
title_zh: 学习倾听：建模非确定性二元面部运动
abstract: We present a framework for modeling interactional communication in dyadic conversations: given multimodal inputs of a speaker, we autoregressively output multiple possibilities of corresponding listener motion. We combine the motion and speech audio of the speaker using a motion-audio cross attention transformer. Furthermore, we enable non-deterministic prediction by learning a discrete latent representation of realistic listener motion with a novel motion-encoding VQ-VAE. Our method organically captures the multimodal and non-deterministic nature of nonverbal dyadic interactions. Moreover, it produces realistic 3D listener facial motion synchronous with the speaker (see video). We demonstrate that our method outperforms baselines qualitatively and quantitatively via a rich suite of experiments. To facilitate this line of research, we introduce a novel and large in-the-wild dataset of dyadic conversations. Code, data, and videos available at https://evonneng.github.io/learning2listen/.
summary: We present a framework for modeling interactional communication in dyadic conversations: given multimodal inputs of a speaker, we autoregressively output multiple possibilities of corresponding listener motion. We combine the motion and speech audio of the speaker using a motion-audio cross attention transformer. Furthermore, we enable non-deterministic prediction by learning a discrete latent representation of realistic listener motion with a novel motion-encoding VQ-VAE. Our method organically captures the multimodal and non-deterministic nature of nonverbal dyadic interactions. Moreover, it produces realistic 3D listener facial motion synchronous with the speaker (see video). We demonstrate that our method outperforms baselines qualitatively and quantitatively via a rich suite of experiments. To facilitate this line of research, we introduce a novel and large in-the-wild dataset of dyadic conversations. Code, data, and videos available at https://evonneng.github.io/learning2listen/.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个对二元对话中的交互通信进行建模的框架：给定说话者的多模态输入，我们自回归输出相应听众运动的多种可能性。我们使用运动音频交叉注意力转换器将说话者的运动和语音音频结合起来。此外，我们通过使用新颖的运动编码 VQ-VAE 学习真实听者运动的离散潜在表示来实现非确定性预测。我们的方法有机地捕捉了非语言二元交互的多模式和非确定性本质。此外，它还能产生与扬声器同步的逼真 3D 听众面部运动（参见视频）。我们通过一系列丰富的实验证明，我们的方法在定性和定量上都优于基线。为了促进这方面的研究，我们引入了一个新颖且大型的二元对话数据集。代码、数据和视频可在 https://evonneng.github.io/learning2listen/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种框架，通过多模态输入（说话者的动作和语音）自回归生成多种可能的听话人面部运动，以建模非确定性双人对话中的非语言交互。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以捕捉双人对话中非确定性和多模态交互的复杂性，需开发能生成真实听话人面部运动并同步说话者语音的模型。
AI.method: 结合运动与语音的跨模态注意力Transformer，并引入离散潜在表示的VQ-VAE，实现非确定性预测与同步3D面部运动生成。
AI.result: 在大量实验中定性和定量优于基线方法，并发布了一个新的真实场景双人对话数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效建模了非语言双人交互的多模态与非确定性特性，为相关研究提供了新工具与数据支持。

authors_text: Qiming Zhang,Yufei Xu,Jing Zhang,Dacheng Tao
title: VSA: Learning Varied-Size Window Attention in Vision Transformers
title_zh: VSA：学习视觉变压器中不同尺寸的窗口注意力
comment: 23 pages, 13 tables, and 5 figures; ECCV 2022 version
comments: 23 pages, 13 tables, and 5 figures; ECCV 2022 version
abstract: Attention within windows has been widely explored in vision transformers to balance the performance, computation complexity, and memory footprint. However, current models adopt a hand-crafted fixed-size window design, which restricts their capacity of modeling long-term dependencies and adapting to objects of different sizes. To address this drawback, we propose \textbf{V}aried-\textbf{S}ize Window \textbf{A}ttention (VSA) to learn adaptive window configurations from data. Specifically, based on the tokens within each default window, VSA employs a window regression module to predict the size and location of the target window, i.e., the attention area where the key and value tokens are sampled. By adopting VSA independently for each attention head, it can model long-term dependencies, capture rich context from diverse windows, and promote information exchange among overlapped windows. VSA is an easy-to-implement module that can replace the window attention in state-of-the-art representative models with minor modifications and negligible extra computational cost while improving their performance by a large margin, e.g., 1.1\% for Swin-T on ImageNet classification. In addition, the performance gain increases when using larger images for training and test. Experimental results on more downstream tasks, including object detection, instance segmentation, and semantic segmentation, further demonstrate the superiority of VSA over the vanilla window attention in dealing with objects of different sizes. The code will be released https://github.com/ViTAE-Transformer/ViTAE-VSA.
summary: Attention within windows has been widely explored in vision transformers to balance the performance, computation complexity, and memory footprint. However, current models adopt a hand-crafted fixed-size window design, which restricts their capacity of modeling long-term dependencies and adapting to objects of different sizes. To address this drawback, we propose \textbf{V}aried-\textbf{S}ize Window \textbf{A}ttention (VSA) to learn adaptive window configurations from data. Specifically, based on the tokens within each default window, VSA employs a window regression module to predict the size and location of the target window, i.e., the attention area where the key and value tokens are sampled. By adopting VSA independently for each attention head, it can model long-term dependencies, capture rich context from diverse windows, and promote information exchange among overlapped windows. VSA is an easy-to-implement module that can replace the window attention in state-of-the-art representative models with minor modifications and negligible extra computational cost while improving their performance by a large margin, e.g., 1.1\% for Swin-T on ImageNet classification. In addition, the performance gain increases when using larger images for training and test. Experimental results on more downstream tasks, including object detection, instance segmentation, and semantic segmentation, further demonstrate the superiority of VSA over the vanilla window attention in dealing with objects of different sizes. The code will be released https://github.com/ViTAE-Transformer/ViTAE-VSA.
abstract_zh: Windows 内的注意力机制在视觉转换器中得到了广泛的探索，以平衡性能、计算复杂性和内存占用。然而，当前的模型采用手工制作的固定大小窗口设计，这限制了它们建模长期依赖关系和适应不同大小对象的能力。为了解决这个缺点，我们提出 \textbf{V}aried-\textbf{S}ize Window \textbf{A}ttention (VSA) 从数据中学习自适应窗口配置。具体来说，基于每个默认窗口内的标记，VSA 采用窗口回归模块来预测目标窗口的大小和位置，即对键和值标记进行采样的关注区域。通过对每个注意力头独立采用 VSA，它可以对长期依赖关系进行建模，从不同的窗口捕获丰富的上下文，并促进重叠窗口之间的信息交换。 VSA 是一个易于实现的模块，可以通过较小的修改和可忽略的额外计算成本来取代最先进的代表性模型中的窗口注意力，同时大幅提高其性能，例如 ImageNet 分类上的 Swin-T 提高了 1.1%。此外，使用更大的图像进行训练和测试时，性能增益也会增加。更多下游任务（包括对象检测、实例分割和语义分割）的实验结果进一步证明了 VSA 在处理不同大小的对象时相对于普通窗口注意力的优越性。代码将发布https://github.com/ViTAE-Transformer/ViTAE-VSA。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为VSA的可变尺寸窗口注意力机制，用于改进视觉Transformer模型。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉Transformer模型使用固定尺寸的窗口设计，这限制了其对长期依赖关系的建模能力和对不同尺寸对象的适应能力。
AI.method: VSA通过一个窗口回归模块，从数据中学习自适应的窗口配置，预测目标窗口的尺寸和位置，从而提高模型性能。
AI.result: VSA在ImageNet分类任务中提升了Swin-T模型的性能1.1%，并且在更大的图像上训练和测试时性能提升更显著。此外，VSA在多个下游任务如目标检测、实例分割和语义分割中表现优于传统窗口注意力。
AI.conclusion: VSA是一种易于实现的模块，可以显著提升视觉Transformer模型的性能，适用于不同尺寸的对象，并具有广泛的应用前景。

Experimental results on more downstream tasks, including object detection, instance segmentation, and semantic segmentation, further demonstrate the superiority of VSA over the vanilla window attention in dealing with objects of different sizes. The code will be released https://github.com/ViTAE-Transformer/ViTAE-VSA. Windows 内的注意力机制在视觉转换器中得到了广泛的探索，以平衡性能、计算复杂性和内存占用。然而，当前的模型采用手工制作的固定大小窗口设计，这限制了它们建模长期依赖关系和适应不同大小对象的能力。为了解决这个缺点，我们提出 \textbf{V}aried-\textbf{S}ize Window \textbf{A}ttention (VSA) 从数据中学习自适应窗口配置。具体来说，基于每个默认窗口内的标记，VSA 采用窗口回归模块来预测目标窗口的大小和位置，即对键和值标记进行采样的关注区域。通过对每个注意力头独立采用 VSA，它可以对长期依赖关系进行建模，从不同的窗口捕获丰富的上下文，并促进重叠窗口之间的信息交换。 VSA 是一个易于实现的模块，可以通过较小的修改和可忽略的额外计算成本来取代最先进的代表性模型中的窗口注意力，同时大幅提高其性能，例如 ImageNet 分类上的 Swin-T 提高了 1.1%。此外，使用更大的图像进行训练和测试时，性能增益也会增加。更多下游任务（包括对象检测、实例分割和语义分割）的实验结果进一步证明了 VSA 在处理不同大小的对象时相对于普通窗口注意力的优越性。代码将发布https://github.com/ViTAE-Transformer/ViTAE-VSA。 该论文提出了一种名为VSA的可变尺寸窗口注意力机制，用于改进视觉Transformer模型。 Qiming Zhang,Yufei Xu,Jing Zhang,Dacheng Tao cs.CV

authors_text: Shaojie Bai,Zhengyang Geng,Yash Savani,J. Zico Kolter
title: Deep Equilibrium Optical Flow Estimation
title_zh: 深度平衡光流估计
abstract: Many recent state-of-the-art (SOTA) optical flow models use finite-step recurrent update operations to emulate traditional algorithms by encouraging iterative refinements toward a stable flow estimation. However, these RNNs impose large computation and memory overheads, and are not directly trained to model such stable estimation. They can converge poorly and thereby suffer from performance degradation. To combat these drawbacks, we propose deep equilibrium (DEQ) flow estimators, an approach that directly solves for the flow as the infinite-level fixed point of an implicit layer (using any black-box solver), and differentiates through this fixed point analytically (thus requiring $O(1)$ training memory). This implicit-depth approach is not predicated on any specific model, and thus can be applied to a wide range of SOTA flow estimation model designs. The use of these DEQ flow estimators allows us to compute the flow faster using, e.g., fixed-point reuse and inexact gradients, consumes $4\sim6\times$ times less training memory than the recurrent counterpart, and achieves better results with the same computation budget. In addition, we propose a novel, sparse fixed-point correction scheme to stabilize our DEQ flow estimators, which addresses a longstanding challenge for DEQ models in general. We test our approach in various realistic settings and show that it improves SOTA methods on Sintel and KITTI datasets with substantially better computational and memory efficiency.
summary: Many recent state-of-the-art (SOTA) optical flow models use finite-step recurrent update operations to emulate traditional algorithms by encouraging iterative refinements toward a stable flow estimation. However, these RNNs impose large computation and memory overheads, and are not directly trained to model such stable estimation. They can converge poorly and thereby suffer from performance degradation. To combat these drawbacks, we propose deep equilibrium (DEQ) flow estimators, an approach that directly solves for the flow as the infinite-level fixed point of an implicit layer (using any black-box solver), and differentiates through this fixed point analytically (thus requiring $O(1)$ training memory). This implicit-depth approach is not predicated on any specific model, and thus can be applied to a wide range of SOTA flow estimation model designs. The use of these DEQ flow estimators allows us to compute the flow faster using, e.g., fixed-point reuse and inexact gradients, consumes $4\sim6\times$ times less training memory than the recurrent counterpart, and achieves better results with the same computation budget. In addition, we propose a novel, sparse fixed-point correction scheme to stabilize our DEQ flow estimators, which addresses a longstanding challenge for DEQ models in general. We test our approach in various realistic settings and show that it improves SOTA methods on Sintel and KITTI datasets with substantially better computational and memory efficiency.
abstract_zh: 许多最新的（SOTA）光流模型使用有限步循环更新操作来模拟传统算法，通过鼓励迭代细化来实现稳定的流估计。然而，这些 RNN 会带来大量的计算和内存开销，并且没有直接训练来模拟这种稳定的估计。它们的收敛性较差，从而导致性能下降。为了克服这些缺点，我们提出了深度平衡（DEQ）流量估计器，这种方法直接将流量求解为隐式层的无限级固定点（使用任何黑盒求解器），并通过该固定点进行分析微分（因此需要 $O(1)$ 训练内存）。这种隐式深度方法不基于任何特定模型，因此可以应用于广泛的 SOTA 流量估计模型设计。使用这些 DEQ 流量估计器使我们能够使用定点重用和不精确梯度等方法更快地计算流量，消耗的训练内存比循环对应的训练内存少 4\sim6\times$ 倍，并且在相同的计算预算下获得更好的结果。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的稀疏定点校正方案来稳定我们的 DEQ 流量估计器，总体上解决了 DEQ 模型长期存在的挑战。我们在各种现实环境中测试了我们的方法，并表明它改进了 Sintel 和 KITTI 数据集上的 SOTA 方法，具有更好的计算和内存效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度均衡（DEQ）的光流估计方法，通过隐式层的固定点求解优化计算效率和内存消耗。
AI.motivation: 现有光流估计模型依赖有限步长的循环网络，存在计算开销大、内存消耗高且难以稳定收敛的问题。
AI.method: 提出DEQ光流估计器，通过隐式层的无限级固定点求解（使用黑盒求解器）直接计算光流，并采用稀疏固定点校正方案提升稳定性。
AI.result: 在Sintel和KITTI数据集上，DEQ方法相比循环模型减少4-6倍训练内存，计算效率更高且性能更优。
AI.conclusion: DEQ方法通过隐式深度机制有效解决了光流估计的计算与内存瓶颈，为现有模型提供了高效替代方案。

authors_text: Ziyao Wang,Chiyi Liu,Jialiang Chen,Yao Yao,Dazheng Fang,Zhiyi Shi,Rui Yan,Yiye Wang,KanJian Zhang,Hai Wang,Haikun Wei
title: Strolling in Room-Scale VR: Hex-Core-MK1 Omnidirectional Treadmill
title_zh: 在房间规模的 VR 中漫步：Hex-Core-MK1 全向跑步机
abstract: The natural locomotion interface is critical to the development of many VR applications. For household VR applications, there are two basic requirements: natural immersive experience and minimized space occupation. The existing locomotion strategies generally do not simultaneously satisfy these two requirements well. This paper presents a novel omnidirectional treadmill (ODT) system, named Hex-Core-MK1 (HCMK1). By implementing two kinds of mirror symmetrical spiral rollers to generate the omnidirectional velocity field, this proposed system is capable of providing real walking experiences with a full-degree of freedom in an area as small as 1.76 m^2, while delivering great advantages over several existing ODT systems in terms of weight, volume, latency and dynamic performance. Compared with the sizes of Infinadeck and HCP, the two best motor-driven ODTs so far, the 8 cm height of HCMK1 is only 20% of Infinadeck and 50% of HCP. In addition, HCMK1 is a lightweight device weighing only 110 kg, which provides possibilities of further expanding VR scenarios, such as terrain simulation. The latency of HCMK1 is only 23ms. The experiments show that HCMK1 can deliver on a starting acceleration of 16.00 m/s^2 and a braking acceleration of 30.00 m/s^2.
summary: The natural locomotion interface is critical to the development of many VR applications. For household VR applications, there are two basic requirements: natural immersive experience and minimized space occupation. The existing locomotion strategies generally do not simultaneously satisfy these two requirements well. This paper presents a novel omnidirectional treadmill (ODT) system, named Hex-Core-MK1 (HCMK1). By implementing two kinds of mirror symmetrical spiral rollers to generate the omnidirectional velocity field, this proposed system is capable of providing real walking experiences with a full-degree of freedom in an area as small as 1.76 m^2, while delivering great advantages over several existing ODT systems in terms of weight, volume, latency and dynamic performance. Compared with the sizes of Infinadeck and HCP, the two best motor-driven ODTs so far, the 8 cm height of HCMK1 is only 20% of Infinadeck and 50% of HCP. In addition, HCMK1 is a lightweight device weighing only 110 kg, which provides possibilities of further expanding VR scenarios, such as terrain simulation. The latency of HCMK1 is only 23ms. The experiments show that HCMK1 can deliver on a starting acceleration of 16.00 m/s^2 and a braking acceleration of 30.00 m/s^2.
abstract_zh: 自然运动界面对于许多 VR 应用程序的开发至关重要。对于家庭VR应用来说，有两个基本要求：自然的沉浸式体验和最小化的空间占用。现有的运动策略一般不能很好地同时满足这两个要求。本文提出了一种新型全向跑步机 (ODT) 系统，名为 Hex-Core-MK1 (HCMK1)。通过实现两种镜面对称的螺旋滚轮来产生全向速度场，该系统能够在小至1.76 m^2的区域内提供全自由度的真实步行体验，同时在重量、体积、延迟和动态性能方面比现有的几种ODT系统具有巨大优势。与迄今为止最好的两款电机驱动ODT Infinadeck和HCP的尺寸相比，HCMK1的8厘米高度仅为Infinadeck和HCP的20%和50%。此外，HCMK1是一款重量仅为110公斤的轻量级设备，为进一步扩展VR场景（例如地形模拟）提供了可能。 HCMK1的延迟仅为23ms。实验表明，HCMK1可以提供16.00 m/s^2的启动加速度和30.00 m/s^2的制动加速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Hex-Core-MK1的新型全向跑步机系统，旨在为家庭虚拟现实应用提供自然沉浸式体验并最小化空间占用。
AI.motivation: 现有VR移动方案难以同时满足自然沉浸感与空间效率的需求，需开发更紧凑高效的全向跑步机（ODT）以推动家庭VR应用发展。
AI.method: 通过实现两种镜像对称螺旋辊，生成全向速度场，使系统在1.76平方米的区域内实现六自由度行走体验。
AI.result: HCMK1高度仅8cm（为Infinadeck的20%），重量110kg，延迟23ms，可实现16.00m/s²启动加速度和30.00m/s²制动加速度。
AI.conclusion: 该系统在体积、重量、延迟及动态性能上优于现有方案，为VR地形模拟等场景扩展提供可能。

authors_text: Shusheng Yang,Xinggang Wang,Yu Li,Yuxin Fang,Jiemin Fang,Wenyu Liu,Xun Zhao,Ying Shan
title: Temporally Efficient Vision Transformer for Video Instance Segmentation
title_zh: 用于视频实例分割的时间高效视觉转换器
abstract: Recently vision transformer has achieved tremendous success on image-level visual recognition tasks. To effectively and efficiently model the crucial temporal information within a video clip, we propose a Temporally Efficient Vision Transformer (TeViT) for video instance segmentation (VIS). Different from previous transformer-based VIS methods, TeViT is nearly convolution-free, which contains a transformer backbone and a query-based video instance segmentation head. In the backbone stage, we propose a nearly parameter-free messenger shift mechanism for early temporal context fusion. In the head stages, we propose a parameter-shared spatiotemporal query interaction mechanism to build the one-to-one correspondence between video instances and queries. Thus, TeViT fully utilizes both framelevel and instance-level temporal context information and obtains strong temporal modeling capacity with negligible extra computational cost. On three widely adopted VIS benchmarks, i.e., YouTube-VIS-2019, YouTube-VIS-2021, and OVIS, TeViT obtains state-of-the-art results and maintains high inference speed, e.g., 46.6 AP with 68.9 FPS on YouTube-VIS-2019. Code is available at https://github.com/hustvl/TeViT.
summary: Recently vision transformer has achieved tremendous success on image-level visual recognition tasks. To effectively and efficiently model the crucial temporal information within a video clip, we propose a Temporally Efficient Vision Transformer (TeViT) for video instance segmentation (VIS). Different from previous transformer-based VIS methods, TeViT is nearly convolution-free, which contains a transformer backbone and a query-based video instance segmentation head. In the backbone stage, we propose a nearly parameter-free messenger shift mechanism for early temporal context fusion. In the head stages, we propose a parameter-shared spatiotemporal query interaction mechanism to build the one-to-one correspondence between video instances and queries. Thus, TeViT fully utilizes both framelevel and instance-level temporal context information and obtains strong temporal modeling capacity with negligible extra computational cost. On three widely adopted VIS benchmarks, i.e., YouTube-VIS-2019, YouTube-VIS-2021, and OVIS, TeViT obtains state-of-the-art results and maintains high inference speed, e.g., 46.6 AP with 68.9 FPS on YouTube-VIS-2019. Code is available at https://github.com/hustvl/TeViT.
abstract_zh: 最近，视觉转换器在图像级视觉识别任务上取得了巨大的成功。为了有效且高效地对视频剪辑中的关键时间信息进行建模，我们提出了一种用于视频实例分割（VIS）的时间高效视觉变换器（TeViT）。与之前基于 Transformer 的 VIS 方法不同，TeViT 几乎是无卷积的，它包含一个 Transformer 主干和一个基于查询的视频实例分割头。在主干阶段，我们提出了一种几乎无参数的信使转移机制，用于早期时间上下文融合。在头部阶段，我们提出了一种参数共享的时空查询交互机制来建立视频实例和查询之间的一对一对应关系。因此，TeViT 充分利用帧级和实例级时间上下文信息，并以可忽略的额外计算成本获得强大的时间建模能力。在三个广泛采用的 VIS 基准（即 YouTube-VIS-2019、YouTube-VIS-2021 和 OVIS）上，TeViT 获得了最先进的结果并保持了较高的推理速度，例如 YouTube-VIS-2019 上的 46.6 AP 和 68.9 FPS。代码可在 https://github.com/hustvl/TeViT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的时间视觉变换器（TeViT），用于视频实例分割任务，通过减少计算成本并提升时序建模能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉变换器在图像识别中表现优异，但现有方法在视频时序建模中存在计算成本高、效率低的问题，需设计更高效的时序建模方案。
AI.method: 提出近似无参数的信使位移机制融合早期时序上下文，并设计参数共享的时空查询交互机制，建立视频实例与查询的一一对应关系。
AI.result: 在YouTube-VIS-2019等三个基准测试中取得最优结果，例如在YouTube-VIS-2019上达到46.6 AP且保持68.9 FPS的高推理速度。
AI.conclusion: TeViT通过高效时序建模机制在视频实例分割任务中实现性能与速度的平衡，验证了方法的有效性与实用性。

authors_text: Kaan Gokcesu,Hakan Gokcesu
title: Robust, Nonparametric, Efficient Decomposition of Spectral Peaks under Distortion and Interference
title_zh: 失真和干扰下谱峰的稳健、非参数、高效分解
abstract: We propose a decomposition method for the spectral peaks in an observed frequency spectrum, which is efficiently acquired by utilizing the Fast Fourier Transform. In contrast to the traditional methods of waveform fitting on the spectrum, we optimize the problem from a more robust perspective. We model the peaks in spectrum as pseudo-symmetric functions, where the only constraint is a nonincreasing behavior around a central frequency when the distance increases. Our approach is more robust against arbitrary distortion, interference and noise on the spectrum that may be caused by an observation system. The time complexity of our method is linear, i.e., $O(N)$ per extracted spectral peak. Moreover, the decomposed spectral peaks show a pseudo-orthogonal behavior, where they conform to a power preserving equality.
summary: We propose a decomposition method for the spectral peaks in an observed frequency spectrum, which is efficiently acquired by utilizing the Fast Fourier Transform. In contrast to the traditional methods of waveform fitting on the spectrum, we optimize the problem from a more robust perspective. We model the peaks in spectrum as pseudo-symmetric functions, where the only constraint is a nonincreasing behavior around a central frequency when the distance increases. Our approach is more robust against arbitrary distortion, interference and noise on the spectrum that may be caused by an observation system. The time complexity of our method is linear, i.e., $O(N)$ per extracted spectral peak. Moreover, the decomposed spectral peaks show a pseudo-orthogonal behavior, where they conform to a power preserving equality.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种对观测到的频谱中的频谱峰值进行分解的方法，该方法可以通过利用快速傅里叶变换来有效地获得。与传统的频谱波形拟合方法相比，我们从更稳健的角度优化问题。我们将频谱中的峰值建模为伪对称函数，其中唯一的约束是当距离增加时围绕中心频率的不增加行为。我们的方法对于观测系统可能引起的频谱上的任意失真、干扰和噪声更加稳健。我们方法的时间复杂度是线性的，即每个提取的谱峰为 $O(N)$。此外，分解的谱峰表现出伪正交行为，它们符合功率保持等式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在存在失真和干扰情况下高效分解谱峰的方法，通过将谱峰建模为伪对称函数并优化鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统谱峰分解方法对噪声、干扰和系统失真敏感，需更稳健且高效的解决方案以适应复杂观测环境。
AI.method: 将谱峰建模为伪对称函数，仅约束中心频率附近的非递增特性，采用线性时间复杂度算法实现分解，分解后峰满足伪正交性与功率保持等式。
AI.result: 方法在对抗失真、干扰和噪声时表现更鲁棒，时间复杂度为O(N)，分解结果符合功率保持特性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持高效性的同时提升了谱峰分解的鲁棒性，适用于复杂观测场景下的频谱分析。

authors_text: Yiming Zhang,Hong Yu,Ruoyi Du,Zhanyu Ma,Yuan Dong
title: Caption Feature Space Regularization for Audio Captioning
title_zh: 音频字幕的字幕特征空间正则化
abstract: Audio captioning aims at describing the content of audio clips with human language. Due to the ambiguity of audio, different people may perceive the same audio differently, resulting in caption disparities (i.e., one audio may correlate to several captions with diverse semantics). For that, general audio captioning models achieve the one-to-many training by randomly selecting a correlated caption as the ground truth for each audio. However, it leads to a significant variation in the optimization directions and weakens the model stability. To eliminate this negative effect, in this paper, we propose a two-stage framework for audio captioning: (i) in the first stage, via the contrastive learning, we construct a proxy feature space to reduce the distances between captions correlated to the same audio, and (ii) in the second stage, the proxy feature space is utilized as additional supervision to encourage the model to be optimized in the direction that benefits all the correlated captions. We conducted extensive experiments on two datasets using four commonly used encoder and decoder architectures. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. The code is available at https://github.com/PRIS-CV/Caption-Feature-Space-Regularization.
summary: Audio captioning aims at describing the content of audio clips with human language. Due to the ambiguity of audio, different people may perceive the same audio differently, resulting in caption disparities (i.e., one audio may correlate to several captions with diverse semantics). For that, general audio captioning models achieve the one-to-many training by randomly selecting a correlated caption as the ground truth for each audio. However, it leads to a significant variation in the optimization directions and weakens the model stability. To eliminate this negative effect, in this paper, we propose a two-stage framework for audio captioning: (i) in the first stage, via the contrastive learning, we construct a proxy feature space to reduce the distances between captions correlated to the same audio, and (ii) in the second stage, the proxy feature space is utilized as additional supervision to encourage the model to be optimized in the direction that benefits all the correlated captions. We conducted extensive experiments on two datasets using four commonly used encoder and decoder architectures. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. The code is available at https://github.com/PRIS-CV/Caption-Feature-Space-Regularization.
abstract_zh: 音频字幕旨在用人类语言描述音频片段的内容。由于音频的模糊性，不同的人可能会以不同的方式感知相同的音频，从而导致字幕差异（即，一个音频可能与具有不同语义的多个字幕相关）。为此，通用音频字幕模型通过随机选择相关字幕作为每个音频的基本事实来实现一对多训练。然而，它会导致优化方向发生显着变化并削弱模型稳定性。为了消除这种负面影响，在本文中，我们提出了一个两阶段的音频字幕框架：（i）在第一阶段，通过对比学习，我们构建一个代理特征空间来减少与同一音频相关的字幕之间的距离，（ii）在第二阶段，利用代理特征空间作为额外的监督，以鼓励模型朝着有利于所有相关字幕的方向进行优化。我们使用四种常用的编码器和解码器架构对两个数据集进行了广泛的实验。实验结果证明了该方法的有效性。该代码可从 https://github.com/PRIS-CV/Caption-Feature-Space-Regularization 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于音频字幕生成的两阶段框架，通过构建代理特征空间来解决音频感知歧义导致的字幕差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有音频字幕模型通过随机选择相关字幕进行训练，导致优化方向不稳定且模型性能受限。
AI.method: 采用对比学习构建代理特征空间以缩小同一音频相关字幕的特征距离，并在第二阶段利用该空间作为额外监督指导模型优化。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上使用四种常见编码器-解码器架构进行实验，验证了所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过特征空间正则化提升了音频字幕生成的稳定性与多样性，为相关研究提供了新思路。
