tldr: 本文提出了一种用于音频字幕生成的两阶段框架，通过构建代理特征空间来解决音频感知歧义导致的字幕差异问题。
motivation: 现有音频字幕模型通过随机选择相关字幕进行训练，导致优化方向不稳定且模型性能受限。
method: 采用对比学习构建代理特征空间以缩小同一音频相关字幕的特征距离，并在第二阶段利用该空间作为额外监督指导模型优化。
result: 在两个数据集上使用四种常见编码器-解码器架构进行实验，验证了所提方法的有效性。
conclusion: 该方法通过特征空间正则化提升了音频字幕生成的稳定性与多样性，为相关研究提供了新思路。
search_text: Caption Feature Space Regularization for Audio Captioning 音频字幕的字幕特征空间正则化 Audio captioning aims at describing the content of audio clips with human language. Due to the ambiguity of audio, different people may perceive the same audio differently, resulting in caption disparities (i.e., one audio may correlate to several captions with diverse semantics). For that, general audio captioning models achieve the one-to-many training by randomly selecting a correlated caption as the ground truth for each audio. However, it leads to a significant variation in the optimization directions and weakens the model stability. To eliminate this negative effect, in this paper, we propose a two-stage framework for audio captioning: (i) in the first stage, via the contrastive learning, we construct a proxy feature space to reduce the distances between captions correlated to the same audio, and (ii) in the second stage, the proxy feature space is utilized as additional supervision to encourage the model to be optimized in the direction that benefits all the correlated captions. We conducted extensive experiments on two datasets using four commonly used encoder and decoder architectures. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. The code is available at https://github.com/PRIS-CV/Caption-Feature-Space-Regularization. 音频字幕旨在用人类语言描述音频片段的内容。由于音频的模糊性，不同的人可能会以不同的方式感知相同的音频，从而导致字幕差异（即，一个音频可能与具有不同语义的多个字幕相关）。为此，通用音频字幕模型通过随机选择相关字幕作为每个音频的基本事实来实现一对多训练。然而，它会导致优化方向发生显着变化并削弱模型稳定性。为了消除这种负面影响，在本文中，我们提出了一个两阶段的音频字幕框架：（i）在第一阶段，通过对比学习，我们构建一个代理特征空间来减少与同一音频相关的字幕之间的距离，（ii）在第二阶段，利用代理特征空间作为额外的监督，以鼓励模型朝着有利于所有相关字幕的方向进行优化。我们使用四种常用的编码器和解码器架构对两个数据集进行了广泛的实验。实验结果证明了该方法的有效性。该代码可从 https://github.com/PRIS-CV/Caption-Feature-Space-Regularization 获取。 本文提出了一种用于音频字幕生成的两阶段框架，通过构建代理特征空间来解决音频感知歧义导致的字幕差异问题。 Yiming Zhang,Hong Yu,Ruoyi Du,Zhanyu Ma,Yuan Dong cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Vipul Arora,Arnab Bhattacharyya,Noah Fleming,Esty Kelman,Yuichi Yoshida
title: Low Degree Testing over the Reals
title_zh: 低阶实数测试
abstract: We study the problem of testing whether a function $f: \mathbb{R}^n \to \mathbb{R}$ is a polynomial of degree at most $d$ in the \emph{distribution-free} testing model. Here, the distance between functions is measured with respect to an unknown distribution $\mathcal{D}$ over $\mathbb{R}^n$ from which we can draw samples. In contrast to previous work, we do not assume that $\mathcal{D}$ has finite support. We design a tester that given query access to $f$, and sample access to $\mathcal{D}$, makes $(d/\varepsilon)^{O(1)}$ many queries to $f$, accepts with probability $1$ if $f$ is a polynomial of degree $d$, and rejects with probability at least $2/3$ if every degree-$d$ polynomial $P$ disagrees with $f$ on a set of mass at least $\varepsilon$ with respect to $\mathcal{D}$. Our result also holds under mild assumptions when we receive only a polynomial number of bits of precision for each query to $f$, or when $f$ can only be queried on rational points representable using a logarithmic number of bits. Along the way, we prove a new stability theorem for multivariate polynomials that may be of independent interest.
summary: We study the problem of testing whether a function $f: \mathbb{R}^n \to \mathbb{R}$ is a polynomial of degree at most $d$ in the \emph{distribution-free} testing model. Here, the distance between functions is measured with respect to an unknown distribution $\mathcal{D}$ over $\mathbb{R}^n$ from which we can draw samples. In contrast to previous work, we do not assume that $\mathcal{D}$ has finite support. We design a tester that given query access to $f$, and sample access to $\mathcal{D}$, makes $(d/\varepsilon)^{O(1)}$ many queries to $f$, accepts with probability $1$ if $f$ is a polynomial of degree $d$, and rejects with probability at least $2/3$ if every degree-$d$ polynomial $P$ disagrees with $f$ on a set of mass at least $\varepsilon$ with respect to $\mathcal{D}$. Our result also holds under mild assumptions when we receive only a polynomial number of bits of precision for each query to $f$, or when $f$ can only be queried on rational points representable using a logarithmic number of bits. Along the way, we prove a new stability theorem for multivariate polynomials that may be of independent interest.
abstract_zh: 我们研究在\emph{无分布}测试模型中测试函数$f: \mathbb{R}^n \to \mathbb{R}$是否是次数最多为$d$的多项式的问题。这里，函数之间的距离是相对于 $\mathbb{R}^n$ 上的未知分布 $\mathcal{D}$ 来测量的，我们可以从中抽取样本。与之前的工作相比，我们不假设 $\mathcal{D}$ 具有有限支持。我们设计了一个测试器，对 $f$ 进行查询访问，并对 $\mathcal{D}$ 进行样本访问，使 $(d/\varepsilon)^{O(1)}$ 对 $f$ 进行多次查询，如果 $f$ 是 $d$ 次多项式，则以 $1$ 的概率接受，如果每个 $d$ 次多项式 $P$ 至少在一组质量上与 $f$ 不一致，则以至少 $2/3$ 的概率拒绝$\varepsilon$ 相对于 $\mathcal{D}$。当我们对 $f$ 的每次查询仅收到多项式位数的精度时，或者当 $f$ 只能在可使用对数位数表示的有理点上查询时，我们的结果在温和的假设下也成立。在此过程中，我们证明了一个可能具有独立意义的多元多项式的新稳定性定理。

AI.tldr: 研究在分布自由测试模型下，判断函数 f: ℝⁿ → ℝ 是否为次数不超过 d 的多项式的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有工作假设分布具有有限支撑，而本工作希望取消这一限制，在未知一般分布下实现多项式低次性质的测试。
AI.method: 设计了一个测试器，利用对 f 的查询访问和对分布 D 的采样访问，结合新的多元多项式稳定性定理进行判定。
AI.result: 测试器以 (d/ε)^O(1) 次查询即可完成测试；若 f 是 d 次多项式则接受概率为 1，若 f 与所有 d 次多项式在分布 D 下至少有 ε 质量的分歧则拒绝概率至少 2/3。该结果在有限精度查询和有理点查询等温和假设下同样成立。
AI.conclusion: 成功推广了低次多项式测试到实域和任意分布场景，并证明了新的多元多项式稳定性定理，具有独立理论价值。

authors_text: Feihu Zhang,Vladlen Koltun,Philip Torr,René Ranftl,Stephan R. Richter
title: Unsupervised Contrastive Domain Adaptation for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于语义分割的无监督对比域适应
abstract: Semantic segmentation models struggle to generalize in the presence of domain shift. In this paper, we introduce contrastive learning for feature alignment in cross-domain adaptation. We assemble both in-domain contrastive pairs and cross-domain contrastive pairs to learn discriminative features that align across domains. Based on the resulting well-aligned feature representations we introduce a label expansion approach that is able to discover samples from hard classes during the adaptation process to further boost performance. The proposed approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods for domain adaptation. It achieves 60.2% mIoU on the Cityscapes dataset when training on the synthetic GTA5 dataset together with unlabeled Cityscapes images.
summary: Semantic segmentation models struggle to generalize in the presence of domain shift. In this paper, we introduce contrastive learning for feature alignment in cross-domain adaptation. We assemble both in-domain contrastive pairs and cross-domain contrastive pairs to learn discriminative features that align across domains. Based on the resulting well-aligned feature representations we introduce a label expansion approach that is able to discover samples from hard classes during the adaptation process to further boost performance. The proposed approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods for domain adaptation. It achieves 60.2% mIoU on the Cityscapes dataset when training on the synthetic GTA5 dataset together with unlabeled Cityscapes images.
abstract_zh: 语义分割模型在存在域转移的情况下很难泛化。在本文中，我们介绍了跨域适应中特征对齐的对比学习。我们组装域内对比对和跨域对比对来学习跨域对齐的判别特征。基于得到的对齐良好的特征表示，我们引入了一种标签扩展方法，该方法能够在适应过程中从硬类中发现样本，以进一步提高性能。所提出的方法始终优于领域适应的最先进方法。在合成 GTA5 数据集和未标记的 Cityscapes 图像上进行训练时，它在 Cityscapes 数据集上实现了 60.2% mIoU。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督对比域适应方法，用于提升语义分割模型在跨域场景下的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 语义分割模型在域偏移情况下表现不佳，现有方法难以有效对齐跨域特征并利用未标记目标域数据。
AI.method: 通过构建域内和跨域对比样本对，利用对比学习对齐特征分布；结合标签扩展策略挖掘难样本类别以提升适应效果。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes数据集上，使用GTA5合成数据训练时达到60.2% mIoU，优于现有域适应方法。
AI.conclusion: 对比域适应方法能有效提升跨域语义分割性能，标签扩展策略进一步增强了模型对难样本的识别能力。

authors_text: Zongcai Du,Ding Liu,Jie Liu,Jie Tang,Gangshan Wu,Lean Fu
title: Fast and Memory-Efficient Network Towards Efficient Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 快速且内存高效的网络实现高效的图像超分辨率
abstract: Runtime and memory consumption are two important aspects for efficient image super-resolution (EISR) models to be deployed on resource-constrained devices. Recent advances in EISR exploit distillation and aggregation strategies with plenty of channel split and concatenation operations to make full use of limited hierarchical features. In contrast, sequential network operations avoid frequently accessing preceding states and extra nodes, and thus are beneficial to reducing the memory consumption and runtime overhead. Following this idea, we design our lightweight network backbone by mainly stacking multiple highly optimized convolution and activation layers and decreasing the usage of feature fusion. We propose a novel sequential attention branch, where every pixel is assigned an important factor according to local and global contexts, to enhance high-frequency details. In addition, we tailor the residual block for EISR and propose an enhanced residual block (ERB) to further accelerate the network inference. Finally, combining all the above techniques, we construct a fast and memory-efficient network (FMEN) and its small version FMEN-S, which runs 33% faster and reduces 74% memory consumption compared with the state-of-the-art EISR model: E-RFDN, the champion in AIM 2020 efficient super-resolution challenge. Besides, FMEN-S achieves the lowest memory consumption and the second shortest runtime in NTIRE 2022 challenge on efficient super-resolution. Code is available at https://github.com/NJU-Jet/FMEN.
summary: Runtime and memory consumption are two important aspects for efficient image super-resolution (EISR) models to be deployed on resource-constrained devices. Recent advances in EISR exploit distillation and aggregation strategies with plenty of channel split and concatenation operations to make full use of limited hierarchical features. In contrast, sequential network operations avoid frequently accessing preceding states and extra nodes, and thus are beneficial to reducing the memory consumption and runtime overhead. Following this idea, we design our lightweight network backbone by mainly stacking multiple highly optimized convolution and activation layers and decreasing the usage of feature fusion. We propose a novel sequential attention branch, where every pixel is assigned an important factor according to local and global contexts, to enhance high-frequency details. In addition, we tailor the residual block for EISR and propose an enhanced residual block (ERB) to further accelerate the network inference. Finally, combining all the above techniques, we construct a fast and memory-efficient network (FMEN) and its small version FMEN-S, which runs 33% faster and reduces 74% memory consumption compared with the state-of-the-art EISR model: E-RFDN, the champion in AIM 2020 efficient super-resolution challenge. Besides, FMEN-S achieves the lowest memory consumption and the second shortest runtime in NTIRE 2022 challenge on efficient super-resolution. Code is available at https://github.com/NJU-Jet/FMEN.
abstract_zh: 运行时和内存消耗是在资源受限设备上部署高效图像超分辨率（EISR）模型的两个重要方面。 EISR 的最新进展利用蒸馏和聚合策略以及大量通道拆分和串联操作，以充分利用有限的分层功能。相反，顺序网络操作避免频繁访问先前的状态和额外的节点，因此有利于减少内存消耗和运行时开销。遵循这个想法，我们主要通过堆叠多个高度优化的卷积层和激活层并减少特征融合的使用来设计轻量级网络主干。我们提出了一种新颖的顺序注意力分支，其中根据局部和全局上下文为每个像素分配一个重要因素，以增强高频细节。此外，我们为 EISR 定制了残差块，并提出了增强残差块（ERB）以进一步加速网络推理。最后，结合上述所有技术，我们构建了一个快速且内存高效的网络（FMEN）及其小型版本FMEN-S，与最先进的EISR模型相比，其运行速度提高了33％，内存消耗减少了74％：E-RFDN，AIM 2020高效超分辨率挑战赛的冠军。此外，FMEN-S 在 NTIRE 2022 高效超分辨率挑战赛中实现了最低的内存消耗和第二短的运行时间。代码可在 https://github.com/NJU-Jet/FMEN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种快速且内存高效的图像超分辨率网络FMEN，通过优化网络结构降低计算和内存消耗。
AI.motivation: 现有高效超分辨率模型依赖复杂特征融合操作，导致内存和运行时开销较大，难以部署在资源受限设备上。
AI.method: 设计轻量级网络主干，采用顺序操作减少内存访问；引入局部-全局上下文感知的序列注意力分支增强细节；提出加速残差块（ERB）优化推理速度。
AI.result: FMEN相比E-RFDN模型提速33%且内存消耗降低74%，其小型版本FMEN-S在NTIRE 2022挑战赛中内存消耗最低且运行时间排名第二。
AI.conclusion: 通过简化特征融合与优化网络结构，本文方法在保持性能的同时显著提升了超分辨率模型的部署效率。

search_text: Fast and Memory-Efficient Network Towards Efficient Image Super-Resolution 快速且内存高效的网络实现高效的图像超分辨率 Runtime and memory consumption are two important aspects for efficient image super-resolution (EISR) models to be deployed on resource-constrained devices. Recent advances in EISR exploit distillation and aggregation strategies with plenty of channel split and concatenation operations to make full use of limited hierarchical features. In contrast, sequential network operations avoid frequently accessing preceding states and extra nodes, and thus are beneficial to reducing the memory consumption and runtime overhead. Following this idea, we design our lightweight network backbone by mainly stacking multiple highly optimized convolution and activation layers and decreasing the usage of feature fusion. We propose a novel sequential attention branch, where every pixel is assigned an important factor according to local and global contexts, to enhance high-frequency details. In addition, we tailor the residual block for EISR and propose an enhanced residual block (ERB) to further accelerate the network inference. Finally, combining all the above techniques, we construct a fast and memory-efficient network (FMEN) and its small version FMEN-S, which runs 33% faster and reduces 74% memory consumption compared with the state-of-the-art EISR model: E-RFDN, the champion in AIM 2020 efficient super-resolution challenge. Besides, FMEN-S achieves the lowest memory consumption and the second shortest runtime in NTIRE 2022 challenge on efficient super-resolution. Code is available at https://github.com/NJU-Jet/FMEN. 运行时和内存消耗是在资源受限设备上部署高效图像超分辨率（EISR）模型的两个重要方面。 EISR 的最新进展利用蒸馏和聚合策略以及大量通道拆分和串联操作，以充分利用有限的分层功能。相反，顺序网络操作避免频繁访问先前的状态和额外的节点，因此有利于减少内存消耗和运行时开销。遵循这个想法，我们主要通过堆叠多个高度优化的卷积层和激活层并减少特征融合的使用来设计轻量级网络主干。我们提出了一种新颖的顺序注意力分支，其中根据局部和全局上下文为每个像素分配一个重要因素，以增强高频细节。此外，我们为 EISR 定制了残差块，并提出了增强残差块（ERB）以进一步加速网络推理。最后，结合上述所有技术，我们构建了一个快速且内存高效的网络（FMEN）及其小型版本FMEN-S，与最先进的EISR模型相比，其运行速度提高了33％，内存消耗减少了74％：E-RFDN，AIM 2020高效超分辨率挑战赛的冠军。此外，FMEN-S 在 NTIRE 2022 高效超分辨率挑战赛中实现了最低的内存消耗和第二短的运行时间。代码可在 https://github.com/NJU-Jet/FMEN 获取。 本文提出一种快速且内存高效的图像超分辨率网络FMEN，通过优化网络结构降低计算和内存消耗。 Zongcai Du,Ding Liu,Jie Liu,Jie Tang,Gangshan Wu,Lean Fu eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Kaiwen Duan,Song Bai,Lingxi Xie,Honggang Qi,Qingming Huang,Qi Tian
title: CenterNet++ for Object Detection
title_zh: 用于物体检测的 CenterNet++
comment: 11 pages, 9 figures, 8 tables. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1904.08189
comments: 11 pages, 9 figures, 8 tables. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1904.08189
abstract: There are two mainstreams for object detection: top-down and bottom-up. The state-of-the-art approaches mostly belong to the first category. In this paper, we demonstrate that the bottom-up approaches are as competitive as the top-down and enjoy higher recall. Our approach, named CenterNet, detects each object as a triplet keypoints (top-left and bottom-right corners and the center keypoint). We firstly group the corners by some designed cues and further confirm the objects by the center keypoints. The corner keypoints equip the approach with the ability to detect objects of various scales and shapes and the center keypoint avoids the confusion brought by a large number of false-positive proposals. Our approach is a kind of anchor-free detector because it does not need to define explicit anchor boxes. We adapt our approach to the backbones with different structures, i.e., the 'hourglass' like networks and the the 'pyramid' like networks, which detect objects on a single-resolution feature map and multi-resolution feature maps, respectively. On the MS-COCO dataset, CenterNet with Res2Net-101 and Swin-Transformer achieves APs of 53.7% and 57.1%, respectively, outperforming all existing bottom-up detectors and achieving state-of-the-art. We also design a real-time CenterNet, which achieves a good trade-off between accuracy and speed with an AP of 43.6% at 30.5 FPS. https://github.com/Duankaiwen/PyCenterNet.
summary: There are two mainstreams for object detection: top-down and bottom-up. The state-of-the-art approaches mostly belong to the first category. In this paper, we demonstrate that the bottom-up approaches are as competitive as the top-down and enjoy higher recall. Our approach, named CenterNet, detects each object as a triplet keypoints (top-left and bottom-right corners and the center keypoint). We firstly group the corners by some designed cues and further confirm the objects by the center keypoints. The corner keypoints equip the approach with the ability to detect objects of various scales and shapes and the center keypoint avoids the confusion brought by a large number of false-positive proposals. Our approach is a kind of anchor-free detector because it does not need to define explicit anchor boxes. We adapt our approach to the backbones with different structures, i.e., the 'hourglass' like networks and the the 'pyramid' like networks, which detect objects on a single-resolution feature map and multi-resolution feature maps, respectively. On the MS-COCO dataset, CenterNet with Res2Net-101 and Swin-Transformer achieves APs of 53.7% and 57.1%, respectively, outperforming all existing bottom-up detectors and achieving state-of-the-art. We also design a real-time CenterNet, which achieves a good trade-off between accuracy and speed with an AP of 43.6% at 30.5 FPS. https://github.com/Duankaiwen/PyCenterNet.
abstract_zh: 目标检测有两种主流：自上而下和自下而上。最先进的方法大多属于第一类。在本文中，我们证明自下而上的方法与自上而下的方法一样有竞争力，并且具有更高的召回率。我们的方法名为 CenterNet，将每个对象检测为三元组关键点（左上角、右下角以及中心关键点）。我们首先通过一些设计的线索对角进行分组，并通过中心关键点进一步确认对象。角点关键点使该方法能够检测各种尺度和形状的物体，中心关键点避免了大量误报建议带来的混乱。我们的方法是一种无锚检测器，因为它不需要定义显式的锚框。我们使我们的方法适应具有不同结构的主干，即“沙漏”状网络和“金字塔”状网络，它们分别在单分辨率特征图和多分辨率特征图上检测对象。在 MS-COCO 数据集上，采用 Res2Net-101 和 Swin-Transformer 的 CenterNet 分别实现了 53.7% 和 57.1% 的 AP，优于所有现有的自下而上检测器，达到了最先进的水平。我们还设计了一个实时 CenterNet，它在精度和速度之间实现了良好的权衡，在 30.5 FPS 下 AP 为 43.6%。 https://github.com/Duankaiwen/PyCenterNet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CenterNet的自底向上的目标检测方法，通过检测物体的三个关键点（左上角、右下角和中心点）实现高召回率和竞争力。
AI.motivation: 传统自顶向下方法主导目标检测领域，但自底向上方法因更高的召回率和更少的误检而具有潜力。本文旨在证明自底向上方法的竞争力并解决其关键挑战。
AI.method: 通过设计线索分组角点并利用中心点确认物体，结合无锚框检测机制，适配不同结构的骨干网络（如hourglass和pyramid结构），实现单分辨率和多分辨率特征图检测。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO数据集上，CenterNet使用Res2Net-101和Swin-Transformer分别达到53.7%和57.1%的AP值，优于所有现有自底向上检测器并达到SOTA。实时版本在30.5 FPS下实现43.6% AP。
AI.conclusion: CenterNet通过关键点检测机制有效提升了自底向上方法的性能，实现了精度与速度的平衡，为锚框无关检测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yupan Huang,Tengchao Lv,Lei Cui,Yutong Lu,Furu Wei
title: LayoutLMv3: Pre-training for Document AI with Unified Text and Image Masking
title_zh: LayoutLMv3：具有统一文本和图像屏蔽的文档 AI 预训练
abstract: Self-supervised pre-training techniques have achieved remarkable progress in Document AI. Most multimodal pre-trained models use a masked language modeling objective to learn bidirectional representations on the text modality, but they differ in pre-training objectives for the image modality. This discrepancy adds difficulty to multimodal representation learning. In this paper, we propose \textbf{LayoutLMv3} to pre-train multimodal Transformers for Document AI with unified text and image masking. Additionally, LayoutLMv3 is pre-trained with a word-patch alignment objective to learn cross-modal alignment by predicting whether the corresponding image patch of a text word is masked. The simple unified architecture and training objectives make LayoutLMv3 a general-purpose pre-trained model for both text-centric and image-centric Document AI tasks. Experimental results show that LayoutLMv3 achieves state-of-the-art performance not only in text-centric tasks, including form understanding, receipt understanding, and document visual question answering, but also in image-centric tasks such as document image classification and document layout analysis. The code and models are publicly available at \url{https://aka.ms/layoutlmv3}.
summary: Self-supervised pre-training techniques have achieved remarkable progress in Document AI. Most multimodal pre-trained models use a masked language modeling objective to learn bidirectional representations on the text modality, but they differ in pre-training objectives for the image modality. This discrepancy adds difficulty to multimodal representation learning. In this paper, we propose \textbf{LayoutLMv3} to pre-train multimodal Transformers for Document AI with unified text and image masking. Additionally, LayoutLMv3 is pre-trained with a word-patch alignment objective to learn cross-modal alignment by predicting whether the corresponding image patch of a text word is masked. The simple unified architecture and training objectives make LayoutLMv3 a general-purpose pre-trained model for both text-centric and image-centric Document AI tasks. Experimental results show that LayoutLMv3 achieves state-of-the-art performance not only in text-centric tasks, including form understanding, receipt understanding, and document visual question answering, but also in image-centric tasks such as document image classification and document layout analysis. The code and models are publicly available at \url{https://aka.ms/layoutlmv3}.
abstract_zh: 自监督预训练技术在文档人工智能方面取得了显着的进步。大多数多模态预训练模型使用掩码语言建模目标来学习文本模态的双向表示，但它们在图像模态的预训练目标上有所不同。这种差异增加了多模态表示学习的难度。在本文中，我们提出 \textbf{LayoutLMv3} 来通过统一的文本和图像掩码来预训练用于文档 AI 的多模态 Transformer。此外，LayoutLMv3 还使用单词补丁对齐目标进行了预训练，通过预测文本单词的相应图像补丁是否被屏蔽来学习跨模态对齐。简单的统一架构和训练目标使 LayoutLMv3 成为适用于以文本为中心和以图像为中心的文档 AI 任务的通用预训练模型。实验结果表明，LayoutLMv3 不仅在以文本为中心的任务（包括表单理解、收据理解和文档视觉问答）中实现了最先进的性能，而且在以图像为中心的任务（如文档图像分类和文档布局分析）中也实现了最先进的性能。代码和模型可在 \url{https://aka.ms/layoutlmv3} 上公开获取。

AI.motivation: 现有文档AI多模态预训练模型在文本和图像模态的预训练目标不一致，导致多模态表征学习困难。
AI.method: 采用统一的文本和图像掩码机制，并引入词-图像块对齐目标，通过预测文本词对应的图像块是否被掩码来学习跨模态对齐。
AI.result: 在文本相关任务（表单理解、收据理解、文档视觉问答）和图像相关任务（文档图像分类、布局分析）中均达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: LayoutLMv3通过统一架构和训练目标，成为兼顾文本和图像模态的通用文档AI预训练模型。

search_text: LayoutLMv3: Pre-training for Document AI with Unified Text and Image Masking LayoutLMv3：具有统一文本和图像屏蔽的文档 AI 预训练 Self-supervised pre-training techniques have achieved remarkable progress in Document AI. Most multimodal pre-trained models use a masked language modeling objective to learn bidirectional representations on the text modality, but they differ in pre-training objectives for the image modality. This discrepancy adds difficulty to multimodal representation learning. In this paper, we propose \textbf{LayoutLMv3} to pre-train multimodal Transformers for Document AI with unified text and image masking. Additionally, LayoutLMv3 is pre-trained with a word-patch alignment objective to learn cross-modal alignment by predicting whether the corresponding image patch of a text word is masked. The simple unified architecture and training objectives make LayoutLMv3 a general-purpose pre-trained model for both text-centric and image-centric Document AI tasks. Experimental results show that LayoutLMv3 achieves state-of-the-art performance not only in text-centric tasks, including form understanding, receipt understanding, and document visual question answering, but also in image-centric tasks such as document image classification and document layout analysis. The code and models are publicly available at \url{https://aka.ms/layoutlmv3}. 自监督预训练技术在文档人工智能方面取得了显着的进步。大多数多模态预训练模型使用掩码语言建模目标来学习文本模态的双向表示，但它们在图像模态的预训练目标上有所不同。这种差异增加了多模态表示学习的难度。在本文中，我们提出 \textbf{LayoutLMv3} 来通过统一的文本和图像掩码来预训练用于文档 AI 的多模态 Transformer。此外，LayoutLMv3 还使用单词补丁对齐目标进行了预训练，通过预测文本单词的相应图像补丁是否被屏蔽来学习跨模态对齐。简单的统一架构和训练目标使 LayoutLMv3 成为适用于以文本为中心和以图像为中心的文档 AI 任务的通用预训练模型。实验结果表明，LayoutLMv3 不仅在以文本为中心的任务（包括表单理解、收据理解和文档视觉问答）中实现了最先进的性能，而且在以图像为中心的任务（如文档图像分类和文档布局分析）中也实现了最先进的性能。代码和模型可在 \url{https://aka.ms/layoutlmv3} 上公开获取。 本文提出LayoutLMv3，一种通过统一文本和图像掩码预训练的多模态Transformer模型，用于文档人工智能任务。 Yupan Huang,Tengchao Lv,Lei Cui,Yutong Lu,Furu Wei cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: John Augustine,William K. Moses Jr.,Gopal Pandurangan
title: Awake Complexity of Distributed Minimum Spanning Tree
title_zh: 分布式最小生成树的清醒复杂度
comment: 29 pages, 1 table, 5 figures, abstract modified to fit arXiv constraints
comments: 29 pages, 1 table, 5 figures, abstract modified to fit arXiv constraints
abstract: We study the distributed minimum spanning tree (MST) problem, a fundamental problem in distributed computing. It is well-known that distributed MST can be solved in $\tilde{O}(D+\sqrt{n})$ rounds in the standard CONGEST model (where $n$ is the network size and $D$ is the network diameter) and this is essentially the best possible round complexity (up to logarithmic factors). However, in resource-constrained networks such as ad hoc wireless and sensor networks, nodes spending so much time can lead to significant spending of resources such as energy. Motivated by the above consideration, we study distributed algorithms for MST under the \emph{sleeping model} [Chatterjee et al., PODC 2020], a model for design and analysis of resource-efficient distributed algorithms. In the sleeping model, a node can be in one of two modes in any round -- \emph{sleeping} or \emph{awake} (unlike the traditional model where nodes are always awake). Only the rounds in which a node is \emph{awake} are counted, while \emph{sleeping} rounds are ignored. A node spends resources only in the awake rounds and hence the main goal is to minimize the \emph{awake complexity} of a distributed algorithm, the worst-case number of rounds any node is awake. We present deterministic and randomized distributed MST algorithms that have an \emph{optimal} awake complexity of $O(\log n)$ time with a matching lower bound. We also show that our randomized awake-optimal algorithm has essentially the best possible round complexity by presenting a lower bound of $\tildeΩ(n)$ on the product of the awake and round complexity of any distributed algorithm (including randomized) that outputs an MST. To complement our trade-off lower bound, we present a parameterized family of distributed algorithms that gives an essentially optimal trade-off between the awake complexity and the round complexity.
summary: We study the distributed minimum spanning tree (MST) problem, a fundamental problem in distributed computing. It is well-known that distributed MST can be solved in $\tilde{O}(D+\sqrt{n})$ rounds in the standard CONGEST model (where $n$ is the network size and $D$ is the network diameter) and this is essentially the best possible round complexity (up to logarithmic factors). However, in resource-constrained networks such as ad hoc wireless and sensor networks, nodes spending so much time can lead to significant spending of resources such as energy. Motivated by the above consideration, we study distributed algorithms for MST under the \emph{sleeping model} [Chatterjee et al., PODC 2020], a model for design and analysis of resource-efficient distributed algorithms. In the sleeping model, a node can be in one of two modes in any round -- \emph{sleeping} or \emph{awake} (unlike the traditional model where nodes are always awake). Only the rounds in which a node is \emph{awake} are counted, while \emph{sleeping} rounds are ignored. A node spends resources only in the awake rounds and hence the main goal is to minimize the \emph{awake complexity} of a distributed algorithm, the worst-case number of rounds any node is awake. We present deterministic and randomized distributed MST algorithms that have an \emph{optimal} awake complexity of $O(\log n)$ time with a matching lower bound. We also show that our randomized awake-optimal algorithm has essentially the best possible round complexity by presenting a lower bound of $\tildeΩ(n)$ on the product of the awake and round complexity of any distributed algorithm (including randomized) that outputs an MST. To complement our trade-off lower bound, we present a parameterized family of distributed algorithms that gives an essentially optimal trade-off between the awake complexity and the round complexity.
abstract_zh: 我们研究分布式最小生成树（MST）问题，这是分布式计算中的一个基本问题。众所周知，分布式 MST 可以在标准 CONGEST 模型中的 $\tilde{O}(D+\sqrt{n})$ 轮中求解（其中 $n$ 是网络大小，$D$ 是网络直径），这本质上是最佳可能的轮复杂度（最多为对数因子）。然而，在资源受限的网络（例如自组织无线网络和传感器网络）中，节点花费大量时间可能会导致能源等资源的大量消耗。出于上述考虑，我们在 emph{sleeping 模型} [Chatterjee et al., PODC 2020] 下研究 MST 的分布式算法，这是一种用于设计和分析资源高效分布式算法的模型。在睡眠模型中，节点在任何一轮中都可以处于两种模式之一 - \emph{sleeping} 或 \emph{awake} （与节点始终清醒的传统模型不同）。仅计算节点处于 \emph{awake} 的轮次，而 \emph{sleeping} 轮次被忽略。节点仅在唤醒轮次中花费资源，因此主要目标是最小化分布式算法的\emph{唤醒复杂度}，即任何节点处于唤醒状态的最坏情况轮数。我们提出了确定性和随机的分布式 MST 算法，其具有 $O(\log n)$ 时间的 \emph{optimal} 清醒复杂度以及匹配的下限。我们还通过在输出 MST 的任何分布式算法（包括随机算法）的唤醒和轮次复杂度乘积上呈现 $\tildeΩ(n)$ 的下限，证明我们的随机唤醒最优算法本质上具有最佳可能的轮次复杂度。为了补充我们的权衡下限，我们提出了一系列参数化的分布式算法，它在清醒复杂度和轮次复杂度之间给出了本质上最佳的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在睡眠模型下的分布式最小生成树（MST）算法，旨在优化节点的唤醒复杂度。
AI.motivation: 在资源受限的网络（如无线传感器网络）中，节点长时间保持唤醒状态会导致能源浪费，传统模型未考虑此问题，需设计更高效的算法。
AI.method: 提出确定性和随机化分布式MST算法，通过睡眠模型优化唤醒复杂度，并建立唤醒复杂度与轮次复杂度的下界关系。
AI.result: 实现最优唤醒复杂度O(log n)，证明任何算法的唤醒与轮次复杂度乘积下界为~Ω(n)，并提供平衡两者的参数化算法族。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法在唤醒复杂度上达到最优，且通过下界证明了唤醒与轮次复杂度的权衡必要性，为资源受限网络提供理论支持。

authors_text: Levente Juhasz,Peter Mooney
title: 'I think I discovered a military base in the middle of the ocean' -- Null Island, the most real of fictional places
title_zh: “我想我在大洋中央发现了一个军事基地”——空岛，虚构的地方中最真实的地方
comment: IEEE Access. \c{opyright}2022 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. abstract: This paper explores Null Island, a fictional place located at 0$^\circ$ latitude and 0$^\circ$ longitude in the WGS84 geographic coordinate system. Null Island is erroneously associated with large amounts of geographic data in a wide variety of location-based services, place databases, social media and web-based maps. While it was originally considered a joke within the geospatial community, this article will demonstrate implications of its existence, both technological and social in nature, promoting Null Island as a fundamental issue of geographic information that requires more widespread awareness. The article summarizes error sources that lead to data being associated with Null Island. We identify four evolutionary phases which help explain how this fictional place evolved and established itself as an entity reaching beyond the geospatial profession to the point of being discovered by the visual arts and the general population. After providing an accurate account of data that can be found at (0, 0), geospatial, technological and social implications of Null Island are discussed. Guidelines to avoid misplacing data to Null Island are provided. Since data will likely continue to appear at this location, our contribution is aimed at both GIScientists and the general population to promote awareness of this error source.

Guidelines to avoid misplacing data to Null Island are provided. Since data will likely continue to appear at this location, our contribution is aimed at both GIScientists and the general population to promote awareness of this error source.
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了空岛，这是一个虚构的地方，位于 WGS84 地理坐标系中纬度 0$^\circ$ 和经度 0$^\circ$ 处。空岛被错误地与各种基于位置的服务、地点数据库、社交媒体和网络地图中的大量地理数据关联起来。虽然它最初被认为是地理空间界的一个笑话，但本文将展示其存在的技术和社会意义，将空岛推广为需要更广泛认识的地理信息基本问题。本文总结了导致数据与空岛相关的错误来源。我们确定了四个进化阶段，这有助于解释这个虚构的地方如何进化并建立自己作为一个超越地理空间专业的实体，直至被视觉艺术和普通大众发现的程度。在提供了 (0, 0) 处数据的准确说明后，讨论了空岛的地理空间、技术和社会影响。提供了避免将数据错放至空岛的指南。由于数据可能会继续出现在该位置，因此我们的贡献针对 GIS 科学家和普通大众，以提高对此错误源的认识。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了虚构地点'Null Island'（0°纬度、0°经度）在地理信息系统中被错误关联数据的现象，分析其技术与社会影响，并提出避免数据误置的建议。
AI.motivation: 由于大量地理数据错误地关联到Null Island，导致该虚构地点从地理学界扩展至大众视野，需提高对此类数据错误源的认知。
AI.method: 通过总结数据错误来源，分析Null Island被误认的四个演化阶段，并结合技术、社会视角讨论其影响。
AI.result: 明确了Null Island数据误置的技术原因与传播路径，提出了针对GIS专家和公众的预防指南。
AI.conclusion: Null Island作为地理信息错误的典型案例，需通过跨领域协作提升数据准确性与公众意识。

search_text: 'I think I discovered a military base in the middle of the ocean' -- Null Island, the most real of fictional places “我想我在大洋中央发现了一个军事基地”——空岛，虚构的地方中最真实的地方 This paper explores Null Island, a fictional place located at 0$^\circ$ latitude and 0$^\circ$ longitude in the WGS84 geographic coordinate system. Null Island is erroneously associated with large amounts of geographic data in a wide variety of location-based services, place databases, social media and web-based maps. While it was originally considered a joke within the geospatial community, this article will demonstrate implications of its existence, both technological and social in nature, promoting Null Island as a fundamental issue of geographic information that requires more widespread awareness. The article summarizes error sources that lead to data being associated with Null Island. We identify four evolutionary phases which help explain how this fictional place evolved and established itself as an entity reaching beyond the geospatial profession to the point of being discovered by the visual arts and the general population. After providing an accurate account of data that can be found at (0, 0), geospatial, technological and social implications of Null Island are discussed. Guidelines to avoid misplacing data to Null Island are provided. Since data will likely continue to appear at this location, our contribution is aimed at both GIScientists and the general population to promote awareness of this error source. 本文探讨了空岛，这是一个虚构的地方，位于 WGS84 地理坐标系中纬度 0$^\circ$ 和经度 0$^\circ$ 处。空岛被错误地与各种基于位置的服务、地点数据库、社交媒体和网络地图中的大量地理数据关联起来。虽然它最初被认为是地理空间界的一个笑话，但本文将展示其存在的技术和社会意义，将空岛推广为需要更广泛认识的地理信息基本问题。本文总结了导致数据与空岛相关的错误来源。我们确定了四个进化阶段，这有助于解释这个虚构的地方如何进化并建立自己作为一个超越地理空间专业的实体，直至被视觉艺术和普通大众发现的程度。在提供了 (0, 0) 处数据的准确说明后，讨论了空岛的地理空间、技术和社会影响。提供了避免将数据错放至空岛的指南。由于数据可能会继续出现在该位置，因此我们的贡献针对 GIS 科学家和普通大众，以提高对此错误源的认识。 本文探讨了虚构地点'Null Island'（0°纬度、0°经度）在地理信息系统中被错误关联数据的现象，分析其技术与社会影响，并提出避免数据误置的建议。 Levente Juhasz,Peter Mooney cs.HC,cs.CY,cs.DB

authors_text: Junhang Li,Jiao Wei,Can Tong,Tingting Shen,Yuchen Liu,Chen Li,Shouliang Qi,Yudong Yao,Yueyang Teng
title: Subspace Nonnegative Matrix Factorization for Feature Representation
title_zh: 用于特征表示的子空间非负矩阵分解
abstract: Traditional nonnegative matrix factorization (NMF) learns a new feature representation on the whole data space, which means treating all features equally. However, a subspace is often sufficient for accurate representation in practical applications, and redundant features can be invalid or even harmful. For example, if a camera has some sensors destroyed, then the corresponding pixels in the photos from this camera are not helpful to identify the content, which means only the subspace consisting of remaining pixels is worthy of attention. This paper proposes a new NMF method by introducing adaptive weights to identify key features in the original space so that only a subspace involves generating the new representation. Two strategies are proposed to achieve this: the fuzzier weighted technique and entropy regularized weighted technique, both of which result in an iterative solution with a simple form. Experimental results on several real-world datasets demonstrated that the proposed methods can generate a more accurate feature representation than existing methods. The code developed in this study is available at https://github.com/WNMF1/FWNMF-ERWNMF.
summary: Traditional nonnegative matrix factorization (NMF) learns a new feature representation on the whole data space, which means treating all features equally. However, a subspace is often sufficient for accurate representation in practical applications, and redundant features can be invalid or even harmful. For example, if a camera has some sensors destroyed, then the corresponding pixels in the photos from this camera are not helpful to identify the content, which means only the subspace consisting of remaining pixels is worthy of attention. This paper proposes a new NMF method by introducing adaptive weights to identify key features in the original space so that only a subspace involves generating the new representation. Two strategies are proposed to achieve this: the fuzzier weighted technique and entropy regularized weighted technique, both of which result in an iterative solution with a simple form. Experimental results on several real-world datasets demonstrated that the proposed methods can generate a more accurate feature representation than existing methods. The code developed in this study is available at https://github.com/WNMF1/FWNMF-ERWNMF.
abstract_zh: 传统的非负矩阵分解（NMF）在整个数据空间上学习新的特征表示，这意味着平等地对待所有特征。然而，在实际应用中，子空间通常足以准确表示，而冗余特征可能是无效的，甚至是有害的。例如，如果一台相机的某些传感器被损坏，那么该相机的照片中对应的像素对识别内容没有帮助，这意味着只有由剩余像素组成的子空间值得关注。本文提出了一种新的 NMF 方法，通过引入自适应权重来识别原始空间中的关键特征，以便只有子空间涉及生成新的表示。提出了两种策略来实现这一目标：模糊加权技术和熵正则化加权技术，这两种策略都会产生具有简单形式的迭代解决方案。在几个真实世界数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以生成比现有方法更准确的特征表示。本研究开发的代码可在 https://github.com/WNMF1/FWNMF-ERWNMF 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种子空间非负矩阵分解方法，通过自适应权重识别关键特征以提升特征表示的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统NMF对所有特征平等处理，但实际应用中冗余或损坏特征可能降低表示效果，需聚焦有效子空间。
AI.method: 引入自适应权重机制，采用模糊加权技术和熵正则化加权策略，迭代优化子空间特征表示。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上验证，新方法生成的特征表示优于现有技术，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效识别关键特征，生成更准确的子空间表示，适用于实际场景中的特征学习任务。

authors_text: Tingyu Wang,Zhedong Zheng,Yaoqi Sun,Chenggang Yan,Yi Yang,Tat-Seng Chua
title: Multiple-environment Self-adaptive Network for Aerial-view Geo-localization
title_zh: 多环境自适应航拍地理定位网络
abstract: Aerial-view geo-localization tends to determine an unknown position through matching the drone-view image with the geo-tagged satellite-view image. This task is mostly regarded as an image retrieval problem. The key underpinning this task is to design a series of deep neural networks to learn discriminative image descriptors. However, existing methods meet large performance drops under realistic weather, such as rain and fog, since they do not take the domain shift between the training data and multiple test environments into consideration. To minor this domain gap, we propose a Multiple-environment Self-adaptive Network (MuSe-Net) to dynamically adjust the domain shift caused by environmental changing. In particular, MuSe-Net employs a two-branch neural network containing one multiple-environment style extraction network and one self-adaptive feature extraction network. As the name implies, the multiple-environment style extraction network is to extract the environment-related style information, while the self-adaptive feature extraction network utilizes an adaptive modulation module to dynamically minimize the environment-related style gap. Extensive experiments on two widely-used benchmarks, i.e., University-1652 and CVUSA, demonstrate that the proposed MuSe-Net achieves a competitive result for geo-localization in multiple environments. Furthermore, we observe that the proposed method also shows great potential to the unseen extreme weather, such as mixing the fog, rain and snow.
summary: Aerial-view geo-localization tends to determine an unknown position through matching the drone-view image with the geo-tagged satellite-view image. This task is mostly regarded as an image retrieval problem. The key underpinning this task is to design a series of deep neural networks to learn discriminative image descriptors. However, existing methods meet large performance drops under realistic weather, such as rain and fog, since they do not take the domain shift between the training data and multiple test environments into consideration. To minor this domain gap, we propose a Multiple-environment Self-adaptive Network (MuSe-Net) to dynamically adjust the domain shift caused by environmental changing. In particular, MuSe-Net employs a two-branch neural network containing one multiple-environment style extraction network and one self-adaptive feature extraction network. As the name implies, the multiple-environment style extraction network is to extract the environment-related style information, while the self-adaptive feature extraction network utilizes an adaptive modulation module to dynamically minimize the environment-related style gap. Extensive experiments on two widely-used benchmarks, i.e., University-1652 and CVUSA, demonstrate that the proposed MuSe-Net achieves a competitive result for geo-localization in multiple environments. Furthermore, we observe that the proposed method also shows great potential to the unseen extreme weather, such as mixing the fog, rain and snow.
abstract_zh: 鸟瞰地理定位倾向于通过将无人机视图图像与带有地理标记的卫星视图图像进行匹配来确定未知位置。该任务主要被视为图像检索问题。支持这项任务的关键是设计一系列深度神经网络来学习判别性图像描述符。然而，现有方法在现实天气（例如雨和雾）下会遇到较大的性能下降，因为它们没有考虑训练数据和多个测试环境之间的域转移。为了缩小这个领域差距，我们提出了一种多环境自适应网络（MuSe-Net）来动态调整由环境变化引起的领域转移。特别是，MuSe-Net 采用两分支神经网络，包含一个多环境风格提取网络和一个自适应特征提取网络。顾名思义，多环境风格提取网络是提取与环境相关的风格信息，而自适应特征提取网络利用自适应调制模块来动态最小化与环境相关的风格差距。对两个广泛使用的基准（即 University-1652 和 CVUSA）进行的广泛实验表明，所提出的 MuSe-Net 在多种环境中的地理定位方面取得了有竞争力的结果。此外，我们观察到所提出的方法对于未见过的极端天气也显示出巨大的潜力，例如混合雾、雨和雪。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多环境自适应网络（MuSe-Net），用于解决航拍图像地理定位中因天气变化导致的领域差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在雨雾等真实天气条件下性能显著下降，因其未考虑训练数据与多测试环境间的领域迁移问题。
AI.method: 设计双分支网络：多环境风格提取分支与自适应特征提取分支，通过自适应调制模块动态缩小环境风格差异。
AI.result: 在University-1652和CVUSA数据集上验证，MuSe-Net在多环境地理定位中表现优异，且对未见极端天气（如雨雾雪混合）具有潜力。
AI.conclusion: MuSe-Net有效缓解了环境领域差异问题，在多种天气条件下均展现出竞争力，为复杂环境下的地理定位提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出一种多环境自适应网络（MuSe-Net），用于解决航拍图像地理定位中因天气变化导致的领域差异问题。
motivation: 现有方法在雨雾等真实天气条件下性能显著下降，因其未考虑训练数据与多测试环境间的领域迁移问题。
method: 设计双分支网络：多环境风格提取分支与自适应特征提取分支，通过自适应调制模块动态缩小环境风格差异。
result: 在University-1652和CVUSA数据集上验证，MuSe-Net在多环境地理定位中表现优异，且对未见极端天气（如雨雾雪混合）具有潜力。
conclusion: MuSe-Net有效缓解了环境领域差异问题，在多种天气条件下均展现出竞争力，为复杂环境下的地理定位提供了新思路。
search_text: Multiple-environment Self-adaptive Network for Aerial-view Geo-localization 多环境自适应航拍地理定位网络 Aerial-view geo-localization tends to determine an unknown position through matching the drone-view image with the geo-tagged satellite-view image. This task is mostly regarded as an image retrieval problem. The key underpinning this task is to design a series of deep neural networks to learn discriminative image descriptors. However, existing methods meet large performance drops under realistic weather, such as rain and fog, since they do not take the domain shift between the training data and multiple test environments into consideration. To minor this domain gap, we propose a Multiple-environment Self-adaptive Network (MuSe-Net) to dynamically adjust the domain shift caused by environmental changing. In particular, MuSe-Net employs a two-branch neural network containing one multiple-environment style extraction network and one self-adaptive feature extraction network. As the name implies, the multiple-environment style extraction network is to extract the environment-related style information, while the self-adaptive feature extraction network utilizes an adaptive modulation module to dynamically minimize the environment-related style gap. Extensive experiments on two widely-used benchmarks, i.e., University-1652 and CVUSA, demonstrate that the proposed MuSe-Net achieves a competitive result for geo-localization in multiple environments. Furthermore, we observe that the proposed method also shows great potential to the unseen extreme weather, such as mixing the fog, rain and snow. 鸟瞰地理定位倾向于通过将无人机视图图像与带有地理标记的卫星视图图像进行匹配来确定未知位置。该任务主要被视为图像检索问题。支持这项任务的关键是设计一系列深度神经网络来学习判别性图像描述符。然而，现有方法在现实天气（例如雨和雾）下会遇到较大的性能下降，因为它们没有考虑训练数据和多个测试环境之间的域转移。为了缩小这个领域差距，我们提出了一种多环境自适应网络（MuSe-Net）来动态调整由环境变化引起的领域转移。特别是，MuSe-Net 采用两分支神经网络，包含一个多环境风格提取网络和一个自适应特征提取网络。顾名思义，多环境风格提取网络是提取与环境相关的风格信息，而自适应特征提取网络利用自适应调制模块来动态最小化与环境相关的风格差距。对两个广泛使用的基准（即 University-1652 和 CVUSA）进行的广泛实验表明，所提出的 MuSe-Net 在多种环境中的地理定位方面取得了有竞争力的结果。此外，我们观察到所提出的方法对于未见过的极端天气也显示出巨大的潜力，例如混合雾、雨和雪。 本文提出一种多环境自适应网络（MuSe-Net），用于解决航拍图像地理定位中因天气变化导致的领域差异问题。 Tingyu Wang,Zhedong Zheng,Yaoqi Sun,Chenggang Yan,Yi Yang,Tat-Seng Chua cs.CV

authors_text: Andi Peng,Jessica Zosa Forde,Yonadav Shavit,Jonathan Frankle
title: Strengthening Subcommunities: Towards Sustainable Growth in AI Research
title_zh: 加强子社区：实现人工智能研究的可持续增长
abstract: AI's rapid growth has been felt acutely by scholarly venues, leading to growing pains within the peer review process. These challenges largely center on the inability of specific subareas to identify and evaluate work that is appropriate according to criteria relevant to each subcommunity as determined by stakeholders of that subarea. We set forth a proposal that re-focuses efforts within these subcommunities through a decentralization of the reviewing and publication process. Through this re-centering effort, we hope to encourage each subarea to confront the issues specific to their process of academic publication and incentivization. This model has historically been successful for several subcommunities in AI, and we highlight those instances as examples for how the broader field can continue to evolve despite its continually growing size.
summary: AI's rapid growth has been felt acutely by scholarly venues, leading to growing pains within the peer review process. These challenges largely center on the inability of specific subareas to identify and evaluate work that is appropriate according to criteria relevant to each subcommunity as determined by stakeholders of that subarea. We set forth a proposal that re-focuses efforts within these subcommunities through a decentralization of the reviewing and publication process. Through this re-centering effort, we hope to encourage each subarea to confront the issues specific to their process of academic publication and incentivization. This model has historically been successful for several subcommunities in AI, and we highlight those instances as examples for how the broader field can continue to evolve despite its continually growing size.
abstract_zh: 学术场所敏锐地感受到人工智能的快速发展，导致同行评审过程中出现成长的烦恼。这些挑战主要集中在特定子区域无法根据该子区域的利益相关者确定的与每个子社区相关的标准来识别和评估适当的工作。我们提出了一项提案，通过审查和发布流程的权力下放，重新集中这些子社区内的工作重点。通过这种重新定位的努力，我们希望鼓励每个子领域面对其学术出版和激励过程中的具体问题。该模型历来在人工智能的多个子社区中取得了成功，我们重点介绍这些实例，以说明更广泛的领域如何在其规模不断扩大的情况下继续发展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过去中心化审稿与出版流程，强化AI研究子社区的自主性以应对学术出版挑战。
AI.motivation: AI领域快速扩张导致传统同行评审机制难以适配各子社区的差异化评估需求，引发出版流程的结构性问题。
AI.method: 建议将审稿与出版流程权力下放至各子社区，由其根据自身标准制定评估体系与激励机制。
AI.result: 历史案例表明该模式在部分AI子领域已成功实施，证明其可作为解决出版困境的可行路径。
AI.conclusion: 去中心化模式有助于各子社区针对性优化流程，是推动AI研究可持续发展的关键方向。

authors_text: Kaede Shiohara,Toshihiko Yamasaki
title: Detecting Deepfakes with Self-Blended Images
title_zh: 使用自混合图像检测 Deepfakes
abstract: In this paper, we present novel synthetic training data called self-blended images (SBIs) to detect deepfakes. SBIs are generated by blending pseudo source and target images from single pristine images, reproducing common forgery artifacts (e.g., blending boundaries and statistical inconsistencies between source and target images). The key idea behind SBIs is that more general and hardly recognizable fake samples encourage classifiers to learn generic and robust representations without overfitting to manipulation-specific artifacts. We compare our approach with state-of-the-art methods on FF++, CDF, DFD, DFDC, DFDCP, and FFIW datasets by following the standard cross-dataset and cross-manipulation protocols. Extensive experiments show that our method improves the model generalization to unknown manipulations and scenes. In particular, on DFDC and DFDCP where existing methods suffer from the domain gap between the training and test sets, our approach outperforms the baseline by 4.90% and 11.78% points in the cross-dataset evaluation, respectively.
summary: In this paper, we present novel synthetic training data called self-blended images (SBIs) to detect deepfakes. SBIs are generated by blending pseudo source and target images from single pristine images, reproducing common forgery artifacts (e.g., blending boundaries and statistical inconsistencies between source and target images). The key idea behind SBIs is that more general and hardly recognizable fake samples encourage classifiers to learn generic and robust representations without overfitting to manipulation-specific artifacts. We compare our approach with state-of-the-art methods on FF++, CDF, DFD, DFDC, DFDCP, and FFIW datasets by following the standard cross-dataset and cross-manipulation protocols. Extensive experiments show that our method improves the model generalization to unknown manipulations and scenes. In particular, on DFDC and DFDCP where existing methods suffer from the domain gap between the training and test sets, our approach outperforms the baseline by 4.90% and 11.78% points in the cross-dataset evaluation, respectively.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种称为自混合图像（SBI）的新型合成训练数据来检测深度伪造品。 SBI 是通过混合来自单个原始图像的伪源图像和目标图像来生成的，再现常见的伪造伪影（例如，混合源图像和目标图像之间的边界和统计不一致）。 SBI 背后的关键思想是，更普遍且难以识别的假样本鼓励分类器学习通用且稳健的表示，而不会过度拟合特定于操作的工件。我们遵循标准的跨数据集和交叉操作协议，将我们的方法与 FF++、CDF、DFD、DFDC、DFDCP 和 FFIW 数据集上最先进的方法进行比较。大量的实验表明，我们的方法提高了模型对未知操作和场景的泛化能力。特别是，在 DFDC 和 DFDCP 上，现有方法受到训练集和测试集之间领域差距的影响，我们的方法在跨数据集评估中分别优于基线 4.90% 和 11.78%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为自融合图像（SBIs）的新合成训练数据，用于检测深度伪造（deepfakes）。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在检测未知篡改和场景时存在泛化能力不足的问题，而SBIs通过生成更通用且难以识别的伪造样本，帮助分类器学习鲁棒的通用特征。
AI.method: 通过从单张原始图像中融合伪源图像和目标图像生成SBIs，模拟常见的伪造痕迹（如融合边界和统计不一致性），并用于训练分类器。
AI.result: 在多个数据集（如DFDC、DFDCP）的跨数据集评估中，该方法分别超出基线4.90%和11.78%的准确率，显著缓解了训练集与测试集间的领域差异问题。
AI.conclusion: SBIs能有效提升模型对未知篡改和场景的泛化能力，为深度伪造检测提供了更通用的解决方案。

authors_text: Kyriakos Stylianopoulos,George C. Alexandropoulos
title: Online RIS Configuration Learning for Arbitrary Large Numbers of $1$-Bit Phase Resolution Elements
title_zh: 任意大量 1$ 位相位分辨率元件的在线 RIS 配置学习
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, submitted to an IEEE conference
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures, submitted to an IEEE conference
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) approaches are lately deployed for orchestrating wireless communications empowered by Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RISs), leveraging their online optimization capabilities. Most commonly, in RL-based formulations for realistic RISs with low resolution phase-tunable elements, each configuration is modeled as a distinct reflection action, resulting to inefficient exploration due to the exponential nature of the search space. In this paper, we consider RISs with 1-bit phase resolution elements, and model the action of each of them as a binary vector including the feasible reflection coefficients. We then introduce two variations of the well-established Deep Q-Network (DQN) and Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) agents, aiming for effective exploration of the binary action spaces. For the case of DQN, we make use of an efficient approximation of the Q-function, whereas a discretization post-processing step is applied to the output of DDPG. Our simulation results showcase that the proposed techniques greatly outperform the baseline in terms of the rate maximization objective, when large-scale RISs are considered. In addition, when dealing with moderate scale RIS sizes, where the conventional DQN based on configuration-based action spaces is feasible, the performance of the latter technique is similar to the proposed learning approach.
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) approaches are lately deployed for orchestrating wireless communications empowered by Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RISs), leveraging their online optimization capabilities. Most commonly, in RL-based formulations for realistic RISs with low resolution phase-tunable elements, each configuration is modeled as a distinct reflection action, resulting to inefficient exploration due to the exponential nature of the search space. In this paper, we consider RISs with 1-bit phase resolution elements, and model the action of each of them as a binary vector including the feasible reflection coefficients. We then introduce two variations of the well-established Deep Q-Network (DQN) and Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) agents, aiming for effective exploration of the binary action spaces. For the case of DQN, we make use of an efficient approximation of the Q-function, whereas a discretization post-processing step is applied to the output of DDPG. Our simulation results showcase that the proposed techniques greatly outperform the baseline in terms of the rate maximization objective, when large-scale RISs are considered. In addition, when dealing with moderate scale RIS sizes, where the conventional DQN based on configuration-based action spaces is feasible, the performance of the latter technique is similar to the proposed learning approach.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）方法最近被部署用于编排由可重构智能表面（RIS）支持的无线通信，利用其在线优化功能。最常见的是，在具有低分辨率相位可调元件的现实 RIS 的基于强化学习的公式中，每种配置都被建模为不同的反射动作，由于搜索空间的指数性质，导致探索效率低下。在本文中，我们考虑具有 1 位相位分辨率元素的 RIS，并将它们每个的动作建模为包含可行反射系数的二进制向量。然后，我们介绍了成熟的深度 Q 网络（DQN）和深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）代理的两种变体，旨在有效探索二元动作空间。对于 DQN 的情况，我们利用 Q 函数的有效近似，而离散化后处理步骤应用于 DDPG 的输出。我们的模拟结果表明，当考虑大规模 RIS 时，所提出的技术在速率最大化目标方面大大优于基线。此外，当处理中等规模的 RIS 大小时，基于配置的动作空间的传统 DQN 是可行的，后一种技术的性能与所提出的学习方法类似。

AI.tldr: 本文针对大规模1位相位分辨率可重构智能表面（RIS）的在线配置问题，提出改进的深度强化学习方法以提升探索效率。
AI.motivation: 传统基于配置的动作空间建模在低分辨率RIS中因指数级动作空间导致探索效率低下，需更高效的二进制动作空间学习方法。
AI.method: 改进DQN与DDPG算法：DQN采用Q函数高效近似，DDPG通过离散化后处理输出，适应二进制反射系数动作空间。
AI.result: 仿真显示，新方法在大规模RIS中显著优于基线，中等规模RIS下性能与传统DQN相当。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决大规模1位相位RIS的配置优化问题，兼顾不同规模场景的性能需求。

search_text: Online RIS Configuration Learning for Arbitrary Large Numbers of $1$-Bit Phase Resolution Elements 任意大量 1$ 位相位分辨率元件的在线 RIS 配置学习 Reinforcement Learning (RL) approaches are lately deployed for orchestrating wireless communications empowered by Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RISs), leveraging their online optimization capabilities. Most commonly, in RL-based formulations for realistic RISs with low resolution phase-tunable elements, each configuration is modeled as a distinct reflection action, resulting to inefficient exploration due to the exponential nature of the search space. In this paper, we consider RISs with 1-bit phase resolution elements, and model the action of each of them as a binary vector including the feasible reflection coefficients. We then introduce two variations of the well-established Deep Q-Network (DQN) and Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) agents, aiming for effective exploration of the binary action spaces. For the case of DQN, we make use of an efficient approximation of the Q-function, whereas a discretization post-processing step is applied to the output of DDPG. Our simulation results showcase that the proposed techniques greatly outperform the baseline in terms of the rate maximization objective, when large-scale RISs are considered. In addition, when dealing with moderate scale RIS sizes, where the conventional DQN based on configuration-based action spaces is feasible, the performance of the latter technique is similar to the proposed learning approach. 强化学习（RL）方法最近被部署用于编排由可重构智能表面（RIS）支持的无线通信，利用其在线优化功能。最常见的是，在具有低分辨率相位可调元件的现实 RIS 的基于强化学习的公式中，每种配置都被建模为不同的反射动作，由于搜索空间的指数性质，导致探索效率低下。在本文中，我们考虑具有 1 位相位分辨率元素的 RIS，并将它们每个的动作建模为包含可行反射系数的二进制向量。然后，我们介绍了成熟的深度 Q 网络（DQN）和深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）代理的两种变体，旨在有效探索二元动作空间。对于 DQN 的情况，我们利用 Q 函数的有效近似，而离散化后处理步骤应用于 DDPG 的输出。我们的模拟结果表明，当考虑大规模 RIS 时，所提出的技术在速率最大化目标方面大大优于基线。此外，当处理中等规模的 RIS 大小时，基于配置的动作空间的传统 DQN 是可行的，后一种技术的性能与所提出的学习方法类似。 本文针对大规模1位相位分辨率可重构智能表面（RIS）的在线配置问题，提出改进的深度强化学习方法以提升探索效率。 Kyriakos Stylianopoulos,George C. authors_text: Aman Goyal,Dev Agarwal,Anbumani Subramanian,C. V. Jawahar,Ravi Kiran Sarvadevabhatla,Rohit Saluja
title: Detecting, Tracking and Counting Motorcycle Rider Traffic Violations on Unconstrained Roads
title_zh: 检测、跟踪和统计无约束道路上的摩托车骑手交通违规行为
comment: 10 pages, 9 figures, Accepted at The 5th Workshop and Prize Challenge: Bridging the Gap between Computational Photography and Visual Recognition (UG2+) in conjunction with IEEE CVPR 2022
comments: 10 pages, 9 figures, Accepted at The 5th Workshop and Prize Challenge: Bridging the Gap between Computational Photography and Visual Recognition (UG2+) in conjunction with IEEE CVPR 2022
abstract: In many Asian countries with unconstrained road traffic conditions, driving violations such as not wearing helmets and triple-riding are a significant source of fatalities involving motorcycles. Identifying and penalizing such riders is vital in curbing road accidents and improving citizens' safety. With this motivation, we propose an approach for detecting, tracking, and counting motorcycle riding violations in videos taken from a vehicle-mounted dashboard camera. We employ a curriculum learning-based object detector to better tackle challenging scenarios such as occlusions. We introduce a novel trapezium-shaped object boundary representation to increase robustness and tackle the rider-motorcycle association. We also introduce an amodal regressor that generates bounding boxes for the occluded riders. Experimental results on a large-scale unconstrained driving dataset demonstrate the superiority of our approach compared to existing approaches and other ablative variants.
summary: In many Asian countries with unconstrained road traffic conditions, driving violations such as not wearing helmets and triple-riding are a significant source of fatalities involving motorcycles. Identifying and penalizing such riders is vital in curbing road accidents and improving citizens' safety. With this motivation, we propose an approach for detecting, tracking, and counting motorcycle riding violations in videos taken from a vehicle-mounted dashboard camera. We employ a curriculum learning-based object detector to better tackle challenging scenarios such as occlusions. We introduce a novel trapezium-shaped object boundary representation to increase robustness and tackle the rider-motorcycle association. We also introduce an amodal regressor that generates bounding boxes for the occluded riders. Experimental results on a large-scale unconstrained driving dataset demonstrate the superiority of our approach compared to existing approaches and other ablative variants.
abstract_zh: 在许多道路交通条件不受限制的亚洲国家，不戴头盔、三人骑行等违规驾驶行为是摩托车死亡的重要原因。识别和惩罚此类骑手对于遏制道路事故和提高公民安全至关重要。出于这个动机，我们提出了一种在车载仪表板摄像头拍摄的视频中检测、跟踪和计数摩托车骑行违规行为的方法。我们采用基于课程学习的对象检测器来更好地解决遮挡等具有挑战性的场景。我们引入了一种新颖的梯形对象边界表示，以提高鲁棒性并解决骑手与摩托车之间的关联问题。我们还引入了一个非模态回归器，它为被遮挡的骑手生成边界框。大规模无约束驾驶数据集的实验结果证明了我们的方法相对于现有方法和其他消融变体的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在无约束道路环境下检测、跟踪和统计摩托车骑手交通违规行为的方法。
AI.motivation: 亚洲国家摩托车驾驶违规（如不戴头盔、三人共乘）导致大量致命事故，需有效检测手段以提升道路安全。
AI.method: 采用课程学习的物体检测器应对遮挡挑战，引入梯形边界表示增强鲁棒性，并设计模态回归器生成遮挡骑手的边界框。
AI.result: 在大规模无约束驾驶数据集上验证，该方法优于现有技术及其他消融变体。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升摩托车违规检测性能，有助于减少交通事故并改善公共安全。

authors_text: Shuiying Xiang,Yuechun Shi,Xingxing Guo,Yahui Zhang,Hongji Wang,Dianzhuang Zheng,Ziwei Song,Yanan Han,Shuang Gao,Shihao Zhao,Biling Gu,Hailing Wang,Xiaojun Zhu,Lianping Hou,Xiangfei Chen,Wanhua Zheng,Xiaohua Ma,Yue Hao
title: Hardware-algorithm collaborative computing with photonic spiking neuron chip based on integrated Fabry-Pérot laser with saturable absorber
title_zh: 基于可饱和吸收体集成法布里-珀罗激光器的光子尖峰神经元芯片的硬件算法协同计算
abstract: Photonic neuromorphic computing has emerged as a promising avenue toward building a low-latency and energy-efficient non-von-Neuman computing system. Photonic spiking neural network (PSNN) exploits brain-like spatiotemporal processing to realize high-performance neuromorphic computing. However, the nonlinear computation of PSNN remains a significant challenging. Here, we proposed and fabricated a photonic spiking neuron chip based on an integrated Fabry-Pérot laser with a saturable absorber (FP-SA) for the first time. The nonlinear neuron-like dynamics including temporal integration, threshold and spike generation, refractory period, and cascadability were experimentally demonstrated, which offers an indispensable fundamental building block to construct the PSNN hardware. Furthermore, we proposed time-multiplexed spike encoding to realize functional PSNN far beyond the hardware integration scale limit. PSNNs with single/cascaded photonic spiking neurons were experimentally demonstrated to realize hardware-algorithm collaborative computing, showing capability in performing classification tasks with supervised learning algorithm, which paves the way for multi-layer PSNN for solving complex tasks.
summary: Photonic neuromorphic computing has emerged as a promising avenue toward building a low-latency and energy-efficient non-von-Neuman computing system. Photonic spiking neural network (PSNN) exploits brain-like spatiotemporal processing to realize high-performance neuromorphic computing. However, the nonlinear computation of PSNN remains a significant challenging. Here, we proposed and fabricated a photonic spiking neuron chip based on an integrated Fabry-Pérot laser with a saturable absorber (FP-SA) for the first time. The nonlinear neuron-like dynamics including temporal integration, threshold and spike generation, refractory period, and cascadability were experimentally demonstrated, which offers an indispensable fundamental building block to construct the PSNN hardware. Furthermore, we proposed time-multiplexed spike encoding to realize functional PSNN far beyond the hardware integration scale limit. PSNNs with single/cascaded photonic spiking neurons were experimentally demonstrated to realize hardware-algorithm collaborative computing, showing capability in performing classification tasks with supervised learning algorithm, which paves the way for multi-layer PSNN for solving complex tasks.
abstract_zh: 光子神经形态计算已成为构建低延迟且节能的非冯诺依曼计算系统的一条有前途的途径。光子尖峰神经网络（PSNN）利用类脑时空处理来实现高性能神经形态计算。然而，PSNN 的非线性计算仍然是一个重大挑战。在这里，我们首次提出并制造了一种基于带有可饱和吸收器的集成法布里-珀罗激光器（FP-SA）的光子尖峰神经元芯片。实验证明了类非线性神经元动力学，包括时间积分、阈值和尖峰生成、不应期和级联性，这为构建 PSNN 硬件提供了不可或缺的基本构建块。此外，我们提出了时分复用尖峰编码来实现功能性 PSNN，远远超出了硬件集成规模的限制。实验证明具有单级/级联光子尖峰神经元的PSNN可以实现硬件算法协同计算，显示出利用监督学习算法执行分类任务的能力，这为多层PSNN解决复杂任务铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并制造了基于集成法布里-珀罗激光器与可饱和吸收体的光子脉冲神经元芯片，用于实现硬件与算法协同计算。
AI.motivation: 光子脉冲神经网络（PSNN）在非冯·诺依曼计算中具有潜力，但其非线性计算仍是核心挑战，需开发新型硬件基础模块。
AI.method: 设计并制造集成Fabry-Pérot激光器与可饱和吸收体的光子神经元芯片，通过时分复用编码突破硬件集成限制，实验验证其神经元动态特性。
AI.result: 实验实现时间积分、阈值触发等神经元功能，成功完成监督学习分类任务，为构建多层PSNN提供了硬件基础。
AI.conclusion: 该芯片为光子神经形态计算提供了关键硬件模块，推动了低功耗、高性能非冯·诺依曼系统的实现。

motivation: 光子脉冲神经网络（PSNN）在非冯·诺依曼计算中具有潜力，但其非线性计算仍是核心挑战，需开发新型硬件基础模块。

conclusion: 该芯片为光子神经形态计算提供了关键硬件模块，推动了低功耗、高性能非冯·诺依曼系统的实现。
search_text: Hardware-algorithm collaborative computing with photonic spiking neuron chip based on integrated Fabry-Pérot laser with saturable absorber 基于可饱和吸收体集成法布里-珀罗激光器的光子尖峰神经元芯片的硬件算法协同计算 Photonic neuromorphic computing has emerged as a promising avenue toward building a low-latency and energy-efficient non-von-Neuman computing system. Photonic spiking neural network (PSNN) exploits brain-like spatiotemporal processing to realize high-performance neuromorphic computing. However, the nonlinear computation of PSNN remains a significant challenging. Here, we proposed and fabricated a photonic spiking neuron chip based on an integrated Fabry-Pérot laser with a saturable absorber (FP-SA) for the first time. The nonlinear neuron-like dynamics including temporal integration, threshold and spike generation, refractory period, and cascadability were experimentally demonstrated, which offers an indispensable fundamental building block to construct the PSNN hardware. Furthermore, we proposed time-multiplexed spike encoding to realize functional PSNN far beyond the hardware integration scale limit. PSNNs with single/cascaded photonic spiking neurons were experimentally demonstrated to realize hardware-algorithm collaborative computing, showing capability in performing classification tasks with supervised learning algorithm, which paves the way for multi-layer PSNN for solving complex tasks. 光子神经形态计算已成为构建低延迟且节能的非冯诺依曼计算系统的一条有前途的途径。光子尖峰神经网络（PSNN）利用类脑时空处理来实现高性能神经形态计算。然而，PSNN 的非线性计算仍然是一个重大挑战。在这里，我们首次提出并制造了一种基于带有可饱和吸收器的集成法布里-珀罗激光器（FP-SA）的光子尖峰神经元芯片。实验证明了类非线性神经元动力学，包括时间积分、阈值和尖峰生成、不应期和级联性，这为构建 PSNN 硬件提供了不可或缺的基本构建块。此外，我们提出了时分复用尖峰编码来实现功能性 PSNN，远远超出了硬件集成规模的限制。实验证明具有单级/级联光子尖峰神经元的PSNN可以实现硬件算法协同计算，显示出利用监督学习算法执行分类任务的能力，这为多层PSNN解决复杂任务铺平了道路。 本文提出并制造了基于集成法布里-珀罗激光器与可饱和吸收体的光子脉冲神经元芯片，用于实现硬件与算法协同计算。 Shuiying Xiang,Yuechun Shi,Xingxing Guo,Yahui Zhang,Hongji Wang,Dianzhuang Zheng,Ziwei Song,Yanan Han,Shuang Gao,Shihao Zhao,Biling Gu,Hailing Wang,Xiaojun Zhu,Lianping Hou,Xiangfei Chen,Wanhua Zheng,Xiaohua Ma,Yue Hao cs.ET,physics.optics

authors_text: Fabien Dufoulon,William K. Moses Jr.,Gopal Pandurangan
title: Distributed MIS in $O(\log\log{n} )$ Awake Complexity
title_zh: $O(\log\log{n} )$ 中的分布式 MIS 唤醒复杂性
comment: Abstract shortened to fit arXiv constraints
comments: Abstract shortened to fit arXiv constraints
abstract: Maximal Independent Set (MIS) is one of the fundamental and most well-studied problems in distributed graph algorithms. Even after four decades of intensive research, the best-known (randomized) MIS algorithms have $O(\log{n})$ round complexity on general graphs [Luby, STOC 1986] (where $n$ is the number of nodes), while the best-known lower bound is $Ω(\sqrt{\log{n}/\log\log{n}})$ [Kuhn, Moscibroda, Wattenhofer, JACM 2016]. Breaking past the $O(\log{n})$ round complexity upper bound or showing stronger lower bounds have been longstanding open problems. Our main contribution is to show that MIS can be computed in awake complexity that is exponentially better compared to the best known round complexity of $O(\log n)$ and also bypassing its fundamental $Ω(\sqrt{\log{n}/\log\log{n}})$ round complexity lower bound exponentially. Specifically, we show that MIS can be computed by a randomized distributed (Monte Carlo) algorithm in $O(\log\log{n} )$ awake complexity with high probability (i.e., with probability at least $1 - n^{-1}$). This algorithm has a round complexity of $O((\log^7 n) \log \log n)$. We also show that we can improve the round complexity at the cost of a slight increase in awake complexity, by presenting a randomized distributed (Monte Carlo) algorithm for MIS that, with high probability, computes an MIS in $O((\log\log{n})\log^*n)$ awake complexity and $O((\log^3 n) (\log \log n) \log^*n)$ round complexity. Our algorithms work in the CONGEST model where messages of size $O(\log n)$ bits can be sent per edge per round.
summary: Maximal Independent Set (MIS) is one of the fundamental and most well-studied problems in distributed graph algorithms. Even after four decades of intensive research, the best-known (randomized) MIS algorithms have $O(\log{n})$ round complexity on general graphs [Luby, STOC 1986] (where $n$ is the number of nodes), while the best-known lower bound is $Ω(\sqrt{\log{n}/\log\log{n}})$ [Kuhn, Moscibroda, Wattenhofer, JACM 2016]. Breaking past the $O(\log{n})$ round complexity upper bound or showing stronger lower bounds have been longstanding open problems. Our main contribution is to show that MIS can be computed in awake complexity that is exponentially better compared to the best known round complexity of $O(\log n)$ and also bypassing its fundamental $Ω(\sqrt{\log{n}/\log\log{n}})$ round complexity lower bound exponentially. Specifically, we show that MIS can be computed by a randomized distributed (Monte Carlo) algorithm in $O(\log\log{n} )$ awake complexity with high probability (i.e., with probability at least $1 - n^{-1}$). This algorithm has a round complexity of $O((\log^7 n) \log \log n)$. We also show that we can improve the round complexity at the cost of a slight increase in awake complexity, by presenting a randomized distributed (Monte Carlo) algorithm for MIS that, with high probability, computes an MIS in $O((\log\log{n})\log^*n)$ awake complexity and $O((\log^3 n) (\log \log n) \log^*n)$ round complexity. Our algorithms work in the CONGEST model where messages of size $O(\log n)$ bits can be sent per edge per round.
abstract_zh: 最大独立集（MIS）是分布式图算法中基本且研究最深入的问题之一。即使经过四十年的深入研究，最著名的（随机化）MIS 算法在一般图上的轮复杂度为 $O(\log{n})$ [Luby, STOC 1986]（其中 $n$ 是节点数），而最著名的下界为 $Ω(\sqrt{\log{n}/\log\log{n}})$ [Kuhn, Moscibroda, Wattenhofer, JACM 2016]。突破 $O(\log{n})$ 轮复杂度上限或显示更强的下限一直是长期存在的开放问题。我们的主要贡具体来说，我们证明 MIS 可以通过随机分布式（蒙特卡罗）算法以 $O(\log\log{n} )$ 清醒复杂度以高概率（即概率至少为 $1 - n^{-1}$）计算。该算法的轮复杂度为$O((\log^7 n) \log \log n)$。我们还表明，通过提出一种用于 MIS 的随机分布式（蒙特卡罗）算法，我们可以以稍微增加清醒复杂度为代价来提高回合复杂度，该算法以高概率以 $O((\log\log{n})\log^*n)$ 清醒复杂度和 $O((\log^3 n) (\log \log n) \log^*n)$ 回合复杂度计算 MIS。我们的算法在 CONGEST 模型中工作，其中每轮每条边可以发送大小为 $O(\log n)$ 位的消息。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种在CONGEST模型中以$O(\\log\\log{n})$的唤醒复杂度计算最大独立集（MIS）的分布式算法。
AI.motivation: 尽管MIS问题已被研究四十年，但现有算法的轮复杂度仍为$O(\\log{n})$，且无法突破其下界。本文旨在通过改进唤醒复杂度（而非轮复杂度）实现指数级优化。
AI.method: 设计了一种随机化分布式（Monte Carlo）算法，在CONGEST模型中通过降低节点唤醒频率，同时控制轮复杂度，实现唤醒复杂度与轮复杂度的权衡。
AI.result: 提出两种算法：第一种以$O(\\log\\log{n})$唤醒复杂度和$O(\\log^7{n}\\log\\log{n})$轮复杂度求解MIS；第二种以$O((\\log\\log{n})\\log^*n)$唤醒复杂度和$O(\\log^3{n}(\\log\\log{n})\\log^*n)$轮复杂度求解MIS，均以高概率成功。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次在唤醒复杂度上实现对传统轮复杂度下界的指数级突破，为分布式算法设计提供了新的复杂度权衡视角。

search_text: Distributed MIS in $O(\log\log{n} )$ Awake Complexity $O(\log\log{n} )$ 中的分布式 MIS 唤醒复杂性 Maximal Independent Set (MIS) is one of the fundamental and most well-studied problems in distributed graph algorithms. Even after four decades of intensive research, the best-known (randomized) MIS algorithms have $O(\log{n})$ round complexity on general graphs [Luby, STOC 1986] (where $n$ is the number of nodes), while the best-known lower bound is $Ω(\sqrt{\log{n}/\log\log{n}})$ [Kuhn, Moscibroda, Wattenhofer, JACM 2016]. Our main contribution is to show that MIS can be computed in awake complexity that is exponentially better compared to the best known round complexity of $O(\log n)$ and also bypassing its fundamental $Ω(\sqrt{\log{n}/\log\log{n}})$ round complexity lower bound exponentially. Specifically, we show that MIS can be computed by a randomized distributed (Monte Carlo) algorithm in $O(\log\log{n} )$ awake complexity with high probability (i.e., with probability at least $1 - n^{-1}$). Our algorithms work in the CONGEST model where messages of size $O(\log n)$ bits can be sent per edge per round. 最大独立集（MIS）是分布式图算法中基本且研究最深入的问题之一。即使经过四十年的深入研究，最著名的（随机化）MIS 算法在一般图上的轮复杂度为 $O(\log{n})$ [Luby, STOC 1986]（其中 $n$ 是节点数），而最著名的下界为 $Ω(\sqrt{\log{n}/\log\log{n}})$ [Kuhn, Moscibroda, Wattenhofer, JACM 2016]。突破 $O(\log{n})$ 轮复杂度上限或显示更强的下限一直是长期存在的开放问题。我们的主要贡具体来说，我们证明 MIS 可以通过随机分布式（蒙特卡罗）算法以 $O(\log\log{n} )$ 清醒复杂度以高概率（即概率至少为 $1 - n^{-1}$）计算。该算法的轮复杂度为$O((\log^7 n) \log \log n)$。我们还表明，通过提出一种用于 MIS 的随机分布式（蒙特卡罗）算法，我们可以以稍微增加清醒复杂度为代价来提高回合复杂度，该算法以高概率以 $O((\log\log{n})\log^*n)$ 清醒复杂度和 $O((\log^3 n) (\log \log n) \log^*n)$ 回合复杂度计算 MIS。我们的算法在 CONGEST 模型中工作，其中每轮每条边可以发送大小为 $O(\log n)$ 位的消息。 该论文提出了一种在CONGEST模型中以$O(\\log\\log{n})$的唤醒复杂度计算最大独立集（MIS）的分布式算法。 Fabien Dufoulon,William K. authors_text: Hassan Eldeeb,Mohamed Maher,Radwa Elshawi,Sherif Sakr
title: AutoMLBench: A Comprehensive Experimental Evaluation of Automated Machine Learning Frameworks
title_zh: AutoMLBench：自动化机器学习框架的综合实验评估
abstract: With the booming demand for machine learning applications, it has been recognized that the number of knowledgeable data scientists can not scale with the growing data volumes and application needs in our digital world. In response to this demand, several automated machine learning (AutoML) frameworks have been developed to fill the gap of human expertise by automating the process of building machine learning pipelines. Each framework comes with different heuristics-based design decisions. In this study, we present a comprehensive evaluation and comparison of the performance characteristics of six popular AutoML frameworks, namely, AutoWeka, AutoSKlearn, TPOT, Recipe, ATM, and SmartML, across 100 data sets from established AutoML benchmark suites. Our experimental evaluation considers different aspects for its comparison, including the performance impact of several design decisions, including time budget, size of search space, meta-learning, and ensemble construction. The results of our study reveal various interesting insights that can significantly guide and impact the design of AutoML frameworks.
summary: With the booming demand for machine learning applications, it has been recognized that the number of knowledgeable data scientists can not scale with the growing data volumes and application needs in our digital world. In response to this demand, several automated machine learning (AutoML) frameworks have been developed to fill the gap of human expertise by automating the process of building machine learning pipelines. Each framework comes with different heuristics-based design decisions. In this study, we present a comprehensive evaluation and comparison of the performance characteristics of six popular AutoML frameworks, namely, AutoWeka, AutoSKlearn, TPOT, Recipe, ATM, and SmartML, across 100 data sets from established AutoML benchmark suites. Our experimental evaluation considers different aspects for its comparison, including the performance impact of several design decisions, including time budget, size of search space, meta-learning, and ensemble construction. The results of our study reveal various interesting insights that can significantly guide and impact the design of AutoML frameworks.
abstract_zh: 随着对机器学习应用程序的需求不断增长，人们已经认识到，知识渊博的数据科学家的数量无法随着数字世界中不断增长的数据量和应用程序需求而扩展。为了满足这一需求，人们开发了几种自动化机器学习（AutoML）框架，通过自动化构建机器学习管道的过程来填补人类专业知识的空白。每个框架都有不同的基于启发式的设计决策。在这项研究中，我们通过已建立的 AutoML 基准套件的 100 个数据集，对六种流行的 AutoML 框架（即 AutoWeka、AutoSKlearn、TPOT、Recipe、ATM 和 SmartML）的性能特征进行了全面评估和比较。我们的实验评估考虑了不同方面的比较，包括几个设计决策的性能影响，包括时间预算、搜索空间的大小、元学习和集成构建。我们的研究结果揭示了各种有趣的见解，可以显着指导和影响 AutoML 框架的设计。

AI.tldr: 本文对六种主流AutoML框架在100个数据集上的性能进行了全面评估与比较。
AI.motivation: 随着数据量和应用需求的增长，专业数据科学家数量不足，需通过AutoML框架自动化构建机器学习流水线以弥补人力缺口。
AI.method: 通过实验评估六个框架（AutoWeka、AutoSKlearn等）在时间预算、搜索空间规模、元学习和集成构建等设计决策下的性能表现。
AI.result: 研究揭示了不同设计决策对性能的影响，为AutoML框架的优化提供了关键见解。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为AutoML框架的设计与改进提供了实证依据和方向指导。

result: 研究揭示了不同设计决策对性能的影响，为AutoML框架的优化提供了关键见解。
conclusion: 该研究为AutoML框架的设计与改进提供了实证依据和方向指导。
search_text: AutoMLBench: A Comprehensive Experimental Evaluation of Automated Machine Learning Frameworks AutoMLBench：自动化机器学习框架的综合实验评估 With the booming demand for machine learning applications, it has been recognized that the number of knowledgeable data scientists can not scale with the growing data volumes and application needs in our digital world. In response to this demand, several automated machine learning (AutoML) frameworks have been developed to fill the gap of human expertise by automating the process of building machine learning pipelines. Each framework comes with different heuristics-based design decisions. In this study, we present a comprehensive evaluation and comparison of the performance characteristics of six popular AutoML frameworks, namely, AutoWeka, AutoSKlearn, TPOT, Recipe, ATM, and SmartML, across 100 data sets from established AutoML benchmark suites. Our experimental evaluation considers different aspects for its comparison, including the performance impact of several design decisions, including time budget, size of search space, meta-learning, and ensemble construction. The results of our study reveal various interesting insights that can significantly guide and impact the design of AutoML frameworks. 随着对机器学习应用程序的需求不断增长，人们已经认识到，知识渊博的数据科学家的数量无法随着数字世界中不断增长的数据量和应用程序需求而扩展。为了满足这一需求，人们开发了几种自动化机器学习（AutoML）框架，通过自动化构建机器学习管道的过程来填补人类专业知识的空白。每个框架都有不同的基于启发式的设计决策。在这项研究中，我们通过已建立的 AutoML 基准套件的 100 个数据集，对六种流行的 AutoML 框架（即 AutoWeka、AutoSKlearn、TPOT、Recipe、ATM 和 SmartML）的性能特征进行了全面评估和比较。我们的实验评估考虑了不同方面的比较，包括几个设计决策的性能影响，包括时间预算、搜索空间的大小、元学习和集成构建。我们的研究结果揭示了各种有趣的见解，可以显着指导和影响 AutoML 框架的设计。 本文对六种主流AutoML框架在100个数据集上的性能进行了全面评估与比较。 Hassan Eldeeb,Mohamed Maher,Radwa Elshawi,Sherif Sakr cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Wujiang Xu,Runzhong Wang,Xiaobo Guo,Shaoshuai Li,Qiongxu Ma,Yunan Zhao,Sheng Guo,Zhenfeng Zhu,Junchi Yan
title: MHSCNet: A Multimodal Hierarchical Shot-aware Convolutional Network for Video Summarization
title_zh: MHSCNet：用于视频摘要的多模态分层镜头感知卷积网络
abstract: Video summarization intends to produce a concise video summary by effectively capturing and combining the most informative parts of the whole content. Existing approaches for video summarization regard the task as a frame-wise keyframe selection problem and generally construct the frame-wise representation by combining the long-range temporal dependency with the unimodal or bimodal information. However, the optimal video summaries need to reflect the most valuable keyframe with its own information, and one with semantic power of the whole content. Thus, it is critical to construct a more powerful and robust frame-wise representation and predict the frame-level importance score in a fair and comprehensive manner. To tackle the above issues, we propose a multimodal hierarchical shot-aware convolutional network, denoted as MHSCNet, to enhance the frame-wise representation via combining the comprehensive available multimodal information. Specifically, we design a hierarchical ShotConv network to incorporate the adaptive shot-aware frame-level representation by considering the short-range and long-range temporal dependency. Based on the learned shot-aware representations, MHSCNet can predict the frame-level importance score in the local and global view of the video. Extensive experiments on two standard video summarization datasets demonstrate that our proposed method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. Source code will be made publicly available.
summary: Video summarization intends to produce a concise video summary by effectively capturing and combining the most informative parts of the whole content. Existing approaches for video summarization regard the task as a frame-wise keyframe selection problem and generally construct the frame-wise representation by combining the long-range temporal dependency with the unimodal or bimodal information. However, the optimal video summaries need to reflect the most valuable keyframe with its own information, and one with semantic power of the whole content. Thus, it is critical to construct a more powerful and robust frame-wise representation and predict the frame-level importance score in a fair and comprehensive manner. To tackle the above issues, we propose a multimodal hierarchical shot-aware convolutional network, denoted as MHSCNet, to enhance the frame-wise representation via combining the comprehensive available multimodal information. Specifically, we design a hierarchical ShotConv network to incorporate the adaptive shot-aware frame-level representation by considering the short-range and long-range temporal dependency. Based on the learned shot-aware representations, MHSCNet can predict the frame-level importance score in the local and global view of the video. Extensive experiments on two standard video summarization datasets demonstrate that our proposed method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. Source code will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 视频摘要旨在通过有效捕获和组合整个内容中信息量最大的部分来生成简洁的视频摘要。现有的视频摘要方法将任务视为逐帧关键帧选择问题，并且通常通过将长程时间依赖性与单峰或双峰信息相结合来构造逐帧表示。然而，最佳的视频摘要需要反映最有价值的关键帧及其自身信息，并且具有整个内容的语义能力。因此，构建更强大、更鲁棒的帧级表示并以公平、全面的方式预测帧级重要性得分至关重要。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种多模态分层镜头感知卷积网络，表示为 MHSCNet，通过结合全面的可用多模态信息来增强逐帧表示。具体来说，我们设计了一个分层 ShotConv 网络，通过考虑短程和长程时间依赖性来合并自适应镜头感知帧级表示。基于学习到的镜头感知表示，MHSCNet 可以预测视频局部和全局视图中的帧级重要性得分。对两个标准视频摘要数据集的大量实验表明，我们提出的方法始终优于最先进的基线。源代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MHSCNet，一种多模态分层镜头感知卷积网络，用于视频摘要任务，旨在通过有效捕捉关键帧生成简洁的视频摘要。
AI.motivation: 现有视频摘要方法仅依赖单模态或双模态信息及帧级表示，难以全面反映视频内容的语义价值，需构建更强大且鲁棒的帧级表示以公平预测重要性评分。
AI.method: 设计分层ShotConv网络，结合短时和长时时间依赖性生成自适应镜头感知的帧级表示，并基于局部与全局视角预测帧级重要性评分。
AI.result: 在两个标准数据集上实验表明，MHSCNet在多项指标上持续优于现有先进方法，源代码将公开。
AI.conclusion: MHSCNet通过多模态信息融合与分层结构有效提升了帧级表示能力，验证了其在视频摘要任务中的优越性。
