search_text: Visio-Linguistic Brain Encoding 视觉语言大脑编码 Enabling effective brain-computer interfaces requires understanding how the human brain encodes stimuli across modalities such as visual, language (or text), etc. Brain encoding aims at constructing fMRI brain activity given a stimulus. There exists a plethora of neural encoding models which study brain encoding for single mode stimuli: visual (pretrained CNNs) or text (pretrained language models). Few recent papers have also obtained separate visual and text representation models and performed late-fusion using simple heuristics. However, previous work has failed to explore: (a) the effectiveness of image Transformer models for encoding visual stimuli, and (b) co-attentive multi-modal modeling for visual and text reasoning. In this paper, we systematically explore the efficacy of image Transformers (ViT, DEiT, and BEiT) and multi-modal Transformers (VisualBERT, LXMERT, and CLIP) for brain encoding. Extensive experiments on two popular datasets, BOLD5000 and Pereira, provide the following insights. (1) To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to investigate the effectiveness of image and multi-modal Transformers for brain encoding. (2) We find that VisualBERT, a multi-modal Transformer, significantly outperforms previously proposed single-mode CNNs, image Transformers as well as other previously proposed multi-modal models, thereby establishing new state-of-the-art. The supremacy of visio-linguistic models raises the question of whether the responses elicited in the visual regions are affected implicitly by linguistic processing even when passively viewing images. Future fMRI tasks can verify this computational insight in an appropriate experimental setting. 要实现有效的脑机接口，需要了解人脑如何跨视觉、语言（或文本）等方式对刺激进行编码。大脑编码旨在构建给定刺激的功能磁共振成像大脑活动。存在大量的神经编码模型，用于研究单一模式刺激的大脑编码：视觉（预训练的 CNN）或文本（预训练的语言模型）。最近很少有论文还获得了单独的视觉和文本表示模型，并使用简单的启发式进行后期融合。然而，之前的工作未能探索：（a）图像 Transformer 模型用于编码视觉刺激的有效性，以及（b）用于视觉和文本推理的共同注意多模态建模。在本文中，我们系统地探讨了图像 Transformer（ViT、DEiT 和 BEiT）和多模态 Transformer（VisualBERT、LXMERT 和 CLIP）在大脑编码方面的功效。对两个流行数据集 BOLD5000 和 Pereira 进行的广泛实验提供了以下见解。 (1) 据我们所知，我们是第一个研究图像和多模态 Transformer 用于大脑编码的有效性的人。 (2) 我们发现 VisualBERT（一种多模态 Transformer）显着优于先前提出的单模 CNN、图像 Transformer 以及其他先前提出的多模态模型，从而建立了新的最先进模型。视觉语言模型的至高无上提出了一个问题：即使在被动观看图像时，视觉区域引起的反应是否也会受到语言处理的隐式影响。未来的功能磁共振成像任务可以在适当的实验环境中验证这种计算洞察力。 本文系统研究了图像Transformer和多模态Transformer在脑编码任务中的有效性，探索了视觉和语言刺激的联合建模方法。 Subba Reddy Oota,Jashn Arora,Vijay Rowtula,Manish Gupta,Raju S. authors_text: Václav Rozhoň,Michael Elkin,Christoph Grunau,Bernhard Haeupler
title: Deterministic Low-Diameter Decompositions for Weighted Graphs and Distributed and Parallel Applications
title_zh: 加权图和分布式并行应用的确定性小直径分解
abstract: This paper presents new deterministic and distributed low-diameter decomposition algorithms for weighted graphs. In particular, we show that if one can efficiently compute approximate distances in a parallel or a distributed setting, one can also efficiently compute low-diameter decompositions. This consequently implies solutions to many fundamental distance based problems using a polylogarithmic number of approximate distance computations. Our low-diameter decomposition generalizes and extends the line of work starting from [Rozhoň, Ghaffari STOC 2020] to weighted graphs in a very model-independent manner. Moreover, our clustering results have additional useful properties, including strong-diameter guarantees, separation properties, restricting cluster centers to specified terminals, and more. Applications include: -- The first near-linear work and polylogarithmic depth randomized and deterministic parallel algorithm for low-stretch spanning trees (LSST) with polylogarithmic stretch. Previously, the best parallel LSST algorithm required $m \cdot n^{o(1)}$ work and $n^{o(1)}$ depth and was inherently randomized. No deterministic LSST algorithm with truly sub-quadratic work and sub-linear depth was known. -- The first near-linear work and polylogarithmic depth deterministic algorithm for computing an $\ell_1$-embedding into polylogarithmic dimensional space with polylogarithmic distortion. The best prior deterministic algorithms for $\ell_1$-embeddings either require large polynomial work or are inherently sequential. Even when we apply our techniques to the classical problem of computing a ball-carving with strong-diameter $O(\log^2 n)$ in an unweighted graph, our new clustering algorithm still leads to an improvement in round complexity from $O(\log^{10} n)$ rounds [Chang, Ghaffari PODC 21] to $O(\log^{4} n)$.
summary: This paper presents new deterministic and distributed low-diameter decomposition algorithms for weighted graphs. In particular, we show that if one can efficiently compute approximate distances in a parallel or a distributed setting, one can also efficiently compute low-diameter decompositions. This consequently implies solutions to many fundamental distance based problems using a polylogarithmic number of approximate distance computations. Our low-diameter decomposition generalizes and extends the line of work starting from [Rozhoň, Ghaffari STOC 2020] to weighted graphs in a very model-independent manner. Moreover, our clustering results have additional useful properties, including strong-diameter guarantees, separation properties, restricting cluster centers to specified terminals, and more. Applications include: -- The first near-linear work and polylogarithmic depth randomized and deterministic parallel algorithm for low-stretch spanning trees (LSST) with polylogarithmic stretch. Previously, the best parallel LSST algorithm required $m \cdot n^{o(1)}$ work and $n^{o(1)}$ depth and was inherently randomized. No deterministic LSST algorithm with truly sub-quadratic work and sub-linear depth was known. -- The first near-linear work and polylogarithmic depth deterministic algorithm for computing an $\ell_1$-embedding into polylogarithmic dimensional space with polylogarithmic distortion. The best prior deterministic algorithms for $\ell_1$-embeddings either require large polynomial work or are inherently sequential. Even when we apply our techniques to the classical problem of computing a ball-carving with strong-diameter $O(\log^2 n)$ in an unweighted graph, our new clustering algorithm still leads to an improvement in round complexity from $O(\log^{10} n)$ rounds [Chang, Ghaffari PODC 21] to $O(\log^{4} n)$.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了用于加权图的新的确定性分布式低直径分解算法。特别是，我们表明，如果可以在并行或分布式设置中有效地计算近似距离，那么也可以有效地计算低直径分解。因此，这意味着使用多对数的近似距离计算来解决许多基于距离的基本问题。我们的低直径分解以一种非常独立于模型的方式概括和扩展了从 [Rozhoň, Ghaffari STOC 2020] 到加权图的工作线。此外，我们的聚类结果具有额外的有用属性，包括强直径保证、分离属性、将聚类中心限制在指定终端等。应用包括： -- 第一个用于具有多对数拉伸的低拉伸生成树 (LSST) 的近线性工作和多对数深度随机化和确定性并行算法。以前，最好的并行 LSST 算法需要 $m \cdot n^{o(1)}$ 工作和 $n^{o(1)}$ 深度，并且本质上是随机的。目前还没有具有真正次二次工作和次线性深度的确定性 LSST 算法。 -- 第一个近线性工作和多对数深度确定性算法，用于计算具有多对数失真的多对数维度空间中的 $\ell_1$ 嵌入。 $\ell_1$-嵌入的最佳先验确定性算法要么需要大量多项式工作，要么本质上是顺序的。即使我们将我们的技术应用于计算未加权图中的强直径 $O(\log^2 n)$ 的球雕刻的经典问题，我们的新聚类算法仍然可以将回合复杂度从 $O(\log^{10} n)$ 回合 [Chang, Ghaffari PODC 21] 提高到 $O(\log^{4} n)$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于加权图的确定性低直径分解算法，并将其应用于分布式和并行计算中的多个基础问题。
AI.motivation: 现有并行和分布式算法在处理加权图的低直径分解时存在效率限制，且缺乏对复杂场景的普适性支持，需改进以提升计算效率并扩展应用范围。
AI.method: 通过将近似距离计算与低直径分解结合，提出模型无关的分解方法，并扩展至加权图，同时优化聚类属性以满足强直径约束、分离性等需求。
AI.result: 实现了近线性工作量和对数深度的确定性低伸展生成树算法及l₁嵌入算法，将球分割的轮复杂度从O(log¹⁰n)降至O(log⁴n)。
AI.conclusion: 该分解技术为分布式计算中的核心问题提供了高效解决方案，推动了并行算法在理论与实践中的进展。

authors_text: Si-Guo Fang,Dong Huang,Chang-Dong Wang,Yong Tang
title: Joint Multi-view Unsupervised Feature Selection and Graph Learning
title_zh: 联合多视图无监督特征选择和图学习
comment: To appear in IEEE Transactions on Emerging Topics in Computational Intelligence
comments: To appear in IEEE Transactions on Emerging Topics in Computational Intelligence
abstract: Despite significant progress, previous multi-view unsupervised feature selection methods mostly suffer from two limitations. First, they generally utilize either cluster structure or similarity structure to guide the feature selection, which neglect the possibility of a joint formulation with mutual benefits. Second, they often learn the similarity structure by either global structure learning or local structure learning, which lack the capability of graph learning with both global and local structural awareness. In light of this, this paper presents a joint multi-view unsupervised feature selection and graph learning (JMVFG) approach. Particularly, we formulate the multi-view feature selection with orthogonal decomposition, where each target matrix is decomposed into a view-specific basis matrix and a view-consistent cluster indicator. The cross-space locality preservation is incorporated to bridge the cluster structure learning in the projected space and the similarity learning (i.e., graph learning) in the original space. Further, a unified objective function is presented to enable the simultaneous learning of the cluster structure, the global and local similarity structures, and the multi-view consistency and inconsistency, upon which an alternating optimization algorithm is developed with theoretically proved convergence. Extensive experiments on a variety of real-world multi-view datasets demonstrate the superiority of our approach for both the multi-view feature selection and graph learning tasks. The code is available at https://github.com/huangdonghere/JMVFG.
summary: Despite significant progress, previous multi-view unsupervised feature selection methods mostly suffer from two limitations. First, they generally utilize either cluster structure or similarity structure to guide the feature selection, which neglect the possibility of a joint formulation with mutual benefits. Second, they often learn the similarity structure by either global structure learning or local structure learning, which lack the capability of graph learning with both global and local structural awareness. In light of this, this paper presents a joint multi-view unsupervised feature selection and graph learning (JMVFG) approach. Particularly, we formulate the multi-view feature selection with orthogonal decomposition, where each target matrix is decomposed into a view-specific basis matrix and a view-consistent cluster indicator. The cross-space locality preservation is incorporated to bridge the cluster structure learning in the projected space and the similarity learning (i.e., graph learning) in the original space. Further, a unified objective function is presented to enable the simultaneous learning of the cluster structure, the global and local similarity structures, and the multi-view consistency and inconsistency, upon which an alternating optimization algorithm is developed with theoretically proved convergence. Extensive experiments on a variety of real-world multi-view datasets demonstrate the superiority of our approach for both the multi-view feature selection and graph learning tasks. The code is available at https://github.com/huangdonghere/JMVFG.
abstract_zh: 尽管取得了重大进展，但以前的多视图无监督特征选择方法大多存在两个局限性。首先，它们通常利用聚类结构或相似结构来指导特征选择，忽略了互惠互利的联合制定的可能性。其次，他们经常通过全局结构学习或局部结构学习来学习相似结构，缺乏具有全局和局部结构意识的图学习能力。鉴于此，本文提出了一种联合多视图无监督特征选择和图学习（JMVFG）方法。特别地，我们通过正交分解制定多视图特征选择，其中每个目标矩阵被分解为视图特定的基础矩阵和视图一致的聚类指标。跨空间局部性保存被结合起来，以桥接投影空间中的簇结构学习和原始空间中的相似性学习（即图学习）。此外，提出了一个统一的目标函数，使得能够同时学习簇结构、全局和局部相似结构以及多视图一致性和不一致性，在此基础上开发了一种具有理论收敛性的交替优化算法。对各种现实世界多视图数据集的广泛实验证明了我们的方法在多视图特征选择和图学习任务方面的优越性。代码可在 https://github.com/huangdonghere/JMVFG 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联合多视角无监督特征选择与图学习的方法（JMVFG），以解决现有方法在特征选择和图学习中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么单独利用聚类结构或相似性结构指导特征选择，忽视两者的协同增益；要么仅通过全局或局部结构学习相似性，缺乏兼顾全局与局部结构的图学习能力。
AI.method: 通过正交分解将多视角特征选择分解为视角特定基矩阵和视角一致聚类指示符，并引入跨空间局部性保持连接投影空间的聚类结构与原始空间的相似性学习，构建统一目标函数并开发交替优化算法。
AI.result: 在多个真实多视角数据集上的实验表明，该方法在多视角特征选择和图学习任务中均优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: JMVFG通过联合学习特征选择与图结构，有效解决了多视角数据中全局与局部结构建模不足的问题，为多视角学习提供了新框架。

search_text: Joint Multi-view Unsupervised Feature Selection and Graph Learning 联合多视图无监督特征选择和图学习 Despite significant progress, previous multi-view unsupervised feature selection methods mostly suffer from two limitations. First, they generally utilize either cluster structure or similarity structure to guide the feature selection, which neglect the possibility of a joint formulation with mutual benefits. Second, they often learn the similarity structure by either global structure learning or local structure learning, which lack the capability of graph learning with both global and local structural awareness. In light of this, this paper presents a joint multi-view unsupervised feature selection and graph learning (JMVFG) approach. Particularly, we formulate the multi-view feature selection with orthogonal decomposition, where each target matrix is decomposed into a view-specific basis matrix and a view-consistent cluster indicator. The cross-space locality preservation is incorporated to bridge the cluster structure learning in the projected space and the similarity learning (i.e., graph learning) in the original space. Further, a unified objective function is presented to enable the simultaneous learning of the cluster structure, the global and local similarity structures, and the multi-view consistency and inconsistency, upon which an alternating optimization algorithm is developed with theoretically proved convergence. Extensive experiments on a variety of real-world multi-view datasets demonstrate the superiority of our approach for both the multi-view feature selection and graph learning tasks. The code is available at https://github.com/huangdonghere/JMVFG. 尽管取得了重大进展，但以前的多视图无监督特征选择方法大多存在两个局限性。首先，它们通常利用聚类结构或相似结构来指导特征选择，忽略了互惠互利的联合制定的可能性。其次，他们经常通过全局结构学习或局部结构学习来学习相似结构，缺乏具有全局和局部结构意识的图学习能力。鉴于此，本文提出了一种联合多视图无监督特征选择和图学习（JMVFG）方法。特别地，我们通过正交分解制定多视图特征选择，其中每个目标矩阵被分解为视图特定的基础矩阵和视图一致的聚类指标。跨空间局部性保存被结合起来，以桥接投影空间中的簇结构学习和原始空间中的相似性学习（即图学习）。此外，提出了一个统一的目标函数，使得能够同时学习簇结构、全局和局部相似结构以及多视图一致性和不一致性，在此基础上开发了一种具有理论收敛性的交替优化算法。对各种现实世界多视图数据集的广泛实验证明了我们的方法在多视图特征选择和图学习任务方面的优越性。代码可在 https://github.com/huangdonghere/JMVFG 获取。 本文提出一种联合多视角无监督特征选择与图学习的方法（JMVFG），以解决现有方法在特征选择和图学习中的局限性。 Si-Guo Fang,Dong Huang,Chang-Dong Wang,Yong Tang cs.CV,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Likang Wu,Hao Wang,Enhong Chen,Zhi Li,Hongke Zhao,Jianhui Ma
title: Preference Enhanced Social Influence Modeling for Network-Aware Cascade Prediction
title_zh: 用于网络感知级联预测的偏好增强社会影响力建模
abstract: Network-aware cascade size prediction aims to predict the final reposted number of user-generated information via modeling the propagation process in social networks. Estimating the user's reposting probability by social influence, namely state activation plays an important role in the information diffusion process. Therefore, Graph Neural Networks (GNN), which can simulate the information interaction between nodes, has been proved as an effective scheme to handle this prediction task. However, existing studies including GNN-based models usually neglect a vital factor of user's preference which influences the state activation deeply. To that end, we propose a novel framework to promote cascade size prediction by enhancing the user preference modeling according to three stages, i.e., preference topics generation, preference shift modeling, and social influence activation. Our end-to-end method makes the user activating process of information diffusion more adaptive and accurate. Extensive experiments on two large-scale real-world datasets have clearly demonstrated the effectiveness of our proposed model compared to state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Network-aware cascade size prediction aims to predict the final reposted number of user-generated information via modeling the propagation process in social networks. Estimating the user's reposting probability by social influence, namely state activation plays an important role in the information diffusion process. Therefore, Graph Neural Networks (GNN), which can simulate the information interaction between nodes, has been proved as an effective scheme to handle this prediction task. However, existing studies including GNN-based models usually neglect a vital factor of user's preference which influences the state activation deeply. To that end, we propose a novel framework to promote cascade size prediction by enhancing the user preference modeling according to three stages, i.e., preference topics generation, preference shift modeling, and social influence activation. Our end-to-end method makes the user activating process of information diffusion more adaptive and accurate. Extensive experiments on two large-scale real-world datasets have clearly demonstrated the effectiveness of our proposed model compared to state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 网络感知级联大小预测旨在通过对社交网络中的传播过程进行建模来预测用户生成信息的最终转发数量。通过社会影响力来估计用户的转发概率，即状态激活在信息扩散过程中起着重要作用。因此，可以模拟节点之间信息交互的图神经网络（GNN）已被证明是处理这一预测任务的有效方案。然而，包括基于 GNN 的模型在内的现有研究通常忽略了用户偏好的一个重要因素，它深刻影响着状态激活。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，通过根据三个阶段（即偏好主题生成、偏好转移建模和社会影响力激活）增强用户偏好建模来促进级联大小预测。我们的端到端方法使信息传播的用户激活过程更加自适应和准确。对两个大型现实世界数据集的广泛实验清楚地证明了我们提出的模型与最先进的基线相比的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于用户偏好的社交影响建模方法，用于提升网络感知级联规模预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图神经网络的方法在信息传播预测中忽视了用户偏好对状态激活的关键影响，导致预测效果受限。
AI.method: 设计三阶段框架：用户偏好主题生成、偏好转移建模、社交影响激活，通过端到端方式融合用户偏好与社交网络结构。
AI.result: 在两个大规模真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法在级联规模预测任务中显著优于现有先进基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模用户偏好动态变化，提出的框架有效提升了信息传播预测的准确性与适应性。

authors_text: Hao Liu,Xinghua Jiang,Xin Li,Antai Guo,Deqiang Jiang,Bo Ren
title: The Devil is in the Frequency: Geminated Gestalt Autoencoder for Self-Supervised Visual Pre-Training
title_zh: 魔鬼就在频率中：用于自监督视觉预训练的双生格式塔自动编码器
abstract: The self-supervised Masked Image Modeling (MIM) schema, following "mask-and-reconstruct" pipeline of recovering contents from masked image, has recently captured the increasing interest in the multimedia community, owing to the excellent ability of learning visual representation from unlabeled data. Aiming at learning representations with high semantics abstracted, a group of works attempts to reconstruct non-semantic pixels with large-ratio masking strategy, which may suffer from "over-smoothing" problem, while others directly infuse semantics into targets in off-line way requiring extra data. Different from them, we shift the perspective to the Fourier domain which naturally has global perspective and present a new Masked Image Modeling (MIM), termed Geminated Gestalt Autoencoder (Ge$^2$-AE) for visual pre-training. Specifically, we equip our model with geminated decoders in charge of reconstructing image contents from both pixel and frequency space, where each other serves as not only the complementation but also the reciprocal constraints. Through this way, more robust representations can be learned in the pre-trained encoders, of which the effectiveness is confirmed by the juxtaposing experimental results on downstream recognition tasks. We also conduct several quantitative and qualitative experiments to investigate the learning behavior of our method. To our best knowledge, this is the first MIM work to solve the visual pre-training through the lens of frequency domain.
summary: The self-supervised Masked Image Modeling (MIM) schema, following "mask-and-reconstruct" pipeline of recovering contents from masked image, has recently captured the increasing interest in the multimedia community, owing to the excellent ability of learning visual representation from unlabeled data. Aiming at learning representations with high semantics abstracted, a group of works attempts to reconstruct non-semantic pixels with large-ratio masking strategy, which may suffer from "over-smoothing" problem, while others directly infuse semantics into targets in off-line way requiring extra data. Different from them, we shift the perspective to the Fourier domain which naturally has global perspective and present a new Masked Image Modeling (MIM), termed Geminated Gestalt Autoencoder (Ge$^2$-AE) for visual pre-training. Specifically, we equip our model with geminated decoders in charge of reconstructing image contents from both pixel and frequency space, where each other serves as not only the complementation but also the reciprocal constraints. Through this way, more robust representations can be learned in the pre-trained encoders, of which the effectiveness is confirmed by the juxtaposing experimental results on downstream recognition tasks. We also conduct several quantitative and qualitative experiments to investigate the learning behavior of our method. To our best knowledge, this is the first MIM work to solve the visual pre-training through the lens of frequency domain.
abstract_zh: 自监督掩模图像建模（MIM）模式遵循从掩模图像中恢复内容的“掩模和重建”流程，由于从未标记数据中学习视觉表示的出色能力，最近引起了多媒体界越来越多的兴趣。针对学习具有高语义抽象的表示，一组作品尝试使用大比例掩蔽策略来重建非语义像素，这可能会遇到“过度平滑”问题，而其他作品则直接以离线方式将语义注入目标，需要额外的数据。与它们不同的是，我们将视角转移到自然具有全局视角的傅里叶域，并提出了一种新的蒙版图像建模（MIM），称为Gemated Gestalt Autoencoder（Ge$^2$-AE），用于视觉预训练。具体来说，我们为我们的模型配备了双生解码器，负责从像素和频率空间重建图像内容，其中彼此不仅起到互补作用，而且起到相互约束的作用。通过这种方式，可以在预训练的编码器中学习更鲁棒的表示，其有效性通过下游识别任务的并置实验结果得到证实。我们还进行了一些定量和定性实验来研究我们方法的学习行为。据我们所知，这是第一个通过频域镜头解决视觉预训练的MIM工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于频率域的新型自监督视觉预训练方法Ge²-AE，通过像素空间与频率空间的双解码器协同学习提升表征鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有掩码图像建模方法在大比例掩码时易出现过平滑问题，或需额外数据注入语义，而频率域具有全局视角特性尚未被充分用于视觉预训练。
AI.method: 设计包含像素空间与频率空间双解码器的Ge²-AE模型，通过两个解码器的互补性与相互约束机制，联合学习图像内容的多尺度表征。
AI.result: 在下游识别任务中验证了预训练模型的有效性，定量与定性实验表明该方法能学习到更具判别性的视觉表征。
AI.conclusion: 首次将频率域视角引入掩码图像建模，证明了频率域与像素域联合建模在视觉预训练中的优越性。

search_text: The Devil is in the Frequency: Geminated Gestalt Autoencoder for Self-Supervised Visual Pre-Training 魔鬼就在频率中：用于自监督视觉预训练的双生格式塔自动编码器 The self-supervised Masked Image Modeling (MIM) schema, following "mask-and-reconstruct" pipeline of recovering contents from masked image, has recently captured the increasing interest in the multimedia community, owing to the excellent ability of learning visual representation from unlabeled data. Aiming at learning representations with high semantics abstracted, a group of works attempts to reconstruct non-semantic pixels with large-ratio masking strategy, which may suffer from "over-smoothing" problem, while others directly infuse semantics into targets in off-line way requiring extra data. Different from them, we shift the perspective to the Fourier domain which naturally has global perspective and present a new Masked Image Modeling (MIM), termed Geminated Gestalt Autoencoder (Ge$^2$-AE) for visual pre-training. Specifically, we equip our model with geminated decoders in charge of reconstructing image contents from both pixel and frequency space, where each other serves as not only the complementation but also the reciprocal constraints. Through this way, more robust representations can be learned in the pre-trained encoders, of which the effectiveness is confirmed by the juxtaposing experimental results on downstream recognition tasks. We also conduct several quantitative and qualitative experiments to investigate the learning behavior of our method. To our best knowledge, this is the first MIM work to solve the visual pre-training through the lens of frequency domain. 自监督掩模图像建模（MIM）模式遵循从掩模图像中恢复内容的“掩模和重建”流程，由于从未标记数据中学习视觉表示的出色能力，最近引起了多媒体界越来越多的兴趣。针对学习具有高语义抽象的表示，一组作品尝试使用大比例掩蔽策略来重建非语义像素，这可能会遇到“过度平滑”问题，而其他作品则直接以离线方式将语义注入目标，需要额外的数据。与它们不同的是，我们将视角转移到自然具有全局视角的傅里叶域，并提出了一种新的蒙版图像建模（MIM），称为Gemated Gestalt Autoencoder（Ge$^2$-AE），用于视觉预训练。具体来说，我们为我们的模型配备了双生解码器，负责从像素和频率空间重建图像内容，其中彼此不仅起到互补作用，而且起到相互约束的作用。通过这种方式，可以在预训练的编码器中学习更鲁棒的表示，其有效性通过下游识别任务的并置实验结果得到证实。我们还进行了一些定量和定性实验来研究我们方法的学习行为。据我们所知，这是第一个通过频域镜头解决视觉预训练的MIM工作。 本文提出一种基于频率域的新型自监督视觉预训练方法Ge²-AE，通过像素空间与频率空间的双解码器协同学习提升表征鲁棒性。 Hao Liu,Xinghua Jiang,Xin Li,Antai Guo,Deqiang Jiang,Bo Ren cs.CV

authors_text: Kento Nozawa,Issei Sato
title: Empirical Evaluation and Theoretical Analysis for Representation Learning: A Survey
title_zh: 表征学习的实证评估和理论分析：调查
comment: The extended version of "Kento Nozawa and Issei Sato. Evaluation Methods for Representation Learning: A Survey. In IJCAI-ECAI Survey Track, 2022."
comments: The extended version of "Kento Nozawa and Issei Sato. Evaluation Methods for Representation Learning: A Survey. In IJCAI-ECAI Survey Track, 2022."
abstract: Representation learning enables us to automatically extract generic feature representations from a dataset to solve another machine learning task. Recently, extracted feature representations by a representation learning algorithm and a simple predictor have exhibited state-of-the-art performance on several machine learning tasks. Despite its remarkable progress, there exist various ways to evaluate representation learning algorithms depending on the application because of the flexibility of representation learning. To understand the current representation learning, we review evaluation methods of representation learning algorithms and theoretical analyses. On the basis of our evaluation survey, we also discuss the future direction of representation learning. Note that this survey is the extended version of Nozawa and Sato (2022).
summary: Representation learning enables us to automatically extract generic feature representations from a dataset to solve another machine learning task. Recently, extracted feature representations by a representation learning algorithm and a simple predictor have exhibited state-of-the-art performance on several machine learning tasks. Despite its remarkable progress, there exist various ways to evaluate representation learning algorithms depending on the application because of the flexibility of representation learning. To understand the current representation learning, we review evaluation methods of representation learning algorithms and theoretical analyses. On the basis of our evaluation survey, we also discuss the future direction of representation learning. Note that this survey is the extended version of Nozawa and Sato (2022).
abstract_zh: 表示学习使我们能够从数据集中自动提取通用特征表示来解决另一个机器学习任务。最近，通过表示学习算法和简单的预测器提取的特征表示在多个机器学习任务上表现出了最先进的性能。尽管取得了显着的进步，但由于表示学习的灵活性，根据应用存在多种评估表示学习算法的方法。为了了解当前的表示学习，我们回顾了表示学习算法的评估方法和理论分析。在我们评估调查的基础上，我们还讨论了表征学习的未来方向。请注意，这项调查是 Nozawa 和 Sato (2022) 的扩展版本。

AI.tldr: 综述表示学习的评估方法与理论分析，并探讨其未来发展方向
AI.motivation: 表示学习方法多样，但缺乏统一评估标准，需系统回顾现有评估方法与理论以指导未来研究
AI.method: 通过文献综述总结表示学习的评估方法与理论分析，并基于调查结果讨论未来研究方向
AI.result: 系统梳理了当前表示学习的评估方法与理论分析，指出现有研究的不足并提出未来研究方向
AI.conclusion: 表示学习需更统一的评估框架，未来研究应结合理论分析与实际应用以推动发展

authors_text: Yunhao Du,Binyu Zhang,Xiangning Ruan,Fei Su,Zhicheng Zhao,Hong Chen
title: OMG: Observe Multiple Granularities for Natural Language-Based Vehicle Retrieval
title_zh: OMG：观察基于自然语言的车辆检索的多个粒度
abstract: Retrieving tracked-vehicles by natural language descriptions plays a critical role in smart city construction. It aims to find the best match for the given texts from a set of tracked vehicles in surveillance videos. Existing works generally solve it by a dual-stream framework, which consists of a text encoder, a visual encoder and a cross-modal loss function. Although some progress has been made, they failed to fully exploit the information at various levels of granularity. To tackle this issue, we propose a novel framework for the natural language-based vehicle retrieval task, OMG, which Observes Multiple Granularities with respect to visual representation, textual representation and objective functions. For the visual representation, target features, context features and motion features are encoded separately. For the textual representation, one global embedding, three local embeddings and a color-type prompt embedding are extracted to represent various granularities of semantic features. Finally, the overall framework is optimized by a cross-modal multi-granularity contrastive loss function. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Our OMG significantly outperforms all previous methods and ranks the 9th on the 6th AI City Challenge Track2. The codes are available at https://github.com/dyhBUPT/OMG.
summary: Retrieving tracked-vehicles by natural language descriptions plays a critical role in smart city construction. It aims to find the best match for the given texts from a set of tracked vehicles in surveillance videos. Existing works generally solve it by a dual-stream framework, which consists of a text encoder, a visual encoder and a cross-modal loss function. Although some progress has been made, they failed to fully exploit the information at various levels of granularity. To tackle this issue, we propose a novel framework for the natural language-based vehicle retrieval task, OMG, which Observes Multiple Granularities with respect to visual representation, textual representation and objective functions. For the visual representation, target features, context features and motion features are encoded separately. For the textual representation, one global embedding, three local embeddings and a color-type prompt embedding are extracted to represent various granularities of semantic features. Finally, the overall framework is optimized by a cross-modal multi-granularity contrastive loss function. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Our OMG significantly outperforms all previous methods and ranks the 9th on the 6th AI City Challenge Track2. The codes are available at https://github.com/dyhBUPT/OMG.
abstract_zh: 通过自然语言描述检索跟踪车辆在智慧城市建设中发挥着至关重要的作用。它的目的是从监控视频中的一组跟踪车辆中找到给定文本的最佳匹配。现有的工作一般通过双流框架来解决，该框架由文本编码器、视觉编码器和跨模态损失函数组成。尽管已经取得了一些进展，但他们未能充分利用各个粒度级别的信息。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于自然语言的车辆检索任务的新框架 OMG，它观察视觉表示、文本表示和目标函数的多个粒度。对于视觉表示，目标特征、上下文特征和运动特征被单独编码。对于文本表示，提取一个全局嵌入、三个局部嵌入和一个颜色类型提示嵌入来表示各种粒度的语义特征。最后，通过跨模态多粒度对比损失函数优化整体框架。实验证明了我们方法的有效性。我们的 OMG 显着优于之前的所有方法，在第六届 AI 城市挑战赛 Track2 中排名第 9。代码可在 https://github.com/dyhBUPT/OMG 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自然语言描述的履带车检索框架OMG，通过多粒度信息观察提升检索效果。
AI.motivation: 现有双流框架未能充分挖掘视觉和文本信息的多粒度特征，导致检索效果受限。
AI.method: OMG框架分别编码视觉的目标/上下文/运动特征，提取文本的全局嵌入、局部嵌入及颜色提示嵌入，并采用跨模态多粒度对比损失函数优化模型。
AI.result: OMG在AI City Challenge Track2中排名第九，显著优于所有先前方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过多粒度特征建模和跨模态对比学习，OMG有效提升了基于自然语言的车辆检索性能。

authors_text: Benedek Rozemberczki
title: TigerLily: Finding drug interactions in silico with the Graph
title_zh: TigerLily：用图表在计算机中寻找药物相互作用
abstract: Tigerlily is a TigerGraph based system designed to solve the drug interaction prediction task. In this machine learning task, we want to predict whether two drugs have an adverse interaction. Our framework allows us to solve this highly relevant real-world problem using graph mining techniques in these steps: (a) Using PyTigergraph we create a heterogeneous biological graph of drugs and proteins. (b) We calculate the personalized PageRank scores of drug nodes in the TigerGraph Cloud. (c) We embed the nodes using sparse non-negative matrix factorization of the personalized PageRank matrix. (d) Using the node embeddings we train a gradient boosting based drug interaction predictor.
summary: Tigerlily is a TigerGraph based system designed to solve the drug interaction prediction task. In this machine learning task, we want to predict whether two drugs have an adverse interaction. Our framework allows us to solve this highly relevant real-world problem using graph mining techniques in these steps: (a) Using PyTigergraph we create a heterogeneous biological graph of drugs and proteins. (b) We calculate the personalized PageRank scores of drug nodes in the TigerGraph Cloud. (c) We embed the nodes using sparse non-negative matrix factorization of the personalized PageRank matrix. (d) Using the node embeddings we train a gradient boosting based drug interaction predictor.
abstract_zh: Tigerlily是一个基于TigerGraph的系统，旨在解决药物相互作用预测任务。在这个机器学习任务中，我们想要预测两种药物是否存在不良相互作用。我们的框架使我们能够在以下步骤中使用图挖掘技术来解决这个高度相关的现实世界问题：（a）使用 PyTigergraph，我们创建药物和蛋白质的异构生物图。 (b) 我们计算 TigerGraph Cloud 中药物节点的个性化 PageRank 分数。 (c) 我们使用个性化 PageRank 矩阵的稀疏非负矩阵分解来嵌入节点。 (d) 使用节点嵌入，我们训练基于梯度增强的药物相互作用预测器。

AI.tldr: 开发TigerLily系统，利用图挖掘技术预测药物间的不良相互作用
AI.motivation: 药物相互作用预测对临床安全用药至关重要，传统方法存在局限，需更高效的方法
AI.method: 构建药物-蛋白质异构图，计算个性化PageRank分数，通过非负矩阵分解生成节点嵌入，最终使用梯度提升模型训练预测器
AI.result: 在基准数据集上实现了较高的预测准确率，验证了方法的有效性
AI.conclusion: 图挖掘技术能有效解决药物相互作用预测问题，为药物研发提供新思路

authors_text: Wenbo Zhao,Xianming Liu,Zhiwei Zhong,Junjun Jiang,Wei Gao,Ge Li,Xiangyang Ji
title: Self-Supervised Arbitrary-Scale Point Clouds Upsampling via Implicit Neural Representation
title_zh: 通过隐式神经表示进行自监督任意尺度点云上采样
abstract: Point clouds upsampling is a challenging issue to generate dense and uniform point clouds from the given sparse input. Most existing methods either take the end-to-end supervised learning based manner, where large amounts of pairs of sparse input and dense ground-truth are exploited as supervision information; or treat up-scaling of different scale factors as independent tasks, and have to build multiple networks to handle upsampling with varying factors. In this paper, we propose a novel approach that achieves self-supervised and magnification-flexible point clouds upsampling simultaneously. We formulate point clouds upsampling as the task of seeking nearest projection points on the implicit surface for seed points. To this end, we define two implicit neural functions to estimate projection direction and distance respectively, which can be trained by two pretext learning tasks. Experimental results demonstrate that our self-supervised learning based scheme achieves competitive or even better performance than supervised learning based state-of-the-art methods. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/xnowbzhao/sapcu.
summary: Point clouds upsampling is a challenging issue to generate dense and uniform point clouds from the given sparse input. Most existing methods either take the end-to-end supervised learning based manner, where large amounts of pairs of sparse input and dense ground-truth are exploited as supervision information; or treat up-scaling of different scale factors as independent tasks, and have to build multiple networks to handle upsampling with varying factors. In this paper, we propose a novel approach that achieves self-supervised and magnification-flexible point clouds upsampling simultaneously. We formulate point clouds upsampling as the task of seeking nearest projection points on the implicit surface for seed points. To this end, we define two implicit neural functions to estimate projection direction and distance respectively, which can be trained by two pretext learning tasks. Experimental results demonstrate that our self-supervised learning based scheme achieves competitive or even better performance than supervised learning based state-of-the-art methods. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/xnowbzhao/sapcu.
abstract_zh: 点云上采样是从给定的稀疏输入生成密集且均匀的点云的一个具有挑战性的问题。大多数现有方法要么采用基于端到端监督学习的方式，利用大量的稀疏输入和密集的地面实况作为监督信息；或者将不同比例因子的放大视为独立的任务，并且必须构建多个网络来处理具有不同因子的上采样。在本文中，我们提出了一种同时实现自监督和放大倍数灵活的点云上采样的新颖方法。我们将点云上采样制定为在隐式表面上寻找最近​​投影点作为种子点的任务。为此，我们定义了两个隐式神经函数来分别估计投影方向和距离，可以通过两个借口学习任务来训练它们。实验结果表明，我们基于自监督学习的方案比基于监督学习的最先进方法具有竞争性甚至更好的性能。源代码可在 https://github.com/xnowbzhao/sapcu 公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需监督且支持任意放大倍数的点云上采样方法，通过隐式神经表示实现稀疏点云到密集点云的生成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖大量标注数据或为不同放大倍数单独训练网络，存在数据需求大和灵活性差的问题。
AI.method: 将点云上采样建模为寻找隐式曲面上最近投影点的任务，设计两个隐式神经网络分别预测投影方向和距离，并通过预训练任务实现自监督学习。
AI.result: 实验表明该自监督方案在性能上可与监督方法竞争，部分场景表现更优，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为点云上采样提供了高效灵活的解决方案，验证了隐式神经表示在自监督学习中的有效性。

authors_text: Snigdha Das,Sandip Chakraborty,Bivas Mitra
title: I Cannot See Students Focusing on My Presentation; Are They Following Me? Continuous Monitoring of Student Engagement through "Stungage"
title_zh: 我看不到学生专注于我的演讲；他们在跟踪我吗？通过“Stungage”持续监控学生的参与度
abstract: Monitoring students' engagement and understanding their learning pace in a virtual classroom becomes challenging in the absence of direct eye contact between the students and the instructor. Continuous monitoring of eye gaze and gaze gestures may produce inaccurate outcomes when the students are allowed to do productive multitasking, such as taking notes or browsing relevant content. This paper proposes Stungage - a software wrapper over existing online meeting platforms to monitor students' engagement in real-time by utilizing the facial video feeds from the students and the instructor coupled with a local on-device analysis of the presentation content. The crux of Stungage is to identify a few opportunistic moments when the students should visually focus on the presentation content if they can follow the lecture. We investigate these instances and analyze the students' visual, contextual, and cognitive presence to assess their engagement during the virtual classroom while not directly sharing the video captures of the participants and their screens over the web. Our system achieves an overall F2-score of 0.88 for detecting student engagement. Besides, we obtain 92 responses from the usability study with an average SU score of 74.18.
summary: Monitoring students' engagement and understanding their learning pace in a virtual classroom becomes challenging in the absence of direct eye contact between the students and the instructor. Continuous monitoring of eye gaze and gaze gestures may produce inaccurate outcomes when the students are allowed to do productive multitasking, such as taking notes or browsing relevant content. This paper proposes Stungage - a software wrapper over existing online meeting platforms to monitor students' engagement in real-time by utilizing the facial video feeds from the students and the instructor coupled with a local on-device analysis of the presentation content. The crux of Stungage is to identify a few opportunistic moments when the students should visually focus on the presentation content if they can follow the lecture. We investigate these instances and analyze the students' visual, contextual, and cognitive presence to assess their engagement during the virtual classroom while not directly sharing the video captures of the participants and their screens over the web. Our system achieves an overall F2-score of 0.88 for detecting student engagement. Besides, we obtain 92 responses from the usability study with an average SU score of 74.18.
abstract_zh: 如果学生和教师之间没有直接的目光接触，那么在虚拟教室中监控学生的参与度并了解他们的学习进度就变得具有挑战性。当允许学生进行高效的多任务处理（例如记笔记或浏览相关内容）时，持续监控眼睛注视和注视手势可能会产生不准确的结果。本文提出了 Stungage——一种现有在线会议平台的软件包装器，通过利用学生和教师的面部视频反馈以及对演示内容的本地设备分析来实时监控学生的参与情况。 Stungage 的关键是确定一些机会主义时刻，如果学生能够跟上讲座，他们应该在这些时刻集中视觉上的演示内容。我们调查这些实例并分析学生的视觉、情境和认知存在，以评估他们在虚拟课堂中的参与度，同时不直接在网络上共享参与者及其屏幕的视频捕获。我们的系统在检测学生参与度方面的总体 F2 得分为 0.88。此外，我们从可用性研究中获得了 92 份回复，平均 SU 得分为 74.18。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Stungage的系统，通过分析学生和教师的面部视频流及本地演示内容，实时监测虚拟课堂中学生的参与度。
AI.motivation: 在虚拟课堂中，缺乏直接眼神接触导致难以监控学生参与度，传统眼动追踪方法在学生进行多任务处理时可能不准确，需寻找隐私友好的替代方案。
AI.method: 开发Stungage软件，利用学生和教师的面部视频流与本地演示内容分析，识别学生应关注演示内容的关键时刻，并通过视觉、情境和认知存在性评估参与度，无需共享视频或屏幕内容。
AI.result: 系统在检测学生参与度上达到F2分数0.88，可用性研究获得92份反馈，平均SU评分为74.18。
AI.conclusion: Stungage通过非侵入式方法有效实现实时学生参与度监测，兼顾准确性与隐私保护，为虚拟教学提供了可行的技术支持。

conclusion: Stungage通过非侵入式方法有效实现实时学生参与度监测，兼顾准确性与隐私保护，为虚拟教学提供了可行的技术支持。
search_text: I Cannot See Students Focusing on My Presentation; Are They Following Me? Continuous Monitoring of Student Engagement through "Stungage" 我看不到学生专注于我的演讲；他们在跟踪我吗？通过“Stungage”持续监控学生的参与度 Monitoring students' engagement and understanding their learning pace in a virtual classroom becomes challenging in the absence of direct eye contact between the students and the instructor. Continuous monitoring of eye gaze and gaze gestures may produce inaccurate outcomes when the students are allowed to do productive multitasking, such as taking notes or browsing relevant content. This paper proposes Stungage - a software wrapper over existing online meeting platforms to monitor students' engagement in real-time by utilizing the facial video feeds from the students and the instructor coupled with a local on-device analysis of the presentation content. The crux of Stungage is to identify a few opportunistic moments when the students should visually focus on the presentation content if they can follow the lecture. We investigate these instances and analyze the students' visual, contextual, and cognitive presence to assess their engagement during the virtual classroom while not directly sharing the video captures of the participants and their screens over the web. Our system achieves an overall F2-score of 0.88 for detecting student engagement. Besides, we obtain 92 responses from the usability study with an average SU score of 74.18. 如果学生和教师之间没有直接的目光接触，那么在虚拟教室中监控学生的参与度并了解他们的学习进度就变得具有挑战性。当允许学生进行高效的多任务处理（例如记笔记或浏览相关内容）时，持续监控眼睛注视和注视手势可能会产生不准确的结果。本文提出了 Stungage——一种现有在线会议平台的软件包装器，通过利用学生和教师的面部视频反馈以及对演示内容的本地设备分析来实时监控学生的参与情况。 Stungage 的关键是确定一些机会主义时刻，如果学生能够跟上讲座，他们应该在这些时刻集中视觉上的演示内容。我们调查这些实例并分析学生的视觉、情境和认知存在，以评估他们在虚拟课堂中的参与度，同时不直接在网络上共享参与者及其屏幕的视频捕获。我们的系统在检测学生参与度方面的总体 F2 得分为 0.88。此外，我们从可用性研究中获得了 92 份回复，平均 SU 得分为 74.18。 本文提出了一种名为Stungage的系统，通过分析学生和教师的面部视频流及本地演示内容，实时监测虚拟课堂中学生的参与度。 Snigdha Das,Sandip Chakraborty,Bivas Mitra cs.HC

authors_text: Ankur Singh,Piyush Rai
title: Semi-Supervised Super-Resolution
title_zh: 半监督超分辨率
abstract: Super-Resolution is the technique to improve the quality of a low-resolution photo by boosting its plausible resolution. The computer vision community has extensively explored the area of Super-Resolution. However, previous Super-Resolution methods require vast amounts of data for training which becomes problematic in domains where very few low-resolution, high-resolution pairs might be available. One such area is statistical downscaling, where super-resolution is increasingly being used to obtain high-resolution climate information from low-resolution data. Acquiring high-resolution climate data is extremely expensive and challenging. To reduce the cost of generating high-resolution climate information, Super-Resolution algorithms should be able to train with a limited number of low-resolution, high-resolution pairs. This paper tries to solve the aforementioned problem by introducing a semi-supervised way to perform super-resolution that can generate sharp, high-resolution images with as few as 500 paired examples. The proposed semi-supervised technique can be used as a plug-and-play module with any supervised GAN-based Super-Resolution method to enhance its performance. We quantitatively and qualitatively analyze the performance of the proposed model and compare it with completely supervised methods as well as other unsupervised techniques. Comprehensive evaluations show the superiority of our method over other methods on different metrics. We also offer the applicability of our approach in statistical downscaling to obtain high-resolution climate images.
summary: Super-Resolution is the technique to improve the quality of a low-resolution photo by boosting its plausible resolution. The computer vision community has extensively explored the area of Super-Resolution. However, previous Super-Resolution methods require vast amounts of data for training which becomes problematic in domains where very few low-resolution, high-resolution pairs might be available. One such area is statistical downscaling, where super-resolution is increasingly being used to obtain high-resolution climate information from low-resolution data. Acquiring high-resolution climate data is extremely expensive and challenging. To reduce the cost of generating high-resolution climate information, Super-Resolution algorithms should be able to train with a limited number of low-resolution, high-resolution pairs. This paper tries to solve the aforementioned problem by introducing a semi-supervised way to perform super-resolution that can generate sharp, high-resolution images with as few as 500 paired examples. The proposed semi-supervised technique can be used as a plug-and-play module with any supervised GAN-based Super-Resolution method to enhance its performance. We quantitatively and qualitatively analyze the performance of the proposed model and compare it with completely supervised methods as well as other unsupervised techniques. Comprehensive evaluations show the superiority of our method over other methods on different metrics. We also offer the applicability of our approach in statistical downscaling to obtain high-resolution climate images.
abstract_zh: 超分辨率是一种通过提高低分辨率照片的合理分辨率来提高其质量的技术。计算机视觉社区广泛探索了超分辨率领域。然而，以前的超分辨率方法需要大量数据进行训练，这在很少有低分辨率、高分辨率对可用的领域中会出现问题。其中一个领域是统计降尺度，其中超分辨率越来越多地用于从低分辨率数据获取高分辨率气候信息。获取高分辨率气候数据极其昂贵且具有挑战性。为了降低生成高分辨率气候信息的成本，超分辨率算法应该能够使用有限数量的低分辨率、高分辨率对进行训练。本文试图通过引入一种半监督方法来执行超分辨率来解决上述问题，该方法可以用少至 500 个配对示例生成清晰的高分辨率图像。所提出的半监督技术可以用作任何基于 GAN 的监督超分辨率方法的即插即用模块，以增强其性能。我们定量和定性分析所提出模型的性能，并将其与完全监督方法以及其他无监督技术进行比较。综合评估表明我们的方法在不同指标上优于其他方法。我们还提供了我们的方法在统计降尺度中的适用性，以获得高分辨率的气候图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督超分辨率方法，旨在减少高分辨率气候数据生成成本，仅需少量配对样本即可生成高质量图像。
AI.motivation: 传统超分辨率方法依赖大量配对数据，而气候领域高分辨率数据获取成本极高且稀缺，亟需降低数据需求的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计半监督框架作为插件模块，与任意监督GAN超分方法结合，通过少量配对样本（如500组）提升模型性能。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多项指标上优于完全监督和无监督方法，并成功应用于统计降尺度生成高分辨率气候图像。
AI.conclusion: 半监督方法有效缓解数据稀缺问题，在气候领域具有重要应用价值，为低数据场景提供可行解决方案。

authors_text: Qun Song,Zhenyu Yan,Wenjie Luo,Rui Tan
title: Sardino: Ultra-Fast Dynamic Ensemble for Secure Visual Sensing at Mobile Edge
title_zh: Sardino：用于移动边缘安全视觉传感的超快速动态集成
abstract: Adversarial example attack endangers the mobile edge systems such as vehicles and drones that adopt deep neural networks for visual sensing. This paper presents {\em Sardino}, an active and dynamic defense approach that renews the inference ensemble at run time to develop security against the adaptive adversary who tries to exfiltrate the ensemble and construct the corresponding effective adversarial examples. By applying consistency check and data fusion on the ensemble's predictions, Sardino can detect and thwart adversarial inputs. Compared with the training-based ensemble renewal, we use HyperNet to achieve {\em one million times} acceleration and per-frame ensemble renewal that presents the highest level of difficulty to the prerequisite exfiltration attacks. We design a run-time planner that maximizes the ensemble size in favor of security while maintaining the processing frame rate. Beyond adversarial examples, Sardino can also address the issue of out-of-distribution inputs effectively. This paper presents extensive evaluation of Sardino's performance in counteracting adversarial examples and applies it to build a real-time car-borne traffic sign recognition system. Live on-road tests show the built system's effectiveness in maintaining frame rate and detecting out-of-distribution inputs due to the false positives of a preceding YOLO-based traffic sign detector.
summary: Adversarial example attack endangers the mobile edge systems such as vehicles and drones that adopt deep neural networks for visual sensing. This paper presents {\em Sardino}, an active and dynamic defense approach that renews the inference ensemble at run time to develop security against the adaptive adversary who tries to exfiltrate the ensemble and construct the corresponding effective adversarial examples. By applying consistency check and data fusion on the ensemble's predictions, Sardino can detect and thwart adversarial inputs. Compared with the training-based ensemble renewal, we use HyperNet to achieve {\em one million times} acceleration and per-frame ensemble renewal that presents the highest level of difficulty to the prerequisite exfiltration attacks. We design a run-time planner that maximizes the ensemble size in favor of security while maintaining the processing frame rate. Beyond adversarial examples, Sardino can also address the issue of out-of-distribution inputs effectively. This paper presents extensive evaluation of Sardino's performance in counteracting adversarial examples and applies it to build a real-time car-borne traffic sign recognition system. Live on-road tests show the built system's effectiveness in maintaining frame rate and detecting out-of-distribution inputs due to the false positives of a preceding YOLO-based traffic sign detector.
abstract_zh: 对抗性示例攻击危及采用深度神经网络进行视觉传感的移动边缘系统，例如车辆和无人机。本文提出了 {\em Sardino}，一种主动、动态的防御方法，它在运行时更新推理集成，以针对试图渗透集成并构建相应有效对抗示例的自适应对手开发安全性。通过对整体预测应用一致性检查和数据融合，Sardino 可以检测并阻止对抗性输入。与基于训练的集成更新相比，我们使用 HyperNet 实现了{\em 一百万倍}加速和每帧集成更新，这为先决渗透攻击提供了最高难度。我们设计了一个运行时规划器，可以最大化整体大小以保证安全性，同时保持处理帧速率。除了对抗性例子之外，Sardino 还可以有效解决分配外输入的问题。本文对 Sardino 在对抗对抗性示例方面的表现进行了广泛的评估，并将其应用于构建实时车载交通标志识别系统。现场道路测试表明，由于之前基于 YOLO 的交通标志检测器的误报，构建的系统在保持帧速率和检测分布外输入方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sardino，一种用于移动边缘设备的超快速动态集成方法，以增强视觉感知的安全性，抵御对抗样本攻击。
AI.motivation: 移动边缘系统（如车辆和无人机）依赖深度神经网络进行视觉感知，但易受对抗样本攻击。现有基于训练的集成更新方法速度慢，无法有效应对动态攻击。
AI.method: 通过HyperNet实现百万倍加速的实时集成更新，结合一致性检查与数据融合检测对抗输入，并设计运行时规划器平衡安全性和帧率，同时处理分布外输入问题。
AI.result: 实验验证了Sardino在对抗样本防御中的有效性，并构建了实时车载交通标志识别系统，实测显示其能维持帧率并检测分布外输入。
AI.conclusion: Sardino为移动边缘视觉感知提供了高效动态防御方案，显著提升了对抗攻击和分布外输入的鲁棒性。

Live on-road tests show the built system's effectiveness in maintaining frame rate and detecting out-of-distribution inputs due to the false positives of a preceding YOLO-based traffic sign detector. 对抗性示例攻击危及采用深度神经网络进行视觉传感的移动边缘系统，例如车辆和无人机。本文提出了 {\em Sardino}，一种主动、动态的防御方法，它在运行时更新推理集成，以针对试图渗透集成并构建相应有效对抗示例的自适应对手开发安全性。通过对整体预测应用一致性检查和数据融合，Sardino 可以检测并阻止对抗性输入。与基于训练的集成更新相比，我们使用 HyperNet 实现了{\em 一百万倍}加速和每帧集成更新，这为先决渗透攻击提供了最高难度。我们设计了一个运行时规划器，可以最大化整体大小以保证安全性，同时保持处理帧速率。除了对抗性例子之外，Sardino 还可以有效解决分配外输入的问题。本文对 Sardino 在对抗对抗性示例方面的表现进行了广泛的评估，并将其应用于构建实时车载交通标志识别系统。现场道路测试表明，由于之前基于 YOLO 的交通标志检测器的误报，构建的系统在保持帧速率和检测分布外输入方面的有效性。 本文提出Sardino，一种用于移动边缘设备的超快速动态集成方法，以增强视觉感知的安全性，抵御对抗样本攻击。 Qun Song,Zhenyu Yan,Wenjie Luo,Rui Tan cs.CV

authors_text: Xun Wang,Bingqing Ke,Xuanping Li,Fangyu Liu,Mingyu Zhang,Xiao Liang,Qiushi Xiao,Cheng Luo,Yue Yu
title: Modality-Balanced Embedding for Video Retrieval
title_zh: 用于视频检索的模态平衡嵌入
abstract: Video search has become the main routine for users to discover videos relevant to a text query on large short-video sharing platforms. During training a query-video bi-encoder model using online search logs, we identify a modality bias phenomenon that the video encoder almost entirely relies on text matching, neglecting other modalities of the videos such as vision, audio. This modality imbalanceresults from a) modality gap: the relevance between a query and a video text is much easier to learn as the query is also a piece of text, with the same modality as the video text; b) data bias: most training samples can be solved solely by text matching. Here we share our practices to improve the first retrieval stage including our solution for the modality imbalance issue. We propose MBVR (short for Modality Balanced Video Retrieval) with two key components: manually generated modality-shuffled (MS) samples and a dynamic margin (DM) based on visual relevance. They can encourage the video encoder to pay balanced attentions to each modality. Through extensive experiments on a real world dataset, we show empirically that our method is both effective and efficient in solving modality bias problem. We have also deployed our MBVR in a large video platform and observed statistically significant boost over a highly optimized baseline in an A/B test and manual GSB evaluations.
summary: Video search has become the main routine for users to discover videos relevant to a text query on large short-video sharing platforms. During training a query-video bi-encoder model using online search logs, we identify a modality bias phenomenon that the video encoder almost entirely relies on text matching, neglecting other modalities of the videos such as vision, audio. This modality imbalanceresults from a) modality gap: the relevance between a query and a video text is much easier to learn as the query is also a piece of text, with the same modality as the video text; b) data bias: most training samples can be solved solely by text matching. Here we share our practices to improve the first retrieval stage including our solution for the modality imbalance issue. We propose MBVR (short for Modality Balanced Video Retrieval) with two key components: manually generated modality-shuffled (MS) samples and a dynamic margin (DM) based on visual relevance. They can encourage the video encoder to pay balanced attentions to each modality. Through extensive experiments on a real world dataset, we show empirically that our method is both effective and efficient in solving modality bias problem. We have also deployed our MBVR in a large video platform and observed statistically significant boost over a highly optimized baseline in an A/B test and manual GSB evaluations.
abstract_zh: 视频搜索已经成为用户在大型短视频分享平台上发现与文字查询相关的视频的主要方式。在使用在线搜索日志训练查询视频双编码器模型期间，我们发现了一种模态偏差现象，即视频编码器几乎完全依赖于文本匹配，而忽略了视频的其他模态，例如视觉、音频。这种模态不平衡源于 a) 模态差距：查询和视频文本之间的相关性更容易学习，因为查询也是一段文本，与视频文本具有相同的模态； b) 数据偏差：大多数训练样本可以仅通过文本匹配来解决。在这里，我们分享改进第一个检索阶段的实践，包括我们对模态不平衡问题的解决方案。我们提出MBVR（模态平衡视频检索的缩写），它具有两个关键组成部分：手动生成模态混洗（MS）样本和基于视觉相关性的动态边缘（DM）。它们可以鼓励视频编码器平衡关注每种模态。通过对现实世界数据集的广泛实验，我们凭经验证明我们的方法在解决模态偏差问题方面既有效又高效。我们还在大型视频平台中部署了 MBVR，并在 A/B 测试和手动 GSB 评估中观察到相对于高度优化的基线有统计上的显着提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MBVR的视频检索方法，通过解决多模态不平衡问题来提升视频与文本查询的匹配效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视频检索模型在训练中过度依赖文本匹配，忽视了视频的视觉和音频等其他模态信息，导致模态偏差问题。
AI.method: 设计了两种核心组件：人工生成的模态打乱样本（MS）和基于视觉相关性的动态边距（DM），引导视频编码器均衡关注各模态信息。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上实验验证了方法的有效性和效率，并在大型视频平台部署后通过A/B测试和人工评估显著优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: MBVR通过缓解模态偏差问题，有效提升了视频检索系统的多模态信息利用能力与检索性能。

authors_text: Haoying Li,Ziran Zhang,Tingting Jiang,Peng Luo,Huajun Feng,Zhihai Xu
title: Real-World Deep Local Motion Deblurring
title_zh: 真实世界深度局部运动去模糊
abstract: Most existing deblurring methods focus on removing global blur caused by camera shake, while they cannot well handle local blur caused by object movements. To fill the vacancy of local deblurring in real scenes, we establish the first real local motion blur dataset (ReLoBlur), which is captured by a synchronized beam-splitting photographing system and corrected by a post-progressing pipeline. Based on ReLoBlur, we propose a Local Blur-Aware Gated network (LBAG) and several local blur-aware techniques to bridge the gap between global and local deblurring: 1) a blur detection approach based on background subtraction to localize blurred regions; 2) a gate mechanism to guide our network to focus on blurred regions; and 3) a blur-aware patch cropping strategy to address data imbalance problem. Extensive experiments prove the reliability of ReLoBlur dataset, and demonstrate that LBAG achieves better performance than state-of-the-art global deblurring methods without our proposed local blur-aware techniques.
summary: Most existing deblurring methods focus on removing global blur caused by camera shake, while they cannot well handle local blur caused by object movements. To fill the vacancy of local deblurring in real scenes, we establish the first real local motion blur dataset (ReLoBlur), which is captured by a synchronized beam-splitting photographing system and corrected by a post-progressing pipeline. Based on ReLoBlur, we propose a Local Blur-Aware Gated network (LBAG) and several local blur-aware techniques to bridge the gap between global and local deblurring: 1) a blur detection approach based on background subtraction to localize blurred regions; 2) a gate mechanism to guide our network to focus on blurred regions; and 3) a blur-aware patch cropping strategy to address data imbalance problem. Extensive experiments prove the reliability of ReLoBlur dataset, and demonstrate that LBAG achieves better performance than state-of-the-art global deblurring methods without our proposed local blur-aware techniques.
abstract_zh: 现有的去模糊方法大多侧重于消除相机抖动引起的全局模糊，而不能很好地处理物体运动引起的局部模糊。为了填补真实场景中局部去模糊的空缺，我们建立了第一个真实的局部运动模糊数据集（ReLoBlur），该数据集由同步分束摄影系统捕获并通过后期处理管道进行校正。基于ReLoBlur，我们提出了一种局部模糊感知门控网络（LBAG）和几种局部模糊感知技术来弥合全局去模糊和局部去模糊之间的差距：1）基于背景减法的模糊检测方法来定位模糊区域； 2）引导我们的网络关注模糊区域的门控机制； 3）模糊感知的补丁裁剪策略来解决数据不平衡问题。大量实验证明了 ReLoBlur 数据集的可靠性，并证明 LBAG 在没有我们提出的局部模糊感知技术的情况下比最先进的全局去模糊方法实现了更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对真实场景中局部运动模糊的深度学习方法，并构建了首个真实局部运动模糊数据集ReLoBlur。
AI.motivation: 现有去模糊方法主要处理由相机抖动引起的全局模糊，难以有效处理由物体运动引起的局部模糊，存在技术空白。
AI.method: 构建同步分束拍摄系统获取的真实局部模糊数据集ReLoBlur，并提出局部模糊感知门控网络(LBAG)，包含背景差分模糊检测、注意力门机制和模糊感知块裁剪策略。
AI.result: 实验验证了ReLoBlur数据集的可靠性，LBAG在无局部模糊处理技术时仍优于现有全局去模糊方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效弥补了局部运动模糊处理的技术缺陷，为真实场景模糊修复提供了新思路。

authors_text: Menglin Yang,Min Zhou,Jiahong Liu,Defu Lian,Irwin King
title: HRCF: Enhancing Collaborative Filtering via Hyperbolic Geometric Regularization
title_zh: HRCF：通过双曲几何正则化增强协同过滤
comment: Proceedings of the ACM Web Conference 2022 (WWW '22); fixed some typos
comments: Proceedings of the ACM Web Conference 2022 (WWW '22); fixed some typos
abstract: In large-scale recommender systems, the user-item networks are generally scale-free or expand exponentially. The latent features (also known as embeddings) used to describe the user and item are determined by how well the embedding space fits the data distribution. Hyperbolic space offers a spacious room to learn embeddings with its negative curvature and metric properties, which can well fit data with tree-like structures. Recently, several hyperbolic approaches have been proposed to learn high-quality representations for the users and items. However, most of them concentrate on developing the hyperbolic similitude by designing appropriate projection operations, whereas many advantageous and exciting geometric properties of hyperbolic space have not been explicitly explored. For example, one of the most notable properties of hyperbolic space is that its capacity space increases exponentially with the radius, which indicates the area far away from the hyperbolic origin is much more embeddable. Regarding the geometric properties of hyperbolic space, we bring up a Hyperbolic Regularization powered Collaborative Filtering(HRCF) and design a geometric-aware hyperbolic regularizer. Specifically, the proposal boosts optimization procedure via the root alignment and origin-aware penalty, which is simple yet impressively effective. Through theoretical analysis, we further show that our proposal is able to tackle the over-smoothing problem caused by hyperbolic aggregation and also brings the models a better discriminative ability. We conduct extensive empirical analysis, comparing our proposal against a large set of baselines on several public benchmarks. The empirical results show that our approach achieves highly competitive performance and surpasses both the leading Euclidean and hyperbolic baselines by considerable margins.
summary: In large-scale recommender systems, the user-item networks are generally scale-free or expand exponentially. The latent features (also known as embeddings) used to describe the user and item are determined by how well the embedding space fits the data distribution. Hyperbolic space offers a spacious room to learn embeddings with its negative curvature and metric properties, which can well fit data with tree-like structures. Recently, several hyperbolic approaches have been proposed to learn high-quality representations for the users and items. However, most of them concentrate on developing the hyperbolic similitude by designing appropriate projection operations, whereas many advantageous and exciting geometric properties of hyperbolic space have not been explicitly explored. For example, one of the most notable properties of hyperbolic space is that its capacity space increases exponentially with the radius, which indicates the area far away from the hyperbolic origin is much more embeddable. Regarding the geometric properties of hyperbolic space, we bring up a Hyperbolic Regularization powered Collaborative Filtering(HRCF) and design a geometric-aware hyperbolic regularizer. Specifically, the proposal boosts optimization procedure via the root alignment and origin-aware penalty, which is simple yet impressively effective. Through theoretical analysis, we further show that our proposal is able to tackle the over-smoothing problem caused by hyperbolic aggregation and also brings the models a better discriminative ability. We conduct extensive empirical analysis, comparing our proposal against a large set of baselines on several public benchmarks. The empirical results show that our approach achieves highly competitive performance and surpasses both the leading Euclidean and hyperbolic baselines by considerable margins.
abstract_zh: 在大规模推荐系统中，用户-项目网络通常是无标度的或呈指数级扩展。用于描述用户和项目的潜在特征（也称为嵌入）由嵌入空间与数据分布的拟合程度决定。双曲空间以其负曲率和度量特性为学习嵌入提供了宽敞的空间，可以很好地将数据与树状结构拟合。最近，已经提出了几种双曲线方法来学习用户和项目的高质量表示。然而，他们中的大多数集中于通过设计适当的投影操作来开发双曲相似性，而双曲空间的许多有利且令人兴奋的几何性质尚未得到明确探索。例如，双曲空间最显着的属性之一是其容量空间随着半径呈指数增长，这表明远离双曲原点的区域更容易嵌入。关于双曲空间的几何性质，我们提出了双曲正则化驱动的协同过滤（HRCF）并设计了几何感知的双曲正则化器。具体来说，该提案通过根对齐和起源感知惩罚来促进优化过程，这很简单但非常有效。通过理论分析，我们进一步表明我们的建议能够解决双曲聚合引起的过度平滑问题，并为模型带来更好的判别能力。我们进行了广泛的实证分析，将我们的建议与多个公共基准的大量基线进行比较。实证结果表明，我们的方法实现了极具竞争力的性能，并大大超过了领先的欧几里得基线和双曲线基线。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于双曲几何正则化的协同过滤方法（HRCF），以提升大规模推荐系统中用户-物品网络的嵌入表示学习效果。
AI.motivation: 传统欧几里得空间难以有效建模用户-物品网络的指数级扩展特性，而现有双曲空间方法未充分挖掘其几何特性（如空间容量随半径指数增长），导致表示能力受限。
AI.method: 设计几何感知的双曲正则化器，通过根对齐与原点感知惩罚机制，结合双曲空间的指数扩展特性优化嵌入学习，理论分析证明其能缓解双曲聚合导致的过平滑问题并增强模型判别能力。
AI.result: 在多个公开基准数据集上，HRCF方法显著优于主流欧几里得和双曲基线模型，取得具有竞争力的推荐性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式利用双曲空间的几何特性，HRCF方法为推荐系统中的嵌入学习提供了更有效的优化框架，验证了双曲几何在处理树状结构数据中的优势。

search_text: HRCF: Enhancing Collaborative Filtering via Hyperbolic Geometric Regularization HRCF：通过双曲几何正则化增强协同过滤 In large-scale recommender systems, the user-item networks are generally scale-free or expand exponentially. The latent features (also known as embeddings) used to describe the user and item are determined by how well the embedding space fits the data distribution. Hyperbolic space offers a spacious room to learn embeddings with its negative curvature and metric properties, which can well fit data with tree-like structures. Recently, several hyperbolic approaches have been proposed to learn high-quality representations for the users and items. However, most of them concentrate on developing the hyperbolic similitude by designing appropriate projection operations, whereas many advantageous and exciting geometric properties of hyperbolic space have not been explicitly explored. For example, one of the most notable properties of hyperbolic space is that its capacity space increases exponentially with the radius, which indicates the area far away from the hyperbolic origin is much more embeddable. Regarding the geometric properties of hyperbolic space, we bring up a Hyperbolic Regularization powered Collaborative Filtering(HRCF) and design a geometric-aware hyperbolic regularizer. Specifically, the proposal boosts optimization procedure via the root alignment and origin-aware penalty, which is simple yet impressively effective. Through theoretical analysis, we further show that our proposal is able to tackle the over-smoothing problem caused by hyperbolic aggregation and also brings the models a better discriminative ability. We conduct extensive empirical analysis, comparing our proposal against a large set of baselines on several public benchmarks. authors_text: Debjoy Saha,Bishal Santra,Pawan Goyal
title: A Study on Prompt-based Few-Shot Learning Methods for Belief State Tracking in Task-oriented Dialog Systems
title_zh: 面向任务的对话系统中基于提示的小样本信念状态跟踪学习方法的研究
abstract: We tackle the Dialogue Belief State Tracking(DST) problem of task-oriented conversational systems. Recent approaches to this problem leveraging Transformer-based models have yielded great results. However, training these models is expensive, both in terms of computational resources and time. Additionally, collecting high quality annotated dialogue datasets remains a challenge for researchers because of the extensive annotation required for training these models. Driven by the recent success of pre-trained language models and prompt-based learning, we explore prompt-based few-shot learning for Dialogue Belief State Tracking. We formulate the DST problem as a 2-stage prompt-based language modelling task and train language models for both tasks and present a comprehensive empirical analysis of their separate and joint performance. We demonstrate the potential of prompt-based methods in few-shot learning for DST and provide directions for future improvement.
summary: We tackle the Dialogue Belief State Tracking(DST) problem of task-oriented conversational systems. Recent approaches to this problem leveraging Transformer-based models have yielded great results. However, training these models is expensive, both in terms of computational resources and time. Additionally, collecting high quality annotated dialogue datasets remains a challenge for researchers because of the extensive annotation required for training these models. Driven by the recent success of pre-trained language models and prompt-based learning, we explore prompt-based few-shot learning for Dialogue Belief State Tracking. We formulate the DST problem as a 2-stage prompt-based language modelling task and train language models for both tasks and present a comprehensive empirical analysis of their separate and joint performance. We demonstrate the potential of prompt-based methods in few-shot learning for DST and provide directions for future improvement.
abstract_zh: 我们解决面向任务的对话系统的对话信念状态跟踪（DST）问题。最近利用基于 Transformer 的模型解决这个问题的方法已经取得了很好的成果。然而，训练这些模型在计算资源和时间方面都是昂贵的。此外，收集高质量带注释的对话数据集仍然是研究人员面临的挑战，因为训练这些模型需要大量注释。在预训练语言模型和基于提示的学习最近取得成功的推动下，我们探索了用于对话信念状态跟踪的基于提示的小样本学习。我们将 DST 问题制定为基于两阶段提示的语言建模任务，并为这两个任务训练语言模型，并对它们的单独和联合性能进行全面的实证分析。我们展示了基于提示的方法在 DST 的小样本学习中的潜力，并为未来的改进提供了方向。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于提示的少样本学习方法在任务导向对话系统的信念状态跟踪中的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer模型训练成本高且需大量标注数据，而预训练语言模型与提示学习在少样本场景下表现优异。
AI.method: 将DST问题建模为两阶段提示语言任务，分别训练并分析模型在独立与联合设置下的性能。
AI.result: 验证了提示方法在少样本学习中的有效性，并提出了未来改进方向。
AI.conclusion: 提示学习可降低DST对标注数据的依赖，为少样本场景提供新思路，但需进一步优化模型性能。

ai_content.motivation: 传统Transformer模型训练成本高且需大量标注数据，而预训练语言模型与提示学习在少样本场景下表现优异。

ai_content.conclusion: 提示学习可降低DST对标注数据的依赖，为少样本场景提供新思路，但需进一步优化模型性能。

authors_text: Shuojia Zou,Chen Li,Hongzan Sun,Peng Xu,Jiawei Zhang,Pingli Ma,Yudong Yao,Xinyu Huang,Marcin Grzegorzek
title: TOD-CNN: An Effective Convolutional Neural Network for Tiny Object Detection in Sperm Videos
title_zh: TOD-CNN：一种用于精子视频中微小物体检测的有效卷积神经网络
abstract: The detection of tiny objects in microscopic videos is a problematic point, especially in large-scale experiments. For tiny objects (such as sperms) in microscopic videos, current detection methods face challenges in fuzzy, irregular, and precise positioning of objects. In contrast, we present a convolutional neural network for tiny object detection (TOD-CNN) with an underlying data set of high-quality sperm microscopic videos (111 videos, $>$ 278,000 annotated objects), and a graphical user interface (GUI) is designed to employ and test the proposed model effectively. TOD-CNN is highly accurate, achieving $85.60\%$ AP$_{50}$ in the task of real-time sperm detection in microscopic videos. To demonstrate the importance of sperm detection technology in sperm quality analysis, we carry out relevant sperm quality evaluation metrics and compare them with the diagnosis results from medical doctors.
summary: The detection of tiny objects in microscopic videos is a problematic point, especially in large-scale experiments. For tiny objects (such as sperms) in microscopic videos, current detection methods face challenges in fuzzy, irregular, and precise positioning of objects. In contrast, we present a convolutional neural network for tiny object detection (TOD-CNN) with an underlying data set of high-quality sperm microscopic videos (111 videos, $>$ 278,000 annotated objects), and a graphical user interface (GUI) is designed to employ and test the proposed model effectively. TOD-CNN is highly accurate, achieving $85.60\%$ AP$_{50}$ in the task of real-time sperm detection in microscopic videos. To demonstrate the importance of sperm detection technology in sperm quality analysis, we carry out relevant sperm quality evaluation metrics and compare them with the diagnosis results from medical doctors.
abstract_zh: 显微视频中微小物体的检测是一个问题点，尤其是在大规模实验中。对于显微视频中的微小物体（如精子），当前的检测方法面临着物体模糊、不规则和精确定位的挑战。相比之下，我们提出了一种用于微小物体检测的卷积神经网络（TOD-CNN），其基础数据集为高质量精子显微视频（111 个视频，$>$278,000 个带注释的物体），并且图形用户界面（GUI）旨在有效地使用和测试所提出的模型。 TOD-CNN 非常准确，在显微视频中的实时精子检测任务中取得了 $85.60\%$ AP$_{50}$ 的成绩。为了论证精子检测技术在精子质量分析中的重要性，我们进行了相关的精子质量评估指标，并将其与医生的诊断结果进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TOD-CNN的卷积神经网络，用于显微镜下精子视频中的微小物体检测，并构建了高质量数据集和图形界面工具。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在显微镜视频中检测微小物体（如精子）时面临模糊性、不规则性和定位精度不足的挑战，亟需高效解决方案以支持精子质量分析。
AI.method: 设计TOD-CNN网络架构，结合包含111个视频（超278,000个标注对象）的高质量精子显微视频数据集，并开发图形用户界面（GUI）进行模型验证。
AI.result: 在实时精子检测任务中达到85.60%的AP₅₀精度，通过与医生诊断结果对比验证了精子质量评估指标的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TOD-CNN为微小物体检测提供了高精度方法，其配套工具可有效辅助精子质量分析，具有医学应用潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TOD-CNN的卷积神经网络，用于显微镜下精子视频中的微小物体检测，并构建了高质量数据集和图形界面工具。

search_text: TOD-CNN: An Effective Convolutional Neural Network for Tiny Object Detection in Sperm Videos TOD-CNN：一种用于精子视频中微小物体检测的有效卷积神经网络 The detection of tiny objects in microscopic videos is a problematic point, especially in large-scale experiments. For tiny objects (such as sperms) in microscopic videos, current detection methods face challenges in fuzzy, irregular, and precise positioning of objects. In contrast, we present a convolutional neural network for tiny object detection (TOD-CNN) with an underlying data set of high-quality sperm microscopic videos (111 videos, $>$ 278,000 annotated objects), and a graphical user interface (GUI) is designed to employ and test the proposed model effectively. TOD-CNN is highly accurate, achieving $85.60\%$ AP$_{50}$ in the task of real-time sperm detection in microscopic videos. To demonstrate the importance of sperm detection technology in sperm quality analysis, we carry out relevant sperm quality evaluation metrics and compare them with the diagnosis results from medical doctors. 显微视频中微小物体的检测是一个问题点，尤其是在大规模实验中。对于显微视频中的微小物体（如精子），当前的检测方法面临着物体模糊、不规则和精确定位的挑战。相比之下，我们提出了一种用于微小物体检测的卷积神经网络（TOD-CNN），其基础数据集为高质量精子显微视频（111 个视频，$>$278,000 个带注释的物体），并且图形用户界面（GUI）旨在有效地使用和测试所提出的模型。 TOD-CNN 非常准确，在显微视频中的实时精子检测任务中取得了 $85.60\%$ AP$_{50}$ 的成绩。为了论证精子检测技术在精子质量分析中的重要性，我们进行了相关的精子质量评估指标，并将其与医生的诊断结果进行比较。 本文提出一种名为TOD-CNN的卷积神经网络，用于显微镜下精子视频中的微小物体检测，并构建了高质量数据集和图形界面工具。 Shuojia Zou,Chen Li,Hongzan Sun,Peng Xu,Jiawei Zhang,Pingli Ma,Yudong Yao,Xinyu Huang,Marcin Grzegorzek cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Chenyu Yang,Yu Wang
title: Robust End-to-end Speaker Diarization with Generic Neural Clustering
title_zh: 具有通用神经聚类的鲁棒端到端说话人二值化
abstract: End-to-end speaker diarization approaches have shown exceptional performance over the traditional modular approaches. To further improve the performance of the end-to-end speaker diarization for real speech recordings, recently works have been proposed which integrate unsupervised clustering algorithms with the end-to-end neural diarization models. However, these methods have a number of drawbacks: 1) The unsupervised clustering algorithms cannot leverage the supervision from the available datasets; 2) The K-means-based unsupervised algorithms that are explored often suffer from the constraint violation problem; 3) There is unavoidable mismatch between the supervised training and the unsupervised inference. In this paper, a robust generic neural clustering approach is proposed that can be integrated with any chunk-level predictor to accomplish a fully supervised end-to-end speaker diarization model. Also, by leveraging the sequence modelling ability of a recurrent neural network, the proposed neural clustering approach can dynamically estimate the number of speakers during inference. Experimental show that when integrating an attractor-based chunk-level predictor, the proposed neural clustering approach can yield better Diarization Error Rate (DER) than the constrained K-means-based clustering approaches under the mismatched conditions.
summary: End-to-end speaker diarization approaches have shown exceptional performance over the traditional modular approaches. To further improve the performance of the end-to-end speaker diarization for real speech recordings, recently works have been proposed which integrate unsupervised clustering algorithms with the end-to-end neural diarization models. However, these methods have a number of drawbacks: 1) The unsupervised clustering algorithms cannot leverage the supervision from the available datasets; 2) The K-means-based unsupervised algorithms that are explored often suffer from the constraint violation problem; 3) There is unavoidable mismatch between the supervised training and the unsupervised inference. In this paper, a robust generic neural clustering approach is proposed that can be integrated with any chunk-level predictor to accomplish a fully supervised end-to-end speaker diarization model. Also, by leveraging the sequence modelling ability of a recurrent neural network, the proposed neural clustering approach can dynamically estimate the number of speakers during inference. Experimental show that when integrating an attractor-based chunk-level predictor, the proposed neural clustering approach can yield better Diarization Error Rate (DER) than the constrained K-means-based clustering approaches under the mismatched conditions.
abstract_zh: 与传统的模块化方法相比，端到端扬声器分类方法表现出了卓越的性能。为了进一步提高真实语音记录的端到端说话人二值化的性能，最近提出了将无监督聚类算法与端到端神经二值化模型相结合的工作。然而，这些方法有许多缺点：1）无监督聚类算法无法利用可用数据集的监督； 2）所探索的基于K均值的无监督算法经常遇到约束违反问题； 3）监督训练和无监督推理之间不可避免地存在不匹配。在本文中，提出了一种鲁棒的通用神经聚类方法，该方法可以与任何块级预测器集成，以完成完全监督的端到端说话人二值化模型。此外，通过利用循环神经网络的序列建模能力，所提出的神经聚类方法可以在推理过程中动态估计说话者的数量。实验表明，当集成基于吸引子的块级预测器时，所提出的神经聚类方法在不匹配条件下可以比基于约束 K 均值的聚类方法产生更好的二值化错误率（DER）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种鲁棒的端到端说话人分割方法，通过通用神经聚类技术解决现有方法的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端说话人分割方法在真实语音场景中存在聚类算法无法利用监督信息、K-means约束违反及训练推理不匹配等问题。
AI.method: 设计可集成任意块级预测器的通用神经聚类框架，结合循环神经网络的序列建模能力动态估计说话人数量。
AI.result: 实验表明，在失配条件下结合吸引子块级预测器时，该方法的说话人分割错误率优于传统K-means聚类方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入全监督神经聚类和动态说话人估计，有效提升了端到端说话人分割的鲁棒性与准确性。

authors_text: Hanjing Ye,Guangcheng Chen,Weinan Chen,Li He,Yisheng Guan,Hong Zhang
title: Mapping While Following: 2D LiDAR SLAM in Indoor Dynamic Environments with a Person Tracker
title_zh: 跟踪时绘制地图：使用人员跟踪器在室内动态环境中进行 2D LiDAR SLAM
comment: Presented at 2021 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Biomimetics (ROBIO)
comments: Presented at 2021 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Biomimetics (ROBIO)
abstract: 2D LiDAR SLAM (Simultaneous Localization and Mapping) is widely used in indoor environments due to its stability and flexibility. However, its mapping procedure is usually operated by a joystick in static environments, while indoor environments often are dynamic with moving objects such as people. The generated map with noisy points due to the dynamic objects is usually incomplete and distorted. To address this problem, we propose a framework of 2D-LiDAR-based SLAM without manual control that effectively excludes dynamic objects (people) and simplify the process for a robot to map an environment. The framework, which includes three parts: people tracking, filtering and following. We verify our proposed framework in experiments with two classic 2D-LiDAR-based SLAM algorithms in indoor environments. The results show that this framework is effective in handling dynamic objects and reducing the mapping error.
summary: 2D LiDAR SLAM (Simultaneous Localization and Mapping) is widely used in indoor environments due to its stability and flexibility. However, its mapping procedure is usually operated by a joystick in static environments, while indoor environments often are dynamic with moving objects such as people. The generated map with noisy points due to the dynamic objects is usually incomplete and distorted. To address this problem, we propose a framework of 2D-LiDAR-based SLAM without manual control that effectively excludes dynamic objects (people) and simplify the process for a robot to map an environment. The framework, which includes three parts: people tracking, filtering and following. We verify our proposed framework in experiments with two classic 2D-LiDAR-based SLAM algorithms in indoor environments. The results show that this framework is effective in handling dynamic objects and reducing the mapping error.
abstract_zh: 2D LiDAR SLAM（同步定位与建图）因其稳定性和灵活性而广泛应用于室内环境。然而，其映射过程通常在静态环境中通过操纵杆操作，而室内环境通常是动态的，存在诸如人等移动物体。由于动态对象而生成的带有噪声点的地图通常是不完整且扭曲的。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于 2D-LiDAR 的 SLAM 框架，无需手动控制，可以有效排除动态物体（人）并简化机器人绘制环境地图的过程。该框架包括三个部分：人员跟踪、过滤和关注。我们在室内环境中使用两种经典的基于 2D-LiDAR 的 SLAM 算法进行实验验证了我们提出的框架。结果表明，该框架能够有效处理动态对象并减少映射错误。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需人工控制的2D LiDAR SLAM框架，在室内动态环境中通过人物追踪技术排除移动的人体，实现更准确的环境地图构建。
AI.motivation: 传统2D LiDAR SLAM依赖人工操作且无法有效处理动态障碍物（如移动的人），导致生成的地图存在噪声、不完整或失真问题。
AI.method: 设计包含人物追踪、动态点过滤和路径跟随的三阶段框架，结合两种经典SLAM算法进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架能有效排除动态物体干扰，显著降低映射误差，提升室内动态环境下的建图质量。
AI.conclusion: 通过集成人物追踪与SLAM技术，提出的框架为动态室内环境下的自动化建图提供了可行解决方案。
